C: 从阿兰警觉的眼神中你隐约察觉到，密钥不仅可以用来解锁权限，也是你们身份的证明。\n赶快使用它吧。
E: You can sense from Arlan's cautious gaze that the encryption key is not only used for unlocking authorization but also proof of your identity.\nHurry up and use it.

C: 阿兰似乎担心自己会拖累你们，但你们在说服他这点上已经产生了一种微妙的默契，难道这就是同伴么？\n和同伴一起，抓紧时间去往最上层吧。
E: Arlan seems to worry that he would be a hindrance, but you as a group already developed a sort of delicate rapport in how to persuade him. Could this be what it means to be companions?\nHurry and reach the top floor with your companions.

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。\n离开月台已经越来越近了，加快脚步吧。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.\nYou're getting closer to the railway platform, hurry.

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.

C: 你们发现一个瑟瑟发抖的男人把自己埋在雪堆里。如果他不是想在这冰天雪地里美美睡一觉，那他大概是在躲避着什么东西…但至少这个满脸堆笑的男人不是在躲着你们。\n在了解过各位的状况后，他主动提出要带领你们前往星球表面唯一的人类聚居地——「贝洛伯格」。想必你们会在那里找到星核的线索。
E: You discover a shivering man who buried himself in the snow drift. If he wasn't looking to take a good nap in the blistering cold then this smiling man is probably trying to hide from something... something other than the few of you.\nAfter knowing more about each of you, he offers to bring you to Belobog — the only human settlement on the surface of this planet. You will most definitely find clues regarding the Stellaron there.

C: 那位戍卫官的言语犹在耳畔：坚定的「筑城者」们建立了这永屹之城；贝洛伯格虽受风雪侵凌，却永远温暖…\n他引用典籍的奇怪语调已经深深烙进了你的脑海…但愿这不会影响你享受高档酒店的床榻。\n话说回来，距离夜幕降临还有段时间，你不妨在这古老的城市中随意游览一番。
E: The Captain's words linger: The steadfast Architects built this Towering Citadel. Belobog remains forever warm in the face of unrelenting cold...\nHis tone was strange, as if he was quoting a historical record, and made a deep impression on you... Hopefully, this doesn't ruin your enjoyment of the fancy hotel's fluffy mattress.\nThere's still some time before nightfall. Why don't you take a tour around the ancient city in the meantime?

C: 深入矿区的路途中，你可以听到惊叫哭喊始终此起彼伏、不绝于耳——看来此处事态已至危殆，你必须对沿途逃难的矿民伸出援手。\n前进途中，你们听到从矿道深处传来的争吵之声，或许是当地的矿民遇上了麻烦…\n小心应战，保证矿民们的安全！
E: On the way deeper into the mines, you can hear the constant screams in the distance. It is obvious that things have gotten pretty serious, you must help the fleeing miners along the way.\nYou hear people arguing from deeper inside the mines. Maybe the local miners have run into trouble...\nBe careful and guarantee the safety of the miners!

C: 你终于享受了一次优质睡眠——因为你根本不记得夜里有没有做噩梦了。\n你不妨在离开之前再多看看这个简朴却温馨的小房间…毕竟，很难说在这次离开后又要过多久才能够再回来。\n若是看够了，就出发与伙伴们会合吧。
E: Finally, a good night's sleep. Or not — because you can't remember if you had a nightmare during the night.\nWouldn't hurt to stay a while longer to appreciate this simple yet cozy little room of yours... After all, there's no way to tell when you will be able to come back.\nGo meet the group when you are ready.

C: 旋转栈桥坐落在禁区中心。远望栈桥那端，是被希露瓦描绘为「地狱」的光景…而你们正是为此而来。\n但在那之前，你们必须操作栈桥控制终端，使此岸与彼岸相连。\n很不幸，你们找到的第一台终端机似乎已经下线了。在禁区里找找其他终端机吧！
E: The gear bridge is located in the center of the restricted zone. On the other side of the gear bridge is what Serval described as "hell"... And that is exactly where you need to go.\nBut before that, you must use the gear bridge terminal to connect the two sides.\nUnfortunately, the first terminal you found seems to be offline. Try finding another terminal in the restricted zone!

C: 抵达「迴星港」，你们展开搜索行动。猎物总会不自觉留下痕迹，而分辨痕迹是否属于猎物，则是考验猎人技巧的时候了。
E: Having arrived at the "Stargazer Navalia," you begin searching for Kafka and the hunt is on. Prey always leaves behind traces of its presence unwittingly, and now is the time to hone your hunting skills and determine whether the traces you find belong to the prey or not.

C: 在同卡芙卡缠斗时，太卜司之首符玄出现，奉景元的命令将犯人带往太卜司。\n在筹备审问事宜前，你们被暂时留在了「长乐天」，静候太卜司引路人的消息。
E: Fu Xuan, head of the Divination Commission, appears while you were engaged in combat with Kafka. She then takes Kafka back to the Divination Commission as per Jing Yuan's orders.\nYou are temporarily left in the Exalting Sanctum as Kafka's interrogation is being prepared and are told to wait for the guide from the Divination Commission.

C: 明明是外宾身份，却要如梁上君子般做抉门斩关的活计。但麻烦到来时，也顾不上体面了。\n太卜司中，留守卜者们人人自危。星核带来的变数已超越了太卜司所能计算的极限。现在，该是问问太卜如何处置的时候了。
E: Though you are guests, you are now breaking down locks and gates like a group of thieves. However, there is no point in being polite when trouble is at your door.\nThe remaining diviners in the Divination Commission are all worried for their own skins. The variables brought by the Stellaron had far surpassed the limits of the Commission's calculation capacities. Now is the time to ask the master diviner about her plans.

C: 另一边，联系上云骑的素裳将船停靠在了丹鼎司的行医市集，歧路多舛的三人终于靠岸。这儿曾是你熟悉故土的一角，旧日的回忆纷纷涌现，数不清的影子徘徊来去。不过，眼下朋友们音讯不明，你不打算继续在此停留。
E: On the other side of Luofu, Sushang parks the skiff at the Alchemy Commission's Healer's Market after making contact with the Cloud Knights. The three finally land after a tumultuous journey. This was once a part of your familiar home. Memories of the past swell up into your mind, and countless bygone shadows swivel before your eyes. However, your friends are currently missing. You have no plans to remain here.

C: 在星槎海，仪式即将开始。无论短生种还是长生种，如同所有星辰终会熄灭一般，告别的时刻来临了。\n仪式结束，景元邀请你们前往神策府一叙。
E: The soul-soothing ceremony is about to begin in Starskiff Haven. Like how every star will eventually dim and be snuffed out, it is time to bid farewell to the dead for both short-life and long-life species.\nJing Yuan invites you to have a chat at the Seat of Divine Foresight when the ceremony ends.

C: 尽管办理入住期间发生了些不愉快的小插曲，但匹诺康尼最英俊的男人「星期日」和闻名宇宙的歌者「知更鸟」及时赶来解围，令你们免于进一步冲突。\n知更鸟似乎有话对你们说，听听她想说什么吧。
E: Though there were a few complications that made the checking in process a pain, Sunday, the most handsome man in Penacony, and the universally-renowned singer Robin were able to resolve any misunderstandings in time and prevent a further escalation.\nRobin seems to have something to talk to you about. See what she has to say.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你们被困在这个可疑的房间里了，还遭遇了令人心生恐惧的迷因怪物…你们真的能打倒它吗？
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou are trapped in this suspicious room and encounter a terrifying memetic monster... Can you really defeat it?

C: 忆者同样表达了对砂金的不信任，但也说服了你以大局为重。你们决定去看看，他口中那个足以颠覆匹诺康尼的事实究竟是什么。
E: The Memokeeper similarly expresses mistrust of Aventurine, but convinces you that it is for the greater good. You decide to go and see what this truth that he speaks of is — the truth that could "overturn Penacony."

C: 果不其然，事情根本没那么简单——家族议事厅的大门怎会轻易向外人开放？但没关系，真理医生总会有办法，而他猜测破开大门的关键正藏在大厅中央的沙盘中。
E: As expected, things are far from straightforward. How can the outsiders gain access to The Family's council chamber that easily? But fret not, as Dr. Ratio always has the solution. He speculates that the key to unlocking the door is hidden in the sandpit in the center of the hall.

C:
你的未来永远都不存在
你█未来██ █远都不存█在
你█的未██ ██ █永远█不█存███在
你█的████ █ ██远█都█不存██在
你████ █来█ ██ █都███ █不存█ ███在
你███ █ ███来█永远█ ████在
█的█来永█远███都████存███████
E:
Your future never existed
You█ future never existed
You█ future ne█er existed
You█ fut███ ne█er existed
You█ fut███ ne█er ████ted
You█ fut███ █e█er ████ted
Yo██ ██████ █e█er ████ted

C: 你们即将面对本届苏乐达™盛会海选最后、也是最难的关卡——「巨星巅峰战」。能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有在擂台上笑到最后的那个人……\n那究竟是你？还是那位高大、坚实、热情似火、凭一己之力拿下演技挑战最高分的高贵男子？敬请拭目以待！
E: You are about to face the final and most challenging stage of the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions — "The Superstar Showdown"! Only they who laugh last in the ring will be able to become the next Penacony Festive Superstar...\nWill that person be you? Or will it be the towering, strong, passionate nobleman who easily secured the top score in the acting challenge? Stay tuned to find out!

C: 你们即将面对本届苏乐达™盛会海选最后、也是最难的关卡——「巨星巅峰战」。能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有在擂台上笑到最后的那个人……\n那究竟是你？还是那位高大、坚实、热情似火、凭一己之力拿下演技挑战最高分的高贵男子？敬请拭目以待！
E: You are about to face the final and most challenging stage of the SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions — "The Superstar Showdown"! Only they who laugh last in the ring will be able to become the next Penacony Festive Superstar...\nWill that person be you? Or will it be the towering, strong, passionate nobleman who easily secured the top score in the acting challenge? Stay tuned to find out!

C: 公司决定与家族携手共建匹诺康尼，全宇宙的学者们也将不遗余力地提供帮助…好一派皆大欢喜的热闹景象。至此，「梦想之地」匹诺康尼之旅也便告一段落。\n是时候踏上新的旅途了。
E: The IPC decides to develop Penacony alongside The Family, and scholars from all over the universe will assist in every way they can... It is a lively scene where all's well that ends well. With this, your journey to Penacony, the "Land of the Dreams" has come to an end.\nIt's time to embark on a new adventure.

C: 你终于找到了线索——一群把猴子当祖宗供起来的小可爱。这年头，什么东西都能当祖宗，这次是猴子，下次是香蕉，搞不好有一天你也会成为他们的祖宗。\n想办法进他们的地盘看看。想不到办法？你腰上别的可不是玩具。
E: You have finally discovered some clues: A bunch of lil' fudgeheads worshiping monkeys as their ancestors. Now, anything can be an ancestor... monkeys, bananas, heck, even you might end up in their family tree someday.\nFigure out a way to infiltrate their turf. Struggling? Don't sweat, the pistols in your pockets aren't no playthings.

C: 猴子居然敢在你的脑袋里瞎搞，你要让它们记住，这比在黑洞里找香蕉还接近自寻死路。\n上膛的枪，第一发子弹可以不打老大，但至少要等看到老大后再扣扳机。
E: Those fudgin' monkeys dare mess with your brain. Time to show them that messing with you is like heading for their doom, even more than hunting for bananas in a black hole.\nYour pistols are locked and loaded. The first shot doesn't have to nail their boss, but you might want to hold off until the big banana shows before you squeeze that trigger.

C: 告别真是一种奇妙的存在——无论经历多少，仍是无法熟稔。但也无需熟稔，正因离别的存在，人们才会渴盼步入重逢。\n向自己的妹妹告别，慢慢地，极为珍惜地…道别。
E: Farewells are truly a miraculous thing... No matter how much you've experienced it in your life, it's not something you ever get used to. But that is okay. Without farewells, we would never have reunions to look forward to.\nSay farewell to your little sister. Take your time... A long and valuable... farewell.

C: 告别真是一种奇妙的存在——无论经历多少，仍是无法熟稔。但也无需熟稔，正因离别的存在，人们才会渴盼步入重逢。\n向自己的妹妹告别，慢慢地，极为珍惜地…道别。
E: Farewells are truly a miraculous thing... No matter how much you've experienced it in your life, it's not something you ever get used to. But that is okay. Without farewells, we would never have reunions to look forward to.\nSay farewell to your little sister. Take your time... A long and valuable... farewell.

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 我与{NICKNAME}他们失散在这片幻境中。据{NICKNAME}所说，{F#她}{M#他}看到了万敌心中的恐惧：那是来自悬锋一族以血铺就的荣耀……
E: {NICKNAME} and I became separated in this illusion. {NICKNAME} told me that {F#she}{M#he} travelled with Mydei and had seen the man's deepest fear, which was the blood-soaked glory of the Kremnos...

C: 前进路上，自称卡吕普索的神秘人突然出现，她声称已救下那刻夏，并带领{NICKNAME}他们向「启蒙王座」前进。
E: During their advance, a mysterious woman identifying herself as Calypso appears suddenly, stating she saved Anaxa and offering guidance to {NICKNAME}'s group to the Luminary Throne.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 自冥河之中炼成的死龙残躯，它将载着遐蝶到达无人能够渡过的彼岸。\n在遐蝶临行前，与遐蝶再次交谈。
E: The remains of Netherwing forged by the River of Souls. It carries Castorice to a shore none could cross.\nBefore Castorice makes her move, speak with her again.

C: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n你的十五个门扉时终将结束，最后一场表演即将开幕。
E: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYour fifteen Entry Hours are done. The last performance is about to begin.

C: 感恩戴德吧，星穹列车。幸好黑塔大人对「翁法罗斯」很感兴趣，她打算亲自去到那里实地考察。\n黑塔大人您能多和第四面镜我说说话吗？
E: Be grateful, Astral Express. Fortunately, Madam Herta is quite interested in Amphoreus and plans to conduct an on-the-ground investigation there.\nMadam Herta, could you speak with me, the Fourth Mirror, a little more?

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C: 黑潮的造物连同那位盗火行者在此间步步紧逼，而刻法勒的火种却仍不见踪影。我们选择相信被托付火种的赛飞儿，向着云石天宫不断奔跑。
E: Black Tide Creatures, along with the Flame Reaver, are closing in step by step, yet Kephale's Coreflame remains nowhere to be found. We choose to trust Cipher, who was entrusted with the Coreflame, and keep running toward Marmoreal Palace.

C: 阿格莱雅的留言让白厄下定了决心，他号召众人，意图控制住混乱的局面，安抚民众。事实证明，他是一位优秀的演说家。
E: Aglaea's final words gave Phainon resolve. He gathered everyone, determined to bring order to the chaos and calm the people. And indeed, he proved to be a gifted speaker.

C:
你还记得他们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
昔日，恩师尚能为你指点迷津；还有那捷足的羁客，多洛斯的偷儿，她的家乡尚未因你落入火场。
是了，过去的已经过去，但神样的战士，你是否也曾垂泪，为那美酒似的年光？
难道你们不曾血肉相连，金血不曾浓于水么？
不！就让眼泪尽情流淌吧，别教那怒火蒸干了——
然后，记得痛饮：因为之于诸神，人子的泪水胜过凡间万千般蜜酿。
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Once, your teacher could still guide you through the dark. And that fleet-footed traveler, the thief of Dolos, her home was yet untouched by the fires you brought.
Yes, the past is gone. But you, godlike warrior, did you ever shed a tear for those years, sweet as wine?
Weren't you once bound by blood and flesh? Wasn't golden blood thicker than water?
No! Let your tears flow freely. Don't let rage burn them away —
Then, remember to drink deep: For, to the gods, the tears of mortals are sweeter than any honey brew on Earth.

C: 你看，「时辰」的精灵来了，她是来解放你的。但解放需要支付代价——\n关于你所离席的岁月，永远消失在时间的裂隙里，再也回不来了。\n但你要前进，用你创造的未来，偿还你欠下的债。
E: Look, the "Clockkeeper" is here with your temporal pardon. But this bail comes with interest.\nThe seconds, minutes, and years of your absence will be foreclosed upon, forever beyond withdrawal.\nThe only way out is forward, where each new moment you create becomes the currency to settle what you've borrowed from time's unforgiving bank.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C:
丹恒，你最信任的列车护卫，「开拓」之旅中最靠谱的伙伴。
他接受了「大地」的神权，只为与你，与黄金裔的伙伴们一起，并肩面对新世界，以及即将到来的决战——仅仅是知道他回到了翁法罗斯，就让你多了一份、不，一百份的安心感。

当他的神识深入无人可及的忆潮中时，他既是层岩，他也是海浪，他还是霜风…
他是大地，亦是其上的万物。
他为你而来，现在你们要为小三月而去。

烈阳已经指明了方向，继续前进吧。
E:
Dan Heng, your most trusted Express Guard, and the most reliable companion on your Trailblaze journey.
He accepted Earth's divine authority, solely to stand alongside you and the Chrysos Heir friends, facing the new world and the impending final clash together. Just knowing he's back in Amphoreus gives you not just one, but a hundred times more peace of mind.

When his consciousness delves into the memoria tide where no one else can reach, he is the bedrock, the waves, and the frosty gales...
He is the Earth and all that exists upon it.
He came for you, and now you will both go for March.

The blazing sun has shown the way. Press onward.

C: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
E: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

C: 从一页永恒返回战场吧。让记忆与爱成为我们的弓矢，平息那无首巨匠的劫火，为银河的未来做出截然不同的证明——宇宙的答案绝非「毁灭」，在沉重的终幕背后，会亮起希望的起始。
E: Return to the battlefield from An Eternal Page. Let remembrances and love be our bow and arrow to quell the headless giant's karmic flames and prove a different path for the Cosmos's future. The answer to the universe will never be the Destruction. Hope's beginning shall shine forth behind the heavy curtain of the final act.

C: 你看见一颗流星，如同最具创造力的笔尖，在回环的夜中刻下顿号。\n故事，在穹顶下收尾；未来，在星亮的远方。
E: A shooting star flashes by, like the most brilliant pen, carving staccatos into the endless loop of night.\nThe story ends beneath the dome. The future lies in the bright, distant stars.

C: 「军团」战役暂告息止，行进于茫茫星海中，来自「黑塔」的星声余音再度传来——在艾丝妲与全体科员的群策群力下，作为寰宇明珠的空间站，似乎正开展着名为「复兴计划」的行动，亟需有志之士加入。\n而阿兰认为，你是一等一的好选择。
E: The Legion's campaign has come to a temporary end. Traveling amongst the vast sea of stars, the star echo remnants from Herta Space Station are heard once again — with the combined strength of Asta and all the researchers, the peerless space station seems to be expanding and recruiting for an operation known as Project Revival.\nArlan believes that you are the most suitable candidate for this.

C: 温天翁讲述了与「猎彗人」何塞的恩仇过往，并交给你一张宝藏显影图。前往图中所示地点，那里沉睡着何塞的昔日家当。
E: Wen Tianweng describes his past with the Comet Hunter Hosea and hands you a developed treasure map. Head to the marked location in the image to find Hosea's hidden possessions.

C: 就在你打算将《剧本》与《告罪书》交还给希拉的关头，却发现古恩抢先一步接管希拉的治疗，封锁了医疗舱。
E: You decide to give the character script and the confession letter to Sheila, but Gunn seals off the Medical Cabin and is now in charge of Sheila's treatment.

C: 你赶往「瓜农」常去的地方等候许久，却从附近的科员处发现谣言已经传播开来了。\n尽管你没能等到「瓜农」现身，但你最终还是从其他科员处打探到了「瓜农」的下落。
E: You waited for the Gossipmonger at her usual spot for what seemed like a long time when you realized from the researchers around that the gossip has already spread.\nYou couldn't wait for the Gossipmonger to show up, although you did manage to get her whereabouts from other researchers.

C: 当前舱段里出现了裂界化的征兆，监测本区域的设备却在混乱中意外被毁。艾丝妲拜托你在此区域收集残存的信标数据。\n收集呜呜伯们存起来的信标数据。
E: The current zone shows signs of the Fragmentum, but the device that monitors this area was accidentally destroyed in the chaos. Asta had asked you to collect the remaining beacon data in the area.\nCollect the beacon data saved by the Wubbaboos.

C: 与艾丝妲进行远程通信，击败引发能量波动的怪物
E: Communicate with Asta remotely and defeat monsters causing the energy fluctuations

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 冥火流窜过程中形成了古怪的火墙，穿越火墙会造成空间坐标的偏移
E: The infernal fire made bizarre walls of flame as it ran away. Passing through these walls of flame will cause deviations in your three-dimensional coordinates.

C: 按照小机器人的导航，下一站是罗浮——金人巷。
E: According to the little robot's navigation route, the next stop is Aurum Alley on the Luofu.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n扑满好像在给我们带路。先跟着吧。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nThe Trotter seems to be leading the way for us. Follow it for now.

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了解开谜题的报酬——快去收下吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the rewards for solving the puzzle. Collect them now.

C: 娜塔莎告诉你诊所一直收到匿名的爱心包裹的隐秘。尽管娜塔莎并不知道背后的好心人是谁，但你和她还是决定把这位匿名人士的爱心，传递到更多有需要的人手里。
E: Natasha tells you that the clinic keeps receiving anonymous care packages. She doesn't know who is doing this, but you two decide to spread their love and care to those in need.

C: 两位女孩终于将暖炉修好。尽管贝洛伯格正处于漫长的极昼中，但晚饭的时间已经悄然来临——检查一下方才获得的种种食材，并想办法利用他们做出一顿美味的露营餐吧。
E: The girls finally fix the heater. Though Belobog is currently enveloped in the perpetual solar sunlight, it is still time for dinner. Check the food ingredients collected so far and find a way to make a delicious camping meal with them.

C: 谢天谢地，原来那簇来源不明的信号只是来自「星际和平家电」的推销广告。\n虽然这不免令你产生一种白跑一趟的感觉…但说到底，你至少确保了贝洛伯格将会平安无恙。\n将这个好消息汇报给列车组的各位前辈们吧。
E: Thank the stars — that unknown signal was only an ad from the Interastral Peace Appliance.\nYou can't help feeling like your trip was in vain... But at least you get to ensure Belobog remains safe and sound in the end.\nReport the good news to the Crew back on the Express.

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n试炼的第一个目标是…帮忙打杂。\n机械师卡西迪的两台机器伙伴，「小飞」和「大奔」离奇失窃了，你们需要帮他找回这些合法财产。
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "trial plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe first goal of the trial is to... help with chores.\nCassidy the mechanic's two robot friends, Little Fay and Big Ben, have both been incomprehensibly stolen. You lot need to help him regain his legal property.

C: 你结束了博物馆一个阶段的经营。\n你似乎又在展厅里看到了佩拉的影子，去和她打个招呼，看看展品失窃案有没有什么进展吧。
E: You finished one phase of the museum's operation.\nYou seem to see Pela again in the exhibit hall. Go and say hello to her, and see if there has been any progress regarding the artifact thefts.

C: 你还是决定让「黛青小姐」在网络上公开自己的谎言。至此，「美丽狐仙聊天」的真相已经昭然，将它汇报给艾丝妲，希望这些情报对温符瑞的外驻有一些参考作用吧。
E: You decide to let "Ms. Daiqing" expose his own facade online. At this point, the truth about the Foxian Beauty Chat has come to the surface, and it will be reported to Asta. Hopefully, this information will be of consideration for Wen Furui's transfer request.

C: 需要绕过十王司盘查进入流云渡里，而曾经确实有人向你推销过这样的手段……\n地衡司的勤务广大，他好像有些门道。
E: Bypass the Ten-Lords Commission's questioning and enter Cloudford, someone once told you of the method...\nThe orderly from the Realm-Keeping Commission, Guangda, seems to have a way.

C: 了解到铖杰师傅的困扰之后，你和青雀决心去帮助这位可怜的小徒弟取回他师傅的手稿。\n铖杰师傅不敢回到格物院的原因是，不想因为这点小事麻烦云骑军…你生气了吗，他不敢麻烦云骑军，却能随便麻烦你。
E: After understanding what plagues Chengjie, Qingque and you decide to help him out with recovering his master's manuscript.\nChengjie didn't want to go back to the Sapientia Academe because he didn't want to bother the Cloud Knights for something small like this... Do you feel angry at the way he didn't want to bother the Cloud Knights but is so nonchalant about bothering you?

C: 被拖入铜镜中，又自铜镜中脱出，真是一个善始善终的灵异故事啊。可惜，甫一离开幻境你们就察觉到，现实中的绥园已然堕入岁阳的掌控，而判官们正在竭力拖延即将到来的全面溃败。
E: Being dragged into a mirror and then spat out again makes a perfect beginning and end for a supernatural story. Unfortunately, as soon as you leave the illusory maze, you realize that the real Fyxestroll Garden has fallen under the control of the heliobi, and the Judges are doing their best to prolong the impending utter rout.

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n和孤云好好聊聊吧。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nHave a chat with Guyun.

C: 沦入狼爪，陈于刀俎之间，曜青医士椒丘正努力寻求拖延与分化步离人的良机……也许在这场狼与狐的周旋之间，他能找到救治其主的秘密，抑或逃出生天的机会？
E: Having fallen into the wolves' clutches and now at the mercy of their blades, the Yaoqing healer Jiaoqiu is trying his best to find an opportunity to stall for time and split up the borisin... Perhaps, in this battle between fox and wolf, Jiaoqiu will be able to find the secret to curing his superior or a way to escape his current predicament.

C: 乔凡娜模棱两可的说法令你迷惑，再回到商店再看看吧。
E: Giovanna's ambiguous statement has left you perplexed. Return to the store and take another look.

C: 螺丝咕姆与你一同展开了对查德威克真实经历的调查。\n螺丝咕姆似乎在空荡的房间内发现了什么，去和他谈谈。
E: Screwllum joins you in the investigation of Chadwick's past.\nScrewllum has found something in the empty room. Talk to him to learn more.

C: 「湛蓝爵士」出现在了前方，它可能想起来了些什么。
E: Dr. Blues has appeared ahead. It might have remembered something.

C: 你聘请了皮皮西人佩德罗为新任大副，替你打理飞艇。新上任的第一天，你想听听他对飞艇事务的看法。
E: You have hired Pedro, a Pepeshi, as the new first mate to manage your airship. On his first day reporting to duty, you want to hear his thoughts on airship affairs.

C: 佩德罗请你与他一起到长廊视察，似乎有些事项在等着你处理。
E: Pedro invites you to inspect the long gallery together. Some affairs seem to require your attention.

C: 为了彰显你的股东身份，你决定亲自担当白日梦酒店的门面——大堂经理。\n为了顺利上任，你需要和大堂经理丹尼斯谈谈，交接一下工作。
E: To demonstrate your new position as a shareholder, you have decided to take on the role of the lobby manager at the Reverie.\nTo get started, you need to talk with Dennis, the current lobby manager, to familiarize yourself with your duties.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n你救出了天谴猎手，以及她念叨的那位帕里斯——一个油腔滑调的年轻人。多亏翁法罗斯是个封闭的世界，他这说话方式拿到外面去，估计要在星际和平网络论坛里被笑话几百楼。
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nYou rescue the Furiae Archer and this "Paris" that she had mentioned so many times... A glib and cheesy young man. He's fortunate that Amphoreus is a closed-off world. If anyone outside of Amphoreus heard him speak like that, there's no doubt he'd be trolled brutally on the Interastral Peace Network.

C: 欧洛尼斯的眷属，为何会对帕西提亚纠缠不休？在散落的天外之音中，是否会有线索留存？
E: Why are Oronyx's kin so intent on bothering Pasithea? Perhaps there is a clue to be found in the scattered celestial echoes?

C: 赞美欧洛尼斯，愿您降下不可曲解，不可动摇的神谕，向我等揭示命运。
E: Praise Oronyx. May your revelations be absolute and your prophecies unshakeable. Please reveal our destiny to us.

C: 这座花园，就是如我所书的最后一页…
E: This garden is the final page of As I've Written...

C: 对于小机器人的故障情况，维修工程师有些新想法。他拜托你去重启故障的小机器人，然后回来验证下他的猜想是否正确吧。
E: The maintenance engineer has a new idea about the meal-delivery robot malfunction. He asks you to reboot the malfunctioning robot to verify if his guess is accurate.

C: 贝洛伯格的动物学专家莉拉似乎正在寻求别人的帮助，去找她聊聊看吧。
E: Belobog's expert zoologist Lila seems to be looking for someone to help her. Go talk with her and see.

C: 为了尤利安筹划的「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，你得尽快把手里这箱物资送到机械聚落的菲多拉手里。
E: To help Julian with his Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, you must quickly deliver this box of supplies to Fidora at the Robot Settlement.

C: 完成「拟造花萼（金） • 回忆之蕾」获取奖励
E: Complete Calyx (Golden): Bud of Memories and claim the rewards.

C: 你凭借着自己的智慧给出了最优解。\n去「棋鬼」旁边领取宝箱奖励吧。
E: You provided the optimal solution with your superior intellect.\nClaim your treasure chest reward next to the Chess Ghost.

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 带着从朋友那里打听到的知识，回去向帕姆复命吧！
E: Return and report to Pom-Pom with your newfound knowledge gathered from your friends!

C: 机巧鸟似乎探测到流云渡货道附近存在一个未知来源的信号…去那里找找看吧，也许会有意外收获。
E: The cycrane seems to have detected an unknown signal near the Cloudford: Cargo Lane... Go have a look and you might just find some surprise there.

C: 机巧鸟似乎探测到大衍穷观阵附近存在一个未知来源的信号…去那里找找看吧，也许会有意外收获。
E: The cycrane seems to have detected an unknown signal near the Matrix of Prescience Ultima... Go have a look and you might just find some surprise there.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 「吟风爵」维吉妮娅将难以启齿的情事，都藏在这封信笺之中。在宴会中找到「曳石爵」阿波罗尼，替羞涩的少女传达心意吧！
E: The love that "Dux Carminum" Verginia struggles to voice are all hidden in this letter. Find "Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius in the feast and pass the shy girl's feelings along!

C: 迴星港地形复杂，靠人力搜索颇为困难。幸好，天舶司借给了你们一只机巧鸟，只要用它居高临下地搜索，一定可以很快找到遇难飞行士的位置。
E: The terrain of Stargazer Navalia is complex, and searching on foot is rather difficult. Fortunately, the Sky-Faring Commission lent you a cycrane. As long as you use it to search from a high vantage point, you will be able to locate the crashed pilot.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据藏宝图找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on a treasure map.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了银鬃铁卫戍卫官杰帕德。代她们前往铁卫禁区，了解杰帕德是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on Gepard, captain of the Silvermane Guards. Head to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone in their stead, and see whether Gepard is interested in the position.

C: 照片拍摄好了，给三月七看看吧。
E: The photos are all done. Show them to March 7th.

C: 素裳为码头伸张正义，结果反倒是自己和公司代表订下赌约。不知道善良的姑娘现在已经冷静了没有？\n仔细问问码头上发生了什么事吧，吃瓜就要吃到底。
E: Sushang is trying to uphold justice for the people working at the docks, but instead found herself locked into a wager against the IPC representative. Has this kind girl calmed down yet?\nAsk around about what happened on the docks. If you're going to engage in gossip, might as well see it through to the end.

C: 金人巷应该有了新的进展，要回去看看吗？\n常回金人巷看看。
E: There should be new developments at Aurum Alley. Would you like to go back and check it out?\nVisit Aurum Alley regularly

C: 身正不怕影子斜，没有做亏心事的话，货物也经得起检查。\n严查斯科特的货物，提防他的小动作。
E: An honest soul is a blameless one. If someone hasn't done anything wrong, then they have nothing to fear from an inspection.\nScrutinize Skott's goods and be vigilant for any tricks he might pull.

C: 金人巷复兴计划还需要继续，码头还需要你。\n总之先去经营码头吧，多赚些钱总是没有错的。
E: There is yet more work to do for the Aurum Alley revival project. The docks still need you.\nNo matter work, you should go operate the docks. It never hurts to make a bit more money.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「美馔阁」与商会建立合作关系。但「美馔阁」的老板矮阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Short Auntie, owner of Delicacy Pavilion, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Short Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n大矿区的试炼规则会是什么呢？这次可没有人主动向你们解释了。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nWhat will the rules for the Great Mine's trial be? This time, there doesn't seem to be anyone to actively explain anything.

C: 亡妻离世多年，倦鸟孤飞的丈夫面对突然归来的妻子怀着何等的心情？而这死而复生，幽明难辨的「妻子」又是为何而归来呢？\n你们一番调查，决定让文远看清真相。
E: How will a husband, who has been immersed in eternal mourning, react to the sudden return of his long-deceased wife? And why has this reborn "wife," whom you can't tell if she is actually human, returned from the underworld?\nAfter thorough investigation, you decide to unveil the truth to Wenyuan.

C: 嚯，在保姆机器人的帮助下，你成功地使用「生命烘焙箱」培育出新生命。\n新生的造物该喊你什么，你该怎么照顾它，突兀地，你体验到了某种近似于为人父母的感觉……
E: Oh, with the Helper Robot's assistance, you manage to use the Lifeform Oven to nurture a new lifeform.\nWhat should this new creation call you? How are you going to take care of it? Suddenly, you begin to feel somewhat closer to the parenting experience...

C: 造物身上的「变异」并不常见，保姆机器人拜托你依照刚才的思路继续培育，看看能否破解「阮•梅」造物的变异之谜。
E: "Mutation" is not common among creations. The Helper Robot asks you to keep nurturing it using the approach just outlined and see if you can crack the mystery behind Ruan Mei's creations.

C: 美食庆典正在进行中！去问问杰伊今日需要什么食材吧。
E: The gourmet carnival is in progress! Ask Jay what ingredients are needed for today.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n舒翁离开了，但司令似乎还有什么想对你说的，去和它聊聊吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nSiobhan has left the lounge, but it seems like Mr. Bigwig wishes to speak with you. Go and chat with it.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n帮助小星星做出选择后，你终于要抵达「那个房间」了。
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulation and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nAfter helping Starlet make a choice, you have finally arrived at "that room."

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n本层要帮助员工们逃离，打败敌人吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nYou need to help staff members to escape on this floor. Defeat the enemies!

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n优秀的镜头要尽量让所有演员都入镜哦。
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nA good shot needs to include all the actors in the frame.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 黑影生物已退去，小桶宝力即将启程回到自己的世界。临行前，他有话要对你说……
E: The shadowy creature has retreated, and Litter Pony is about to return to his own world. Before that, he wants to have a word with you...

C: 玲可找到了一位热心的卜者，帮助卢卡修复伊戈尔留下的玉兆。\n但你们赶到后，那位热心的卜者却不见了踪影…去找找她吧。
E: Lynx found a helpful diviner who could help Luka fix the jade abacus that Igor left behind.\nBut that helpful diviner is nowhere to be found after you arrived... Go look for her.

C: 完成「枘凿六合•Remake」简单模式III
E: Complete Hexanexus: Remake Easy Mode III

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n乱破正在潜心作曲，趁这个空隙，去和乐队的其他成员聊聊吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nRappa is immersed in composing music. Use this time to chat with the other band members.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n返回排练室，进一步讨论后续的安排。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nReturn to the practice room and discuss your future plans further.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n财富学院代表发现了你们偷偷登台的行为，打算把乐队轰下台。赶紧去阻止他吧！
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe Fortune Academy representative discovered how you've secretly started performing and plans to kick the band off the stage. Go stop him!

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n在空间站的禁闭舱段到处逛逛，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nWander around the seclusion zone of the space station to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你已经是个成熟的无名客了！是时候参与星穹列车的日常运营工作了！
E: You are already a veteran Nameless! It's time to exercise your duty in the daily operations of the Astral Express!

C: 现在，你带领的队伍成为了花园最强小队，捧起属于你的奖章吧！
E: Your team has emerged as the top team in the Garden! Proudly raise the medal that is rightfully yours!

C: 依靠树庭的泰坦神迹，以及脑内关于测试的残存记忆，你成功在圣树的根系网络中仿造出了差分宇宙。按照卡利多托斯的说法，这是最适合你的求学场所，用命途的方程式去理解翁法罗斯的神话和历史。说起来，这算不算是——模拟宇宙的模拟宇宙？
E: Using the Titan Miracle from the Grove and remnant memories pertaining to the test, you successfully emulated a counterfeit Divergent Universe in the Sacred Tree's root system. According to Calidorthos, this is a most appropriate place for you to gain knowledge by using Path Equations to understand Amphoreus' myths and history. Come to think of it, isn't this a simulated version of the Simulated Universe?

C: 去找刻律德菈开始今天的经营吧，别让那些饿肚子的妖精们等急啦。
E: Go find Cerydra and start managing today's business. Better not keep those hungry fairies waiting.

C: 原以为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大能够顺利成长下去，实现它的梦想，却没想到，在它身上出现了一种会变小的奇怪症状。据称，这代表它有欧洛尼斯相关的潜质…？那刻夏提出了一个出乎所有人意料的解决方案－让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大修习欧洛尼斯祷言，进而稳定这一特性。好吧，神奇的第二次养成，开始啦！
E: You thought Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas would grow without a hitch and achieve its dreams, but unexpectedly, it developed a strange condition that made it shrink. Supposedly, this indicates it has potential related to Oronyx...? Anaxa proposed a solution that surprised everyone: Having Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas study Oronyx's Prayer to stabilize this trait. Well, time for a second round of magical nurturing!

C: 小姐…艾丝妲站长第一时间组织疏散科员，我本该负责掩护所有人撤离，但…没想到最后还是大意了。
E: Lady... Lead Researcher Asta immediately began to organize the evacuation. I was supposed to cover everyone as they evacuated, but... I didn't expect to end up failing in this task.

C: 阿兰那家伙根本不在乎受伤，他只在乎自己能不能保护别人，只有这样他才会…感到自己获得了认可。
E: But Arlan doesn't care about getting hurt, he only cares about protecting others. It's the only way he feels... fulfilled.

C: 黑塔女士么…她是「天才俱乐部」的会员，得到「智识」星神青睐的天之骄子。{RUBY_B#「智识」的星神}博识尊{RUBY_E#}诞生以来，这样的人总共也才<unbreak>84</unbreak>个。
E: Herta... she's a member of the Genius Society. One of the proud favorites of the Aeon of Erudition. Ever since the birth of {RUBY_B#Aeon of Erudition}Nous{RUBY_E#}, there have only been <unbreak>84</unbreak> people admitted into the Genius Society.

C: 摇杆向上打开频谱仪，再向右控制衰耗器，最后是向下输出到滤波器。
E: Push the control stick up to activate the spectrometer, then right for the attenuator, and finally down for the filter.

C: 危险？当然危险，我刚从最前线回来，能不清楚吗。
E: Dangerous? Of course it's dangerous, I just came back from the front line, I know that better than you.

C: 希拉，你看到了吗？历史总是在重演。
E: You see that, Sheila? History always repeats itself.

C: 臭小子，头脑不清醒是吧？你要想出去，先从我这把老骨头上跨过去！
E: Stupid boy, is your head not screwed on right? You're leaving over my dead body.

C: 「奇物编号<unbreak>269</unbreak>：分装快乐。立方体内的便携装置，可以用来识别并收集『快乐』类情绪。」
E: "Curio No. <unbreak>269</unbreak>: Joy Filtration Set. The portable device inside the cube can be used to identify and collect joyous emotions."

C: 存放着奇物的展柜，星体上的奇物已被其他科员借走。
E: A display cabinet used to store Curios. The Curios on the planetary body have been borrowed by other researchers.

C: 而且「星核」在{NICKNAME}体内还很稳定……
E: Moreover, the Stellaron is still very stable in {NICKNAME}'s body.

C: 应该会吧？但我来空间站后好像还没申请过休假……
E: I guess so? I haven't taken leave once since I joined the space station...

C: 我在想要不要上车…
E: I'm thinking about if I should get on the Express...

C: 快去快去，我这儿忙着呢，可没那么多闲工夫陪你。
E: Go, go. I'm busy here and I don't have time for you.

C: 关于姬子…
E: About Himeko...

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 我就知道你要问这个，说吧。
E: I knew you'd ask about this. Go on.

C: …你说这个谁懂啦！
E: ...Do you think anyone's gonna know what you're talking about?

C: 所以反物质军团经常与星核一同出现！被种下星核的世界就会诞生裂界，至于寒潮嘛…应该是星核根据你们星球的情况创造的灾祸。
E: Which is why the Antimatter Legion and Stellarons often show up together! Worlds seeded with Stellarons give birth to Fragmentums. As for the Eternal Freeze... it must have been a product of the Stellaron — unique to the environment of your world.

C: 要是你们对音乐感兴趣，可以去「永动」机械屋，那里偶尔会有露天演出。演出者…唔，你们自己看吧。
E: And if you enjoy music, you could head to Neverwinter Workshop. You can sometimes catch an outdoor performance there. The artist is... *sigh* You'll see.

C: 「永动」机械屋到啦——哎，杰帕德不是说这里有演出吗？
E: Neverwinter Workshop... Hey! Didn't Gepard say there'd be a show here?

C: 没错，就是他。
E: That's right.

C: 知道可可利亚的目的吗？
E: Do you know what Cocolia's end goal is?

C: 她亲自下达驱逐我的命令，一面都不肯见我…她后来的行为，我不是很了解，早就放弃用正常的逻辑揣摩她了。
E: She gave the order to expel me herself and refused to see me... I never understood that behavior, and I gave up trying to use logic to work it out a long time ago.

C: 放心，可可利亚她…她不会对布洛妮娅怎么样的。就算人心善变，至少这点我有信心。
E: Rest assured, Cocolia may have changed over the years... but she'd never hurt Bronya. I'm certain of that.

C: 这就是问题所在——我们现在甚至连谜面都看不懂。对我们来说，这就只是一串没见过的字母罢了。
E: That's the problem. We can't even read the puzzle. To us, it's just a bunch of letters that we've never seen before.

C: 什么书这么贵啊？
E: Are books sold here that expensive?

C: 你就是技术部的茉莉小姐吧？情况还好吗？
E: You must be Molly from the Technology Division. How are things going?

C: …算了，那群人的死活和我有什么关系。
E: ... Forget it. Why do I care whether they live or die?

C: 「明文的所有字母都在字母表上向后偏移四位，依此法即可得到密文；反之亦可用于解密。」
E: "All the letters are shifted four places backward in the alphabet, and the ciphertext can be obtained this way; the reverse can also be used for decryption."

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}——希露瓦姐姐的小屋真的好神奇，什么宝贝都有…克拉拉很喜欢这里！
E: How have you been, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}? Miss Serval's workshop is amazing — there are all kinds of things... I like it here a lot!

C: 如果我们找到了某样值得仰望的东西…满怀希望地上路，步子都会变得轻盈，就算被绊倒了也能很快振作起来，重新出发。
E: But if you find something to look up to and move forward with hope, then your steps will grow lighter... and if you should fall, you'll be on your feet before you know it.

C: 当然，当然！我之前还一直担心，没了上层区的客源，老妹你的生意会不会做不下去…没成想你的饭店还活的好好的，多亏了你经营有方！
E: Of course, of course! I was worried before that after losing customers from the Overworld you would go out of business... but your establishment is still alive and well, all thanks to your superb management!

C: 放心，饮料甜点都管够！今天我请客，想喝什么随便点。
E: Don't worry, there's enough to go around! On the house — order whatever you like.

C: 我还以为绝大多数人接受不了这风格呢——看来，我还是给这座城市留下了点记忆的嘛。
E: I didn't think many people liked that one... Seems the city might have a few nice memories of me after I'm gone.

C: 既然是礼物…为什么它会被放在可可利亚大人的办公室里？
E: If it was a gift... why was it in Madam Cocolia's office?

C: 没想到这把吉他还能与我有所联系。真是奇妙的缘分……
E: I never knew your guitar had a connection to me too.... Quite the story.

C: 啊～我明白了——你是想再好好珍惜一下有姐姐陪在身边的时光，对吧？
E: Ahaa~ You just wanna spend as much time as possible with me before I go, right?

C: ——你应该没忘记他吧？他之前在铁卫禁区被你和希露瓦围…制服，昏迷了许久才醒。
E: ...I assume you remember him? You and Serval ambushed — uh... subdued him in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. I think he was out cold for most of the action.

C: 其实，我都有点动心……有时我真的很想随心所欲地过一天呀！
E: Actually, I'm a little tempted... Sometimes I wish I could spend a day doing whatever I want!

C: 一封黑底烫银的硫酸纸信封。如果它出现在邮筒旁，你会尽情猜度这是一封投错地址的情书，一张实为广告传单的优惠券…但这儿是个垃圾桶。
E: A tracing paper envelope, black with silver lettering. If you found it next to a mailbox, you'd speculate that this flyer coupon was a love letter sent to the wrong address... but this is a trashcan.

C: 哎哟，意外，纯属意外！我这就去把他们都找回来。
E: Come on, accidents happen! I'll have them rounded up in no time.

C: 短暂的误解…换来永恒的繁荣。
E: A temporary misunderstanding... for an eternity of prosperity.

C: 是啊，你一直在说什么「星核」，「愿望」…净是些听不明白的话。
E: I bet, you were mumbling something about "Stellarons" and "wishes"... I couldn't make sense of it.

C: 就算你们不来，我一个人也能解决。
E: I can take them on my own, you know.

C: 对，对！就是这个理儿。
E: Yeah! Now you're getting it.

C: 其实我赞同丹恒的意见，咱们总不能看着可爱的女孩子受欺负吧。
E: I agree with Dan Heng, we can't just leave her to the bullies.

C: 你们来这里，是打算帮忙解决矿区的矛盾吗？
E: So, are you guys here to help resolve the conflict?

C: 这话我可是好久没听过了，哈哈，我记住你了。「地火」欢迎真诚的朋友。
E: Hah, it's been a while since I heard that anyone was pleased to meet anyone, haha. I won't forget you in a hurry. Wildfire welcomes you.

C: 其实…一直以来，我总觉得有什么重要的事情被隐藏了起来。不管是筑城者，母亲还是银鬃铁卫的行动，总有些不自然的地方……
E: In truth... I've always felt like something important is being hidden. Whether it's the Architects, mother, or Silvermane Guards, there's always an... unnatural element to their actions.

C: 嗯，这就是目前需要整理的情报了。如果还有什么不清楚的，随时过来找我。
E: Mm, that's all we need to summarize for now. If there's anything else you're not clear on, come and find me.

C: 我来守夜吧。
E: I'll keep watch.

C: 我失去她了…我的「愿望」，你们所谓的计划…这一切还有什么意义？
E: I lost her... My wish, your so-called plan... What is the point of it all?

C: 「地火」…我对他们几乎没有了解。在上层区的这么多年里，我从来没听说过这个组织。
E: Wildfire... I don't know anything about them. In all my time above ground, I never heard of this organization.

C: 对啊，这有什么大惊小怪的，我早就习惯了。
E: Of course. What's all the fuss about? I've done that loads of times.

C: 我是这么猜想的，但无法证明。
E: That's my hunch, but I have no proof.

C: 没完了是吧！我们走这趟路用得着桑博，等上去了再赶走他也不迟！
E: Enough about Sampo! We need him for this trip, and we can still get rid of him after we reach the surface.

C: 你怕是不知道她那个月过得有多痛苦。
E: I'm afraid you have no idea how much she suffered that month.

C: 这是…黑宝石？奇怪，当时我把它缝进玩具熊的时候，难道没发现吗……
E: They must be... erebus? Strange, I didn't notice when I sewed them on...

C: 欺负弱者不算真正的拳击。
E: I'm way above beating up weaklings.

C: 别跟我提什么个人追求，观众们会在乎你的「个人追求」吗？大家之所以会来这儿，就是想得到最直观的感官冲击，懂吗？
E: Don't talk about dreams with me. You think audiences care about your dreams? They're just here for a visceral sensory experience, capeesh?

C: 这不太合适吧？
E: Isn't it unsuitable for people to wear, though?

C: 感觉这不是人应该穿的。
E: I still don't think people should wear it.

C: 哎，说了不听那就算了…
E: Hey, if you don't wanna listen, that's fine...

C: 还挺多的，现在反响还挺好，观众们都是图个新鲜，很正常。
E: Quite a lot actually, at least for now. Audiences are just looking for something new, as is typical.

C: 你带着科鲁泽来到娜塔莎的诊所里，他那副虚弱的样子实在让你不放心。
E: You bring Kluzer to Natasha's clinic. His frail appearance really bothers you.

C: 他才打完一场拳赛，输的彻彻底底！比赛一结束就灰溜溜地跑了，哈哈哈！
E: He just finished a match, and he was utterly destroyed! As soon as the match was over, he ran away, hahaha!

C: 不过管他呢，「怪物盔甲」已这个名号已经帮我吸了不少金了。他爱去哪就去哪吧！
E: But who cares! Monster Armor has already made me quite some money. He can go wherever he wants. After all, it's a free town here.

C: 没问题，您要是有想法了随时和我说！
E: No problem, come back any time!

C: 庆贺吧，欢呼吧！因为，各位观众将在今晚见证王者归来——
E: Let me hear your roars! Because tonight you will witness the return of the king —

C: 难道他们也被刚才的战斗波及到了…快过去问问看吧。
E: Do you think they felt the effects of the battle just now...? Let's go ask around.

C: 你和老歌德很快就能再见面了。
E: You and Old Goethe will have the kettle on the stove in no time.

C: 赶上了啊…我还以为你们要错过这个历史性的时刻了呢。
E: You made it... I thought you were about to miss out on a moment of history.

C: 放心，放心！在我二十多年的职业生涯里，一共只出现过…呃…几乎从来没有出现过安全事故！
E: Relax, relax! In all my <unbreak>20</unbreak> years on the job, there were only ever, uh... Anyway, none of them were serious!

C: 难以置信，老弟居然能说出情商这么高的话……
E: I swear he never used to be this emotionally intelligent...

C: 老弟原来还有这一面…果然我还是不够了解他啊。
E: I've never really seen this side of him before... the more you learn.

C: 这点儿耐心都没有吗？
E: Surely, you're not that impatient?

C: 又是跑腿吗…
E: Yet even more errands to run...

C: 要是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}把书稿交给出版社肯定会有报酬的。
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, you'll definitely hit a payday if you hand the manuscript to a publisher.

C: 你看见一柄久经风霜的铁锹，锹头已经被锐利的岩石啃得伤痕累累了。
E: You see a weathered shovel, the head of which has been gnawed and scarred by the sharp rocks.

C: 海报似乎在邀请你加入「搏击俱乐部」。
E: The poster seems to be tantalizing you to join the Fight Club.

C: 不——要——打开这座垃圾箱，让它就这样安静地、拥有尊严地待在那儿，好吗？
E: Do. Not. Open. This dumpster up. Just let it stand in its place quietly, respectably, alright?

C: 不愧是…呃，什么渡使，说起话来好有气场。
E: You definitely sound like a... what was it again...? Oh, Amicassador! By which I mean — nice speech.

C: 别急……
E: Not so fast...

C: ——是，大人。
E: Yes, Madam.

C: 各位若能帮我捉住星核猎手，便是帮了仙舟一个大忙。
E: If you are able to capture this Stellaron Hunter, the Xianzhou will be indebted to you.

C: 「刃」不仅被公司通缉，也是联盟在案的重犯。关于他的情报，恕我无法透露。
E: Blade is wanted by both the IPC and the Alliance. I'm afraid I cannot comment on his file.

C: 已知的「星核猎手」有五人，首领艾利欧从不出面，大多数行动都是卡芙卡主使的。
E: There are five known members of the Stellaron Hunters. Elio is their leader, but always stays behind the scenes. Most of the operations are led by Kafka.

C: 不行，请您谅解。不止您着急，大家都着急，怎么可能单单为您通融呢？
E: That won't be possible. Please understand. You're not the only one in a rush. Everyone is. How can I make an exception for you?

C: 也难为她了…
E: What a hassle for her...

C: 这就是传说中的量子纠缠。
E: This must be the "quantum entanglement" you hear about in stories.

C: 又或者，太卜司的审讯将会发生什么变故，让她能够顺利脱身……
E: Or perhaps something is supposed to transpire during the Divination Commission's interrogation — something that would allow her a window of escape...

C: 我明白了，来，您在这儿签个字。
E: I see. Please, sign here.

C: 好像电影里的绑匪接头喔……
E: It's like one of those messages a kidnapper sends in a horror movie...

C: 此间心愿已了，再无牵挂。客人，请，咱们出发吧。
E: *sigh* Now that my wish has been fulfilled, there's nothing holding us back. Follow me, honored guests.

C: 嗨呀，先生说话真是耐心又体贴，还很有眼光呢！有兴趣的话，我来教教你这帝垣琼玉牌？很好玩的。
E: Haha, I'm glad to hear it — you clearly have excellent taste! If you're interested I can show you how to play — it's great fun.

C: 有事请教…
E: I'd like to ask something...

C: 但，接渡使停云小姐会给人开交通罚单么？
E: But... would Amicassador Tingyun issue traffic tickets to anyone?

C: 你完了，投降吧！
E: You're finished, surrender!

C: 幸亏遇见了你们，咱们的驻军就在前面，如果你们想找个地方暂时休整一下，我就在前面等你们。
E: Thank goodness you're here... The garrison is up ahead, are you heading there now? I'll wait there for you.

C: 问完了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 胡说，本座很有把握！没问题的！
E: Nonsense! I'm very certain! One-hundred percent!

C: （暂时停留）
E: (Stay here for now.)
...Yes.

C: 依古籍所载，这泓水体是我族自故乡带出的「汤海」的一部分，无染无垢。
E: As recorded in the ancient texts, this body of water was brought by my people from our home world — it formed part of the Roiling Deep. It is as pure here as it was there.

C: 你伸手，那是一颗沙砾般细小的珠子。与持明卵相较，它如此渺小，像是伤心人梦中眼角垂下的泪。
E: You reach out your hand and see a tiny pearl, so small and minuscule compared to the shimmering egg. The pearl reminds one of a tear shed from the eye of a heartbroken dreamer.

C: 那就有劳你了？
E: In that case then, I'll leave it to you.

C: 「尚滋味」…看这招牌，就在这边！
E: Spices Supreme... Check out that sign. Here it is!

C: 那就有劳杨先生。本座瞧瞧今天剩下的公务清单。呃，好长……
E: Thank you, Mr. Yang. Now, let me take a look at my remaining duties for the day. *sigh* It's quite the list...

C: 时间不早了，各位若找我，来太卜司的授事厅便可。
E: It's getting late. If you need me, I'll be in the Divination Commission Conclave Hall.

C: 唯一看重身后仪式的，只有我们这些寿元有限的狐族人。
E: Given our limited life spans, the only ones who place value on ceremony are us foxians.

C: 虽然我不会做饭，但我认得，这应该就是菜刀了。
E: I can't cook to save my life, but one thing I'm sure of is: That's a kitchen knife.

C: 我当初从双亲手中接下这爿茶馆，心想着要做一番前人未有的事业，开创新的茶品。
E: When I took over this teahouse from my parents, I thought I'd shake things up by creating a new tea product.

C: 呃…当然，如此重要的东西，请不要为了微不足道或违背盟谊的事情而擅用，这点大家能理解吧？
E: Ahem... Of course, I trust that such an important article will not be used for trivial or inappropriate circumstances. I hope you can understand...

C: {NICKNAME}，你来啦。最近是不是闲了，有空在仙舟上到处逛逛了？
E: {NICKNAME}, how's it going? Did you take some time off? See any more of the Xianzhou?

C: 踏上下一段旅途吗…真好呀，我什么时候也能离开这里呢？
E: ...To start your next journey... That's great. *sigh* I can't wait to escape the Commission again...

C: 不知道杨先生学会帝垣琼玉牌没有…要是他没有学会，让他回来找我，我包教包会。
E: Did Welt learn how to play celestial jade in the end...? If he hasn't got the hang of it yet, tell him to come see me and I'll show him the ropes.

C: 我都听丹恒说了…
E: Dan Heng told me all about...

C: 谢谢你！
E: Thank you!

C: 她死了。
E: She's dead.

C: 我也想起来了！我们上次和这人打完交道，一回家就吃了一顿拖鞋底！
E: I remember now! Last time we dealt with this one we got into big trouble!

C: 丹枢？丹枢是谁啊？
E: Dan Shu? Who's Dan Shu?

C: 懂的，就是入乡随俗呗！放心吧列车长，咱们绝不给无名客丢脸。
E: Got it! When in Rome, as they say! Don't worry, Conductor, we definitely won't embarrass the Nameless.

C: 如果可以——希望你们在度假之余，也能抽些时间，帮忙打听几位「无名客」的消息。
E: If you could, I hope that while you're all on vacation, you could spare some time to help inquire about a few of the Nameless.

C: 喂——喂喂——各位乘客请注意——
E: Ahem, hi, hello~ Attention all passengers.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>请问，你会对失去这种联系感到恐惧吗？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Might I ask if you fear losing these bonds?</color>

C: …但您说的后半句，我特别喜欢！朋友，对，没什么比朋友更珍贵，更何况是无名客这样光明磊落的开拓者。
E: ...But what you said in the second half, I loved it! Friends, yes — nothing is more precious than friends, especially a righteous Trailblazer like a Nameless.

C: 怎么了，拉帝奥？别愁眉苦脸的了…嘿，我才注意到，你那英俊的石膏头呢？
E: What is it, Ratio? Why the long face... Hey, I just realized, where's that handsome bust of yours?

C: 怎么是帕姆？！
E: How come Pom-Pom is here!?

C: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
E: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

C: 这个形象真的没有风险吗…
E: Isn't having a clock as a character a bit... ominous?

C: …啊！我突然意识到——如果钟表匠真是无名客，那他岂不是你的老前辈？哎，你想和他拍照留个念吗？我可以帮你哦。
E: ...Hold on... If the Watchmaker really was a Nameless, wouldn't that make him your predecessor? Would you like to take a picture with him?

C: 它依旧喋喋不休，希望有人——意思是*你*——能来救救可怜的它。
E: But the eyelashes are still begging for help.

C: 大玩特玩！
E: Let's live it to the fullest!

C: 不会的，这个玩起来很快的，一眨眼就输…就花光了！你试试就知道啦！
E: Not at all! You're going to lose — I mean — spend all of them in no time once you start playing! Just try it and you'll see!

C: …我真的很感谢，你选择出手相助。也因此，我才能向你介绍这座乐园——它愿意接纳我，尽管我不属于这里。我也爱它，所以才想要…同别人分享。
E: ...I really appreciate your help earlier today — that's why I took the chance to introduce this beautiful place to you. It was willing to accept me, even though I didn't belong here. I've grown very fond of this place, and that makes me want to... share it with others.

C: 你说得对…但人们无所依靠时，总归会想要找些什么来安慰自己的。
E: You're right... But when people have nothing to rely on, they always seek out things to find comfort in.

C: {NICKNAME}，能再靠近些吗？——再近些，我想问你一个问题……
E: {NICKNAME}, could you come closer? Closer, please. I have a question for you...

C: 哈哈，错了，流萤小姐！这是一台街机——不是朋克洛德那种电子垃圾，是更符合「梦境」气质的游戏！
E: Haha, I'm afraid you're mistaken, Miss Firefly! This is an arcade! This fine machine has a sense of aesthetics worthy of the Dreamscape — it's nothing like the techy junk you see around Punklorde.

C: 放心吧，绝对都是符合公序良俗的项目！
E: Don't worry! This isn't going to involve anything illegal!

C: 你吸引女孩子注意的方式，就是大摇大摆地跟踪她么？快半个系统时了哦。
E: Is following girls around like a lost puppy your way of getting their attention? You've been doing this for nearly half a system hour.

C: 滴答，我当然存在啦！我可是美梦小镇匹诺康尼的大明星，从来不吹牛！
E: Tick-tock, I'm really here! As the humble face of Penacony, I never ever brag!

C: 欸…这么严重吗……
E: Uh... Is it really that bad...

C: …她走掉了。那，我们也…？
E: ...She's gone. Well, shall we?

C: 不，不是……
E: No, it isn't...

C: …对不起，{NICKNAME}，我的确是一个「偷渡犯」。
E: ... I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}. I really am a stowaway.

C: 这些信用点是一点心意…
E: Here are some credits for you...

C: 感谢您配合「家族」的工作。
E: Thank you for your cooperation.

C: 总之，请给我一点私人空间吧，尊贵的客人。
E: Anyway, please just give me some privacy.

C: 像你这样无视规则的小屁孩，我要修正你——上吧，美梦剧团！给我狠狠地教训{M#他们}{F#她们}！
E: Let me help you spoiled brats learn the hard way. Go, Sweet Dreams Troupe! Teach them a lesson!

C: 好啊。
E: Sure.

C: 但这里和我所熟知的「美梦」差别好大，幽闭…僻静…不安…还有这些飘浮的文字，你也能看见吧？家族治理下的匹诺康尼不可能会有这种地方。所以，是梦泡…？
E: But this is very different from the "sweet dream" that I'm familiar with — suffocating... silent... uneasy... And these floating words. Can you see them too? This kind of place would never exist on Penacony under the provision of The Family. So, could this be a dream bubble...?

C: 我会跟着你的！
E: I'll be right behind you!

C: （别急，你应该先熟悉下梦中梦的感觉。）
E: (No need to be hasty, now. You should take a moment to get used to the feeling of being in a dream within a dream.)

C: 你这台词好像也挺耳熟啊…
E: That line of yours sounds eerily familiar...

C: 我要像战士一样死去！
E: I wish to die as a warrior!

C: 那到底谁才是最具资格的桶…不，那已经不重要了。
E: Then who is the most qualified can... No, that no longer mattered.

C: 用桶盖狠狠地砸！
E: Smash it with the lid!

C: 芝麻开门！
E: Open sesame!

C: 愿死亡结束你漫长的梦……
E: May death be the end of your boundless dream...

C: 忆域的样貌无时无刻不在变幻，看来我们得想办法…走到天花板上。
E: The Memory Zone is constantly shifting its form. Looks like we'll have to think of a way... to walk on the ceiling.

C: 这样下去没完没了。还是让我来吧。
E: There's no end to this. Let me try.

C: 这样就不会有人打扰了。来——我可以为你们表演一个小魔术。
E: No one will disturb us now. Here, how about I show you a little magic trick?

C: 她提到了你的名字。
E: She mentioned your name.

C: …成功了。居然真的可以。
E: ...It worked. You really can walk up walls.

C: 入梦
E: Dream.

C: 先向你声明，这事跟我无关，我只是个不幸撞进现场的倒霉蛋。家族可以作证，不信的话就找个猎犬家系的人打听打听吧，他们恨我，恨公司，所以绝不会说谎。
E: First of all, can I just say that this had nothing to do with me. I'm just an unlucky bystander here. The Family can testify for me. If you don't believe me, just ask anyone in the Bloodhound Family — they hate me, and they hate the IPC, so they'd never lie.

C: 我自有打算。
E: I've got something on right now.

C: 我无法信任你。
E: I can't trust you.

C: 你赐给我们{RUBY_B#埃维金}蜂蜜{RUBY_E#}之名，却又将我们置于苦涩的{RUBY_B#卡提卡}刀{RUBY_E#}下。{RUBY_B#芬戈-比约斯}三重眼的地母神{RUBY_E#}，如果您能听见，就求您睁眼看看这个孩子……
E: You promised us a land of {RUBY_B#Avgin}honey{RUBY_E#}, yet yoked us beneath a {RUBY_B#Katica}sword{RUBY_E#} of bitterness. O, {RUBY_B#Fenge Biyos}Gaiathra Triclops{RUBY_E#}, if Thou can hear me, please open up thy three eyes and gaze upon this child...

C: 厉害啊，赌徒。这么快你就又没辙了？
E: Incredible, gambler. Have you already exhausted your limited repertoire of tricks so soon?

C: 二人返回大厅……
E: The two return to the lobby...

C: 抱歉…那时没能陪在你身旁。
E: I'm sorry... that I couldn't be with you then.

C: 「…他们躲入睡乡██但求安眠不被风雨搅扰…」
E: "...They sought refuge in the land of sleep ██, merely wishing for undisturbed rest, away from the storms..."

C: 我应星期日先生要求将嫌疑人带来了。「拉帝奥」，他应该吩咐过这个名字。
E: I was requested by Mr. Sunday to bring him the suspect. My name is Ratio. He should've mentioned it to you.

C: 什、什么凶案？你们可别乱说。
E: Wh—What murder? You'd better stop spouting nonsense.

C: 哈哈，要我帮你写遗嘱？可以，你说吧。
E: Haha, are you asking me to write your will? Sure, go ahead.

C: （一睡不起？倒是很符合大脑在梦中死亡后，现实身体可能会发生的反应。如果没有醒来那半句就好了。）
E: (Unexplained coma? That's actually what happens to your body if your brain dies in a dream, but unfortunately, the customer ended up waking up in the end.)

C: （苏乐达的恶魔、梦中的危险、噩梦的幽灵…果然在家族承诺的美梦中，「死亡」一定是人们津津乐道的话题。虽然流言众多，但对我有用的线索……）
E: (The Devil of SoulGlad, dangers in the dream, and nightmare ghosts... Surely, "Death" is a popular topic in this sweet dream granted by The Family. I've collected a bunch of rumors, but no useful clues...)

C: 正有此意。朋友们，帮我做件事——<color=#dbc291ff>在酒吧里四处转转，把喜欢的材料带回来吧</color>。
E: That's exactly what I had in mind. Hey, my friends, do me a favor. <color=#dbc291ff>Go around the bar and bring me any ingredients you fancy.</color>

C: 是啊，拜托你了。
E: Yeah, I'm counting on you.

C: 这些角色不仅生活在美梦小镇中，也生活在遥远的过去。明白了这点…也就明白了我们为什么要来这里。
E: These characters not only exist in Dreamville but also in the distant past. Once you realize this... you'll understand why we're here.

C: …也许是需要大量人力的工程，比如「谐乐大典」。
E: ...It must have been a big project to require that much manpower... the "Charmony Festival," perhaps.

C: 嗯，但不知道是为了什么。
E: Yeah, but I don't know why.

C: 列车组刚刚抵达匹诺康尼不久，星期日先生就带着知更鸟小姐前来接待了我们。那时我便觉得她的声音有一丝古怪…现在看来，确有其事。
E: As soon as I and the rest of the Crew arrived in Penacony, Mr. Sunday and Robin showed up to greet us. I remember hearing something unusual in her voice... and now it seems I was right.

C: 你怎么还在？
E: What are you still doing here?

C: 为了「存护」？哼，我看不像。你和「存护」有半点关系吗？
E: For the Preservation? Hmph, I doubt it. Do you even have anything in common with the Preservation?

C: 你的家…在哪里？
E: Your home... Where is it?

C: 唔…总有种大事不妙的预感。{NICKNAME}，你准备好了吗？
E: Mm... I have a bad feeling that something big's gonna go down. {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

C: 你怎么保证自己能活下来？
E: You sure you're gonna survive this?

C: 但怀疑一件事不需要证据，解开真相才要——对我而言，前者便已足够。我也无需找到那只忆域迷因，只要有人能像它一样「杀死」我即可。
E: But you don't need proof to have a suspicion, and for me suspicion is enough. I didn't need to find the memory zone meme. I just needed for someone to kill me like it killed the silver-haired girl.

C: 我想，你会做到的。加油。
E: I know you'll be able to do it. Good luck!

C: 「我心怀对明天的期许，沉入今晚的睡乡；直到一个又一个明天的尽头，我迎来安详的死亡。」
E: "With hope for the morrow nestled in my heart, I descend into the slumber of tonight. Until the denouement of all coming morrows kisses me, I have then embraced the quiet death."

C: 可如今这片夜空却被无情斩断，染上「虚无」的阴霾。而这个过程…仅仅只在一刀之间。
E: But now this night sky has been mercilessly severed, dyed with the mist of Nihility. And this whole event... happened within the course of a single slash of a blade.

C: 呵呵，别紧张。很抱歉给你的美梦之旅带来了不好的体验。你刚才提到的筹码令我很在意，能麻烦再详细说说吗？
E: Heh, no need to worry. I apologize for any inconvenience caused to your delightful dream journey. What you just mentioned about the chips really piqued my interest. Would you mind providing more details about the incident?

C: 请大家不要惊慌。相信家族能给各位一个满意的答复。
E: Everyone, please do not panic. I believe that The Family will give everyone a satisfactory answer in due time.

C: 这就是此前发生的一切。
E: And that's it, that is all that's happened so far.

C: 如果两位是来找知更鸟小姐的，我可以带路。她吩咐过，可以接见外面来的客人。
E: If you're looking for Miss Robin, I can lead the way. She told me that she'd be willing to meet with outside guests.

C: 姬子应该还在向那人打听消息，那我们就赶紧出发咯？
E: Himeko must be gathering information. Let's hurry up and get going.

C: 然而现在，盛会之星只剩下了美梦，沉重的历史和那座监牢一样…早已无迹可寻了。
E: However, today the Planet of Festivities is nothing but sweet dreams. That heavy piece of history is all a distant memory... just like that prison.

C: 嗯…为了我们理想中的乐园。
E: Indeed... for the paradise in our dreams.

C: 英雄可不能临阵脱逃啊。
E: Heroes never back down.

C: 虽然是我主动提出随行，但此行面对梦主…恐怕凶多吉少。
E: I may have been quick to step up to the plate, but confronting the Dreammaster could be a very dangerous affair.

C: 太遗憾了…希望家族能为你排忧解难。
E: How heart-wrenching... I hope The Family has been able to help you.

C: 这世上固然存在英雄，人们向往、歌颂他们，但绝大多数普通人，终其一生也无法成为英雄。
E: While this world has its fair share of heroes who inspire people and garner admiration for their heroic deeds, the majority of ordinary people will never become heroes in their lifetime.

C: 哥哥…没有自己的愿望吗？
E: Don't you... have a wish of your own, brother?

C: 诚然…可即便没有匹诺康尼，他也有可能走上另一种生活。据我所知，博识学会早就在推广相应的康复治疗技术了。
E: That might be true, but... even without Penacony, he could have chosen another path. As far as I know, the Intelligentsia Guild has been promoting their rehabilitation techniques for a long time now.
Hmm...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>于「同谐」之中，我们拥获「秩序」。</color>
E: And through Harmony, we obtain Order.

C: 我同意。还有件奇怪的事，在治理匹诺康尼的五大家系中，橡木家系是议会的组织者，也是梦境内外一切管理、协调工作的责任人。但奇怪的是……
E: I agree. Another unusual thing is that the Oak Family is supposed to be in charge of organizing the council and managing everything inside and outside the Dreamscape. However...

C: 但那个黄泉…至少从她做的事来看，不像是个疯子。正相反，她很有逻辑和条理，该留手时就留手，该杀伐果决时也绝不手软。
E: But that Acheron lady... she doesn't seem like a lunatic at all. On the contrary, she's highly logical and organized. She knows exactly when to hold back and when to strike without mercy.

C: 嗯，我也没问题。
E: All right. I don't have a problem with that.

C: 竟然是你？
E: You, of all people?

C: …恐怕我没那个时间了。作为「虚构人物」…我已经完成了自己的最后一项任务，匹诺康尼能否从梦中醒来，就全看你们的了。
E: ...I'm afraid I won't have the time. As a {RUBY_B#Fictionologist}"virtual character"{RUBY_E#}... I've already completed my final mission. Whether Penacony can awaken from this dream is all down to you.

C: 而流萤小姐，感谢你此前提供的帮助。大敌当前，只要星核猎手和星穹列车的目的一致，我们也愿意与你合作。
E: And Miss Firefly, we thank you for all your support. We're faced with a formidable enemy. As long as the Astral Express and Stellaron Hunters' objectives are aligned, we're willing to cooperate with you.

C: 顺带一提，本关的最高分记录由一位红发选手创造，他精湛的演技竟令最严苛的评委也泪洒赛场，高度评价道——「不像演的！」
E: Also, a bit of trivia: The record score for this stage is held by a participant with fiery red hair. His exceptional performance brought even the strictest judge to tears— It's like he wasn't even acting at all!

C: 这么坚持人设吗，兄弟…
E: Is staying in character this much REALLY necessary...?

C: 你是从哪冒出来的？
E: Where did you come from?

C: 多么精妙的表演，几乎激起了我的愤慨之情！
E: A most magnificent performance that seemed to invoke feelings of rage within me!

C: 还好你没事！可你怎么会钻进那家伙的尾巴里？
E: Thank goodness you're ok! But why did you burrow yourself into that fella's tail?

C: 拯救世界？多么「纯美」的义举！既然如此……
E: Saving the world? What a righteous act of Beauty! If that's the case...

C: 我们的时间已经不多了…有缘再见，纯美的骑士。
E: We don't have much time... May fate allow us to meet again, Knight of Beauty.

C: 你们打算复活一位已死的星神？从来没有人做到过这件事。
E: So you've decided to resurrect a dead Aeon? No one's ever done such a thing.

C: 所以那位爷爷，现在在哪呢？
E: So, where is your grandpa now?

C: 看来星穹列车的各位都非常具有童心呢！
E: Looks like everyone on the Astral Express has a childlike spirit!

C: 所以，要问这节破旧的列车头里还剩什么能被称作「遗产」的东西…我想也只有那些依旧还在引擎炉膛里燃烧的事物了。
E: So, if you ask what's left within this worn-out train engine that can be called a "legacy"... I suppose it's the things that are still burning in the engine's furnace.

C: 与此同时，流梦礁的某处……
E: In the meantime... somewhere at Dreamflux Reef...

C: 天哪，这大剧院的气氛也太诡异了，好瘆人啊……
E: Gosh, the atmosphere here is so creepy and unsettling...

C: 「昼夜就这样成了。这便是第二日。」
E: "And so, the cycle of day and night arose. That marked the second day."

C: 大剧院的舞台怎么成这样了？
E: What happened to the Grand Theater stage?

C: 他真的好喜欢用这些人偶来引导啊。
E: This guy is really into these puppets.

C: 这人偶好像没反应诶…你是不是弄错了？
E: This puppet isn't responding at all... Did something go wrong?

C: 哦，原来是这样！谢谢你，黑天鹅小姐。
E: Oh, so that's what happened! Thank you, Miss Black Swan.

C: 第一个选择来自姬子，是<color=#dbc291ff>海洋星球露莎卡星</color>。那是一颗完全由液态水构成的行星，有许多水生种族在那里定居。当然，那也是老无名客米哈伊尔的故乡帕。
E: The first choice is from Himeko: <color=#dbc291ff>The oceanic planet of Lushaka</color> — a planet composed entirely of water. Many aquatic races reside there. Of course, it's also the home planet of the venerable Nameless, Mikhail.

C: 我也很好奇。
E: I'm curious, too.

C: 怎么有人突然登场耍帅！
E: Well, well, well, someone enjoys making a dramatic entrance.

C: 我…还能再见到他们吗？
E: Will I... ever see them again?

C: 最后，请告诉我你的名字。
E: Please tell me your name.

C: 也许下一刻，我的存在就会消失…没人会记得这场对话，和你的回答……
E: Perhaps my existence will vanish in the next moment... and nobody will remember this conversation or your answer...

C: 你一直没反应，我担心还不行吗？幸好，「秩序」的美梦已经结束了。
E: Hey, I was seriously worried when you didn't respond. Thank goodness. The Order's dream is over.

C: 本姑娘天生丽质，才不会有黑眼圈！
E: A natural beauty like me never has dark circles!

C: 当然可以，我们现在都等得起——加拉赫也是。
E: Sure, we can wait – Gallagher included.

C: 该调哪种饮料，我大概有些想法了。苦口或是甜口，你来做选择吧——看看哪种口味更符合你此时此刻的心境。
E: I think I have an idea about what drink to make. Would you like it bitter or sweet? It's up to you. Choose the flavor that suits you best at this moment.

C: 在发现自己的记忆里并未留下她的结局时，我便察觉到了苦涩的事实。
E: When I realized that her "conclusion" was not preserved in memories, I became aware of the bitter truth.

C: 一段旅途行将结束的时候，总会让人感到怅然。我们能做的，就是让它拥有一个尽量圆满的结局。
E: The conclusion of a journey can often be sorrowful. All we can do is try to make sure it ends on a happy note.

C: 明白。
E: Okay.

C: 喂，我说你呀……
E: Come on...

C: 只是寒暄的开场词而已，你我心照不宣就好。
E: Merely a greeting of platitudes. As long as you and I have an understanding.

C: 砂金，你退场退得还真匆忙。
E: You sure left in a hurry, Aventurine.

C: 也祝你在大典上玩得开心。
E: I hope you have fun at the festival.

C: 想必各位已经发现，本届谐乐大典非比寻常。在各大家系的努力下，本次盛典可谓规模空前，更有全银河的派系应邀赴宴……
E: As you all may have noticed, this year's Charmony Festival is far from regular. Thanks to the efforts of everyone, this celebration is unprecedented in scale, with factions from across the cosmos in attendance...

C: 不客气，{M#先生}{F#女士}，但礼貌依旧无法掩藏我危险癫狂的气息。以防你不信，给你表演一下：宝了个贝的！
E: Thank you, {M#mister}{F#miss}, but courtesy doesn't hide my hazardous lunacy. If you're unconvinced, let me show you: Go fudge yourself, you muddle-fudger!

C: 本姑娘难得严肃一次，你就配合下嘛！好不好？
E: It's rare that I'm this serious, can't you just humor me for once? Sheesh!

C: 我打个比方就好懂了：就像读一本书的时候，如果其中的角色总是遇见坎坷，最后也落得一个充满遗憾的结局，我们的心情总归会有点复杂的，对吧？
E: It'll be easier to understand if I use an analogy: Like when you're reading a book, if one of its characters keeps running into obstacles, and experiences an ending full of regrets, we're bound to feel a bit mixed about it, right?

C: 因为我们见过他们生活的点点滴滴，会认为这些人是特别的。
E: Because we've seen every nook and cranny of their lives, we see these people as special.

C: 可如果他们…还有我们…其实没那么「特别」呢？
E: But what if they... and we... aren't really that special?

C: 还记得刚刚来到匹诺康尼的时候吗？那时谁也想不到，我们的旅途会以这种方式交汇。
E: Do you still remember when we first arrived in Penacony? Who would have thought our paths would cross in such a way.

C: 眷恋、渴望、思念…它们或许都对，但都不完整。
E: Attachment, desire, longing... They may all be right, but they are all incomplete.

C: 别再用哑谜辱没我的尊严。你专程来见我，就只是为了满足自己恶毒的虚荣心么？
E: Do not insult my pride with half-veiled sarcasm. Have you specially come to see me just to sate your vile vanity?

C: 你们公司又在搞什么鬼？！
E: What the heck is wrong with your company this time!?

C: 这下清醒了。
E: Well, I'm definitely awake now.

C: 进入梦泡。
E: Enter Dream Bubble.

C: 瞧你平时天不怕地不怕的样子，谁信啊。
E: No one's going to buy that. You're never afraid of anything.

C: 对，你终于想起来了，在我的片场，{RUBY_B#芮克先生}导演{RUBY_E#}就是规则。
E: Good, you finally connected the dots. On my set, {RUBY_B#Mr. Reca}the director{RUBY_E#}'s word is law.

C: 加入酒店特调辣椒酱。
E: Add the hotel's special chili sauce.

C: 抱歉，在下并不擅长使用这种忍具，还是交给阁下吧。
E: My apologies. I am unfamiliar with this particular ninja tool. It's best I leave it to you.

C: 怎么，这男的是你们找来出头的？
E: So what? You hired this guy to be your thug?

C: 米凯，你不是一向不管这些事吗？
E: Micah, I thought you don't get involved in these matters.

C: 凯瑟琳•玛莎？这是您吗？
E: Mister... Uh, Catherine Marta?

C: ——毕竟睡蕉社的入社考验看起来没那么容易呀。
E: ...After all, the Slumbernana Association's entrance test doesn't seem that easy.

C: 他香蕉的，半点儿奇怪的地方都没有，藏得够深啊。
E: Fudge me. There ain't nothin' strange about this place at all. These ash-voles are good.

C: 竟然看到了知更鸟小姐，我就知道……
E: It's Miss Robin, in the flesh! I knew it...

C: 所以你们到底是要干什么啊？
E: So, what exactly are you gonna do?

C: 你试着用巧妙的手法撬开它…但这儿不是模拟宇宙，没有骰子。你还没有开锁工具，手也不怎么巧，鉴定以大失败告终。
E: You try using your dexterity to pry it open... but this isn't the Simulated Universe. There are no dice. You also don't have any lockpicking tools available, nor are your hands reliably nimble — the roll ends in Critical Failure.

C: 这种时候装什么啦，快走。
E: Quit the act already. Hurry up.

C: 任何香蕉幼苗都有结出果实的可能，每个人都有接受*平等蕉育*的权利。折纸大学是自由的！所以同学，你完全可以留下来旁听，要好好学习哦！
E: Every banana seedling has the potential to bear fruit, that's why everyone deserves bananenlightenment. Paperfold University advocates freedom in education, so feel free to sit in our classes and be sure to apply yourself!

C: 我是压力魔王！大师！帝皇！压倒性的迷因！忆域史上永垂不朽的噩梦！
E: Behold the Devil of Stress! The Ultimate Master! The Emperor! An indomitable meme! An everlasting nightmare of the Memory Zone!

C: 你…啧，你的台词倒没什么问题，下一句！
E: You... Tsk, your lines are fine. Go on, next line!
Bana...

C: 既然虾蟇•忍者早已洞察真相，为何迟迟不行动呢？
E: But Ninja Gama, why are you bogged down by inaction when you've long realized the truth behind their pretense?

C: 痛苦？当然不会！
E: Misery? Why, no!

C: 别心急，睡蕉小猴不会讲什么宽恕或放下的大道理，那实在令人生厌。
E: Calm yourself. Slumbernana Monkey wouldn't preach about forgiveness or burying the hatchet. Now that's something even I'd find annoying.

C: 你是忆域迷因？
E: You're a Memory Zone Meme?

C: 此刻，忍侠的传说画卷将要展开。在缭乱•忍侠的前尘•影事录前，竭尽全力保持理智吧——
E: At this juncture, the legendary scroll of the Ninja Hero is on the cusp of being unfurled. Do your best to maintain your sanity as you watch Dazzling Ninja's past unfold before you...

C: 押忍！经此苦行三千夜，在下当如忍侠一般…刀枪不入。
E: Hi-yah! Having persevered through unending nights of tribulations, I will boast... the impenetrable body of a Ninja Hero.

C: 叆叇馆主与苦茶大师？他们在谈论何事……
E: Umbra Headmistress and Master Kucha? What are they talking about...?

C: 关于你的记忆蕉…
E: Bana, about your memories...

C: 这家伙，是不是还没付片酬啊…对了，蒙塔娜，你现在还喜欢睡蕉小猴吗？
E: That guy... I don't think he has paid our salary yet... By the way, Montana, do you still like Slumbernana Monkey?

C: 再给我一份，再给我一份！
E: Give me one more, give me one more!

C: 我这次在校庆上赚了一大笔——虽然我的理论课不行，但以后可以当个销售嘛，在匹诺康尼也能养活自己！
E: I've earned a fortune during the anniversary celebration — even though I don't do well in my theory courses, I can still become a salesperson in the future and make a great living!

C: 那时的折纸大学和现在一样，算不上多么自由自在，也有让人头疼的考试，各种各样的作业，要求严苛的答辩…没办法，谁叫这里承担着培养未来的重任呢？
E: Paperfold University back then was just like how it is right now. There was a lack of freedom, exams were a source of headaches, we had plenty of homework, and our thesis defense had stringent requirements... Well, it can't be helped since this place bears the burden of training the future of Penacony.

C: 而当他们都不再盲目追逐睡蕉小猴时，我们就能轻易摧毁这场梦境。
E: And when people no longer blindly follow Slumbernana Monkey, we will be able to easily destroy this Dreamscape.

C: 蕉蕉蕉！蕉蕉蕉！
E: Bananana! Bananana!

C: 邪祟退却——极•正觉彩墨绽！
E: Fiendlings, be gone! Ultimate Brilliant Enlightenment!

C: 导演
E: Director

C: …我说怎么感觉有股寒意。
E: ...No wonder I felt a chill.

C: 蝶，求你别教它，我怕。
E: Scary. Don't teach her how to sew, Cas.

C: 不过…缇安好像记不起妈妈的样子了。刚才的梦里也是……
E: But... Trianne can't remember what Mama looked like anymore... Not even in the dream just now...

C: 唔…缇安觉得这个主意很棒！那，缇安可以拜托粉色小狗嘛？
E: Hmm... Trianne thinks that's a great idea! Can the pink puppy help Trianne out?

C: 可是，这些黑乎乎的家伙…不该出现在这里吧？
E: But these monsters... They aren't supposed to show up here, right?

C: 虽然树庭所处地理位置相对偏僻，但黑潮竟能迅速蔓延至此……
E: To think the black tide has spread this quickly to the Grove despite its remote location...

C: 他并非奥赫玛人。其身上所着衣裳，针脚的藏埋方式颇为特殊…是树庭的手艺。
E: He is not Okheman. The way the stitches on his clothes are hidden is quite unique... Such craftsmanship is undeniably from the Grove.

C: 真是看到了…珍奇无比的场面。
E: Truly a rare sight to behold.

C: 要想唤醒它，得先去取来一样「宝物」才行哪。
E: We must first retrieve a treasure if we want to awaken the heart.

C: 「验验成色」…这种理由也太直接了吧。
E: See what we're made of... Could you have phrased that any more directly?

C: 呵，美轮美奂，熠熠生辉…果真似当年。
E: Heh, so lustrous and beautiful... It's even more magnificent than before.

C: 这话…诚然不假。
E: That is... indeed true.

C: 嗯…这倒是个不错的问题。
E: Mmm... A good question.

C: 别慌，我们马上来救你！
E: Calm down, we'll be right there!

C: 「莲食学派」的掌门人，其真名为美狄亚，而非卡吕普索。
E: The head of the Lotophagists is actually called Medea and not Calypso.

C: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}没说错，他果然在这里。
E: {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} was right. He's indeed here.

C: 他、他还在昏迷吗？{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}又在哪儿？
E: I—Is he still unconscious? Where's {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}?

C: 不过，我倒是突然冒出一个想法……
E: An idea does strike me, though...

C: 悬锋人的字典里没有「怯场」二字。我只是觉得可笑。野史学家，你难道没听说过悬锋人沐浴，用的都是锻剑淬铁的滚烫铁水？
E: The phrase "chickening out" does not exist in the Kremnoan language. I just find the situation absurd, that's all. All-knowing historian, are you not aware that we Kremnoans use boiling water from sword forging for our baths?

C: 好像…不太对劲，强烈的感应又来了…是缇安？
E: Something's... off. It's that strong feeling again... Is it Trianne?

C: 哈哈，开玩笑的。也难怪，毕竟你童年一直在…漂泊，离家很远。
E: Haha, that was in jest. I understand. After all, you... spent all your childhood wandering far from home.

C: 果然啊。
E: I knew it.

C: 你已听说了那位异乡人的事，对吗？出于某种原因，{M#他}{F#她}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}建立了联系，能完整地复现往日的风景。
E: You've heard about that outlander, right? {M#He}{F#She} has somehow made a connection with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} and can completely replicate scenes from the past.

C: 这是什么…？！
E: What's this...!?

C: 呵…我的情感在流逝，但那些片段——我全都记得，吾师。
E: Heh, while my emotions might be fading, those memories are still as vivid as ever, teacher.

C: 对不起，缇安…有点晕晕的，*我们*为什么要来这里？
E: Sorry, Trianne feels... a bit dizzy. Why are we here again?

C: 可是它为什么一言不发？
E: But why haven't they said a word?

C: 不足为虑，放手搏杀便是！
E: This is nothing to be worried about. Just fight to your heart's content!

C: 是吗，我心里可没底…
E: Really? I'm not so sure about this...

C: …梦总会结束于此。返回悬锋城的路途也比我预想更久。
E: ...That dream always ends there. The journey back to Castrum Kremnos is proving to be longer than expected.

C: 尼卡多利站在我们这边！
E: Nikador is with us!
Yes...

C: 那就如锈铁般，溃灭吧。
E: Then crumble like rusted iron.

C: …各位先借此机会，休息整备吧。
E: ...Everyone, please take this opportunity to rest and prepare for what awaits us.

C: 但关于提升效率的判断…恐怕你是对的。他的问题先放到一边，当务之急是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的火种，此事尤为棘手。
E: I do concur with your assessment of efficiency, though. Now, let us table the issue concerning him for the moment. The more urgent matter is the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

C: 你们回来了。毫发无伤，还带回了胜利的消息——可喜可贺。
E: You've returned unscathed and brought tidings of triumph. Truly a moment worthy of celebration.

C: 你还在…为那虚假的预言…磨灭自己。
E: You still... consume yourself... for that false prophecy.

C: 哇，听起来就像梦里的小岛！
E: Wow! That sounds just like the island from my dream!

C: 我拗不过她，只好想办法带她溜进来了。
E: I couldn't stop her, so I had to think of a way to sneak her in.
