C: 当年究竟是何人施以援手，如今已无从得知。但这份心意始终烙印在心中，激励着*我们*一路前行——为了不忘初心，岁月将这段记忆修饰成了一封特别的信。
E: We can never know for sure who helped us back then. But that kindness was forever engraved in our hearts, motivating us to move forward. Time has modified this memory into a special letter, so that we do not forget our original intent.

C: 嗯？怎么回事……
E: Huh? What's going on?

C: ……老奥帝端上了「甘露」，那么在杯中兑入的「鸩毒」又是什么呢？
E: ...Old Oti's serving up the "nectar," but what kind of "poison" is mixed into the cup?

C: 哈哈，真他宝贝的好笑。姐们，我知道自己的身份比较敏感…但在流梦礁，还是直呼我的大名吧。
E: Hah! Now that's forkin' hilarious. Girl, I know my identity's a little... touchy. But here in Dreamflux Reef, just call me by my name, alright?

C: 快到了，Saber，前面就是「梦境快餐店」。
E: Almost there, Saber. Up ahead is the Dreamscape Fast Food Restaurant.

C: 店主女士，麻烦把这两位的餐食也记在我的账上吧。此外，请您为我们保证一个安静的就餐环境，不要让其他客人打扰。我会另付小费的，谢谢。
E: Excuse me, could you please put their meals on my tab as well? Also, make sure we have a quiet dining experience, no interruptions from the other guests. I'll leave an extra tip for that. Thanks!

C: 说的不错。兄长曾对我说过：「匹诺康尼是一个空有传奇，却没有英雄的国度。」
E: Well said. My brother once told me that Penacony is a land of empty legends and no true heroes.

C: 统统打倒就好！
E: Let's just beat them all!

C: 你是不是看过剧本？
E: Did you peek at the script?

C: 掏出球棒给她一顿打。
E: Take out the baseball bat and give her a good beating.

C: 你应该是被召唤的英灵。
E: You should've been one of the summoned Heroic Spirits.

C: 抱歉，您所预约的时间已无会议室。
E: Sorry, there are no conference rooms available at your requested time.

C: 很好，算上系统新增的两个会议需求，再完成<unbreak>897</unbreak>个会议的预约就能结束了。
E: Alright. Including the two new system-generated meetings, just <unbreak>897</unbreak> more to go, and the list is done.

C: 鸣鸟的歌声沉默了。
E: The birdsong fades into silence.

C: 如果还有下一次选择的机会，我会告诉她：希望这一回你能比过去的自己，做得更好一些。
E: If I was given another chance to make my choice, I would tell her, "I hope you can do better this time."

C: 在空间站的生活不好吗？有多少人会羡慕你在这里的生活？
E: Isn't life on the space station wonderful? People would kill just to live the life you have here!

C: 即使他们将你的名字注册成了商标，夺走了你的一切，你也绝非一文不名的失败者。
E: Even if they have trademarked your name and stripped you of everything, that does not make you an unknown failure.

C: 凭空出现的财富只会引起通货膨胀！金融的秘密可不是靠空口许愿就能实现的！那需要精妙的平衡与操作。我喜欢钱，但我不喜欢一味增长的数字游戏！
E: Wealth that pops out of thin air will only lead to inflation! Financial growth can't be achieved by miracles. It requires precise balance and expert handling. I like money, but I don't like to play a numbers game.

C: 风度翩翩的霸道总裁，战略投资部的石心十人之一，砂金总监强势客串！
E: With a powerful guest appearance from the charismatic and commanding director, Aventurine, one of the Ten Stonehearts of the Strategic Investment Department!

C: 噫！难道您听说过我的名字？
E: Huh!? H—Have you actually heard of me?

C: 别靠近那东西。
E: Don't go near it.

C: 斯科特
E: Skott

C: 已经是第五个房间了，<size=28>喂！能听到吗？</size>——啧，真是群不省事的家伙。
E: This is already the fifth room. <size=28>Hey! Can you hear me?</size> Tsk. What a bunch of troublesome fools.

C: 希佩在上！看不出来，你年纪轻轻竟然对匹诺康尼早期的梦泡电影有所了解，真是后生可畏。
E: By Xipe! I did not expect someone your age to know that much about Penacony's early dream bubble cinema. You have a bright future ahead.

C: 身为金发美少女，你难道不该主动承担起制造尖叫和等待英雄救美的角色？
E: A blonde beauty like you. Shouldn't you be screaming for help and waiting for the hero to save the day?

C: 气氛太沉闷了，这可不行！让我们迎接《午夜电锯狂想》的最后一幕吧！在充斥着怨灵的酒店尽头，真正的邪恶等待着你们。
E: This gloom won't do! Let's kick off the final act of Midnight Chainsaw Rhapsody! The true evil awaits at the end of this haunted hotel!

C: 要不是他们这些累赘拖后腿，我早赢了！
E: If those dead weights weren't dragging me down, I'd have won ages ago!

C: 还有你们，听她说了两句话就叛变了？区区一群群演，工资还想不想要了？
E: You traitors! One pep talk and you're switching sides? You're just extras! Don't you want your paycheck?

C: 我留下来好了。
E: I'll stay.

C: 如果你做不到的话，知更鸟小姐，我们就此别过。
E: If this is beyond you, Miss Robin, then we must part ways here.

C: 惊不惊喜？意不意外？
E: Didn't see that coming, did you?

C: 为了胜利，卑鄙些又何妨？
E: What's wrong with being a little underhanded if we can win?

C: 没想到你这浓眉大眼的，竟然会是那种家伙的粉丝。
E: Didn't expect someone like you to be that fudger's fan.

C: 瞧见了吧，红色的哥们儿，这群做生意的都一个样，无论是唾骂还是讽刺，他们统统笑纳，就像子弹打在棉花上。
E: See, red guy? Those business crooks are all the same. They take everything you throw at them. Insulting them is like punching a cotton fluff ball, ain't no fun at all.

C: 就算纳努克本尊来了，也得扇三十个巴掌才能打穿！
E: Even Nanook himself would need thirty slaps to break through!

C: 这话都讲得出，你确实没什么良心。
E: You certainly don't have much of one if you can bring yourself to say something like that.

C: 并不复杂。任何扭曲都有根源，一旦显现便可追查。可以故意违背一些准则，只要我们能承担后果就行。
E: Nothing complicated. All distortions have their roots. We'll be able to trace them to the source once they manifest. Breaking a few rules will do. We just need to make sure that the corrective measures that will be implemented aren't too much for us to handle.

C: 嗷嗷嗷呜——
E: Arf, arf, arroooo!

C: 还真有效果。公司该找个人盯着你的，就不怕你在匹诺康尼从头来过，再长出一双翅膀？
E: Whoa, it worked! The IPC totally should've sent someone to keep an eye on you. Aren't they worried that you might make a comeback in Penacony and grow a new pair of wings?

C: 很高兴能以这种形式重温过去。走吧，这场告别还很漫长。
E: I'm glad for this chance to look back on my past in this way. Come now, we should go. This will be a long farewell.

C: …你还好么？
E: ...You okay?

C: 但这只是我的个人意见。对于此事，我的伙伴们同样有知情的必要。
E: That said, I can't make this call by myself. My companions need to know about this too.

C: 瓦尔特为两人讲述了此前的经历……
E: Welt fills them in on what he's been through...

C: 是我呀！准备与所有停云联手，成立「停云商团」的那位。
E: It's me! I'm the one who wants every Tingyun to come together to form the Tingyun Merchant Guild!

C: 喏——杨叔，你看。
E: There. Now do you see what I mean, Mr. Yang?

C: 这位停云小姐好像在梦游，应该不行。
E: This Miss Tingyun looks like she's sleepwalking. Nope, not her.

C: 刚到遗像制作环节。
E: We were just about to make a memorial portrait of you.

C: 还真够利索的啊。
E: A little quick to the draw, aren't you?

C: 也好，方才的骚乱引起了不少注意。我们换个地方说话吧。
E: That's fine. We should find another place to talk anyway. We drew some attention with that commotion earlier.

C: 哪有商人能给你下套啊……
E: As if a merchant could seriously take advantage of you...

C: 这便齐啦，劳烦您为我装起来吧。
E: That's all of them. Please wrap them up for me.

C: 而现在，停云便要将失去的都拿回来，就从一个理所应当的称呼开始——
E: And now, I will reclaim everything I have lost. And it should begin with a proper acknowledgment—

C: 还没想好。
E: I haven't decided yet.

C: 我将在这里，告别「昨日的自己」。
E: I will say goodbye here to the me of yesterday.

C: 呵呵，不知他听到这句话，是该高兴还是该失落呢。
E: I can't decide if he'll be happy or disappointed to hear that.

C: 那你可得多提醒我，随时准备好按下快门！
E: Then you're going to have to give me a nudge whenever there's something worth snapping!

C: 先前，我们已经知道了这三重命途的其中一重是「智识」……
E: We already know one of the three Paths to be the Erudition...

C: 我有种…奇怪的预感。各位先去吧，我稍后就来。
E: Something feels... off. Please, all of you go ahead without me. I'll join you later.

C: 对啦，有句话忘说了。看着以前的照片，咱忽然意识到一件事。无论是雅利洛-VI、仙舟还是匹诺康尼……
E: Oh, I almost forgot. I was looking at the photos from before when I realized something. When we were on Jarilo-VI, the Xianzhou, and Penacony...

C: 唔…这就是「谒见系统」？看起来跟模拟宇宙没什么区别嘛。
E: Hmm... This is the Audience System? It looks just like the Simulated Universe.

C: 女士，这是什么？
E: What's this, ma'am?

C: 这重要吗？我只需要让它运转起来，能引起机器头的注意就行了。
E: Is that important? All that matters is that they work and are able to attract Droidhead's attention.

C: 你记得还挺清楚嘛。走吧，去看看那边出了什么状况。
E: Oh? You have a good memory. Let's go see what's wrong in that zone.

C: 一旦被我的镜子照到……
E: Once you're reflected in my mirrors...

C: 呜呜…博爱又温柔的黑塔女士！本镜可真是跟对了主人啊……
E: *sob* Oh Madam Herta, so selfless and kind! I am truly... truly a lucky mirror to have found the best... best possible master...

C: 如此一来，我们也算是不打不相识。
E: Friction really does spark friendships, huh?

C: 「翻越{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的万千门径，我等谦恭之裔矜立于祇前，接受天秤的审判。」
E: "We, thy humble descendants, doth surmount the myriad of passages of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} to stand before thee and receive the scales of judgment."

C: 又来了，是它做的？这种现象…难以解释。
E: There it is again. Is it doing all of this? This phenomenon... is hard to explain.

C: 我们，回来了。
E: We're back.

C: 抱歉，我们的动作还是太慢了。
E: I'm sorry, we were not quick enough.

C: 而那时的我，四肢震颤、兵戈脱手，耳边只余狂躁又可耻的心跳……
E: My limbs trembled uncontrollably as my weapon clattered to the ground. I could hear nothing but the frenzied and shameful beating of my own heart...

C: 预言中的英雄会扫清命运的阴影，刻法勒的光辉会永远庇护奥赫玛……
E: The hero from the prophecy will sweep away the shadows of fate, and Kephale's light will always protect Okhema...

C: 「好啦！坐好坐好，翁法罗斯的历史课要继续啦！」
E: "Okie doke, make yourself comfortable~ Time for a history class on Amphoreus!"

C: 我们说话带口音？
E: We... speak with an accent?

C: 感觉还不错。
E: Not bad.

C: 你们，其实不是从异邦来的吧？
E: You're... You're not really from another city, are you?

C: 嗯。我喜欢这里的气息。很甜蜜…有生命的香气。
E: Yes. I enjoy the air here. It's rather sweet... Full of the fragrance of life.

C: 哪有人在辩论啊？
E: Who's debating what?

C: 呵，尽情释放你们的讥讽吧。我会以实践为盾，折断你们质疑的矛！
E: Heh, ridicule me all you want. I shall prove myself and remove all doubts!

C: 就算只是个装饰品，破坏公物也是要赔偿的。
E: Even if it's just a decoration, we will still have to pay if we damage public property.

C: 让不让人做生意了？
E: Can't a guy run his business in peace?

C: 难道闭目塞听就是对的？
E: So you're saying that it's better to pretend it doesn't exist instead?

C: 若你将生命视作儿戏，悉听尊便。
E: If you treat your lives as mere trifles, then you may do as you wish.

C: 这是前人用巨大的牺牲换来的。黄金裔的脚步一度遭遇巨大的阻碍，在很长一段时间里毫无进展……
E: The generations before us paid a heavy price for that. The journey of the Chrysos Heirs once faced immense hurdles and made no progress for a very long time...

C: 相传，第一位黄金裔诞生在千年以前。自那之后，神选者就开始在世间行走。
E: Legend has it that the first Chrysos Heir was born millennia ago. Since then, the chosen ones began to walk this earth.

C: 白厄阁下…我们的客人似乎有些疲惫。让他们先回浴宫休息片刻吧？
E: Lord Phainon... Our guests seem quite weary. Should we have them return to the bath chamber for some rest?

C: 至于这两位异乡的勇士…挑选一位与你同行吧，白厄。将两位贵客一并推上前线，不是主人应有的作为。
E: As for the two foreign warriors... Select one to accompany you, Phainon. Placing both esteemed guests on the front line would not be proper.

C: 还有失败的可能性？
E: There's a chance of failure?

C: 我会为你祝祷，愿你永远比死亡的追逐行得更快。
E: I'll pray for you. May your steps be ever quicker than death's relentless pursuit.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝
E: Tribios

C: 而且…我信任阿格莱雅和缇宝老师。奥赫玛有两位半神驻守，还有我们的伙伴，她们能保护好圣城。
E: Besides, I have faith in Aglaea and Tribbie. With two demigods and our allies watching over Okhema, they should be more than capable of protecting the holy city.

C: 成为供喂火种的柴薪…将腐烂的世界付之一炬……
E: You shall be the timber to nourish the Coreflame... to reduce the decayed world to ashes...

C: 我已经放弃理解这些家伙的行为逻辑了。简直就是一片混乱。
E: I've given up on figuring out the logic of these minions. They're just pure chaos.

C: 这里是休息室？有些格格不入啊。
E: So, this is a lounge? It feels out of place.

C: 但自它陷入疯狂后，誓约便不复存在。现在看来…为了追求不朽的躯体，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}已经背叛了「死亡」。
E: But their pact was broken when {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} descended into madness. From what we know so far... in the pursuit of an immortal body, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} betrayed Death.

C: 听上去根本就是在碰运气…
E: Sounds like we're leaving it up to luck...

C: 那是……
E: Is that...

C: 接受欧洛尼斯的邀请。
E: Accept Oronyx's invitation.

C: 卡芙卡…刃？！
E: Kafka... Blade!?

C: 择日不如撞日，不如现在就来想一个吧？
E: There's no time like the present. Why don't we come up with one right now?

C: 与{F#她}{M#他}同行吧，<color=#dbc291ff>迷迷</color>……
E: Accompany {M#him,}{F#her,} <color=#dbc291ff>Mem</color>...

C: 那就和我一起来吧。
E: Then come with me.

C: 那真是太好了。
E: That's fantastic.

C: 我们很久没见了。
E: We haven't met in quite a while.

C: 你知道我永远不会那么做，{NICKNAME}。
E: You know I'd never ever do that, {NICKNAME}.

C: 原来如此…你把自己的「过去」弄丢了，你感到很无助。
E: I see... You have lost your "past" and are feeling very helpless.

C: 当命运将你置于岔路时…大胆地做出选择吧，不要惧怕后悔。
E: When fate places you at a crossroads... make your choice boldly, and don't fear regret.

C: 我被浮黎瞥视了。
E: Fuli gazed at me.

C: 迷迷说它能帮助我们。
E: Mem says that they can help us.

C: 那些拥有美满人生的人，或许会享受这种干预吧……
E: Maybe people who have led wonderful lives would enjoy such an intrusion...

C: 我记得，您曾受悬锋族人之邀，为他们打造某样圣物…不知您能否回忆起其中细节？
E: I remember the Kremnoans commissioned you to craft a divine object before. Do you happen to recall the details?

C: 准备工作已经完成了吗？那该去跟白厄和万敌阁下汇合了。
E: Is everything in order? If so, we need to meet up with Lords Phainon and Mydei.

C: 那…两位，要是你们能活过今天的祭典，欢迎下次再来光临。
E: Well then, come back anytime... if you make it through the festival today.

C: 那些武器上有血腥味。他很努力地掩盖，但死亡的痕迹没那么容易清除…至于那些商品是哪来的，我不愿联想。
E: Those weapons reek of blood. He made an effort to conceal it, but traces of death aren't something you can easily erase... I shudder to even consider where he got his goods from.

C: 最稳妥的方式还是融入规则…既然城中正在举办祭典，也许我们可以前去报名。
E: The safest bet is to play by the rules. They happen to be hosting a festival in the city... We can try entering as participants?

C: 预言算碑……
E: A Prophecy Tablet...

C: 给我一个解释…证明你并非同那群乌合之众一样愚蠢。
E: Give me a reason... show me you're not as dumb as those ignorant fools.

C: 勇者…勇者！靠近些…让我看清你啊……
E: Brave one... O Brave one! Come closer... Let me get a good look at you...

C: …我不是来拯救谁的，老狮子。我来到这里只是为了响应召唤…粉碎愚蠢和贪婪。
E: ...I did not come to save anybody, old lion. I am here to answer a call... to crush greed and foolishness once and for all.

C: 也许我能从他们那里听到些什么……
E: Perhaps I can learn something from their cries...

C: 他们为什么要这么做？
E: Why are they doing this?

C: 遐蝶…
E: Castorice...

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的「牺牲」——
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s Sacrifice...

C: 记忆…味道，浓烈！
E: Memory... Scent, strong!

C: 那声战吼，是万敌阁下？
E: That battle cry... Is that Lord Mydei?

C: 格奈乌斯阁下……
E: Lord Gnaeus...

C: 那…考试的结果如何？
E: ...How did you do on the exam then?

C: 哪怕在无边的幽暗中沉浸了万余个夜晚，神谕的指引也依旧如第一缕晨光般明亮，清晰。
E: Despite the myriad dark and endless nights that have gone by, the guidance of the prophecy is nevertheless as clear and bright as the first ray of dawn.

C: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
E: "O majesty of the twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

C: 「你必须接受神性的试炼……」
E: "You must accept a trial of divinity..."

C: 等我回来，朋友们。
E: Wait for my return, my friends.

C: 你们聊过了？
E: You spoke to him?

C: 在被神谕选中之前，白厄阁下已经被夺走了一切：故乡、家人、挚友…<color=#dbc291ff>他曾誓言要守护的一切。</color>
E: Before he was chosen by the prophecy, Lord Phainon had everything taken away from him: His home, his family, his close friends... <color=#dbc291ff>Everything he once swore to protect.</color>

C: 也许，翁法罗斯的「开拓」之旅要步入新的阶段了。
E: Perhaps, a new phase of our Trailblazing expedition in Amphoreus is about to begin.

C: …试炼中发生的事，迷迷都告诉我了。它还要和其他人解释，托我先带你回房间休息。
E: ...Mem has told me about what happened during the trial. They are still explaining things to the others and told me to bring you back to your room to rest first.

C: 就听迷迷的吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's do that then, {NICKNAME}.

C: 是褒义喔。身为救世之神的信徒，自当是嫉恶如仇。
E: Praising him, of course. As a believer of the god of Deliverance, it is only natural that he detests evil.

C: 阁下是要剖开我的心腹，取出火种，再为来宾大摆筵席不成？
E: Perhaps you intend to cut open my heart, retrieve the Coreflame, and then hold a grand feast for all of the guests?

C: 退一步说，我早就是树庭在奥赫玛的特派公使，在公民大会上自然也保有关键的一票。
E: At the very least, I have served as the Grove's special envoy to Okhema for a significant amount of time. Of course, this also means that I will hold a crucial vote at the citizens' assembly.
Urk...

C: 明日{RUBY_B#午时}践行时{RUBY_E#}，云石天宫见——届时，<color=#dbc291ff>赛飞儿</color>将成为诸位的向导，带你们找到那座古城。
E: I'll see you at Marmoreal Palace at {RUBY_B#noon}Action Hour{RUBY_E#} tomorrow. <color=#dbc291ff>Cipher</color> shall be your guide to finding that ancient city.

C: 在我看来：无论暴烈，还是体面，死亡就是死亡……
E: No matter how kind or cruel the means, nothing can change the essence of death...

C: 不，我做不到。
E: No. I can't do it.

C: 哈哈，怎么可能？千年以前没准还有人喜欢这口癖，现在早就不流行了。
E: Haha, no way! Some people might have been into that a millennium ago, but it's long since gone out of style.

C: 那…那就百分之九十…不，八十吧……
E: Th—Then I'll give you ninety... no, eighty percent...

C: 行吧，那我就不客气了：遐蝶八成的积蓄，外加一瓶神血蜜露…嘿，不算亏。
E: Well, don't mind if I do. Eighty percent of Castorice's savings and a bottle of Dew of Divine Blood... Heh, not a bad trade.

C: 我得跟阿格莱雅打个招呼…
E: I'll go give Aglaea a heads-up...

C: 好多…大家还撑得住吗？
E: There's so many of them... How are we holding up?

C: 缇安大人，画得真好啊……
E: It's seriously... A wonderful drawing, Lady Trianne...

C: 你是说…玻吕刻斯？
E: You mean... Pollux?

C: 虽然我知道，这也许不是你期待的。
E: I know this might not be what you wanted.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>因为凡人的生与死，本就不该被任何意志主宰。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Because the life and death of mortals should never be dictated by another's will.</color>

C: *远方的欢呼声*
E: *Loud cheers from afar*

C: 感谢您，高贵的来古士阁下。
E: Much obliged, Lord Lygus.

C: 别犹豫了，阿格莱雅。这可不是你的作风。
E: Enough with the hesitation, Aglaea. This is not like you.
(Finally...)

C: 你们看！那是……
E: Look! It's...

C: *泰坦的呢喃*
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 这…就是「智种」的含义？
E: Is that what Nousporism means?

C: 于是，吾亦赐汝箴言——
E: Thus, I shall confer upon you these words.

C: 这场看似平常，实则空前绝后的交谈，已经足以为我揭晓{RUBY_B#「我们」究竟为何物}瑟希斯之问{RUBY_E#}的终极答案。
E: What may seem like a mundane conversation is, in truth, a once-in-a-lifetime exchange that has revealed the ultimate answer to {RUBY_B#What exactly are we?}Cerces' question{RUBY_E#}.

C: 黑色的怪物姿态扭曲，生命已随着灵魂一同化作死灰，无法辨认其生前的模样。
E: Black monsters are twisted in form, and their life has turned to ash together with their souls. It's impossible to figure out their form when they were still alive.

C: …接下来的课题越来越五花八门，唯有回复的结果不变。
E: ...The subsequent topics grew increasingly eclectic, yet the outcome of the replies remained unchanged.

C: 如果老师也能这样回答，恐怕就不用受难了。但他却以逐火的历史为例，宣扬人类也有接过神权的可能性。
E: Anaxa would've probably been spared a lot of trouble if he had answered this way... Instead, he quoted past instances of the Flame-Chase Journey and posited that humans have the potential to take over the divinity of Titans.

C: 这也是老师当时的观点。
E: Anaxa said the same thing then.

C: 这…不会吧……
E: No... no way...

C: 那刻夏老师……
E: Professor Anaxa...

C: 我责无旁贷，但……
E: Yes, this is my duty, but...

C: 没有另一种解读的方式么？
E: Is there no other way of interpreting those words?

C: 恐怕，它的意思十分明确：我和姐姐，必须有一人付出牺牲——以生命为代价，才能完成「我们」的试炼。
E: I'm afraid that the meaning is clear: Between my sister and me, one must pay the price... "Our" trial can only be completed when the one chosen sacrifices her life.

C: 「试炼」、「预言」…他们在讨论的话题，似乎有点耳熟呢。
E: Trial, prophecy... the topics that they're discussing seem familiar.

C: …身为「纷争」的化身，却在向我讲述世界的壮美吗？
E: ...The embodiment of Strife telling me about the majesty of the world...?

C: 回去吧，回到海洋之神的掌上明珠，我们的故乡。
E: Go now, return to the Ocean God's treasured pearl – our hometown.

C: 那也很简单，向全世界承认实验失败了就是。
E: Simple. I shall merely admit to the entire world that my experiment was a failure.

C: 但我的思想绝不会失败，因为我已将「怀疑」的种子播在每个人心中。
E: However, my line of thinking will not fail because I have already planted the seeds of doubt into the hearts of the masses.

C: 再整理一下心情吧，风堇。
E: Take a moment to gather your thoughts, Hyacine.

C: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝——你成为英雄了吗？*我们*多希望你成功了呀。那样一来，就会有更多的人们相信神谕…并愿意团结在它身边了吧？
E: Dear Seliose — have you become a hero? We truly hope you've succeeded. If you have, perhaps more people will believe in the prophecy... and find the strength to stand together because of it.

C: …带上那枚火种，风堇。我们的使命还没结束。
E: ...Take that Coreflame with you, Hyacine. Our mission isn't over.

C: 值钱的玩意，到底藏在哪儿呢……
E: Seriously, where did they hide that thing...

C: 啊，有了！这是啥？
E: Oh, what do we have here?

C: 「宿命」？哼，我还以为只有养尊处优的城里人爱把这词挂在嘴边，好像没了这两个字当借口，日子就过不下去了一样。
E: Fate? Hmph, I always thought only privileged city dwellers liked to toss that word around, as if they couldn't get by without using it as an excuse.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>——黎明机器的光芒永不熄灭…刻法勒的庇佑没有尽头！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>— The light of the Dawn Device never fades... Kephale's protection has no end!</color>

C: 哈哈哈！乖狗狗，你就这点本事？
E: Hahaha! Good dog, is that all you've got?

C: 它消耗了巨大的能量，只为给我留下一道箴言：<color=#dbc291ff>黎明机器…熄灭了。</color>
E: It burns through immense energy just to leave me with one message: <color=#dbc291ff>The Dawn Device... is extinguished.</color>

C: 那就…举个例子吧？正好，缇宝老师也在……
E: Well... shall I give you an example? Since Lady Tribbie happens to be here too...

C: 「我们于此索求神性……」
E: "We seek your divinity..."

C: 我们感谢你，风堇姑娘……
E: We thank you, Miss Hyacine...

C: 我…十分…悔恨……
E: I... deeply regret...

C: 结论：蝴蝶已经扇动翅膀，一场风暴正在逼近。无名客是重要的盟友，你我有要事在身，黑塔。我恳请你……
E: Conclusion: The butterfly has already flapped its wings, and an impending storm closes in. The Nameless are important allies, and you and I have matters to attend to, Herta. I beseech you...

C: 十二座星辰悬浮在虚空中，俯瞰着创世涡心。
E: The twelve constellations hover above, overlooking the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 个中奥秘，还请阁下勿要深究。您只需知晓：我可以办到这件事。
E: It's best if you don't delve too deeply into that question, my lord. All you need to know is, I can make it happen.

C: 对，所以我必须继续磨练自己…我和它迟早要在战场上作出决断。
E: Right, I must continue sharpening my skills... Eventually, I'll need to face them on the battlefield.

C: 就是因为结果有好有坏，占卜才有意义呀。
E: Divination is only meaningful when there are both good and bad outcomes.

C: 你如此擅长说谎，我又如何能确定这话是否属实？
E: How can I trust a word you say when you're so skilled at lying?

C: 呵…那就等你再长大些后穿吧。
E: ...Well, I suppose you'll have to grow into them.

C: 呃…桀桀桀，大姐头，您说得太对啦！我一定谨言慎行！
E: Uh... hehe, Boss Lady, you're absolutely right! I'll be careful with my words!

C: 呵，瞧你那怂样，这才多大点场面就遭不住了？
E: Look at you, all shaken up. Can't handle even this bit of action?

C: 嗅…嗅嗅……
E: Sniff... sniff...

C: 与我相见，以这幅模样。这意味着……
E: In this form, you come to me. It means...

C: 但你也是「完美」的。因为你理解并包容所有人的缺憾，你愿意以不设前提的善意鉴出凡人粗坯之下最为珍贵的品质。
E: Yet, in your way, you are perfect. You embrace everyone's imperfections, always ready to find the precious qualities hidden beneath their rough exteriors, unconditionally.

C: 请尽管动用你的手段，哪怕要把我们也连带着一起蒙蔽。我只有一个请求：请保护好刻法勒的火种。
E: I have only one request. Please, use whatever tricks you need to protect Kephale's Coreflame, even if you have to deceive the rest of the Chrysos Heirs as well.

C: 一副掌控全局的自信啊…你算是学到了半点她的精髓。
E: What confidence. You talk as if you have everything in the palm of your hand... Hmph, so you did learn a thing or two from her. I'll give you that.

C: 我还记得，就是在这里，那刻夏老师给我们上了「那一课」。
E: This was where Professor Anaxa gave us "the lesson."

C: ——首先，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯教授。
E: —Firstly, call me Professor Anaxagoras.

C: 那我倒是有个提议。
E: I have a suggestion.

C: 略过这段叙述。
E: Skip this narration.

C: …是克拉特鲁斯阁下。
E: ...was Lord Krateros.

C: 临别之际，祖母最后一次为风堇讲述了那段关于天空的英雄——「阳雷骑士」塞涅俄丝的传说……
E: At the moment of parting, Grandmother told Hyacine one last time the legend of the hero of the sky — Seliose the Daythunder Knight...

C: 数日以后，黎明云崖……
E: A few days later, at Dawncloud...

C: 那我再回去睡会儿。
E: Well, maybe I'll go back and grab a quick nap.

C: 所以，彩虹是我最钟爱的气象——它不仅折射出许多色彩，还含有桥梁的寓意。
E: That's why the rainbow is my favorite, for not only does it reflect the many colors, it is also a bridge.

C: 但烈阳之子擅自霸占天象画壁，令白昼无尽漫长，大地受尽干旱与暴晒…你们有何颜面指责被欺压至极的雨之民？！
E: But the Sunborn have asserted control over the celestial mural, and now the days are endless, subjecting the land to drought and burning... And you have the gall to accuse the Rainfolk, who you've oppressed!?

C: 被热浪冲昏头脑的狂信徒……
E: Fanatics whose minds have been muddled by the heat...

C: 样子像是奇兽。但这一匹…似乎对我们没有敌意。
E: It looks like a mythical beast. But this one... doesn't seem hostile towards us.

C: 掌握欧洛尼斯神迹的是你们。我无权阻止你们翻阅那段往事。
E: You are the ones who hold Oronyx's miracle. I have no authority to prevent you from delving into the past.

C: 在被疯狂彻底吞没前，它也曾是泰坦忠实的随从吧？
E: Before it was consumed by madness, it must have also faithfully served the Titan, don't you think?

C: 诸位与其听我诉说，不如继续前进、见证。
E: Rather than listening to me, continue onward and witness for yourselves.

C: 为了阻止艾格勒将整个翁法罗斯的天幕作为武器砸向大地，英雄塞涅俄丝选择牺牲自己，封印泰坦……
E: To prevent Aquila from using the sky of Amphoreus as a weapon to crush the earth, the hero Seliose chose to sacrifice herself, sealing the Titan in the process...

C: 我们的想法完全一致，白厄阁下。
E: We're on the same page, Lord Phainon.

C: 你选择的道路非常艰难，没有必要把所有重担都一个人抗在肩上！要记得，如果想要团结人们、打破心跟心之间的壁障，耐心的沟通和分享是必不可少的环节！
E: The road you've chosen is tough, but there's no need to bear all the burdens alone! Remember, if you aim to unite people and tear down the barriers between hearts, patient communication and sharing are absolutely crucial.

C: 走吧，我们回去检查下浑象仪。
E: Let's go. We should return and check on the celestial globe.

C: 还差一步…要解开它的秘术锁…{NICKNAME}，恐怕还要借助你的力量。
E: One step left... To undo its arcane seal... {NICKNAME}, I may require your strength again.

C: 交给我们吧，白厄阁下——你只要专注于自己的使命就好。
E: Leave this to us, Lord Phainon. Just focus on your own mission.

C: 继续跑，别停下！
E: Keep running. Don't stop!

C: 希望能传达给两位「无名客」。
E: I hope to convey a message to the two "Nameless."

C: 正是。黑塔女士邀请我与诸位无名客进行了会晤，请放心，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: Indeed. Madam Herta invited me to meet with you Nameless. Rest assured, {NICKNAME}.

C: 身为神礼观众，我有义务见证世界的未来，并代她们主持最后的火种仪式——
E: As the Theoros, it is my duty to witness the world's future and oversee this final Coreflame ritual on their behalf—

C: 然而，对刻法勒的半神而言，战胜试炼的可能性始终为零。因为「负世」之试炼正是神职本身——「再创世」并「肩负世界」——除非倒下，否则永无止境。
E: Yet, for Kephale's demigods, the possibility of overcoming the trials has forever been nonexistent. For the "Worldbearing" trial is the divine duty itself — bringing forth the "Era Nova" and bearing its weight is an endless ordeal, ceasing only upon collapse.

C: 你说是吧？既然又在陪他胡闹…今天的人设是什么？
E: Don't you agree? And since you're playing along with his antics... who are you pretending to be today?

C: 这是…玩具？真是，多大个人了还玩玩具。
E: Is this... a toy? Really now, aren't we past the age for these?

C: 名字真是一个赛一个奇怪…
E: The names just keep getting weirder...

C: 那时我们一起围着篝火边跳边唱，畅想未来的旅途如何精彩…时过境迁，要不是再次回到这里，那些画面都快要彻底被抛在脑后了啊。
E: We used to gather around the fire, singing and dancing, imagining all our future journeys... Without coming back here, those memories might've faded away entirely.

C: 这回和我勾起手指，就算约定好了，再也不许变卦了哦！
E: Make a pinky promise with me. No more going back on your word!

C: 白厄？你怎么是这副怯步不前的模样，还问出「心愿是什么」这种幼稚的话。
E: Phainon? Since when did you become so timid, asking such juvenile questions about wishes?

C: 你究竟在说什么…
E: What are you talking about...?

C: 跟上他们吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。去见证那注定不得成为英雄的男人，在救世之路上迈出的第一步。
E: Follow their path, {NICKNAME}. Bear witness as this man, forever denied the mantle of hero, takes his first step on the path to Deliverance.

C: 这份悲伤不会骗人。我们的故乡只是个小村庄，但对于小小的你和我，它就是整个世界。
E: The pain speaks for itself. Our hometown may have been just a tiny village, but to us, it was the whole world.

C: 笑一笑，好吗？
E: C'mon, cheer up a bit, okay?

C: 还是叫我<color=#dbc291ff>海瑟音</color>吧，无名剑士。
E: Call me <color=#dbc291ff>Hysilens</color>, nameless swordmaster.

C: 在那之后，他举剑袭来……
E: After that, he raised his sword and attacked...

C: 命运真是奇妙：无论历史的细节怎么变化，我认识的那刻夏总是这么刻薄。
E: Fate is a strange thing: no matter how the details of history change, the Anaxa I know always remains as harsh as ever.

C: …一千五百九十六。
E: ...<unbreak>1,596</unbreak>.

C: 当然，神火总有一天会烧毁我的眼球，令我盲目……
E: Of course, the divine flames will eventually consume my eyes and blind me...

C: 在下一世，我必将再次拦住你的去路……
E: In the next life, I shall once again block your path...

C: 但，每次都是你们的愿望…引领我抵达轮回尽头…将这团火递给下一个我……
E: Each cycle, it's your wishes that guide me to the end... that pass the flames to the next me.

C: 是啊，你们的太阳，足以烧尽一切……
E: Yes, your sun burns hot enough to turn everything to ash...

C: 相比一团只懂得燃烧的火焰，{F#她}{M#他}一定能在救世的路上走得更远。
E: {M#He'll}{F#She'll} be able to walk further down the path of Deliverance than a fire that only knows how to burn.

C: 我们，也该在这里道别了……
E: We, too, must part ways here...

C: 嗯？如果你说的是过去的轮回……
E: Huh? If you're talking about in past cycles...

C: 呵，你已经比其他学生幸运太多了。
E: Heh, you're already much luckier than the other students.

C: …嘻，不用说出来。对人家来说，这样就够啦。
E: Hehe... No need to say it out loud. This is enough for me.

C: 很高兴见到你，三月小姐。
E: A pleasure to see you, Miss March.

C: 是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？
E: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?

C: 总之，先试试看吧？至少得把你平安无事的好消息，带给天外的朋友们。
E: Why don't we give it a try? We should at least tell our friends from beyond the sky that you're still in one piece.

C: 可能性太多了。瓦解星际通讯、破坏联觉信标、让群星重回黑暗时代，甚至掀起第三次反有机战争，为银河带来灭顶之灾。
E: The possibilities are endless. Breaking down interstellar communications, destroying the Synesthesia Beacons, returning cosmic civilizations to the dark ages, or even starting the third Anti-Organic War... Any of it would be able to bring the cosmos to its knees.

C: 循环已被打破，你进入了翁法罗斯理论上的最后一次回归。只要再完成一次「创世」进程，铁墓就会破壳而出。
E: The cycles have already been broken. You've entered what is theoretically the last cycle Amphoreus will ever be able to run, and Irontomb will break out of its prison as soon as the process of "genesis" is triggered once more.

C: 黑塔，防火墙的干扰迫近了。{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，时间紧迫，如果还有待确认事项，请一并提出。
E: Herta, the firewall's interference is getting closer. Time is running out, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Please ask any questions you still have as soon as possible.

C: 我与丹恒会合，并意外与螺丝咕姆取得联系。他警示我们，翁法罗斯实为「智识」的试验场，并正在急速坠入「毁灭」命途：一名「绝灭大君」很快就会在翁法罗斯完成进化。
E: I reunited with Dan Heng and unexpectedly made contact with Screwllum. He warned us that Amphoreus was actually an experimental ground for the Erudition and was rapidly falling into the Path of Destruction: A Lord Ravager would soon complete its evolution in Amphoreus.

C: 这种事应该不会发生。我想，多半是有第三者插足，扰乱了局势……
E: Unlikely. I think it's probably a third party interfering...

C: 恭迎救世主造访！
E: Hail to the Deliverer!

C: 你好，初次见面。
E: Hello. Nice to meet you for the first time.

C: 诸君已经看到了：在这世上最神圣、最庄严的议院中，就在我们之间，竟有人想要将屠刀挥向对方，公然挑衅同盟，摧毁来之不易的团结与和平……
E: Witness! Even within the most sacred and dignified Council, there were those among us who wished to draw their blades, brazenly challenging the alliance, seeking to shatter our hard-earned peace and unity...

C: …哦？你们当下需要的…是「律法」的力量？
E: ...Oh? What you require now... is the power of "Law"?

C: 遵命——
E: Yes...

C: 况且，神礼官已对凯撒许诺了命运，这些跳梁小丑迟早会认识到自己的愚蠢……
E: Besides, the Theoros has already promised the Imperator her fate, and these clowns will eventually realize their foolishness...

C: 唉，又是一场灾难……
E: Alas, yet another disaster...

C: {NICKNAME}，看来对方是冲着<color=#dbc291ff>识刻锚</color>来的呀。要怎么做？
E: {NICKNAME}, it seems like he's aiming specifically for the <color=#dbc291ff>Chronocognitive Anchor</color>. What should we do?

C: 也许不要打扰她们…
E: Maybe it's better to not disturb them...

C: 这样啊……
E: I see...

C: 眨眼间，陶杯贴上了你的嘴唇。不愧是凯撒御用的锋刃，翁法罗斯最敏捷的剑士。
E: The clay cup touches your lips in the blink of an eye. She is indeed the imperial blade of the Imperator and the swiftest swordmaster in Amphoreus.

C: 你打算对{M#他}{F#她}动用私刑？
E: You plan to torture {M#him?}{F#her?}

C: 自上次分别过后，我便着手将「神话之外」改造为专属于您的「观众席」。现在，您可以于此静待翁法罗斯的终幕上演了。
E: Since we parted ways last time, I have modified the Exomyth into an "audience area" exclusive to you. Now, you'll be able to silently wait here for the final act of Amphoreus to begin.

C: 云石天宫沦为废墟，许多凡人因你们的顽抗白白丧生。
E: The Marmoreal Palace lies in ruins. Countless mortals have perished because of your stubborn resistance.

C: 她…就这么走了？
E: She just left... like that?

C: …「律法」的试炼？你从未向他人提及。它究竟是……
E: ...The Trial of Law? You never spoke of this to anyone. What is...?

C: 当你的哀悼结束时，我大概也会从醉梦中苏醒了吧？就请你顺着余音的轨迹，找到我的所在——
E: When your mourning ends, I'll likely wake from my dream as well. Then, follow the trail of echoes and find me.

C: 去吧，小家伙，扭转「再创世」——！
E: Go, little one. Go overturn the "Era Nova"!

C: 而在它的征服之路上，弱者必遭欺凌，甚至毁灭——难道这冰球在面对公司时就没有想过舍弃尊严，卑躬屈膝？我不相信。
E: Its path of conquest must have had no mercy for the weak and would have destroyed them if needed. Are you telling me that this snowland never thought about tossing its dignity to the wind and kneeling to the IPC? I will not believe it.

C: 可惜，银河的秩序早已铸成。若不倚仗「毁灭」，弱者只能自限于弱肉强食的旧律，直到化为尘埃。
E: But the order of the cosmos is already set in stone. The old laws decree that only the strong survive, binding the weak in an unbroken chain, until they wither and turn to dust. Unless... they embrace the power of the Destruction.

C: 「…她生命的起点和终点。」
E: "...The beginning and the end of her existence."

C: 你想说，流光忆庭也会来蹚这趟浑水？
E: Are you saying the Garden of Recollection is also getting involved in this unsavory mess?

C: 「…很遗憾，离开匹诺康尼时，我把那枚筹码留在了梦境里。」
E: "Right... unfortunately, I left that chip in the Dreamscape when we departed Penacony."

C: 这么一会儿，{F#她}{M#他}就成翁法罗斯的大名人啦？
E: {M#He's}{F#She's} barely spent any time in Amphoreus, and {F#s}he's already famous?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>操作已授权，协议名：【██ ███】</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Operation authorized, protocol name "███████"</color>

C: （上传密钥。）
E: (Upload the encryption key.)

C: 这段记忆里，进程发生了错误…
E: There was a process error in this memory...

C: 你以为祂会像昔涟祈祷的那样，拯救这个摇摇欲坠的世界？
E: Did you really think THEY would just save this crumbling world in the way Cyrene was praying for?

C: 一条无主的命途，被两位星神平分。浮黎——将以此吞并「智识」。
E: That masterless Path will be equally split between two Aeons. Fuli... will devour the Erudition.

C: 谁是你伙伴，把三月七还回来！
E: I'm not your companion! Give March 7th back to us!

C: 也许要将模块嵌入凹槽中，符文才会完整。
E: Maybe the rune will only be completed after the modules are inserted into the slot.

C: 好了，去封装密钥吧。
E: Nice. Let's go encapsulate the encryption key.

C: 况且——我只是打个比方——只要黑塔女士愿意，她随时可以掏出虚数武器，把这台「权杖」炸个灰飞烟灭。
E: Besides — and this is just an example — if Madam Herta wanted to, she could have whipped out her Imaginary weapon any time and blasted this "Scepter" to bits.

C: 还有——以后要是哪一站，咱忙别的下不了车，这台照相机就交给你们了。
E: And one more thing. If I'm ever too busy to get off at a stop, this camera is gonna be in your hands.

C: 还好，本姑娘胆大心细、足智多谋，才没落在{NICKNAME}和丹恒身后……
E: Thankfully, with my quick thinking and sharp planning, I managed to keep up with {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng.

C: 我们不止要一起开拓未来，拯救世界……
E: We'll not only Trailblaze into the future together and save the world...

C: （上前看看吧……）
E: (Better step forward and take a closer look...)

C: （不署名的访客登记…还能算是「登记」吗？）
E: (An unsigned guest log... Can you really call that a "log"?)

C: 记住这段话，然后忘掉它。让它沉睡在你的记忆深处，直到未来的某一天被唤醒。
E: Remember these words... then forget them. Let them slumber in the depths of your memory, until the day they are awakened once more.
Ugh...

C: 打个比方？你不是最擅长这个吗？
E: Can't you come up with an analogy? I thought that was your thing!

C: 水也好、酒也罢，若是朋友所赠，便是同等醇厚。
E: Any gift from a friend, whether it is water or wine, is rich in flavor all the same.

C: 所以，在{NICKNAME}和三月七也离你而去的当下，你能理解了么？
E: So, can you understand it now, after both {NICKNAME} and March 7th have left you?

C: 让这片忆潮，吞噬一切。
E: Let this memoria tide swallow everything.

C: 原来如此，你假称自己是荒笛……
E: I see. So you pretended to be Terravox...

C: 把你们的体力留在更重要的事情上吧，这个简单，交给本大爷我吧。
E: Save your energy for more important stuff! This is a piece of cake. Leave it to yours truly!

C: 如何，坚持得住么？
E: How are you doing? Can you keep going?

C: 我只警告一次——立刻，离开她的身体。
E: I'll only warn you once. Leave her body. Now.

C: 小灰鱼儿，大胆前进吧——我的洋流会拱卫你的来时，歌声会陪伴你的去路。
E: Go forth with courage, Little Gray Fry. My ocean currents will guard your arrival, and my songs will accompany your journey ahead.

C: 一道毁天灭地的金光，将天空、圣树、山岭尽数洞穿。从这里望去，你看见那道伤痕背后的光芒依旧在燃烧。
E: A golden light that can destroy the world pierces through the sky, the Sacred Tree, and the mountains. Looking from where you are, you see that the light behind that scar burns still.

C: 「死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的死的——」
E: "Dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead dead—"

C: 「容我再次强调，<color=#dbc291ff>阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下已经掌握了你的要害</color>。」
E: "Allow me to reiterate that <color=#dbc291ff>Lord Anaxagoras now has a firm grasp on your crucial weakness.</color>"

C: 阁下或许难以认同，但我向来认为，这一数字让我成为了最理解卡厄斯兰那的人。
E: You may not agree with me, but I've always believed that this number has made me the person who understands Khaslana the most.

C: 即便我已不再是英雄，所留下的，也只有无尽的怒火。
E: Even though I am no longer a hero and the only thing remaining in me is the boundless flames of wrath.

C: 而他们将为翁法罗斯，带来真正的明天。
E: And they will bring the true tomorrow to Amphoreus.

C: 事到如今，无法得出结论的线索不重要。
E: As of now, clues that yield no conclusions are not important.

C: 这不是某一个人创造的奇迹。
E: This miracle wasn't created by just one person.

C: 祝那新生的黎明，令世界目光常亮。抗争或许苦涩，但「浪漫」从不灭亡。
E: May the newborn dawn keep the world's eyes ever bright. Though defiance may be bitter, "Romance" shall never perish.

C: 「思维折射」启动：请仔细阅读安全协议……
E: Initiating Thought Refraction. Please read the safety protocols carefully...

C: <size=28><color=#dbc291ff>「与我一同——成为英雄吧——！」</color></size>
E: <size=28><color=#dbc291ff>"Stand with me... and become heroes...!"</color></size>

C: 「铁墓」的自我迭代不会停止，其进化速度已超过最坏预期。
E: Irontomb never stops, it is evolving faster than any of our worst projections.

C: 可惜，它还是留下了痕迹。
E: But he failed. It still left a mark.

C: 可惜，我们只同行过一世。
E: Unfortunately, our paths crossed in only one lifetime.

C: 金色的羽毛……
E: A golden feather...

C: 看见那些晶体了么？它们承载着<color=#dbc291ff>「救世的愿望」</color>，就像琥珀和松脂里的昆虫。
E: See those crystals? They carry the "<color=#dbc291ff>wishes of deliverance</color>," like insects trapped in amber and resin.

C: 「救世的信念，远比世界更为沉重。」
E: "Hmm, the conviction to save the world weighs far heavier than the world itself."

C: 两位，还是这么有魄力呀。
E: You two are still as resolute as ever.

C: 她是「创世之泰坦」德谬歌，是要和英雄们一起，创造奇迹的人。
E: She is the Demiurge, Titan of Genesis, the one destined to work miracles alongside the heroes.

C: 绝望？
E: Despair?

C: 这时候还有心思开玩笑？要是所有人都和你一样乐观，我们早赢了。
E: You're still in the mood to crack jokes? We would have won way sooner if everyone were as optimistic as you.

C: 一次又一次，白厄向权杖发起冲击，孤身一人。
E: Again and again, Phainon launched his attack against the Scepter alone.

C: 我们追上他了。
E: We've caught up to him.

C: 不难想象：你为何选择「毁灭」。
E: No wonder you chose the Destruction.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「如果岁月是个无穷的轮回——那就忘掉不断重复的苦涩，单独记住每个快乐的瞬间吧！」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"If time is an endless cycle, then forget the bitterness that keeps repeating, and remember only the moments of happiness!"</color>

C: 到了这里，《如我所书》就算正式完本啦。
E: And with this, As I've Written officially comes to an end.

C: 文字脱离了作者的手笔，被他人收入眼中的时候，它承载的意义就不受你我掌控啦。
E: Once the words are written down and have been read by others, the meaning they carry is no longer in our control.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你们都是…「记忆」的孩子……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Both of you... children of Remembrance...</color>

C: 第一次，也是最后一次…我看见你啦，{NICKNAME}♪
E: The first time... was also the last time I saw you, {NICKNAME} ♪

C: 借着一丝缥缈的希望，我们拥抱三千万世徒劳，开启了「永劫回归」。
E: With nothing but a fragile sliver of hope, we embraced thirty million cycles of futility and began the Eternal Recurrence.

C: 准备好了吗？
E: Are you ready?

C: 呀，是谁竖起了小耳朵？这句话，你一定听「我」说过很多遍。
E: Oh? Whose ears are pricked up now? You've definitely heard "me" say this sentence a lot of times.
>>> Parsing object information: 0, 9, 3...

C: 说话。简单。我。会。
E: Speaking. Easy. I. Can.

C: 如此一来，我也能安心地留在过去。至于「明天」何时会到来……
E: Now, I can rest in peace in the past. As for when "tomorrow" will come...

C: 昔涟是，长不高的，会说话的。随风逝去后，仍被留下的。
E: Cyrene, she can't grow up, but she can talk. After all is lost to the wind, she will stay behind.

C: 目光，注视。窗外，冰冷。
E: Gaze, watching. Outside, cold.

C: 你是击败铁墓的关键之一。
E: You are one of the keys to defeating Irontomb.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>当三千万次轮回的「憎恨」与「哀怜」合而为一，会诞生出何种美妙的造物？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>When thirty million cycles of "hatred" and "lament" are joined as one, what wondrous creation will arise?</color>

C: （即便过去这么久，经历数不清的失败，甚至在糟糕透顶的，机器头计算中不可违逆的<color=#dbc291ff>「时刻」</color>到来时……）
E: (It's been so long, and we've all failed so many times. Even now, moments before the horrible and inescapable <color=#dbc291ff>"Instant"</color> within Droidhead's calculations arrives...)

C: 第一次，与会者两人；「帝皇」遇刺后，与会者七人；第二次大繁荣，与会者共五人。
E: The first meeting had two attendees. After the emperor was assassinated, the second meeting had seven attendees. During the Second Great Prosperity, the third meeting had five attendees.

C: 在记忆错乱的树庭，丹恒得到记忆中「丹枫」的帮助，完成了与过往的告别。「大地」的半神荒笛枯朽之余，将使命与权能尽数托付给丹恒。借助新的力量，丹恒在忆潮中找到了我。
E: In the Grove, where memories became disjointed, Dan Heng received help from "Dan Feng" within his memories and completed his farewell to the past. In their final moments, the "Earth" demigod Terravox entrusted all their duty and authority to Dan Heng. With this newfound strength, Dan Heng found me within the memoria tide.

C: 警告█▄█▄█脉冲还有五秒抵达本舰█▄▀███数据█▀正在██损毁！███████████
E: Be careful█▄█▄█The pulse will reach our ship in 5 seconds█▄▀███Our data█▀is██currently being destroyed███████████
███████ Nameless one, fateless one ███████

C: ███████诚如我之所见：开拓乃无限无序的混沌。在其道路上，星神必已陨落，命途必已崩毁。一切不复存在，存在亦不复存在███████
E: ███████ As I have seen it: Trailblazing is an endless, chaotic abyss. On its path, Aeons must have fallen, and THEIR Paths must have been destroyed. Everything ceases to exist, and even existence itself no longer exists ███████

C: 友情出演
E: Cameo Appearances

C: 你知道这房间里有多少显示器么？
E: Do you know how many monitors are in the room?

C: 奇物编号<unbreak>211</unbreak>「视野盲区」：一个简单的偏折光场，让区域里的事物不容易引起注意，但只要别的东西不再显眼，它就露馅了。
E: Item number <unbreak>211</unbreak>, "Blind Spot": A simple light-deflecting field. It allows an object in its field to pass unnoticed, but if a different item ceases to be obvious, the object gets revealed.

C: 我看你是想把我拉到和你一样悲惨的境地。
E: I see. So you are just trying to drag me into the same miserable situation as you.

C: 随你怎么耍嘴皮子，把事儿给我办了就行。我就在这儿，哼着小曲儿等你~
E: Smart mouth you've got there! You just worry about getting those photos. I'll be waiting for you here, humming some tunes~

C: 嘟噜噜，想想就恐怖，我可别遇上它。
E: Just thinking about it gives me jitters. I hope I never cross paths with it.

C: 来一口来一口！
E: Just one sip!

C: 气足着呢，要说我在你这年纪，就凭这一口气，点了古恩的胡子，撮合伯纳德和密卷科那娘们儿……
E: I haven't gone flat! When I was your age, I could light Gunn's beard on fire and set up Bernard with that chick in the Department of Insight, all in one go!

C: 我要收藏…
E: I want to keep it...

C: 怎么说，「瓜农」有什么劲爆内幕吗？站长真的有贪污？那个举报人是谁啊这么狂？
E: Have you heard anything from Gossipmonger? Is the lead researcher really that corrupt? Who exactly is this whistleblower?

C: 特殊解析室？那<color=#dbc291ff>「瓜农」帕梅拉岂不是也……</color>
E: The Special Purpose Lab? Then wouldn't <color=#dbc291ff>Pamela — I mean, Gossipmonger be...</color>

C: 这么大的金额，她自己掏钱？什么家庭啊，弗莱明亲女儿啊？
E: That amount of money? Herself!? Who do you think she is, Fleming's daughter?

C: 关键纪录损坏…全景监控区……
E: Key record is damaged... full surveillance area...

C: 既然知道是谁了，现在，就去找他对质吧。
E: Now that I know who that is, let me confront him and find out the truth.

C: 拿好，仔细地想一想。洛奇还在等你的消息。
E: Take them and give it some thought. Rocky is waiting for your news.

C: 老实说，哥们儿，你不会真以为我那么天真吧？
E: Come on, bro, do you really think I'm that naive?

C: 睡一觉就好了。
E: Get some rest.

C: 好，很有精神！
E: Wow, how proactive!

C: 请随意差使我！
E: Please just order me around as you please!

C: 「朝夕相处的科员惨遭怪物屠戮，他们冰冷不瞑的…」
E: "Our fellow researchers were slaughtered by monsters. Their lifeless forms were cold and woeful..."

C: 当代的年轻人唷，一天到晚只晓得折腾我这把老骨头……
E: Darn the kids these days. They only know how to rattle my old bones...

C: 而播放录像带的装置，就在<color=#dbc291ff>支援舱段的安全区</color>。你到那里去，或许就能找到线索。
E: The device for playing those videotapes is located in the <color=#dbc291ff>safe area of the supply zone</color>. If you go there, you may find some clues.

C: 就在下一秒，科员被推到一旁，身后露出了一架完好的航器。在升空尾流的噪音中，你听见那名法政科员大喊着一个名字，仿佛是……
E: The next second, the researcher is pushed aside and an intact aircraft can be seen behind him. Amidst the noise of the lift-off, you hear the geopolitics researcher shout out a name, as though...

C: 这位{M#先生}{F#小姐}，我们是第一次见吧。我的名字是希拉•诺娃，如果你需要知道的话。
E: {M#Sir}{F#Ma'am}, this is the first time we've met. My name is Sheila Nova, if you want to know that.

C: 他们致力于为弱者争取权益，为被星神派系践踏之人伸张正义。
E: They were committed to fighting for the weak and upholding justice for those who were trampled by Aeons and their factions.

C: 我刚刚明明看到你在偷窥我，绝对错不了！
E: I saw you peeping at me. I am sure of it!

C: 既然终端机没有反应，不如去问问他好了。
E: The terminal doesn't respond. Let me ask him.

C: 辛苦你忙前忙后的这么久，查到了实质性证据，那么——
E: Thank you for your hard work on finding such substantial evidence, so—

C: 你的事情我也知道一些，没关系的，你还有无限的未来，在漫长的人生里总能找到自己的喜好与要走的路。
E: Well, I do know a little about your situation. It's alright. You still have a long way to go. You'll eventually find your hobbies and your own way of life.

C: 还有一个秘密武器！那就是……
E: I have a secret weapon! Say hello to...

C: 佩佩？
E: Peppy?

C: 波少且慢！你没必要亲自教导，不然这家伙赚死了。
E: Wait, Master Capote! Don't impart your wisdom to this person. They don't deserve it!

C: 最后是从我——将自己置身于压力当中，完成自我的蜕变。
E: Lastly, trial of the self. One places oneself within that pressure to complete a transformation.

C: 咋、咋办？要我说，照片上是啥东西都没弄清楚，就不该我们管！
E: Wh—What should we do? If it were up to me, we shouldn't do anything since we're not even sure what's shown in those photos.

C: 围城内外总是互相羡慕。
E: The grass is always greener on the other side.

C: 平静的…
E: Calm...

C: 哦对，你可能还不知道。那起事故已经平息了，我本以为自己会被追责，但黑塔女士大人有大量，竟然允许我继续调查，真是不幸中的万幸。
E: Oh, maybe you haven't heard. Now that everything has calmed down, I thought they'd be on my case already. The silver lining? Madam Herta was generous enough to allow me to continue investigating this matter.

C: 咱们需要再破译一次，就能看到真正的可疑痕迹了。
E: We need to decipher it if want to find any culpatory evidence.

C: 她应该在这儿停留过一段时间，四处找找吧。
E: She must have stopped here for a bit. Let's look around.

C: 呃…晚点再讨论这个。
E: Uhh... Let's talk about that later.

C: 还好吧。
E: It wasn't so bad.

C: 「喔，又回到空间站了。还有解谜？一键跳过吧。」
E: "Oh, back to the space station again. A riddle? Where's the skip button?"

C: 没能分出结果的胜负终于要成为历史了，今天胜者只会有一个。拜托了，让我玩得开心点，好吗？
E: The long-awaited result will finally be determined. There will only be one victor today. Please... let me have some fun this time, okay?

C: 而今，年轻的「银河冒险玩家」，她这么说道——
E: And now, the young Cosmic Adventure Gamer, she said...

C: 我明白了…{NICKNAME}，恕我揣测，你对于「纯美」并没有太多认知，因而无法认可……
E: I understand... {NICKNAME}, with all due respect, I believe you refuse to acknowledge the Beauty simply because you lack knowledge on the subject.

C: 干嘛？来给我打鸡血的？你那点小心思，就差直接写在脑门上了！
E: What is it? Here to cheer me up? Save your breath! Your intentions might as well be written on your forehead.

C: 哎呀，君子动腿不动嘴，我先回房间检查一下…等真发现了问题再跟大家汇报。
E: Now's a time for action, I'm gonna go check my room. If there's a problem, I'll let you know...

C: 三月…三月？请回话，你离开房间没有？
E: March... March? Please reply. Have you left the room?

C: 你开始恐惧，暗自扭曲、尖叫，建设内心防御，整顿表情管理，思考逃跑流程。
E: You start to panic and want to get away.

C: 这个方法确实伴随着风险。引擎有可能发生自燃…不过，也没有更好的办法。
E: It would be risky — the engine might overheat and burst into flames... Still, I don't have any better ideas.

C: 那是「星神」吗？
E: Are they an "Aeon"?

C: {NICKNAME}，我们无法改变个人对自我本心的执拗。
E: {NICKNAME}, we can't change what other people long for.

C: 稍微等一下。
E: I need a little longer.

C: 探索关联记忆【阿兰的调查】
E: Explore the related memory "Arlan's investigation"

C: 或许<color=#dbc291ff>界种科和密卷科</color>的人会知道些什么。
E: Maybe the researchers at the <color=#dbc291ff>Departments of Ecology or Insight</color> may have an idea?

C: 就这点线索？也太抽象了。
E: That's all you got? Too abstract.

C: （不对，不是这条路。我没去过那里。）
E: (No, not this road. I didn't go there.)

C: 啧啧啧，看看这小女娃，多乖巧，多水灵。
E: I say, what a wonderfully intelligent-looking young lady.

C: 小心，这片区域的裂界状态很不稳定。
E: Careful, the Fragmentum in this area is very unstable.

C: 可在问询开始前，她却对此事只字未提。
E: However, she decided to hold her tongue until now?

C: 没错，我是在拜访阿德勒的途中遇见阿兰的。
E: Yes, I ran into Arlan when looking for Adler.

C: 如果止步于此，你还有辩解的机会。换作是我……
E: If you limit your involvement to this, there's still room for excuses. If it were me...

C: 最后一个问题：螺丝咕姆，天才如你，能算出我这么做的理由么？
E: One last question. Screwllum, genius though you are, can you deduce why I did this?

C: 我可以给你更多「奖励」。
E: Then I'll grant you even greater rewards.

C: 你培育出了一个复制版扑满！
E: You have nurtured a copy of a Trotter!

C: 模拟宇宙就是我的家！
E: The Simulated Universe is my home!

C: 我将再驻足一段时间。艾丝妲小姐近日表现出对空间站一些骚乱的担忧，结论：我将观察片刻。
E: I will stay for a while longer. Lady Asta has recently expressed concerns regarding disturbances on the space station. Conclusion: Extended observation is necessary.

C: 塔伊兹育罗斯，通过模拟宇宙，我得以窥见寰宇蝗灾的始末，攫取虫皇及其子嗣的数据，复制、培育，从而开辟全新的研究分支。
E: Tayzzyronth. I was able to see the beginning and end of The Swarm Disaster through the Simulated Universe, obtain data on the Imperator Insectorum and their descendants, replicate them, nurture them, and create a brand-new scientific discipline.

C: 这人听起来好耳熟…
E: Why does that name sound familiar...

C: 尤利安平时胆子是小了点，但从没见他这么害怕过。他很喜欢星穹列车的几位，也许，他愿意和你聊聊……
E: Julian does tend to be a little timid, but I've never seen him this scared before. He loves being with the Astral Express Crew. Maybe he would be willing to talk to you...

C: 他转战科幻赛道了。
E: He's moved on to science-fiction.

C: 对付掩耳盗铃的人，最好的办法——
E: If someone's got their head stuck in the sand, or the snow in this case...

C: 其实我还忘了点东西…
E: Actually, I think I forgot something...

C: 天文级别…我甚至不知道该怎么准确地念出那串数字。
E: An astronomical amount. I don't even know how to read such a long string of numbers.

C: 哈哈哈，你谦虚啦。星穹列车去过那么多地方，「无名客」个个见多识广，在这方面肯定比我强多了。
E: Haha, you flatter me! The Express has visited many worlds. I'm sure the Nameless have a far greater knowledge of such things than myself.

C: 归根到底，托帕小姐也只是在贯彻她的工作原则而已。退一步说，从列车组的立场出发，跟公司作对肯定不明智……
E: I guess Miss Topaz is just doing her job. And as far as the Express is concerned, I think it'd be unwise to make the IPC our enemy.

C: 你应该很清楚吧？过去的七百年里，贝洛伯格制造的所有机兵都沿用了「公司」留下的底层系统。如此完善的代码，这里的工程师压根想不到需要替换它的理由。
E: I'm sure you're familiar with this — all mechanized units manufactured in Belobog over the last <unbreak>700</unbreak> years utilize the underlying systems created by the IPC. The code is so refined that the engineers never saw any reason to change it.

C: 算了，三月，别跟他们讲道理了！本来我也没指望能和平解决这事。
E: Save your breath, March. I never held out any hope of resolving this problem peacefully.

C: 希儿，你要和我们一起上去吗？
E: Are you coming with us, Seele?

C: 直到有一天，公司来到了我的母星，还带来了一整套先进的环境改造方案。作为交换，他们要求星球上的每一位居民都签下合同，成为——或是在未来成为——公司的员工。
E: Finally, one fateful day, the IPC arrived on my home planet. They had the technology to repair our planet's damaged environment. In return for their help, they asked for just one thing — that all inhabitants sign a contract which would make them employees of the IPC.

C: 这个星球的命运，它承载的文明，曾在这里发生过、以及未来将会在这里发生的一切…现在全都悬在我的指尖上。
E: This planet's fate, the civilization it carries, everything that has happened here and everything that will happen... it all rests in my hands...

C: 托帕小姐，我知道你之前做了很多调研工作——我想知道，你的资料里是否有关于「造物引擎」的记载？
E: Miss Topaz, I know you've done a lot of research into Belobog. I was wondering if there was any information on the Engine of Creation in your records?

C: 哎，没什么事，就是关心关心你。我早说了，雅利洛-Ⅵ这案子一看就带刺，还榨不出多少油水，何必掺和呢？
E: Oh, nothing important — just checking in on you. I told you Jarilo-VI would be a high-risk low-reward case. Why'd you even bother?

C: …哎，别挂别挂！你是真不在聊天的状态啊，行，那说点你会感兴趣的——
E: W—Wait, hold on a minute, don't hang up. I get it, you're not in the mood for this conversation right now... Okay, how about this — something that might interest you...

C: 看来是很严肃的事啊…请说吧，我会仔细听的。
E: Sounds serious. I'm all ears.

C: 我们认识的贝洛伯格人里，就属大叔你的人生阅历最丰富了。你觉得该怎么选呢？
E: Mr. Oleg, out of all the people we know in Belobog, you have the most life experience. What do you think we should do?

C: 同意还是拒绝，不管她现在偏向于选哪个…她肯定比我看得更远，考虑到的东西绝对比我更多，更完整。
E: No matter the choice she makes, she has far greater foresight than I do — she can see the bigger picture more clearly than I can.

C: …咳，是为了纪念初代大守护者阿丽萨•兰德，还有……
E: *cough* It was built to memorialize Supreme Guardian Alisa Rand, and also...

C: …作为对他们的生命负责的医生，我不能接受这种说辞。我对所谓「特效药」的态度不会改变。
E: ...As a doctor, I don't accept that — I'm responsible for their well-being. My attitude towards this "wonder medicine" won't change.

C: …我说，你到底买不买，能不能给个痛快话？我没空跟你扯闲天。
E: ...Well, are you buying or not? Spit it out. I don't have time for chit-chat.

C: 那些人应该是说了很多于我不利的话，所以你才会先去卖药的窝点一探究竟吧？
E: I'm guessing the patients you met weren't exactly singing my praises, which is why you tracked the dealer down and made inquiries first.

C: 嗯…而且这一切就发生在我的眼皮底下。想来可笑，对亲人的信任竟然蒙蔽了我的双眼……
E: Indeed... and it all happened under my nose. How ridiculous — my judgment was clouded by trust in a loved one...

C: 传说中的外来者一路披荆斩棘，揭幕战全胜宝座已是近在眼前！但{M#他}{F#她}能够像往常一样轻易击败擂主吗？让我们拭目以待！
E: The legendary outsider has climbed {M#his}{F#her} way to the very top, and the season opener win is so close at hand, but will {NICKNAME} beat the champ as easily as usual? Let us wait and see!

C: 希望{NICKNAME}你不要推辞。毕竟——
E: Please, {NICKNAME}. I hope you won't refuse. After all—

C: 应该是吧…字谜这东西就和魔术揭秘一样，一旦知道了谜底，就会觉得是对自己智识的侮辱，但这只是马后炮的错觉罢了……
E: I think so... Solving riddles is like solving magic tricks. Once you know the answer, you would think it's an insult to your intelligence, but that's just the illusion of hindsight.

C: 银鬃铁卫只是被我们打了个出其不意，用不了多久，他们一定会追进来的。
E: We caught them by surprise, nothing more. They'll be in pursuit soon enough.

C: 嘁，没意思。
E: Ugh, you're no fun.

C: …咋了，有人受伤了？那不是该去找娜塔莎吗？
E: ...What? Is someone getting seriously injured? Shouldn't you ask Natasha for help instead?

C: 它声称自己可以找东西…
E: It claims it can find things.

C: 这可能就是新的线索。
E: This may be a new clue.

C: 哼哼，可不要小看情报官——我已经计算到各种可能性啦，肯定不会出事的。
E: Humph, never underestimate an intelligence officer — I've worked out every possible scenario, and nothing will go wrong.

C: 你的请求，我不会拒绝。
E: I won't say no to you.

C: 但在离开这里之前，{NICKNAME}——我还想请你帮我一个忙。我向你保证，这是最后一次……
E: Before we leave, {NICKNAME}, I'd like to ask for another favor — the last one, I promise...

C: 星核的影响消散之后，整个贝洛伯格的氛围明显欢脱了不少，这跟你们的努力脱不了干系。
E: Speaking of things getting better, Belobog's been feeling a little more cheerful since the Stellaron crisis subsided. We couldn't have done it without you.

C: 果然！这些也是从「齿轮与智慧」上拆卸下来的部件！
E: Sure enough! These parts are from the museum's sculpture!

C: {NICKNAME}，我们快走吧……
E: {NICKNAME}, let's get going.

C: 这位优雅的小女士，我经常见你在永冬铭碑附近向孩子们科普贝洛伯格的历史知识，你的博识和耐心令我真心感到敬佩！
E: Young lady, I have seen you on many occasions near the Everwinter Monument, teaching children the history of Belobog. I am truly in awe of your knowledge and patience!

C: 诺尔伯特…诺尔伯特…总觉得在哪里听过这个名字。不好意思，请给我点时间回想一下……
E: Norbert... Norbert... I feel like I've heard that name somewhere before. Please, give me a moment to see if I can recall...

C: 侍从都以为他是背着长辈在和谁偷偷约会，所以也没有把这件事通报给交通部大臣。
E: The attendants think he might have a love interest — someone he doesn't want his family to know about — they haven't mentioned anything to the Minister of Transportation.

C: 肯定是那个家伙的从犯…{NICKNAME}，我们机灵点！
E: Must be the accomplice... {NICKNAME}, let's think fast!

C: 我还以为你已经被铁卫给逮住了——刚才我还在寻思，以你小子的性格，落网以后岂不第一时间就会把我给供出来？
E: I was worried the Silvermane Guards might've got to you. But you're not the type to turn someone in at first capture, right?

C: 啊？！你在逗我吗，五千？！
E: Huh? <unbreak>5000</unbreak>? You're kidding, right?

C: （下个问题无论如何都得考虑清楚再做回答。）
E: (I better think through the next question carefully before answering.)

C: {NICKNAME}，我来了！嫌疑犯在哪？！
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm here! Where is the suspect?

C: 你可以填写这张申请表。
E: Yes. Here is your application form.

C: 克拉拉，别紧张！
E: Clara, don't be nervous!

C: 请听题，克拉拉队员！第一题——你为什么会来博物馆担任志愿管理员呢？！
E: Please listen to the questions carefully, Clara! Question One: Why do you want to be a volunteer guide at the museum?

C: …我理解。她身为情报官，每天都要面对像山一样高的卷宗，能几年如一日地始终不出现错漏，反而不正常。
E: ...I understand. As an Intelligence Officer, she has to deal with piles of files every day. It is impossible not to mess up once in a while.

C: 别高兴得太早，你也跟着一起过来——面试需要你来做辅助评定。
E: Not so fast... You're coming with us. We need you to be an assistant assessor for the interview.

C: 绝无此事！
E: Absolutely not!

C: …呵呵，原来希露瓦是这种风格啊。有点意思。
E: ...Hehe, I see this is Serval's style. How interesting.

C: …你这肯定是故意的吧？！
E: You aren't just putting your serious face on, are you?

C: 哔嘟！哔嘟！发现近似物件，请遵循「家用寻物仪安全使用指南」开始搜索指引。
E: Beep, beep, beep! Item found. Please commence search according to the Home-Use Object Finder Safety Manual.

C: 哼，手脚还挺麻利的嘛，我还以为你们个个都是娇生惯养，没干过粗活呢。
E: Hmph, quick work. Y'know, I didn't think you guys had worked a day in your lives, but you know how to get your hands dirty.

C: 费斯曼老爹就在矿区里，虎克大人好像是听说老爹出事了才冲进去的。
E: Fersman is in the mines. It seems like the boss heard some bad news about him, then just ran in there.

C: 不用担心我！虎克有洞洞机，完全不怕受伤！
E: Don't worry about me! I have Diggertron. No one can hurt me!

C: 那个什么探测器，既然那是老爹的宝贝，虎克一定要帮他找回来！你会帮虎克的吧？
E: That detector is daddy's treasure, so I gotta get it back! You'll help me, won't you?

C: 是你把老爹的探测器偷走了吗？
E: Did you steal daddy's detector?

C: 你看到探测器了吗？
E: Did you see the detector?

C: 虎克再给你一次机会，你看着洞洞机再好好想想！
E: I'll give you one more chance. Think carefully and give your answer to Diggertron this time!

C: 过了我这村儿，你也没有别的店儿能卖了。别犹豫了，我给你开个好价格。
E: I don't believe any other stores will buy it off you. Come on, I'll give you a nice deal.

C: 哈哈哈，算了算了，都怪老爹说了些奇怪的话。总有一天你会明白的。
E: Hahaha, that's okay. I'm saying some things that might seem strange, but you will understand some day.

C: 我不管，给钱。
E: I don't care. Pay up.

C: 感谢你们，外来者！你们不止是矿队的救星，也是下层区所有人的英雄……
E: Thank you, outsiders, from the bottom of my heart! The mining team'll remember you as heroes... as will the rest of the Underworld.

C: 我问过了…她说没问题。看来，她真的很信任你。
E: I asked her already... and she said it was fine. She seems like she really trusts you.

C: …你怎么还是像块木头一样啊，老弟！
E: ...Gepard! Way to make it obvious.

C: …两百……
E: ...<unbreak>200</unbreak>...
...Huh?

C: 「哪怕自身只是半缕微光，也要照亮他人」——这是你自己说的吧。你不是想保护所有人吗？比起在这儿哭哭啼啼，你就没有更要紧的事做了吗？！
E: Even if I am but a small glimmer of light in this world, I must try my best to shine brightly for others. Didn't you say that? Well, if you really want to protect everyone, what are you standing here crying for? Get to it!

C: 是是是，大小姐～哼，未来的大守护者，居然和我出身同一个孤儿院…真是孽缘。
E: Yeah yeah, Lady Bronya~ Hmph, Miss Future Supreme Guardian comes from the same orphanage as me... Who thought it would be a good idea to put us together, huh?

C: 钢板和纱布…医用酒精…止痛剂。好，这样就齐活了。
E: Metal plates and bandages... rubbing alcohol... painkillers. Great, that's everything.

C: 虎克就记得这么多。不过你放心，我也会跟你一起找的！说不定还能比你先找到呢。
E: That's all I can recall. But don't worry, I'll look with you! Heh, I may even find it before you.

C: 去找人修修如何？
E: Why not find someone to fix it?

C: 没有了，这就是最后一次，我们走吧！
E: I promise this is the last time! Let's go!

C: （他本不该落得这个凄惨的下场…得把这件事告诉娜塔莎。）
E: (He shouldn't have come to this miserable end... I have to tell Natasha about this.)

C: 嘿嘿…{NICKNAME}，快把好消息告诉他们吧！
E: Hehe... {NICKNAME}, do you wanna do the honors?

C: 快看，帕斯卡在那里！在它旁边的是……
E: Look, Pascal's over there! Who's standing next to it?

C: 这里，为什么…灯光从来没断过呢？明明已经被废弃了……
E: The light here... Why is it still on? This place has clearly been abandoned for a long time...

C: 你将思考的结果向克拉拉复述了一遍。
E: You recapitulate your thoughts to Clara.

C: 帕斯卡，收集零件，准备，继续！或，等待，指令，下一步！
E: Pascal, collect parts, ready, continue! Or, wait, instruction, next!

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}——我们…还是先回史瓦罗先生那里讨论一下吧。
E: {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, let's go back to Mr. Svarog and talk about what to do next.

C: 以我们的实力，来硬的风险极大。史瓦罗的机器人不怕牺牲，我却不想拿下层百姓的命冒险。
E: At our current strength, it would be incredibly dangerous to use force. Svarog's robots don't fear sacrifice, and I don't want to risk Underworld lives.

C: 实在太让我伤心了…你们连这么小的孩子都想到了，却没想起我……
E: I gotta say I'm a little upset at the thought of you choosing a toddler over your old buddy Sampo...

C: 我桑博当然…不知道了！
E: Sampo Koski always knows the... Wait, what did it say again?

C: 重新评估中——个体威胁指数：高。战斗模组启动，准备清除威胁。
E: Reassessing... Subject threat index: High. Initializing combat module. Threat elimination activated.

C: 是是是，行行行…我要出题了，给我听好了。
E: Yeah, yeah, whatever... Here comes your question, listen up.

C: …认证系统已成功上线。请伸出右手。
E: ...Certification system online. Please extend your right hand.

C: 请求被拒绝。请访客向克拉拉小姐申请访问权限。
E: Request rejected. Visitors must acquire access permissions from Miss Clara.

C: 可是…史瓦罗先生一向不喜欢和其他人沟通，尤其是「地火」的各位……
E: But... Mr. Svarog doesn't like talking to others, especially Wildfire...

C: 我们必须见到他，不惜代价。
E: We have to see him, whatever the cost.

C: 你的意思是…那个机器人的逻辑里有漏洞吗？
E: So... you think Svarog's logic has a hole in it?

C: 「现状」就是…我们来了！这个星球的灾祸有了解决的办法……
E: The present situation is... we're here! This planet isn't doomed after all...

C: 和平维系协议暂时中止…申请启动剿灭协议。
E: Peacekeeping protocol temporarily disengaged... Requesting extermination protocol launch.

C: 这里的事情总算告一段落了，你们也抓紧时间休整一下吧。
E: Things have settled for now, you should rest while you can.

C: 生气？生什么气，我心情好得很，别胡说！
E: Temper? What temper? I'm perfectly calm, thank you!

C: 只要把「菌菌」放在身边，每天都会做很温暖的梦哦！心动了没？
E: You'll have sweet dreams every night as long as Junjun's by your side! Intrigued...?

C: 哦？对，没错！我在拍卖会上看到了好多想要的东西哦！
E: Huh? Y—Yeah, that's right! Hook spotted loads of cool stuff at the auction!

C: …那还是算了吧！
E: ...Well, that really can't be helped!

C: 干脆我自己去宣传一下吧…跟陌生人搭话真是有点不习惯呀……
E: Perhaps I should publicize it myself! Oh... I don't like talking to strangers though...

C: 嗯，现在就先不说鼹鼠党了…谢谢你！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
E: Anyway, enough about The Moles... Thanks for the help, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}!

C: 虎克，怎么哭鼻子了？是被坏人欺负了吗？
E: Hook, what's wrong? Has someone been bullying you?

C: 你们的出价已经很高了，只是没想到下层区还藏了这么多有钱人。
E: You made a very high bid... The problem is that there are a lot of wealthy people lurking in the Underworld.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的台词…很帅气呢，很像在史瓦罗先生的「电影」里看到的那种人…是叫「侦探」，对吧？
E: You sound so cool, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}... You're like one of the characters from Mr. Svarog's movies. Aren't they called detectives?

C: （这「机械宠物」决斗听起来有点恐怖……）
E: (Robot pet battles sound a little frightening...)

C: 其实，克拉拉有个好大好大的保险箱——里面全都是我在下层收集到的、还有修复可能的核心模组。
E: You know, I have a large safe full of core modules that I've gathered around the Underworld.

C: 我相信帕斯卡…它不会故意伤害别人的。
E: I'm certain Pascal would never do anything to harm anyone.

C: ——我们…可以在帕斯卡的核心中加一道「锁」。
E: We can install a "lock" in Pascal's core.

C: 他选择了对你伤害最小的方法。
E: He chose the safest solution for you.

C: 也许在史瓦罗先生看来，帕斯卡会伤害别人是迟早的事…所以他才一直劝克拉拉早点放手。
E: Mr. Svarog believes Pascal will harm someone else eventually... which is why he keeps telling me to let go.

C: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}不用紧张，克拉拉觉得这不是件坏事。因为……
E: Don't worry, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. I don't think it's a bad thing, because...

C: 看到中间那座机械栈桥了吗？穿过那座桥，对面就是人间地狱。
E: Do you see that mechanical gear bridge? When you cross over to the other side, you arrive at hell on earth.

C: 找到了，这就是「密钥」！快，趁还没引起注意，我们——
E: Got it, the encryption key! Quick, before we attract attention, let's—

C: 搞定，能源系统已经重新上线了！去操作栈桥终端吧。
E: That's it, I've reset the energy system! Let's go and operate the gear bridge terminal.

C: 哼，我们连史瓦罗都赢过，还会怕它不成？上吧！
E: Hmph, if we can beat Svarog, we can beat this one. Let's go!

C: 这是什么地方，你应该很清楚，不是吗？朗道家族最熟悉的就是这里，它是抵御裂界的最前线，守护贝洛伯格安宁的核心要塞。
E: Have you forgotten where we are? We Landaus ought to know this place better than anywhere... The outer reaches of the front line against the Fragmentum, Belobog's most strategic protective fortress.

C: 是吗？完全没印象了。
E: We did? I don't remember you at all.

C: 我…因为一件事……
E: I... it's just this thing...

C: 祂的承诺兑现后，布洛妮娅…我们就不必再穷尽此生守护一片废土。你和我，我们会亲眼见证新世界从废墟中升起。
E: When the promise is fulfilled, Bronya... no longer will we have to squander our lives guarding this wasteland. You and I will witness the new world rise from the ruins.

C: 似乎如此…奇怪，裂界怪物应该会破坏人造物件才对。
E: It seems like it... Strange. Fragmentum monsters would usually destroy man-made objects.

C: 别有洞天呀这地方！瞧那些桌子和岗哨，以前有铁卫驻扎在这里吗？
E: Whoa, check this place out! Tables and sentry posts — there must have been Silvermane Guards stationed here once.

C: 许多年前，「星核」的声音第一次在我耳边响起，而我和历代守护者一样，闭目塞听。那时的我就是现在的你，苦苦守着筑城者所谓的「存护」……
E: Many years ago, the voice of the Stellaron sounded in my ears for the first time. I was no different from the previous generations of guardians... I withdrew, refused to hear. I was as you are now — bitterly defending the Architects' so-called "Preservation..."

C: 这座城市…贝洛伯格的命运已经注定，它的未来将在我们手中展开。
E: The fate of this city... of Belobog... is sealed. Its future will unfold in our hands.

C: 结束了……
E: It's over...

C: 对于贝洛伯格来说…这场胜利只是个开始。
E: This victory is only the beginning for Belobog.

C: 我…我不知道该怎么解释，我只是觉得没有别的办法。
E: I... I don't know how to explain it... but I don't think there's any other way.

C: 你愿意帮我吗，陌生人？如果能找到答案…我愿意把有关自己的一切都告诉你。毫无保留。
E: Will you help me, stranger? If you can help me find the answer... I'll tell you everything there is about me. No secrets.

C: 谢谢你…谢谢你愿意留给我最后一丝尊严。
E: Thank you... thank you for leaving me with this one shred of dignity.

C: 也罢…或许像我这样的人不配获得救赎。再见了，陌生人。
E: Well... maybe someone like me doesn't deserve to be saved. Farewell, stranger.

C: （带着她的遗物回上层区吧。肯定有人了解希莉儿担任大守护者的那段历史。）
E: (I should take her relic back to the Overworld. There must be someone who knows about Cyrille's past as a Supreme Guardian.)

C: 别着急，当然不会让你空手离开。我很确定你找到的这件东西是真迹…一笔可观的奖金肯定是少不了的。
E: Relax, I won't leave you empty-handed. I'm highly confident that this thing is an authentic relic... I'm sure you'll be compensated handsomely.

C: …罢了，这个问题并不重要。毕竟你也不知道它们是否具备思考的能力。
E: ...Nevermind. That question doesn't matter. You don't know if they even have the ability to think.

C: 咦？这是…和我当时在官网上看的预览图一模一样，就是有点脏。
E: Huh? This is... exactly like what I saw on the official website. Only this one is a bit dirty.

C: 虽然没有说出口，但我听到你的心声了……
E: You didn't say it out loud, but I know what you're thinking...

C: 等等，我还有些疑惑。
E: Wait, I have some questions.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>货运型的星槎</color>根据货运量区分，基本<color=#dbc291ff>只有红和绿两种颜色。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Freight starskiffs</color> are differentiated by the amount of cargo they carry, and are typically colored <color=#dbc291ff>either in red or green.</color>

C: 这不是相当于什么都没说吗？
E: That doesn't explain anything, does it?

C: 照片我已经很清楚了。
E: I have a clear understanding of the photo.

C: 我这星槎只是小剐小蹭，不碍事的。要怪就怪航道上的人没长眼。
E: My starskiff is just a little scratched, no big deal. If it weren't for those blind drivers on the lane, it would still be in perfect condition!

C: 我将梅姐看作是一个干活不称职的帮手，但是在梅姐心里，我只是她辛苦拉扯竭力照顾的…家人，哎。
E: I've always thought of Mei as an incompetent worker. But in Mei's heart, I'm a family member she has to take care of... *sigh*

C: 没办法，现在到处都乱糟糟的——
E: It can't be helped. It's a mess everywhere...

C: 奇怪，这里也对不上……
E: Weird. It doesn't match up here either...

C: 今天的快乐是书给的，你找到了《要药分剂》其中一册。
E: Today, your happiness came from books. You found one of the volumes of the Compendium of Remedies.

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 关于「菌菌」…
E: About Junjun...

C: 先说好，打坏了你可不赔啊！
E: Let's agree that if I break you, I won't have to pay for you!

C: 功名只应刀尖取，金甲豪杰一丈夫！
E: Fame should be earned at the point of a sword, while glorious armor maketh a lord!

C: 妈妈，你别再劝我了。我已经买好了去曜青仙舟的船票。我一定要投效青丘军，建功立业！就像曜青那位将军大人一样！
E: Mom, I won't change my mind. I've already got my ticket to the Xianzhou Yaoqing. I have to join up with the Verdant Knights and make my contribution! Just like the general of the Yaoqing!

C: 我再考虑一下。
E: Let me think about it.

C: 仄仄平平仄仄平。哼，你肯定是蒙的吧！不过，我认可了。
E: Hmph, that must be a lucky guess. Still, I approve of it.

C: 你真是有天赋呀。
E: You're very talented.

C: 她的前任是一位诗人，她肯定喜欢写诗的人……
E: Her ex is a poet, so she must be into people who write poems...

C: 我可不是老顽固，科员们在这里工作起居，感情生活我自然要全力支持。
E: I'm not an old-fashioned, stubborn person. Our staff members work here, live here, so of course I would support their romantic pursuits and lifestyle.

C: 有点常识的人，都会觉得可疑，但温符瑞科员他…不是一个有常识的人。
E: Those who have some common sense would be considerably suspicious, but Researcher Wen is... not one of them.

C: 嘿嘿，当然当然～
E: Hey! Of course, of course~

C: 我们都已经到地点了，她还没出现，看来是做贼心虚了。你给她发下信息吧，就说「阿青，你根本就不在流云渡，你躲哪去了」。
E: We're here at the location, but she didn't appear. I think she might be feeling guilty. Send her a message and say, "Qingster, you're not at Cloudford at all, where are you?"

C: 不会吧，我是不是认错人了？再仔细看看的话，好像是上次遇到的那个经纪人……
E: It can't be, did I get the wrong person? Lemme look closer... Mm, kinda looks like the manager I saw last time...

C: 你骗了我不止一次。
E: You lied to me more than once.

C: 对吧？在当时那个情景里，我也不认识你们，我只好假装自己是经纪人。
E: Isn't it? In a situation like just now, and the fact that I don't know any of you, I can only pretend to be Daiqing's manager.

C: 对啊，聊天记录我看了，装作楚楚可怜的女孩子，让人泛起同情心之后，就想卖出高价茶叶，这不是诈骗是什么？
E: That's right, I had a look at the chat records. Your M.O. is to pretend to be a pitiful lady, evoking sympathy, before selling them some expensive tea leaves. What is that if not a scam?

C: 没错，犯罪就是犯罪，不管你有没有还回去，骗取他人钱财已经是越线了。
E: That's right, a crime is a crime, whether you return the money or not. Cheating someone out of their money is already crossing the line.

C: 根据青雀牌友的说法，「狐仙黛青」的温柔一如过去，就像没有发生过波澜。
E: According to Qingque's game mates, Foxian Beauty Daiqing is as gentle as she used to be, as if nothing has ever happened.

C: 你们可千万别告诉其他人，如果暴露了，我就要取消你们的资格。
E: Let's keep this between us, alright? If any word of this gets out, I'll have to cancel your membership privileges.

C: 还好有你在旁边，光是我一个人要他紧张起来可不容易。
E: Without you by my side, I don't think I could've intimidated him into playing along with us.

C: 你们为什么会在这里？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 我想了想，要是告诉他那根本不是美丽狐仙，他可能从此一蹶不振。
E: I'm afraid that if he finds out the truth, he'll be devastated beyond recovery.

C: …这点小事，要不我自己去联系吧，就不麻烦你了。
E: Actually, there's no reason to trouble you with such a trivial errand. I'll handle this one myself.

C: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
E: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

C: 所以…总有「极限」无法被超越。这便是追寻永生会得到的必然结局吗？
E: So... there will always be an "insurmountable limit." Is this inevitable in the pursuit of immortality?

C: 人老了…真是百无一用。
E: You really can't do much when you're getting old.

C: 你不知道被失禁的屈辱浸透的滋味，不用被关节炎的刺痛反复折磨，遗忘和失智还没有将你敏锐的脑瓜啃得千疮百孔……
E: You don't know what it's like to be soaked in the humiliation of your own incontinence. The never-ending torture of arthritis. Memory loss and dementia have yet to gnaw into your quick-witted mind just yet...

C: 需要我帮你做些什么？
E: What can I help you with?

C: 十、十王司？！
E: Ah! The T—Ten-Lords Commission!?

C: 来了！
E: Coming!

C: 看来你我同为莳者，{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}。
E: Good to be acquainted with another disciple, {F#sister}{M#brother}.

C: （也许他就是大毫说的「可疑」之人…）
E: (Dahao did say there was suspicion surrounding the Alchemy Commission...)

C: 但我…我绝不是要伤害白露大人！恰恰相反，我带着她从那儿离开，也无形中保护了她的安全。
E: But I... I never meant to harm Lady Bailu! On the contrary, by taking her away from that place, I was protecting her.

C: 嘿嘿，一次草率的实验，一个必然的结果。
E: Hehe, I just was a little sloppy with my experiment. An inevitable result.

C: 我很好，听听海浪的声音，望着这片海，我从未如此清醒过。
E: I'm fine, just listening to the waves and watching the ocean. I've never felt so wide awake.

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 怎么样，有眉目了吗？
E: What happened? Did you find any clues?

C: 但是那儿有云骑军守着…等等，本小姐想到了一个主意。
E: But there are Cloud Knights stationed there... Wait, I have an idea.

C: 该去教训一下挡路的家伙了。
E: About time we taught some roadblocks a lesson.

C: 不许感谢我！…是我没能力…是我没法让你保持原来的样子。
E: Don't thank me! It's my fault... I couldn't preserve you the way you were.

C: 我们沿着这个方向去找吧，要去找到那个人。
E: Let's keep heading in this direction until we find him.

C: 我有点后悔，没能早些和半夏一起出发。她求了我好久。
E: I regret that I didn't set off with Banxia earlier... She begged me for a long time.

C: 不成！地衡司的大哥大姐们虽然待人和气，但思想教育起来可烦人了。
E: No! The Realm-Keeping Commission people are polite, but they're always lecturing me.

C: 呵呵，龙师与龙尊的权争，自古至今相持不休。而到丹枫这一任，强势如他，完全摆脱了长老们的掣肘，令其敢怒不敢言。
E: Haha, the power struggle between the Preceptors and their High Elder is a tale as old as time. And someone as powerful as Dan Feng, who was completely beyond their control, was enough for them to harbor a hidden rage.

C: 哼，跟我有什么关系？我一早说过了，谁想当这龙尊，谁就当去。这名号又不是我非要选的。
E: Hmph, I don't care about my legitimacy — why do they? I told you, whoever wants to be the High Elder is welcome. I never wanted the title.

C: 正是。
E: Precisely.

C: 我听说过，按照书上的记载，这些影子只对它们能认出的人开口说话，身上的水还能入药呢！
E: The books say that these mirages only speak to people they can recognize, and the water on their bodies can be used as medicine!

C: 过去我对于「繁衍」的认知，受限于凡夫俗子的想象，那是多么狭隘啊！持明族的繁衍，未必非要本族血脉传承相续……
E: My understanding of reproduction was limited by ordinary notions — how constrained I was! Why should Vidyadhara reproduction remain trapped within the confines of our race...

C: 如果你问的是持明族传统，我是没有这样的经历的，我早就是无法回到故乡的流浪者了。
E: If you're asking about Vidyadhara tradition, I'm afraid that's something I never had any experience of. I've always been a wanderer... I can never return to my homeland.

C: 未料到此地如此凶险，看来往后行事，须得更稳妥些。
E: I didn't expect this place to be so treacherous. I'll need to be on my guard going forward.

C: 嗯，这当然是最好的。我们走吧。
E: That might be the best approach. Let's go.

C: 真没想到，驭空还有这样的一面……
E: I didn't know Yukong had that side to her...

C: 你是说善战的一面？
E: You mean a warlike side?

C: 她害怕你重蹈挚友的覆辙…
E: She was afraid of you ending up like her friend...

C: 其实真的没什么。我印象里，就只是一些对飞行士生活的感慨。
E: Is it really that big of a deal? I'm sure they're just her notes on life as a pilot...

C: 因为我已经触碰过天空了。
E: Cause... I already touched the sky.

C: 我不相信命运。
E: I don't believe in destiny.

C: 你的决定是？
E: So your choice is...?

C: …睁开眼睛看见的是你，久违的体验呢，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...That felt like a time. It's good to open my eyes and see you back here, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这场冲突都是无可避免的…这就是命运。
E: This conflict is inevitable... it's destiny.

C: 师徒。阿刃说，丹恒的前世是他的徒弟。很久以前，刃的几个徒弟联手杀死了他。
E: Master and disciple. Bladie said that in Dan Heng's previous life, Dan Heng was his apprentice. A long time ago, several of Blade's apprentices joined forces to kill him.

C: 师徒。阿刃说，丹恒的前世是他的徒弟。很久以前，刃的几个徒弟联手杀死了他。
E: Master and disciple. Bladie said that in Dan Heng's previous life, Dan Heng was his apprentice. A long time ago, several of Blade's apprentices joined forces to kill him.

C: ——要让他们血债血偿。
E: ...to make them pay in blood.

C: 可如果这不是{RUBY_B#刃}那家伙{RUBY_E#}寄来的信，又会是谁呢？
E: But if {RUBY_B#Blade}he{RUBY_E#} didn't send the letter... then who did?

C: 「宁如飞萤赴火，不作樗木长春。我会让所有仙舟人知道，应星刹那的一生比他们漫长无用的寿数更有价值。」
E: I'd rather leave this world in a blaze than live until the end of time. I will let all of the Xianzhou know that a brief moment of my life is worth more than their long and meaningless lives.

C: 话虽如此…我还有许多未完成的夙愿，和尚未清偿的仇怨。
E: ...and yet I still have many unfulfilled wishes, and plenty of unfinished business.

C: 我要走了。
E: I have to go.

C: 他当然还活着，但也许还不如死了。
E: Of course he's still alive... but he might be better off dead.

C: 汪汪汪？汪～
E: Woof woof woof? Woof~

C: 呜呜汪，汪汪！
E: Woof! Woof woof!

C: 也是，仙舟上狗都能派活儿…
E: Yep, even the dogs here can give out missions. Nothing shocks me now.

C: 呜汪！
E: Woof!

C: 这些家伙是什么来头？唉，将军说仙舟另有内患，果然不错。
E: Where did these guys come from? Huh, the general was right — there's a threat lurking on the Xianzhou itself.

C: 姐姐既是赏剑之人，我就不卖关子了。正是罗浮的景元将军。
E: I see you're no stranger to the art — I won't keep you in suspense. My master is none other than General Jing Yuan of the Luofu.

C: 彦卿走了几步又退了回来，还是应该回去叫上蒙眼女子，让她跟随同行为好。
E: Yanqing marched several steps forward then returned — It'd better take the lady with blindfold together on the road.

C: （下一页）
E: (Next page)

C: 随着呼吸，细弱的光丝自他的口鼻眼耳中流溢而出。在他高大的躯体上，熟悉的丹腑光芒开始大放异彩。
E: As he breathed, a weak glimmer of light overflowed from his mouth, nose, eyes, and ears. His Core Esse started to shine brightly.

C: （下一页）
E: (Next page)

C: 不然，给你一艘星槎也赶不上我。
E: Otherwise, you won't even catch me in a starskiff.

C: 哦对了！瞧我这记性！您来了，{NICKNAME}！将军的贵客能把咱的求告听在耳中，真是不胜感谢！
E: Oh, that's right! Forgive my forgetfulness — glad you came, {NICKNAME}! It's great to have one of the general's distinguished guests helping us out.

C: 不，我只是渴望纯粹的力量！
E: No. I want power, pure and simple.

C: 别别别…我知道，你肯定是来卧底的。我其实也是！
E: W—Wait a second! You're here undercover, right? So am I!

C: 呼，我装死的本事还行吧？
E: Whew. I did a good job playing dead, didn't I?

C: 丹枢大人是罗浮上…甚至是整个仙舟联盟最有能力的丹士…她是一位盲眼的天缺者，却远比我这样的明眼人更敏锐……
E: Lady Dan Shu is the Luofu's — no, the Xianzhou Alliance's most knowledgeable alchemist... She may be sightless, but she has sharper senses than most...

C: 毕竟，在下也不能真的去取「持明髓」来测试，对吧？
E: ...I could hardly happen upon Vidyadhara bone marrow and test the prescription myself, could I?

C: 这…这可麻烦了！
E: O, the humanity...!

C: 别理我这傻子师弟。他…他不走的话，咱也不能一个人跑不是？
E: Don't pay attention to my silly fellow apprentice... I—If he's set on staying here, I can't exactly leave him here alone, can I?

C: 感谢诸位一路保护。此行善业，吾会上禀十王，若有机缘，定当回报。
E: Thank you for ensuring my safety on this journey. I will report this good deed to the Ten Lords, and if the opportunity arises, I will return the favor.

C: 老夫可不能这么走了，我得找个机会解决司里的麻烦……
E: I can't just abandon the Commission. I must think of a way to solve all this...

C: 就像地衡司的刑捕们办案时搜集证据，还原案发经过一样。推演过去需要的「材料」，既可以是与这段经历有关的「东西」，也可以是当事人的「记忆」。
E: Just as Realm-Keeping Commission officers collect forensic evidence to recreate the scene of a crime, there are materials from which we can infer the past. These may be items related to the experience, or memories of the people involved.

C: 她在说什么……
E: What is she talking about...

C: 你是个人才。
E: You're a genius.

C: 星核催生建木带来的后果将是所有人无法预料的。古人云福兮祸所伏，祸兮福所倚。天道有常，在福祸无可占卜的当下，唯有神通广大的本座才能救罗浮于水火！
E: Nobody could have foreseen the catalyzing effect of the Stellaron on the Ambrosial Arbor. As the ancients said, blessings bring about misfortune, and vice versa. Nature has its own algorithm, and it is precisely when fate wends betwixt blessing and misfortune that I, a master diviner of masterful proportions, am called on to save the people of the Luofu!

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 好在宾馆优质的服务并未受到影响，依然是行政区最好的宾馆。
E: Luckily, the high-quality service of the hotel remains undiminished. It's still the best place to stay in the Administrative District.

C: 说实话，这个布洛妮娅和我印象中的布洛妮娅…差得很远。
E: Hmm, this Bronya is... really different from the Bronya I remember.

C: 小三月，不要继续回忆了。
E: March, leave your memories in the past.

C: 好有意思。
E: How fascinating.

C: 我？哪方面的兴趣？
E: Me? Interested in what?

C: 我打算去一同见证。
E: I'm going to witness its return, too.

C: 我收养云璃长大，是想看到她在天真烂漫的年纪做着天真烂漫的事，而不是踏上「猎剑」的旅途。
E: I took her in to give her a chance at a normal childhood, not to send her on a sword-hunting journey.

C: 好，人都到齐了，该是问话的时候了。
E: Alright, everyone is here. It's time for questioning.

C: （不知有没有遗漏什么线索…）
E: (Did we miss any clues?)

C: 无论如何，作为现场仅有被留下的物证之一，也许会留有窃贼的痕迹也说不准。
E: Regardless, as one of the few pieces of physical evidence left at the scene, it just might hold traces of the thief.

C: 在我离开前，我要求你们为我做一件事。虽然狼妖不在了，但世间依旧还会有怪物。
E: But before I go, I need you to do one thing for me. Even though the wolf demons are gone, new monsters will appear in this world.

C: 花火大人偷走了佐罗的领带，想试试看是否适合自己…谁曾想，佐罗在领带中藏了防盗装置！
E: Miss Sparkle stole Lefton's tie to see if it would fit her... But who knew that Lefton had an anti-theft device installed on it!

C: 花火大人刚把领带套在脖子上，它就开始急速收缩，勒死了可怜的大人！她还想将戒指吞下去，保持呼吸通畅，可惜还是…回天乏术！
E: After Miss Sparkle affixed the tie to her neck, it rapidly contracted, thereby strangling the poor lady! She tried swallowing her ring to preserve her breathing passage, but unfortunately... she was beyond saving.

C: 看，花火小姐给我们出了一道「所有选项都是正确答案」的谜题。
E: Look, Miss Sparkle has given us a puzzle where every single answer is correct.

C: 想必现在…花火小姐正在精心布置下一个「案发现场」吧？
E: Presumably... Miss Sparkle is now carefully arranging the next crime scene, right?

C: 先不玩了。
E: Stop playing now.

C: 有些玉兆小到可以收在手镯珠宝里。大的嘛，就被装进阵法里，用于推演变数，鉴往知来。
E: Some jade abacuses are small enough to fit inside bracelets and jewelry. We put the bigger ones into instruments of calculation so we can simulate the future and learn from the past.

C: 这办不好怕是有被逐出太卜司的危险。办得好，那以后上面交代的任务还不是滚滚而来？
E: If I screw it up, they might fire me... but if I get it done right, they'll send me more work!

C: 但「星核猎手」的秘密非得撬出不可，我也不得不跳脱常理一次——用「卜算」来推知她的意图。
E: ...but the secrets of the Stellaron Hunters cannot remain hidden any longer. I have no choice but to move beyond conventional protocol — we must use divination to ascertain Kafka's intent.

C: 这里该是「业成阵」了。听说这座阵基专用来梳理事物的因果联系。
E: This must be the Karma Terminal. They say this terminal is designed to establish the causal relationships between objects.

C: 我想问的事情有很多…
E: There are so many things I want to ask...

C: 你真的是无辜的？
E: Are you really innocent?

C: 将军。
E: General.

C: 仙舟遭逢剧变，各位却始终不离不弃，赴汤蹈火。我内心感佩。
E: The Xianzhou has met with a dramatic chain of events, and each of you has chosen to stand by us. Your fearlessness moves me.

C: 可能工造司比较爱岗敬业吧。想想太卜司的卜者，什么叫没有对比就没有差距啊……
