E: Maybe the Artisanship Commission are just more dedicated to their work? The Divination Commission's diviners aren't exactly a hard act to follow...

C: 不行啊，我师傅还在里面呢！
E: The worst thing is... my master is still inside!

C: 不信也没关系～星穹列车做好事向来不留名！我们会留意你师傅的。
E: You don't have to believe us — the Astral Express doesn't shout about its achievements! We'll look for your master.

C: 小弟最近…偶感风寒…大师姐，材料组就属您手脚麻利，这动手实操的环节……
E: Well, I... I—I've been feeling a bit under the weather lately. *cough* Yunche, you're the most agile person on the materials team! When it comes to operational efficiency—

C: 那头鹿看似与寻常生命无异，但即便受了致命伤也能瞬间愈合。我算是明白仙舟人为何要追随「巡猎」，铲除「丰饶」了。
E: At first glance, that deer could have been an ordinary life form, but the ability to heal such grave wounds in an instant... I think I finally understand why the Xianzhou decided to follow The Hunt in eradicating the Abundance.

C: 这是在下整理好的《「龙蟠虬跃」药理考》，若策士长急着想看，就要劳烦你呈递上去了。
E: This is a copy of "Pharmacological Studies on the Draught of Draconic Surge." If the chief counselor wants to see it urgently, I'll have to ask you to deliver it for me.

C: 听见没有？老大放你一马，还不快滚！
E: Did you hear that? The boss is letting you off the hook, so scram!

C: 反物质军团来招聘战士？哈哈哈，看来我的恶名终于传播到全银河了啊！我该什么时候来报道？
E: Hmph! The Antimatter Legion wants me to join them? Hah, looks like my reputation has reached the farthest corners of the galaxy! When do I report for duty?

C: 她恐怕走远了。
E: She might've wandered far.

C: 只是这样吗？那…你最好先学会习惯起来。
E: Is that why you're crying? Maybe... you should start getting used to this feeling...

C: 因为在之后的几百年里，像我们这样目不视物的人，还会继续拖累我们遇到的每个人。
E: ...because in the next few centuries, visually impaired people like us will continue to require help from everyone we meet.

C: （呃…头又开始疼起来了…丹枢给我的「餐云承露丹」不会真的有问题吧？）
E: (Argh... There goes my head again... Is Dan Shu sure this Brumedew is safe for consumption?)

C: 太好了，你终于清醒过来了。我还以为要出大事了，惊得一身冷汗。
E: Thank the stars, you're finally awake. I thought we might lose you, I was so worried.

C: 如果我们能找到丹枢，也许能让你当面向她讨个说法吧。
E: If we can find Dan Shu, we might be able to confront her and get some answers.

C: 你体会到转变了吗？多少求药使抵达仙舟，渴望求取不死仙方，却无功而返。
E: Did you feel the shift? So many Elixir Seekers arrive on the Xianzhou in the hope of obtaining the formula to immortality, but none have succeeded.

C: 现在，请你做出选择吧。你如果放下武器，在下会带着兄弟姐妹们离开这里。如果你执意要与在下战斗，那…在下也愿意奉陪到底。
E: Make your choice. If you put away your weapon, I will take my fellow disciples and leave this place. But if you insist upon defying me... then I will have to put an early end to your journey.

C: （唉…去神策府通知一下青镞吧。）
E: (*sigh* ...I'd better report my findings to Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight.)

C: （大把的红色毛发…上面还沾着血迹……看来，那些小羊毫不意外地遭遇了意外。）
E: (A huge tuft of red fur... with blood stains... It seems to be that the sheep have suffered a mishap.)

C: 看，前面那四位就是「放生帮」的「四大善人」了。我先给你介绍一下啊……
E: Look, the four people over there are the Four Benevolent Ones of the Unshackled. Let me introduce them to you...

C: 我放生鳞渊冰泉怎么了？我放生鳞渊冰泉…呃，就不会卷入你们这种莫名其妙的食物链大战！我说你们这到底是在干什么？是在放生啊还是在斗兽啊？
E: What's wrong with releasing the Scalegorge Spring Water? At least I won't get embroiled in this ridiculous battle of the food chain! What exactly are you guys doing? Are you releasing animals or holding a beast fight?

C: 唉，培养「放生帮」后进，在通过试炼的道路上给予帮助也是我的职责啊。所以从某种意义上来说，我们当然算是师徒。
E: Well, it's my duty to train the newcomers of the Unshackled and help them pass the trial. In a sense, that makes you my student.

C: 这、这么快就把我出卖了吗？好吧，一人做事一人当，确实是我劝{F#她}{M#他}一起来的。
E: A—Are you really selling me out that fast? Whatever, I'll take the hit... It's true, I persuaded {M#him}{F#her} to come along.

C: 那个…两位…我们该走了。
E: Um... Excuse me... We should go.

C: 没没没有在怕啊，我、我我只是站不稳而已……
E: I—I—I'm not scared! I just can't stop my legs shaking...

C: 呜呜……
E: *sob*

C: 所以，我想要恢复自由！我想重新去到天外，尾巴大爷，你不想和碎片们重聚，也不想做一辈子的尾巴，不如跟我一起回归天外如何？
E: I want to be free again! I want to return to the cosmos! Mr. Tail, you don't want to regroup with the fragments, and you don't want to be her tail forever — why don't you return with me to the great beyond?

C: 雪衣大人说，被岁阳占据的人不会被夺舍第二次。眼下也只有我能帮到大家了！
E: Madam Xueyi said those possessed by a heliobus can't get possessed again... I'm the only person who can help everyone!

C: 论恶毒，人类比起岁阳真是丝毫不逊色。
E: Tsk, your human tongues are no less poisonous than ours.

C: 可我要是分辨不出，该怎么办？
E: B—But what if I can't tell the difference?

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: 我问得差不多了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 你觉得藿藿性格怎么样？
E: What do you think about Huohuo's personality?

C: 这周围的气氛是不是不太对…我好害怕，你离我近一些，我怕你也不见了……
E: Is it me or is this place starting to feel weirder and weirder...? I'm scared... Can you stay close to me? I don't want to lose you, too...

C: 你有什么资格说这话？你管过她哪怕一天吗？没本事的家伙！
E: And what gives you the right to say that? Have you ever cared about her one bit? Useless bum!

C: 娜娜，你要记得，我们和家族还有那些有钱的逐梦客不一样…我们是匹诺康尼本地人，跟那些有钱人相比，我们没有那么多好选择。
E: Cocona, you must remember that we're different from The Family and those wealthy Dreamchasers... We're Penaconian natives — compared to those rich folk, we don't have many choices laid out for us.

C: 还记得我们聊过的那个星球吗？那里被蓝色的海水覆盖，有分明的四季，有真实的生活。我们会彼此陪伴，也能追求各自的梦想。
E: Still remember that planet we talked about? Blanketed in azure seas, it has distinct seasons and is a place where we can truly live. We would be with each other, and we could pursue our own dreams.

C: 到时候怕忘记了，我的档案证件什么的，都放在你那里好了。
E: In case I forget, I'm leaving my file and papers with you.

C: 我理解…我很遗憾。但庞德希望我能把事情的所有真相都一五一十地告诉您，他相信这样能让您好受一些。
E: I understand... It's just regretful. But Pound hoped that I would tell you the whole truth. He believed that it would make you feel better.

C: 让我…解放吧。
E: Let me... be free.

C: 但我知道…只要还有生命…就还有可能性。
E: But I know... as long as there's life... there are possibilities.

C: 怎么确定你就是本人？
E: How can I be sure that you're really Lesley Dean?

C: （结合之前看到的信件，他大概也是协助构建了莱斯利梦中形象的影迷之一吧？）
E: (With the letter I read before, I could assume that they were one of the fans that assisted in reconstructing the image of Lesley Dean inside the dream.)

C: …无比乐观，无比坚强的哈里，却在这个年纪遭受了意外，结束了生命。
E: ...Harry, so optimistic, ever strong, but also so ill-fated... to have his life cut short by an accident at his age...

C: 看上去，她的世界已经被「我」占满了。站在那里的都是她径自想象出来的莱斯利•迪恩。
E: It seems that "I" have already dominated her entire world. All of those standing there are her imaginings of Lesley Dean.

C: 一段时间过后，她带着新招的船员，过来向你汇报她的工作结果。
E: After a while, with the newly hired crew members behind her, she comes before you to report the state of her work.

C: 这次来，其实还有件事要向您汇报，还请您跟我实地看看比较好——
E: I just have something else to report to you at present. It's better if I showed you in person...

C: 一段时间后，冷芯要求向你汇报工作结果。
E: After some time, Caldwick requests to report in with his results.

C: （该让宾客们见识下什么叫真正的五星级服务了！）
E: (It's time to show the guests what is true five-star service!)

C: 我现在的身份可不止这些！
E: My status is much more than that now!

C: 擅离职守一会儿。
E: MIA for a while.

C: …这两个孩子，感情还真好呢。
E: ...These two kids are such good friends.

C: 你来匹诺康尼是为了city walk吗？
E: Did you come to Penacony to do a "city walk"?

C: …但我能理解你的感受。
E: ...But I get you.

C: 这星海是多么宽广无边啊！下定决心踏上旅程的那一刻，我感觉到身体里有一股强烈的创作欲望被唤醒了。
E: The stars are so vast and boundless! The moment I made up my mind to embark on this journey, I felt a strong inspiration awakening inside me.

C: …巨人族？
E: ...Giants?

C: 你们真以为能拦得住我？
E: Do you guys really think you can stop me?

C: 噢，我懂了！你是想狠狠地教训教训这些可恶的家伙吧？我也一样！
E: Oh, I get it! You can't wait to teach these rascals a lesson, right? Me too!

C: 丹西带着哭腔离开了你们的视线…
E: Dancy leaves with a hint of sadness in his voice...

C: 你想啊，一般来说，一段故事到了最后不都该有个…叫什么来着，哦对，一般不都该有个「升华主题」的环节吗？
E: Look, when a story reaches the end, there's usually a part... What is it called? Ah, a meaningful conclusion that wraps everything up.

C: 就算出师了，她也得好好练习。
E: Even if she had, she would still need to train.

C: 位置给你留好了！
E: We've left a spot for you!

C: 那么，各位，老夫该走了……
E: Well then, it is time for me to be on my way...

C: 我师傅的梦想是造出谁都没见过的星槎。手稿上如果有「星槎设计」、「龙骨结构」、「星槎引擎」之类的词语，应该就没有错了。
E: My master's dream was to create a starskiff that nobody's ever seen before. There should be words like "Starskiff designs," "keel structure," "Starskiff engine" on his manuscript.

C: 实话实说，全部告诉他。
E: Just be honest and tell him the truth.

C: 你来完成手稿中残缺的部分吧。
E: You should complete the missing parts of the manuscript.

C: 多谢两位相救，要不是你们，我可能就没法完成师傅的梦想了……
E: Thank you for saving me. If it weren't for you, I wouldn't be able to fulfill my master's dream...

C: （向前行驶）
E: (Move forward)

C: …希望渺茫，但我不想后悔。
E: ...The chance is slim, but I want to have no regrets.

C: 唉，看来咱们今天的一举一动，都被她算准了。
E: Alas, it seems like she's predicted everything we've done so far.

C: …怎么会这样？
E: ...How could it be?

C: 铖杰将折好的小纸船，送进星槎海风里，轻轻地将它推出去，看着它在星槎海最繁荣的航道里飞行。
E: Chengjie holds a paper boat amid the blowing wind by the Starskiff Haven. Then, he gives the paper boat a push and sets it sailing in the busiest lane of the sea.

C: （将纸船留作纪念）
E: (Keep the paper boat as a memento)

C: 唷，这不是{NICKNAME}吗！有阵子没见你了，最近还好吧？
E: Hey, isn't that the trailblazer? It's been a while since I've seen you around. How you doing?

C: 不过，你们得答应我件事，别让那小子太下不来台，行吗？毕竟他是磐岩镇的搏击冠军，孩子们的偶像——这光辉形象还得想办法维持下去啊，哈哈哈。
E: One thing I will ask — please try not to embarrass him too much, okay? He's the fighting champion of Boulder Town, after all — an idol for all the children. He needs to keep up that image, haha.

C: 别担心，卡西迪，你的事就交给「地火」吧。你就在这儿好好歇着，别被坏心情毁了一整天！
E: Don't worry, Cassidy — Wildfire's on the case. You just rest up here, and don't let this ruin your day!

C: ——你猜对了，就是卡西迪让我们来的！把你偷走的东西交出来，不然就等着见识冠军的拳头吧！
E: That's right. Cassidy sent us here! Hand over what you stole, or be prepared to face the fist of a champion!

C: 这样就行了吧，卢——
E: Luka, is that everyth—

C: 意图不明。{NICKNAME}、「地火」的希儿——你们能否做出解释？
E: Intent unclear. {NICKNAME}, Seele of Wildfire — can you provide an explanation?

C: 与史瓦罗切磋
E: Spar with Svarog

C: 这也是我现在站在这儿的原因——为了让自己觉得鲜活…也为了所有对我寄予厚望的家伙！
E: That's why I'm standing here right now — to feel alive, and also for everyone who put their hope and faith in me!

C: 对「盛会」都有心理创伤了。
E: I'm still recovering from the trauma caused by the last "festivity."

C: 「金伦加深域」…她想从那儿找到什么呢？目前所有关于古兽的研究只是证明了我们对这种生命一无所知……
E: Calenga Abyss... what does she expect to find there? Current research on Leviathan merely proves how little we know about such life forms...

C: 那还用说！这可是巨型斗舰，肯定比民用的星槎大多了！
E: No doubt about it! It's a massive fighter jet! It's got to be larger than a civilian starskiff!

C: 各位，好久不见了啊！
E: Hey, everyone! It's been a while!

C: 公司途径罗浮中转的运输船在即将抵达之际遭到了步离人的袭击。朱明的使节舰出手相助，击溃了这股步离劫匪并收押在船舱里。
E: Here's what happened. An IPC transport ship was attacked by the borisin just before arriving, and the Zhuming's diplomatic vessel came to the rescue. They fought off the borisin pirates and imprisoned them on their ship.

C: 诸位不必客气。今日我与你们一样，是罗浮的客人。
E: No need to be all formal. Today I'm just a guest on the Luofu, the same as all of you.

C: 那是外人对我那些在朱明云骑军和工造司里的师兄师姐们的称呼。
E: That's how outsiders refer to my peers in the Zhuming Cloud Knights and the Artisanship Commission.

C: 不操心这些了，我带各位去客栈吧？
E: Well, let's not worry about that for now. Shall I take you to the inn?

C: 景元，你多心啦。我说过，这次前来除了让孩子见见世面，老朽对罗浮的状况并无说三道四的想法。
E: You're overthinking it, Jing Yuan. As I said, I'm here to broaden my granddaughter's horizons. I have no ulterior motives.

C: 说起来，不知是不是错觉，我总觉得今天的将军有些…唔，有些拘谨？是因为那位怀炎老先生的到访吗？
E: By the way, I don't know if it's just me, but the general seemed a little... hmmm, reserved? Could it be because of Elder Huaiyan's visit?

C: 你们凭什么扣押舰船？
E: How dare you detain our ship? Who do you think you are?

C: {NICKNAME}，咱们还是使些合法手段吧。
E: Let's just do this legally, {NICKNAME}.

C: 放低姿态苦苦哀求他
E: Swallow your pride and beg him.

C: 可是，斯科特先生……
E: But Mr. Skott...

C: 您别生气…这次来看诊的，是一位远道而来的贵客。她实在没办法排上很多年的队，只能在您前面先行问诊了。
E: Please calm down... That person is an esteemed guest who has traveled from afar. She simply couldn't wait in line for years, so we had to let her see the Healer Lady before you.

C: 如果没有建木，这里的景色只怕会更好些。
E: The view here would be even better without the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 看你们的眼神，显然是误会我椒丘只是个妄议武学的孱弱文人。其实，我也不是对杀人技一窍不通的哦～毕竟「医道」本就是生杀一体之术。
E: Seeing the way you're looking at me, it's obvious you think I'm just some feeble academic who likes to blabber on about martial arts. But in reality, I know a thing or two about killing. After all, the art of healing inherently encompasses both life and death.

C: 没问题！朝九晚五，随时奉陪！
E: No problem! I'm ready whenever you need me.

C: …闭嘴吧赤牙，这里的船毕竟不是兽舰，我需要点时间搞定它。
E: ...Oh, just shut up, Red Fang! This is not a beast ship, I need some time to take care of things.

C: 其二，对星核猎手的说辞信之不疑，又将解决危机的重责交托外人，任其触及寿瘟祸迹，是为「失责」。
E: Second, you believed in the Stellaron Hunters' prophecy and entrusted outsiders to solve the crisis, even granting them access to the plaguemark. That was a dereliction of responsibility.

C: 小子，越狱的老毛病又犯了？别打量了，你现在已是自由之身。万一教判官们发现你有什么不轨企图，高低把你抓进去关个几百年。
E: You're still thinking about your old jailbreak tricks, huh? Forget it. You're free now. Just don't do anything stupid, or the judges will throw you back in there and lock you up for a few hundred years.

C: 前往焦热狱层
E: Go to the Pyroscape Hold floor

C: 武弁！底层遭到入侵，速速增援！
E: Wardens! Intruders on the lowest level! Send reinforcements!

C: 机巧鸟虽然断断续续，但简明扼要地为你们提供了情报。
E: Though intermittent in its delivery, the cycrane provides you with succinct and essential intelligence.

C: 最坏的结果是，我们全都折在那头巨狼爪下，幽囚狱被封死。无人知道我们的情况，很长一段时间里，也没人知道他们逃走了。
E: The worst-case scenario, we are all killed by that giant wolf, and the Shackling Prison is sealed off. No one will know about us or about their escape until it's too late.

C: 不必担心，有我在这儿，就算有牺牲，也绝不让你成为第一个。
E: Don't worry. Even if we end up dying here, I won't let it happen to you first.

C: 贱畜，鼓动你那条可怜的舌头，为自己残存的性命摇旗呐喊吧。说说看。
E: Lowly beast, muster up that pitiful tongue of yours and plead for what remains of your life. Speak up.

C: 逃犯只是一枚棋子，那只执棋的手走下这一步，想看到的是一个罗浮人人猜疑，彼此自危的乱局。宣布戒严与推迟演武仪典，就正中了对手下怀，把呼雷带来的恐惧提前放到了台面上。
E: The fugitive is just one piece in the game. The one controlling the pieces wants to spread chaos and suspicion among the people on the Luofu. If we declare martial law and postpone the Wardance, we'll fall into their trap and instill fear in people even before Hoolay actually does anything.

C: 我明白了。只不过将军欲行之事，恐怕很难啊。
E: I understand, but I'm afraid it won't be an easy task.

C: 从远古时代起，步离人一直都在追求更强大的血肉之躯，将狐人视为孱弱之辈。如今为了救出战首，这些人竟愿意伪装成狐人的形貌…他们所下的决心当真不小啊。
E: Since ancient times, the borisin have always sought to have more powerful bodies, regarding the foxians as weaklings. Yet, in order to save their Warhead, they were willing to disguise themselves as foxians... Their determination is quite remarkable.

C: 他以一己之力统合众多猎群，纠集丰饶孽物大军，多次将联盟的军队逼入险地。
E: With his strength, Hoolay united numerous borisin packs, forming a grand army of Abominations of Abundance. They constantly pushed the Alliance's armies into perilous positions.

C: 不过没关系，只要嗅到{RUBY_B#步离}主人{RUBY_E#}的气味，你们总会乖乖回到我们身边的…无论逃多远。
E: But it's alright. As long as you catch the scent of your {RUBY_B#borisins}masters{RUBY_E#}, you obediently return to us... no matter how far you run away.

C: 知道我们在哪吗？
E: Do you know where we are?

C: 地衡司勤务并不擅长处理这类突发情况，<color=#eb4d3dff>若是轻举妄动向他求助，无论成功与否，都会引发严重的后果</color>…切记，千万要谨言慎行。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission orderly is not accustomed to handling emergencies like this one. <color=#eb4d3dff>Understand if you thoughtlessly ask him for aid, you will reap severe repercussions regardless if the outcome is a success or failure.</color> ...Remember: Be mindful of your words and actions.

C: 此刻在这里的不是一群东躲西藏的囚犯，而是走进了羊群的狼。我的狼崽子们正饥肠辘辘，他们渴望吞饮血肉，用你的恐惧来佐餐。
E: What lurks here is not a group of fugitives, but rather a pack of wolves amidst the flock. My cubs are hungry, ready to feast on flesh and blood, reveling in your fear.

C: 将军，虽然我不该质疑您的指示。但如果我没听错，你说你已经获得了关于步离人的一手情报？
E: I know I'm in no position to question your orders, but if I understand correctly, you already have intelligence about the borisin?

C: 将军，在椒丘彻底失联前，我捕捉了他身上的玉兆信号，要不了多久应该能查到他们的落脚处。
E: General, before we completely lost contact with Jiaoqiu, I picked up a signal from his jade abacus. It won't take long before we locate their whereabouts.

C: 你的死亡，亦有价值。它将换来演武仪典的平安；还有被我治愈的飞霄。
E: Even your death has value. It will pave the way for a peaceful Wardance and a fully cured Feixiao.

C: 那肯定是彦卿骁卫赢啊！他的剑术已臻化境，我有幸见过他在星槎海飞剑擒凶的英姿，三招两式就能……
E: Lieutenant Yanqing, obviously! His swordsmanship is on a whole other level! I was fortunate enough to see him in person using his Flying Swords to capture a criminal in Starskiff Haven. I reckon just a few swift strikes and...

C: 可恶，竟然把为师的名头抛到了一边…气死我了。
E: Ugh! You completely left my name out... How rude!

C: 三月七，无敌的三月七！
E: March 7th, the invincible March 7th!

C: 在战场上和自己的敌人攀亲道故，算得上是一种委婉的求饶…呼雷，你是在向我求饶吗？
E: Claiming to have family ties with the enemy sounds to me like an attempt at asking for mercy... Hoolay, are you begging me for mercy?

C: 在你到来之前，我将大开杀戒，让这七百年来黯淡已久的「赤月」再度跳动点燃，用血光照亮这艘众人瞩目的船，让世人认清仙舟有多么软弱无能。
E: Before you arrive, I will slaughter all in sight, allowing the Crimson Moon that has fallen dim for over seven hundred years to once more come to life. I will illuminate this ship with the sheen of blood and show everyone just how weak and powerless the Xianzhou is.

C: …谢谢你，云璃师父。
E: ...Thank you, Master Yunli.

C: 不过可以肯定的是，关于伪造身份，云骑正在抓紧排查溯源……
E: However, you can rest assured that the Cloud Knights are working hard to investigate the source of the forged identities...

C: 我不能代替那些已经不在的人发言。但我知道，月御将军…还有所有一去不回的战士们不是白白送死。
E: I cannot speak for the dead. But, I know that General Yueyu... as well as all the warriors that never returned from battle will not have died in vain!

C: 将军…地面上一切还好吗？
E: General... is everything okay on the ground?

C: 一定是咱们三个的一腔凛然正气让他感到了畏惧！
E: It must have been our awe-inspiring righteousness that struck fear into his heart!

C: 我本以为…这场战斗将会以我和飞霄的死斗做结，却没想到会败在你们的手里。
E: I thought... that this battle would end with a fight to the death against Feixiao. I never imagined I would be defeated by you.

C: …月御将军？！
E: ...General Yueyu!?

C: 「我们如此相似，是为战而生，为战而死的怪物」…你说的一点也没错，呼雷。
E: We are so similar, both monsters that were born for war and will die for war... You were right when you said that, Hoolay.

C: 这是七百年来我唯一的感觉，痛苦！
E: This is the only sensation I have experienced for seven hundred years... Pain!

C: 就连我为客人所备的焚香也要被怀疑…持明一族内部的信任已沦落至此。
E: Even the incense I prepared for guests is considered suspicious... The trust among the Vidyadhara has fallen so low.

C: 听绿火腿夫人刚才的意思…这人应该一直在路上大声唱歌。而且唱得不错。
E: From what Lady Greenham said just now... this person should have been loudly singing on the road, and he sounded decent too.

C: 我倒确实是听见有人唱歌，才跑来看热闹的。但我过来的时候，事情好像已经平息了。不好意思啊陛下，帮不上什么忙。
E: I did hear someone singing, and came by to take a look. But when I got here, the noise had settled down. I apologize, Your Majesty, that I couldn't be of help.

C: 苏安瓜，你疯了？这家伙肯定会去找猎犬报案，咱们的工作就彻底泡汤了。
E: Swanga, are you nuts? This one'll definitely report us to the Bloodhounds and wreck all our progress.

C: 什么？！二姐…她杀了……
E: What!? Second Sister... She killed...

C: 呵…这不都是您的命令吗？况且这世上最没资格指责我滥杀的，不就是陛下您吗？
E: Heh... Weren't they all on your orders? And shouldn't you, Your Majesty, be the last one to accuse me of massacre?

C: 所以…陛下现在要杀我了吗？
E: So... Your Majesty is going to kill me now?

C: 朕不相信任何人，只相信你。而你是怎么报答朕的？你放跑了那些叛党！
E: I believe in no one, but you. And this is how you repay me? You released those traitors!

C: 好的～如果遇到什么烦心事，记得随时来找朕！为臣民排忧解难，是最幸福的事～
E: Sure! If you encounter any troubles, remember to come to me anytime! It gives me untold happiness to dispel any troubles for my subjects!

C: 我明白了…驱动你的是对自身直觉的信任。
E: I see... You're driven by your trust in your intuition.

C: 许久不见，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。希望你最近过得安好。
E: It's been a while, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}. I hope life is treating you well.

C: 漂亮话都让你说了——我可不想干等着！他手上的*那些东西*实在太宝贵了。
E: You can act all righteous as you want, but I can no longer wait! The *things* he is keeping are too valuable.

C: 以查德威克博士现在的状态恐怕无法应门。就由我来开门吧。
E: I'm afraid Dr. Chadwick can't answer the door in his current state. Let me open it.

C: 你有权知道这个故事的来龙去脉，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。假设你没有出于善意将自己的发现告知黑塔，查德威克不知还要被梦的监牢软禁多久。
E: You have the right to learn the story in its entirety, {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}. If you hadn't informed Madam Herta of your discovery out of kindness, it cannot be said how long Chadwick would have been confined here.

C: 你的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: …出了什么状况吗？
E: ...Is there a problem?

C: 再之后，我遣散了团队，废弃了原本的实验室。我想办法带走了一些关键的资料，不希望它们落入别有用心之人手中。
E: After that, I disbanded the team and left the lab. I managed to take some crucial data with me to keep them from falling into the wrong hands.

C: 啊…他们又派了新人来，是吗？
E: Ah... Did they send their guys over again?

C: 冷静下来，二位。我也听到了那个声音……
E: Calm down, both of you. I heard that voice too...

C: 关于「折纸筑梦师」…
E: About the Origami Dreamweavers...

C: 关于这张照片…
E: About this photo...

C: …奥尔拉？
E: ...Orla?

C: 我终于到家啦。
E: I'm finally home.

C: 你需要把他们的故事带回去，重新讲给匹诺康尼，让所有人知道——究竟是谁筑起了这片美梦。
E: You need to bring their stories back, recount these stories to Penacony, and let everyone know exactly who built this Dreamjoy.

C: 奥尔拉？
E: Orla?

C: （咦？远方那只蓝色小鸟…是湛蓝爵士？）
E: (Huh? That blue bird in the distance... Is that Dr. Blues?)

C: 但至少我们可以帮助眼前的人，不是吗？我已经想到了一个办法……
E: But we can at least help those in front of us, can't we? I already have an idea...

C: 这是他们咎由自取。
E: They brought this on themselves.

C: 哎别，何必呢？我就是想说这些食物很珍贵而已，只要你躺在椅子上，按照步骤用餐就好……
E: Oh come on, there's no need for that. I just wanted to put emphasis on how priceless these foods are. Just make sure you lie back in your chair and savor them in order...

C: 当时一定有更好的办法。
E: There must have been a better way.

C: 双方均已提交了书面文件。在辩论开始之前，现场有哪位公民要提问吗？
E: Both parties have submitted their documents. Before the trial starts, do any citizens present have any questions?

C: 在遥远的黄金年代，我们曾经以城邦为界、彼此分立；在并不遥远的纷争年代，我们又以城邦为由、彼此交战…这段历史大家应该很熟悉。
E: In the golden age long past, we were once divided as city-states, separate from one another. In the warring age not-so-long past, we once again divided ourselves as city-states, which became the reason for our battles... I'm sure everyone is very familiar with this stretch of history.

C: 元老话音刚落，两位代表就像竞技场上的角斗士般对峙起来，吵得唾沫横飞。直到双方都精疲力尽、口干舌燥，局面才有所缓和……
E: As soon as the Elder ends his last word, both representatives face off like gladiators in an arena, their verbosity locked in fury and spit. It isn't until both sides have exhausted their energy and spittle, that the situation finally begins to calm down...

C: 是奥赫玛人保卫了城市。
E: It's the Okhemans who protected the city.

C: 不知不觉间，你已经代替了拉莱德的控方代表之位，而且获得了更多支持。
E: Before you realize it, you've replaced Liluder as the prosecutor and garnered more support.

C: 那么，讨论结束，请各位投票……
E: Well, the discussion has concluded. Everyone please cast your vote...

C: 哼哼，我的伙伴厉害吧，快来夸…等等，他们人呢？
E: Hmph. Isn't my partner amazing? You can say it... Wait, where did they go?

C: 太厉害了，恩人！我在奥赫玛这么久居然不知道有你这号文武双全的英雄！
E: My savior, you are truly amazing! After all my years in Okhema, I cannot fathom that I knew not of a hero as both wise and strong as you!

C: 总有一天，我会找到那个地方，躲开这无休无止的纷争和虎视眈眈的死亡，和所爱之人一起享受永恒的浪漫。
E: One day, I will find this place. I will escape this endless strife and ever-looming death and enjoy an eternal romance with the one I love.

C: 因为用「理性」目光来看，「浪漫」确实是一种无法理解的存在吧。
E: That is because if you look at "romance" through the eyes of "reason," it is an existence that one cannot explain.

C: 我或许真的该回到战场，这样我才能知道自己是谁——一个连名字都没有的战士，这是我的命运。
E: Perhaps I should return to the battlefield. That is the only way that I can truly know who I am... A warrior that does not even have a name. That is my fate.

C: 在记忆的更深处，传来了派对的喧闹声……
E: From the depths of the memory emerge the sounds of a lively party...

C: 她死了…不，它或许并没有死亡的概念，只是回到了那本就永恒的安眠中。在那安眠里，没有浪漫与纷争。
E: She's dead... No, perhaps death doesn't even exist for her. She has merely returned to an eternal slumber, a place untouched by romance or conflict.

C: 阿伯，如果车轮从我的身上碾过去，那我是不是会碎掉？就像爸爸那样？
E: Uncle, if the wheel rolls over me, will I break? Just like my father?

C: 我们可以去做工赚钱。
E: We can go and work for money.

C: 恍惚间，你似乎听到了熟悉的呼唤。
E: Suddenly, you hear a familiar voice calling to you.

C: 欧洛尼斯，伟大的命运泰坦，我不奢求您原谅我的罪过。我是最该死的<color=#dbc291ff>骗子</color>，为了自己的私心，不惜让这么多人因我送命。
E: Oronyx, the almighty Fate Titan, I beg not for your forgiveness for my sins. I am the most despicable of <color=#dbc291ff>liars</color>, and for my own selfishness, I sacrificed the lives of many innocents.

C: 我从未想过，真相会是这样。母亲，最后一次见到她的时候，我还不是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的圣女。
E: I've never once thought this would be the truth. My mother... the last time I saw her, I wasn't {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Holy Maiden yet.

C: 按照圣城卫士的说法，命运已经决定了你没法见到帕西提亚。
E: According to the city guard, destiny has already decided you will not meet Pasithea.

C: 加油，就像无名客间不成文的规定：勇往直前，贯彻始终。
E: Keep going! It's like an unwritten rule among the Nameless: press forward and see it through to the end.

C: 虎克老大做担保…总感觉更加可疑了！
E: Hook's vouching for it... somehow that makes it even more suspicious!

C: 我不想独自启程。
E: I don't want to set off alone.

C: 转圈…转圈…转圈圈呜呜……
E: Turn around... turn around... turn around... Wooo...

C: 我重置了她昨天的记忆数据…今天的她就是一张白纸，会画出什么样图案，就看你的发挥了。
E: I reset her memory from yesterday... Today she is a blank slate. What she will learn today is up to you.

C: 学习就是我的全部爱好，我总觉得学的还不够多，要追上大家的脚步，我还差得远呢。
E: Learning is my only hobby. I can never feel like I have learned enough. I have a long way to go.

C: 是的，人类的知识文化无穷无尽，我只恨自己不能一口气通通学完。
E: Yes, human knowledge and culture are endless. I hate not being able to finish it all in one breath.

C: 其他科员怎么办？就干等？
E: What are the other researchers meant to do, then? Just keep waiting for their food?

C: 你瞎嘀咕些什么呢？马桶？什么马桶？
E: What are you mumbling about? Toilet? What toilet?

C: 对了，你跟阿德勒说一声，之后要是查到什么了记得先告诉我。
E: Right, tell Adler that if he finds anything, he needs to let me know first thing.

C: 我就想着可以问问他在哪儿找到的，能不能分我一个半个的…哎，看来你也是同道之人啊。
E: I wanted to ask where they got that thing from, and if they can give even a bit of the luck to me... Haha, seems like you're also looking for this thing.

C: 你很可疑。
E: You're pretty suspicious.

C: 但我真的没想到啊，「复古鎏金古铜色」和「夏日冷萃丛林绿」看名字挺新奇的。
E: But I really didn't expect this. Retro Glazed Bronze and Summer Blooming Forest... they sound so new and special based on the name.

C: …好说好说，你消消气。
E: ...Okay, okay. Calm down.

C: 他说你们两家有些渊源。
E: He said your families have some history.

C: 她说…
E: She said...

C: 干巴巴的讨论永远比不上实际行动。走吧，我已经物色好了今天的拍照地点。
E: Meaningless discussion can never be compared to real action. Come on, I've found a photo spot for today.

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 你能否带着照片去帮我问问，看看她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: Could you show the photo to her and ask her if she's willing to be my friend?

C: 原来如此，这好像就说得通了……
E: I see, now it makes sense...

C: 听说你需要帮助。
E: I hear you need help.

C: 说唱歌手…哇，好酷！尤利安也想成为酷酷的说唱歌手！
E: A rapper... That sounds so cool! I want to become a cool rapper, too!

C: 其实我不想多管闲事…
E: Actually, I don't want to meddle...

C: 真是可爱的小花…没想到老爸还有这份心，妈妈看到了也会很开心的。
E: Aww... I didn't expect him to be this sensitive. Mom would be very happy too when she sees these pretty flowers.

C: 我怎么能变得和你一样聪明？
E: How can I become as clever as you?

C: 事先提醒您，这些题目的难度可不低…答不上来也不丢人哦。不多说了，看题面吧。
E: I would like to remind you in advance that these questions are far from simple... and it's no shame to get them wrong. Onto the quiz, then.

C: 您今天特地前来，是有什么事务需要教育部协助吗？
E: For what purpose have you come today? What task requires the support of the Ministry of Education?

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 小女子听说塔米拉小姐今天会去买花，拜托你去花店看看她是怎样买花的吧~谢谢你啦~
E: I heard that she's going to buy some more flowers today. Please, can you go to the florist and observe how she buys her bouquets? Thank you so much~

C: 塔米拉小姐是忍不住要立刻带一束花回家吗？真浪漫啊…只买最平凡的花这一点，也好浪漫啊…我不由得联想到了阿尔……
E: Are you that eager to take one bunch with you on the way home? That's so romantic... Just like buying ordinary flowers like this is romantic, too... I can't help but think of Arte...

C: 这不是塔米拉小姐吗？稀客啊。您是要住店还是要喝杯下午茶呢？
E: Is that Tamila? A rare blessing. Would you like to stay in the hotel, or perhaps a pot of tea?

C: 我可太会说服人了，放心吧！
E: I'm very good at persuading people! Leave it to me!

C: 你被困在了…过去。
E: You're... stuck in the past.

C: 我听不懂…我才刚刚上小学…很多事情都不明白……
E: I don't get it... I just started grade school. I don't understand a lot of things...

C: 随后，这被困于裂界的小小回声很快便化作微光、四散无踪了。
E: Then, this tiny echo trapped in the Fragmentum scatters into particles of light and disappears.

C: 意识到问题了吗？
E: Do you see the problem now?

C: 哦？这难道是你的设计图纸？介意让我观摩观摩吗，大兵？
E: Oh, are these your design blueprints? Mind if I have a look, soldier?

C: 你正打算将漂流瓶扔回海里的时候，突然有个声音叫住了你。
E: Just as you are about to cast the drift bottle back into the ocean, a voice calls out to you.

C: 你刚喝完这杯茶没多久，便睡着了。
E: You fall asleep almost as soon as you finish this cup of tea.

C: 唔，容我想想还能再加点什么进去呢……
E: Hmm... let's see, what else should I add...

C: 相比于紫红色的斑岩，白色的石灰岩无疑是一种雕刻成本更低的材料…但也更容易被雨水侵蚀。它会在未来的黑潮中幸存下来吗？你不知道。
E: Compared to the rock mottled in purple and red, the white limestone is indubitably a more economical sculpting material... but is also more susceptible to erosion from rainwater. Will it survive the future black tide? You don't know.

C: 塔兰顿的赐福
E: The Benediction of Talanton

C: 收集火种、再创世界…泰坦的力量真能做到那种事？
E: Collecting the Coreflames and creating the world anew... Is the strength of the Titans really capable of such things?

C: 星际和平公司对此等破坏公共财产、威胁银河安全的恶劣行径予以强烈谴责，并向银狼追加十亿信用点悬赏。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation strongly condemns such acts of public property destruction and threats to cosmic security, and has increased the bounty on Silver Wolf by one billion credits.

C: 悬于半空的浴池如是被万众仰望，在欢呼齐颂间他们凯旋。
E: The floating bath is looked up by the people, as the heroes return triumphantly among the chorus.

C: 阿格莱雅，你理应知道，我只想亲手熄灭我族神明早已污浊的神魂。至于那颗火种，你们随意安排便是。
E: Aglaea, you must understand that all I want is to extinguish the long tainted soul of my clan's gods with my own two hands. As for the Coreflame, make arrangements as you see fitting.

C: 毕竟，圣城已是人们唯一的庇护之所，在此处你无法寻得的，恐怕已在这世上绝迹。
E: The holy city is the only solace for mankind now, after all. I fear that what you cannot find here is already lost to this world.

C: 歌耳戈，真是出乎朕的意料。
E: Gorgo, you have truly exceeded my expectations.

C: 不惧锋刃悬喉，以彰勇气之形貌；
E: Unfearing of blade at the throat, manifesting the visage of courage.

C: 若他果真身负悬锋城的未来，朕这颗头颅就是让他拿去又如何？
E: If he will truly bear the future of Castrum Kremnos, what does it matter if he takes my head?

C: 我愧对歌耳戈王后。如今，悬锋城外有一股孤军流窜，据说首领是拒绝死亡之人。我要去寻那孤军，我相信…那是迈德漠斯回来了。
E: I failed Queen Gorgo. Now, I hear that Castrum Kremnos has a detachment army roaming outside the city. Rumor has it that their leader is one that defied death. Krateros. I am going to find that lone army. I believe... Mydeimos has returned.

C: 据说有喝醉的贤者曾经在上面题过一行字——「你们想升高时，就向上仰望。我向下俯视，因为我已经升高。」…可能是在描述这种类似路灯的生物的升降功能。
E: It is said that a drunken sage once inscribed a line on it: "When you seek to rise, look up. I look down, for I have already risen." Perhaps it's describing the lamp-like creature's lifting and lowering function.

C: 在星际间的不少文明中，「巨大的轮子」都作为「命运」的隐喻而存在着。「每种相似的故事都至少会发生两次——一次作为严肃的喜剧，一次作为荒诞的悲剧。」
E: In many interstellar civilizations, "giant wheels" symbolize "fate." "Every similar story will occur at least twice — once as a solemn comedy, and once as an absurd tragedy."

C: 「学医救不了翁法罗斯」——曾有助手抛下这样的话语，离开了这座微小而明亮的庭院。庭院的主人没有责怪这位助手，她知道同一种光明无法抹平所有人的心伤。
E: "Medicine cannot save Amphoreus!" — a former assistant once tossed out this remark before leaving the small yet radiant courtyard. The courtyard's master did not blame the assistant. She knew that a single kind of light could not heal every wounded heart.

C: 虽然只是权宜之计，但足够它们撑到逐火之旅的尽头了。
E: Though only a temporary measure, it's enough to sustain them until the end of the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>小花园旁的断木上</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>on the broken wood near the small garden</color>...

C: 是怎么发出█的声音的？
E: How did you make the █ sound?

C: 呵…真没想到，我们最后的诡计，竟然建立在对彼此毫无保留的信任之上……
E: Ha... Who would have thought that our final trick would be built on unconditional mutual trust...
██ ??█$descend█?"!?!███ sulfur! charcoal█-██for for for for "███/█ perished █??█████!/██ vile and flawed, vile █?█***██ mammals█!

C: 叶片间扑面而来的热风让人联想到列车上的控温系统，亦或是狂转的电脑风扇——或许，它们的作用一致。
E: The rush of hot air through the leaves is reminiscent of the temperature control systems on a train or the whirring fans of an overworked computer... perhaps they serve the same function.

C: 战争，战争从不改变。
E: War... war never changes.

C: 丹恒曾经说过「击云从不离身」——现在想来，「击云」离身的次数还是挺多的。
E: Dan Heng once said, "Cloud-Piercer never leaves my side" — but in hindsight, it sure has left his side plenty of times.

C: 丰盛的食物静静陈列，仿佛在等待一场盛宴——或许将来的某天，你能与伙伴们在此齐聚、共同分享。
E: A feast laid out in silence, as if waiting for the party to start. Maybe one day, you and your companions will gather here and dig in together.

C: 于「再创世」的尽头，你们再度相见了。少女仍挂着如魔法般迷人的微笑——与她在记忆中的模样分毫不差。
E: At the end of Era Nova, you met her again. Her smile, like magic, was just as you remembered.

C: 你在码头伫立，望见孤帆摇曳于遥远海平，水波粼粼，时间仿佛在此刻温柔停驻。
E: You stand at the dock, watching a lone sail sway on the distant horizon, the waves shimmering under the soft, frozen flow of time.

C: 「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，生于光历<unbreak>3749</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
E: "Dux Brumalis" Seneca. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3749</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

C: …观点不错，牙尖嘴利，有些本事。
E: ...Well, well, good point. You do have some solid skills.

C: 呀，是呀，差点闹笑话。*我们*想想…就补在画的角落里吧！
E: Oh, you're right! That was close. Let us think... How about adding them in the corner of the painting?

C: 花微微摇曳了一下。
E: The flower swayed ever so slightly.

C: 别忘了，欧洛尼斯一直在倾听着长夜密语。仅凭它自己，可不知道你们的名字，以及<color=#dbc291ff>真正的星空</color>。
E: Don't forget, Oronyx has been listening to the whispers of the night. By themself, they wouldn't know of your names, nor the <color=#dbc291ff>true starry sky</color>.

C: 要——坏掉了——
E: I'm... breaking down...

C: 他们的声息很小，也往往将痛呼隐于人后，可那满腔的遗憾和对「再创世」的疾呼，却遗留至今——
E: Their breaths were faint, their cries of pain often hidden from others. Yet their regrets, their desperate calls for Era Nova still echo to this day.

C: 很抱歉，我限制了别人对我的回忆。
E: I'm sorry, but I've restricted others from having memories of me.

C: 谢谢你给了我启发，{NICKNAME}教官。哔——啵。
E: Thank you for enlightening me, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}. Beep-boop.

C: 没、没问题，您慢慢来。前路艰险，可得做好万全准备再出发。
E: N—No problem, take your time. It's dangerous ahead. Make sure you're completely prepared before you set out.

C: 汪汪？汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof? Woof woof woof!

C: 拿走的东西该还回来了。
E: What was taken should be returned now.

C: 有没有办法不见？
E: Is there a way we can avoid meeting?

C: 魔法少…呃，少男。
E: Magical gi— Um... boy.

C: 饭搭子。
E: Meal buddies.

C: 没，我只是死了。
E: No, I'm just dead.

C: 很简单的，你去操作这些引航罗盘，货运星槎就会被引导来码头卸货了。
E: It's simple, you go ahead and operate the navigation compasses, and the freight starskiffs will be guided to the jetty to unload their cargo.

C: 滴答！钟表小子启动！
E: Tick tock! Clockie is in action!

C: 做梦吧你？
E: Are you daydreaming?

C: 这不正做着呢吗？
E: I am.

C: 但自从这工造司遭了难，没有徒弟敢跟我进来，你来得正好，做我的助手吧！
E: But ever since the Artisanship Commission suffered the disaster, no apprentice dared to come in with me. You came just in time! Why don't you be my assistant?

C: 嚯，你这小娃儿不简单啊！已经足够称得上是我公输梁的助手了。
E: Oh, you are indeed someone of value and can be my assistant.

C: 要是利用立场将岁阳充能粒子束缚成阵刀形状，那刀锋充满高热的等离子体，破阵杀敌必然无往不利；等到收刀入鞘时再补充岁阳能量……
E: If we use a force field to bind heliobus charged particles into the shape of a saber, its blade will be filled with high-heat plasma, making the weapon deadlier. We can replenish the heliobus energy until the saber is sheathed...

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 喂，算你幸运，今天有幸得到像我这样的大师指点。
E: Hey, consider yourself lucky today to have received guidance from a master like me.

C: 嘿，夸你一句你还得瑟上了。
E: Oh. Turned cocky from a single bit of praise, have we?

C: 我要是抽卡不出货你赔我啊？
E: Really, I'm lucky? So, if I go pull for characters in a game right now, are you going to make it up to me if I don't get a 5-star?

C: 前所未有的复杂棋局，从未公开的独家设计！
E: A chess match of never-before-seen complexity, an exclusive design previously unrevealed!

C: 这话可不敢乱说！还是要多在自己身上找原因，不能做不出好游戏就怪玩家！
E: You shouldn't make such a bold claim! It's important to reflect on ourselves more and not blame players when we aren't making good games!

C: 我准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 这种积木散发着不祥的气息，时间长了，会干扰我们的心神，害我们故障频出……
E: These blocks emit an ominous aura, and over time, they interfere with our minds, causing us to malfunction...

C: 既然都被关起来了，这里也不必遵守隐秘组织的要求，以代号称呼彼此…我这名字也告诉您无妨，我叫西桥，被抓之前一直是工造司的匠人。
E: Since I'm already locked up, there's hardly any reason to adhere to the secret society's requirements and address one another by our aliases... I see no harm in divulging my name. I'm Seymour, formerly a craftsman within the Artisanship Commission before my arrest.

C: 如何，游客？对占卜流程还满意吗？
E: How about it? Were you satisfied with the divination experience?

C: 所以，是你本人在说话？
E: So, it's you speaking?

C: 好啊，知无不言。
E: Sure. Ask away.

C: 嗯…有位忠心耿耿的织者仍无法释怀当年的悲剧。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一幅绘制战甲的壁画上</color>追忆当初，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a loyal weaver who remains haunted by a past tragedy. The golden thread brings tidings: They now gaze <color=#dbc291ff>upon a mural depicting war armors</color>, lost in memories of that fateful day. Go there and seek them.

C: 嗯…有位织者崇尚公平。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>楼梯的侧面</color>，以身为砝码，确保两侧的对称与公平。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who upholds the value of fairness. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>at the side of the stairs</color>, their form stretched out as a scale, balancing symmetry and ensuring fairness on both sides.

C: <unbreak>13</unbreak>盆。
E: Thirteen flames.

C: 更可恨的是，坐拥如此富丽堂皇的屋子，竟然还为了个宝箱和咱过不去…您牙缝里漏下来一些，够我吃穿用度一整年了。
E: What is even more loathsome is that you live in such radiant luxury and would still squabble with me over a mere chest... Just the excess that leaks from the gaps in your teeth would keep me clothed and fed for a whole year.

C: 您竟纡尊降贵，凭附到了凡人身上，难怪我认不出来呢。
E: To have descended from godhood and possessed a mortal shell, it's no wonder I didn't recognize you.

C: 至于您打算把它当作真相，还是一个无伤大雅的吹牛故事，就是您自己的事了。
E: Whether you take it as truth or just a harmless tall tale, that's up to you.

C: ——诡计当然得包含偷袭！
E: Tricks must involve surprise attacks!

C: 嗐，看在我们老交情的份上，快开始吧！
E: Come on, for old times' sake, let's get started!

C: 咳咳…想当年，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}老祖有句话是怎么说的来着……
E: Ahem... What was it that ancestor {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} used to say...?

C: 哦哦，没有别的意思，这是我们意念合一的意思——咳咳，总之不是玩游戏之类的意思，我仍是一个需要尊重次元壁的角色。
E: Oh, no, no, don't get me wrong. It just means we were mentally in sync. Ahem, definitely not anything game-related. I'm still a character who respects the fourth wall.

C: 我受不了这些该死的机关，它们锁住的大宝箱就归你了！只要早点把我放出来就好……
E: I can't deal with these blasted mechanisms anymore. The big chest they're locking up? It's all yours! Just get me out of here as fast as you can...

C: 桀桀，那当然要啦！巴特鲁斯特别为您准备了一些「好东西」——瞧一瞧，看一看，要是钱不够了还可以找扎格列斯去换…哦，我是说扎格列斯之手，还有类似的那些东西。
E: Hehehe, of course! Bartholos has prepared some "good stuff" specially for you! Take a look, have a peek, and if you're short on money, you can always trade with Zagreus... oh, I mean the Hand of Zagreus, and things like that.

C: 好一个…格物致知。
E: You're really getting to the bottom of this, aren't you?

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——「您的虔诚信徒潘，她母亲所在的冥界究竟在何处？」
E: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where exactly is the nether realm where Pam's mother resides"?

C: 但无需担心，这些琐碎步骤就全都简省吧，以辅祭的贡献，我倒要看看谁有意见。所以，你想问些什么？
E: But no need to worry. We'll skip those tedious steps. With your contributions, I'd like to see who'd dare object. So, what would you like to ask?

C: 不出所料。
E: As expected.

C: 再说了，我这么不起眼，也没有人会闲到到处去找虫子，对吧？
E: Besides, I'm so inconspicuous. Nobody would bother looking for a bug, right?

C: 我明白，事态紧急，{NICKNAME}阁下一定有更重要的事去做。愿天父庇佑您！
E: I understand. The situation is urgent everywhere. You must have more pressing matters to attend to. {NICKNAME}, may the sky father guide you!

C: 这次也没有大呼小叫。
E: Huh. No dramatic reactions this time.

C: 哈哈。那就…借您吉言。
E: Haha... Well then, I'll take your word for it.

C: 一生着实过于仓促…{NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你，帮助我做了一件能让自己感到佩服的事情。
E: Life is far too short... {NICKNAME}, thank you for helping me do something I can be proud of.

C: 啊啊，艾…格勒。怀念的发音。是的，是的…
E: Ah, Aqui.. Aquila. What a nostalgic sound. Yes, yes...

C: 唯有彼此齐聚，才是无瑕斑斓的天空。
E: Only when they come together, does the sky become flawless and radiant.

C: 就是这里…接下来，只要把吊坠放入池中就好。
E: This is it... now, just place the pendant into the pool.

C: 谁在说话？
E: Who's talking?

C: 你应该给我点尊重了。
E: You should show me some respect.

C: 你只关心你的模拟宇宙！
E: You only care about your Simulated Universe!

C: 算了，没事。
E: Forget it, it's nothing.

C: 结束。
E: Finish.

C: 我需要那些功能！
E: I need those other features too!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「机器利用你的意识，为『模拟宇宙』增添变量，从而产生『或然的世界』。接着，外面的我利用研究裂界掌握的遗器复制技术，把这部分数据提取出来，制作成『位面饰品』。它就像是一种遗器，只不过更庞大…也更浓缩。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The machine uses your mind to add variables into the Simulated Universe, thereby generating what we call a Probable World. Then, I will use Relic-cloning technology mastered from Fragmentum research to extract this part from the data, creating a Planar Ornament. It's like a kind of Relic, but much bigger... and much more condensed."</color>

C: ——祂真的尚未出现？你不知道，但你的心思开始散漫，螺丝咕姆的声音渐渐扭曲；你听到更多躁动的想法在你的脑中乱窜……
E: Has the Aeon really not appeared yet? You don't have the answer, but you are getting distracted. Screwllum's voice becomes distorted, and more chaotic thoughts are running amok in your mind...

C: 你忽然感到麦穗缠绕你的肋骨，它们试图贯穿你的肉体，而溢出的痛苦又被莫名地愈合…许多命途行者的经历一一浮现，你处于一种永不止息、充满生命力的生态循环内部。而你睁开眼——发现自己身在一片城墙的外侧，在被偷走太阳的国度里，失去了神的信徒不再睡眠，他们将你的形象浇灌在壁画里。他们向你发问——他们向你求救！
E: Suddenly, you can feel ears of wheat wrapping around your ribs as they try to run your body through. Yet, the overflowing pain is somehow healed... One by one, the journeys of many Pathstriders surface, and you are located inside a perpetual and vibrant ecological cycle. You open your eyes to find yourself standing outside a fortress wall. In the nation where the Sun has been stolen, the believers who have lost their god will wake up from slumber. They include your portrait in the murals. They question you... they beseech you for help!

C: 你抚摸着胸前伊莱狄希纳军队的徽章…你的部队刚与赏金猎人们爆发了冲突——是的，你当然知道这是蠹星，不然你的周围怎会有这么多的沙虫？
E: You caress the Elydichnan army insignia affixed to your chest... Your regiment has just erupted into conflict with bounty hunters... And yes, you know well that you are on Lepismat, for where else would you be surrounded by countless sandworms?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「绿丘」盆栽星微生物信号</color>：「绿丘」被某位天才建立之初，只是为了满足他对微小智慧生命狂热的观察欲：他欣赏它们梳洗、进食、解手，如痴如狂——直到整个绿丘被一只真蛰虫踩扁！
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A signal from the microbes on the potted plant "Greenhill"</color>: The "Greenhill" was created by a genius just to slake his obsessive desire for observing tiny intelligent beings. He marveled his little subjects as they groomed, nourished, and excreted in a state of ecstasy, until the entire Greenhill was trampled by a single True Sting!

C: 那是一整个世界的*背面*。那「自灭者」终于找到了失去的「自我」…他扑了上去，然后就在你眼前湮灭了，一瞬间的事儿。
E: The shadow is actually the *back* of an entire world. At that moment, the Self-Annihilator finally reclaims his lost self... He merges with the shadow, and his very existence dissipates into oblivion in the blink of an eye.

C: 春光难耐的下午，你身处一堆叽叽喳喳的螺丝与齿轮中，这是你令这群智械第一次见到有机生命——一位戴帽的旅人在星际航行中意外落脚无机生命地带。
E: You find yourself amidst a pile of gibbering screws and gears on a vibrant spring afternoon. This is the first time these Intellitrons have ever come into contact with organic life, as the result of an accidental landing by a hooded traveler on an interstellar voyage.

C: 你看见熟悉的大脚筑城者靠着墙根，跟你无力地数落自己的贫穷：他总与妻子在最便宜的时段去吃被「筑炉」烤灼过的鼻行兽；为了生计，他们只能住在被砖墙埋住的护城室里，享受片刻的共处与安宁；当他们走出护城室后，贡多拉恰好经过这片星系。
E: You see a familiar Bigfoot Architect leaning against the base of the wall. He feebly laments his own poverty: He would always pick the cheapest hours to eat Nosewalkers grilled by the Furnace with his wife. To make ends meet, they could only live in a bastion room buried by bricks, enjoying scant moments of peace with each other. When they leave the bastion, the gondola just happened to be traversing this star system.

C: 你继续向前走。你走进一个巨型装置，面前有一个展台：屏幕里展示着一些科技更为发达的星系，部分『虫群』在那里已成为巨型的战争兵器。许多先锋部队以纤细甲壳节肢撑起庞大身躯，巨型的蠕虫站在它们身后作为后卫——它们的圆形巨口中是闪烁金属光芒的利齿。
E: You move ahead and enter a huge device. There is a platform in front of you, where a screen is showing some of the more advanced stellar systems. Some Swarms have evolved into large weapons of war there. Many vanguard units support their massive bodies with slender, armored limbs, while giant worms stand behind them as defenders. Inside the worms' round, gaping mouths are sharp teeth that give off a metallic glint.

C: 「<color=#dbc291ff>第一个疑点！</color>还记得吗？蠹星系的前史是一片空白。那本是个与文明一词无缘的世界，却突然成为众多命途的交汇点。<color=#dbc291ff>塔伊兹育罗斯的诞育或是偶然，但蠹星系的灭绝却不自然！</color>」黑塔洋洋得意地开始补充，「是谁引发了这场灾难——『贪饕』？『秩序』？『欢愉』？还是在众多琐碎细节中一闪而过的『终末』？至少现在我们不得而知。」
E: "<color=#dbc291ff>The first point of suspicion!</color> Do you remember? There was nothing regarding the history of the Lepismat system. It was supposed to be a world that was the farthest thing from civilization, and yet it suddenly became a hub for myriads of Paths to intersect. <color=#dbc291ff>Tayzzyronth's birth may have been coincidence, but the Lepismat system's destruction most certainly wasn't a natural occurrence!</color>" Herta smugly adds, "Who caused this disaster? The Voracity? The Order? The Elation? Or was it the Finality that flashes across the countless trivialities and details? We don't know yet, for now."

C: 是『人之大欲』。
E: It is "Man's greatest desire."

C: 我想螺丝也注意到了。我从没想过什么事能瞒得过这些天才，虽说我是背着他俩给模拟宇宙加了点小手脚，只不过我是为了好玩。现在我想知道：他俩有没有也背着我干这回事？
E: I reckon Screwllum's also noticed. I never thought of keeping any secrets from these geniuses, though I did mildly tamper with the Simulated Universe behind their backs, even if it was just for kicks. Now what I want to know is: Did those two do something similar behind my back?

C: 铁、锈、血…这些概念涌入你的脑海。#27鲁珀特，这就是你成为天才后决心要独行的道路吗？这路的前方只有尖啸与哀嚎，有些声音充满*快乐*，有些声音却仿若*地狱*。你也可以假装它们*不存在*。只要你假装，世界就是真的……
E: Iron, rust, blood... These concepts rush into your mind. #27 Rubert, is this the lone path you have determined to travel since you became a Genius? The path ahead holds nothing but screams and howls. Some of the voices are filled with *happiness*, and others seem like *hell*. You can pretend they *do not exist*. As long as you pretend, the world is real...

C: 在第十七下钟声停止时，#27鲁珀特死于#4波尔卡•卡卡目之手——这是两位天才的相遇，她结束了它的旅途，还有它带来的寰宇战争。
E: When the <unbreak>17</unbreak>th chime stops, #27 Rubert is killed by #4 Polka Kakamond. It is an encounter between two geniuses. She has ended its journey as well as the universe-wide war it brings about.

C: 一位矮小的「合伙人」递来情报，执行董事在上次与柯拉帕乌交涉过后，终止了和流光忆庭的合作，「政宣部」特劳拉•法恩莎扶持的忆泡技术让步于联觉信标。现在，公司内部对特劳拉•法恩莎的地位是否会被撼动议论纷纷。
E: According to a short Associate, the executive director of IPC has terminated the collaboration with the Garden of Recollection after their last discussion with Korapao. The Memory Bubble technology that Telora Farnsha of the Outreach and Engagement Division vouches for is forced to give way to the Synesthesia Beacon. Speculation is rife about Farnsha's status in IPC.

C: 「你了解<color=#dbc291ff>『鲁珀特』</color>？」女人漫不经心地问。
E: "Do you know <color=#dbc291ff>Rubert</color> well?" The woman asks absent-mindedly.

C: 接受授帽。
E: Accept the hat.

C: 你无法…终止*反有机方程*。你只能看着它运行。
E: You cannot... stop the Anti-Organic Equation. You can only watch it run.

C: 从内部撕开它们！
E: Tear them open from the inside!

C: 它无止境地吞没着过往的物质和信息，像是古典故事里，潜藏在漩涡中的海魔。
E: It endlessly devours material and information of the past, like a sea creature from a classic story lurking in a deep whirlpool.

C: 璀璨的光点将周边的视界都一并扭曲，它撕扯着时空结构，将要给那颗中年行星一次温暖的拥抱。
E: The brilliant spark of light warps the absolute horizon around it as it tears at the structure of time and space. It prepares to wrap this middle-aged planet in a warm embrace.

C: 答对了，你是当今世上最强的存储设备，你可以记录这颗星球上所有的图文资料。
E: Correct. You are the most powerful memory storage device to exist to date. You can record all graphical and literary materials on this planet.

C: 「那帮『虚构史学家』是疯子么，还在追杀咱们。」小雅扬起一铲土。
E: "Are those History Fictionologists genuinely insane? They're still trying to hunt us down." Xiaoya begins to dig away at the earth, too.

C: 三日后，你被捉拿归案。在法庭上你才知道，死者是纯粹造物学派的著名学者，也是一名「智识」命途行者。在「种植」计划的结尾，他成功培育出一枚人造奇物，但还未曾将实验报告上传，便滑稽地为你所杀。
E: Three days later, you are arrested and brought to face justice. It is only when you get to court that you learn that the deceased was a famous scholar of the School of Pure Creation and a Pathstrider of the Erudition. As his "planting" project had come to an end, he successfully cultivated a synthetic Curio. However, he was unable to submit the experimental report before being comically murdered by you.

C: 这场争论引发了家长们的不满，事情越闹越大，直到引起教育部门的关注。
E: This dispute causes great dissatisfaction among the children's parents. As the conflict escalated, it attracted the attention of the Ministry of Education.

C: 对该技术的前景表示乐观。
E: Express optimism for the future of this technology.

C: 武装考古学派的隔离将图书馆封锁，整装以待的机械甲胄，宛如帝皇战争的再临。只是这次，武器被牢牢地握在了有机生命的手心。
E: The Armed Archaeologists' blockade has sealed off the library. Outfitted with mechanical armor, their waiting ranks look like the second coming of the Emperor's War. But this time, the weapons are firmly held in the hands of organic life.

C: 还有更大的轰鸣，热浪吞噬氧气，灼烧与窒息感接踵而来。伊斯梅尔的华丽外壳被爆炸剥离，垮塌的震颤，仿佛地面都要为之撕裂。
E: An even greater boom follows, a heat wave devouring all oxygen, burning and suffocation encroaching in succession. Izmael's grandiose splendor has been torn apart by the blast, the floors threatening to split open with the ensuing tremors of the collapse.

C: 你在人群中找到了帕提维娅，游行开始时，蝴蝶的翅膀攫住她的心神，瞬间产生的朴素的正义冲动，令她走向了抗议队伍的前沿。
E: You find Patavia among the crowd. When the protests began, the butterfly's wings captured her heart and mind, stirring a stark righteous urge within her, causing her to walk towards the front of the protesting line.

C: 学派「战争」时常被史学家们批评名不副实。与动辄数十纪的诸多事件相比，它的时间太过短暂，局限于博识学会内部的冲突，亦缺乏对银河的深远影响，就像一只羸弱的蝴蝶。
E: The influence of the scholastic "Strife" is often deemed fake by historians. When compared with events that spanned multiple Eras, it was too brief and limited only to the internal clashes of the Intelligentsia Guild. It lacked substantial influence on the Cosmos, like the pathetic wings of a weak butterfly.

C: 斯蒂芬掏出*频变捕手*，试图隐藏自己的踪迹。糖果色的影子现身，从斯蒂芬原先站立的位置出现，凝聚成像，如同蝴蝶钻破蛹壳般碾碎了斯蒂芬的数据。
E: Stephen whips out his "frequency scrambler" in an attempt to conceal his tracks. A candy-colored shadow spawns, appearing where Stephen was standing, manifesting into a figure, grinding Stephen's data into dust like a butterfly breaking out of its chrysalis shell.

C: 我缩小成一只蚂蚁。
E: I have shrunk to the size of an ant.

C: 我喜欢这种生活。
E: I like this life.

C: 你的腰椎被注射进药剂，一种宇宙和谐统一的喜乐贯穿你的脑髓。西利维亚小精灵围绕着你，他们吟唱颂歌。你跟着乐曲扭动着身体。
E: A potion is injected into your lumbar spine, and a joy of universal harmony and unity shoots through your cerebral fluid. As the Silvia Spirits encircle you and start singing a hymn, you sway your body along with the music.

C: 「还要继续翻吗？」
E: "Do you want to draw more cards?"

C: 你判断了一番哪里是它的手指…但你握住了它的手。
E: After assessing the position of its fingers... you hold its hand in the end.

C: 你缓慢地将「抓夹」挪到目标上…你失去耐心了！你狠狠地踢了机器一脚只为希望它快一点！
E: You slowly move the claw to your target... and lose your patience! You give the machine a vicious kick, hoping it can make the claw move faster!

C: 一个背着垃圾桶的人遇到了你。他蹲了下来，向你展示它的宝贝垃圾桶。
E: A person carrying a trashcan meets you. He crouches down and shows you his treasured trashcan.

C: 你失败了！你一脚滑到了「古脑体」面前！
E: You've failed! You slip and fall right in front of the *ancient brain*!

C: 「还记得我说过的吗？无名客和仙舟对我的侮辱，今天就要你们加倍偿还！」大岁阳狂妄地叫嚣道。
E: "Remember what I said? Today, you will pay double for the insults imparted on me by the Nameless and the Xianzhou!" shrieked the great heliobus hysterically.

C: 你已经吃饱了。
E: You're not hungry right now.

C: 遇事不决，直接选最熟悉的。
E: When in doubt, order whatever looks the most familiar.

C: 你以一万分的坚定断绝了心中的欲念，既为你的安全考虑，也为苍猿的心理健康着想。
E: You sever your heart's desires with sheer resolution, in consideration of both your safety and the ape's mental health.

C: 聚变炉开始运转，苍蓝色的火焰呼啸，马格不耐烦地盯着你，「你还在等什么？我的锤子都快无聊得睡着了。」
E: As the fusion furnace hums to life and the blue flames within begin to roar, Magg stares at you impatiently. "What are you waiting for? My hammer can barely stay awake with this boredom!"

C: 「这假赛打得也太明显了！」观众席骤然躁动起来。
E: "This match is so obviously fixed!" The audience starts to become restless.

C: 飞船不断地将沿途的光粒子转化为加速能源，以近乎恐怖的速度冲过终点线。
E: The spaceship relentlessly converts the photons along its path into acceleration energy, crossing the finishing line at a terrifying speed.

C: 细小的火蛇燎烤其中的佐料，层层连绵的山峦如屏风遮挡住香酥下的软糯，欲拒还迎。你化作轻风拂过冷却的战场，飘至云海之间。
E: Among the seasoning of the small roasted fire serpent, unending layers of mountain ranges shield the soft and chewy texture beneath the crisp-fried surface like a protective screen. You want to refuse yet embrace it anyway. You transform into a breeze and drift across a cooling battlefield until you float among a sea of clouds.

C: 你的手穿过它的翅膀，让幻影溃散，指尖唯余一缕旧时的沉吟。
E: Your hand passes through its wings, allowing the illusion to dissipate, leaving nary but a lingering murmur of the past upon your fingertips.

C: 「因此，本法庭判决，你将接受标准化的失败治疗，直到人生的成功和失败回归标准比例为止。」法官们提起戒尺，架在你的肩上，沉闷的电子音在狭窄的空间内回响。
E: "Thus, this court hereby sentences you to undergo standardized failure therapy, until the balance between your success and failure index returns to the prescribed ratio." The judges raise their rulers and place them on your shoulders, as heavy electronic hums reverberate throughout the confined space.

C: 一位身材佝偻的老人涉水走到你的跟前，他歪着脑袋看向你，半晌才说出话来。
E: A wizened old man wades through water and approaches you. He tilts his head at you, finally speaking after a long moment.

C: 木船不出意料地被撞得七零八碎，法吉娜的眷属们将你从水里捞起，嫌弃地扔到岸边。
E: As expected, the dinghy splinters into shreds. Phagousa's kins fish you from the water, tossing you onto the shore with disdain.

C: 泰坦的眷属们撕裂德索斯的战车，将侮辱战争的国王绞死在战场。他的同伙皆被带上血祭，成为对后人的警示，以及结束战争的礼仪。
E: The Titan's kin dismantled Desos' chariot, strangling the king who disgraced warfare, turning his allies into a blood sacrifice — a stark warning and a ritual to end the conflict.

C: 骗子的委屈。
E: The swindler's complaint.

C: 这就是扎格列斯的报应。
E: This is Zagreus' retribution.

C: 在比古老更古老的过去，一无所有的混沌第一次诞生出「有」，一个杂乱的线团，命运的丝线包裹住混沌的琼浆，结出果实。原初的火种，开始在果实中燃烧。
E: In a time older than the oldest, chaos first spawned forth "existence" — a jumbled mess where fate's threads wrap chaos' nectar, bearing fruit. The primal Coreflame ignites within this fruit.

C: 一周后，你收到了神悟树庭发来的悲报「您的学术成果非常具有科研价值！但遗憾的是与主流研究方向不符，您的简历已进入人才库，期待未来与您合作。」
E: A week later, the Grove of Epiphany delivers its verdict — a polite rejection. "Your research holds immense academic significance! However, it does not align with our current primary research direction. Your credentials have been added to our talent database, and we look forward to potential collaboration in the future."

C: 这里汇聚了翁法罗斯绝大部分图书，你就像酒鬼找到了法吉娜的酒酿秘藏，恨不得在这座图书馆里用知识醉生梦死。
E: Here lies the vast majority of Amphoreus's books. To you, it's as if a hopeless drinker has stumbled upon Phagousa's legendary wine cellar — the sheer temptation to lose yourself in this sea of wisdom is overwhelming.

C: 大地兽发出一声低鸣，载着你一摇一晃地出发了。
E: With a low rumble, the dromas sways as it carries you off.

C: 在你面前有两扇门，一扇由青铜铸造，庄严古朴，另一扇由黄金雕琢，熠熠生辉。自从你误入迷宫深处，已经与这两扇门对峙了整整一天。
E: Before you stand two doors — one ancient and solemn, cast in bronze. The other radiant and opulent, sculpted from gold. You've been staring at them, unmoving, for an entire day — ever since you wandered too deep into this twisting labyrinth.

C: 类似的把戏愚弄了一次又一次，但大多数人还是心甘情愿地受骗，足见当时的人们对欧洛尼斯多么虔诚。
E: Similar tricks were played time and again, but most people still willingly fell for them, showing just how devout they were toward Oronyx back then.

C: 小城上下士气大振，最终利用狭隘地形以少胜多，挫败了悬锋城的进攻。而悬锋城的将军，也如预言中的那般牺牲。
E: The small city's morale soared, and they ultimately used the narrow terrain to achieve a victory against the overwhelming number of invaders, thwarting Kremnos's invasion. And just as the prophecy foretold, Kremnos's general met his destined end.

C: 因为公平只是一个中性词，它在大多数时候违背人的本能。
E: Because fairness is but a neutral term, and it goes against the instincts of a person far too often.

C: 因为他违背了殿前忠心护主的誓言，即便结出大义的花，也要尝下赎罪的果。
E: For he betrayed his oath of loyalty to protect his lord. Even should a flower of righteousness bloom for him, he must still taste the fruit of atonement.

C: 然而，并不是所有泰坦都乐见于瑟希斯的春天降临于世。从冥河探来的灰黯之手，已经攀上它的根须。塞纳托斯振振有词——
E: However, not all Titans welcomed Cerces's spring descending upon the world. The Hand of Shadow from the River of Souls had already crawled up its roots. Thanatos declared with conviction —

C: 众多造物罹遭杀害，令巨人心生悲戚。
E: The slaughter of countless creations filled the giant with sorrow.

C: 柜子里空空如也，原本存放于此的光锥早已不见踪影。
E: The cabinet is absolutely bare, with the Light Cone once stored there now long gone.

C: 依老朽看，你这一副依依不舍的样子，不如把你的光锥还给你吧！哈哈，也算成全你了！
E: Despite my old age, I can still tell you look reluctant, so why don't I return the original Light Cone to you? That's what you want, isn't it?

C: 你为什么会说话？
E: Why are you able to talk?

C: 「地面上已经没有人能引导我们着陆了——我们甚至进入不了大气层！」你摸了摸胡须：「如果他们也能从这个视角看看她…悲剧或许就不会发生了。」
E: "There's no one left on the planetary surface to guide our landing. We can't even make it to the atmosphere!" You touch your whiskers. "If only they could look at the planet from this angle... Then the tragedy might not have happened."

C: 哦，太激动一下忘了，我还没正式自我介绍——我叫卢卡，跟希儿一样是「地火」的干部。奥列格首领你应该很熟了吧？他是教我战斗技巧的师父。
E: Oh, I got so excited that I almost forgot to formally introduce myself. My name is Luka, and I'm a core member of "Wildfire" just like Seele. You should be very familiar with Chief Oleg, right? He is the master who taught me how to fight.

C: 你啐了一口，顺势吐出那卡在喉咙里的、裹着血水的碎牙。什么恩•德芮…你很清楚这名字从何流变而来——伊德莉拉——那*无比丑陋*的存在……
E: You spit, getting rid of the bloody broken teeth stuck in your throat. Anne Duray — you know very well where that name is derived from. It's Idrila, that HIDEOUS being...

C: 你向那芳香的源头飞奔，无数腕管剧烈翕动——你已经很久没有过类似的感觉了…某种原始的冲动自外缘神经环贯入内胚层——这种如饥似渴的感觉！
E: You race off to the source of the aroma, countless tubes and feeders swinging about violently. You haven't had this kind of feeling in forever... a primitive impulse shoots into your endoderm from your peripheral nervous system. It's thirst and hunger!

C: 这样才叫完美嘛~
E: Now this is perfect, don't you think~

C: 这些若虫的排列…
E: The way these nymphs are lined up...
...Who's there!?

C: 开玩笑吧？你看{F#她}{M#他}瘦得跟杆子一样……
E: You must be joking? Look, {F#she}{M#he} is as skinny as a bean pole...
*barfs*...

C: 如果让你从它和列车客厢的小床之间做选择，你不会有丝毫犹豫。
E: If you had to choose between this bed and the small beds in the Express' Passenger Car, you wouldn't hesitate for a second.

C: 采光和窗景——很满意。
E: Lighting and view: Very good.

C: 你邻家的友善无名客
E: Your friendly neighborhood Nameless

C: 你给店家的留言：<color=#dbc291ff>感谢关照，服务总体很满意。 / 体验一般，下次不会再住了。 / 建议采购记忆泡沫枕头和天鹅绒被。 / 什么也不写。</color>
E: Your comment for the shop: <color=#dbc291ff>I'm very happy with the excellent service. Thank you. / It was an average experience. I probably won't come back. / May I suggest you buy some memory foam pillows and velvet quilts? / Write nothing.</color>

C: 哎…算了算了，不逼你了！不管怎么样，这次是你赢了哦！这是你的奖励，拿好了哦！
E: Geez... Whatever! I won't force you to tell! Anyway, you win! Here's your prize. Take it!

C: 哦，哦哦！我懂，我懂！
E: Oh! Oh! I see. I see!

C: 房门紧闭。坚实的木板后，隐约传来窸窸窣窣的响动。想来这房间一定属于某位贝洛伯格居民。
E: The door is shut tightly. Behind the sturdy wood, you can vaguely hear a rustling sound. This room must belong to a resident of Belobog.

C: 包在我身上。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 就这么同意了？！
E: You're going to agree to this!?

C: 喀喀——人无法两次踏入相同的河流，也无法仅凭火光观测洞穴外的世界……
E: Crrk crrk — One can never set foot in the same river twice. Nor can one ever observe the world beyond the cave by torchlight alone...

C: 哎哟！
E: Yeowch!

C: 没错！但它也可以是一棵大树、一株蘑菇……
E: Correct! But it could also be a big tree, a mushroom...

C: 嗯…这事说来话长。
E: Umm... It's a long story.
Three... two... one...

C: <size=36>回家睡大觉咯！</size>
E: <size=36>Go home and get some sleep!</size>

C: 对不起，漆黑的虎克大人…
E: Sorry, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great...

C: 看品相，这地髓结晶的纯净度应该至少在<unbreak>85%</unbreak>以上…这要是被直接扔进锅炉里烧成灰渣，可就太浪费了。
E: Judging by the appearance, the purity of this Geomarrow crystal has to be at least <unbreak>85%</unbreak>... Chucking it in the boiler and burning it down to slag would be too wasteful.

C: 我要再考虑考虑。
E: Let me think about it some more...

C: 因为它很快就又刷新出来了嗡~
E: Because it will respawn soon enough, buzz~

C: 是我家大大为我示现的启示，还是跨越时空的心有灵犀啾？
E: Is it a revelation granted by my master, or a connection beyond time and space, tweet?

C: 小心啊嘤~
E: Watch out, chirp~

C: 用点力！
E: Try harder!

C: 眼前的景象似乎是一幅再现记忆的画卷，被某种力量从过往之河中打捞上岸。它不是真正的冥界，否则你早已失去呼吸。
E: The scene before you seems like a painting of memories, fished out from the river of the past by some force. It is not the true nether realm, or else you would have already lost your breath.

C: 就这样也好。
E: This is fine as it is.

C: 或许，这也是一种职业病吧……
E: Maybe that's just my occupational habit...

C: 想想那一刻…
E: Think of that moment...

C: 对嗷，我是怎么回事呢？
E: Now that I think about it, how can I talk?

C: 我遇到了一只忧伤的机巧鸟。
E: I came across a depressed cycrane.

C: 唔，我感觉你在期待我做什么「小丑表演」…我可不干，你只是把我当作一个会讲段子的木偶而已。
E: Oh, I feel like you are expecting some kind of clown show. Not my thing. You are treating me like a puppet that tells little stories.

C: 后来三天过去，我心想，坏了，不会真的没有人注意到吧。这个时候幸好您来了。
E: Three days passed and I thought, this is bad! Really? Nobody noticed? And that's just when you arrived.

C: 谢谢谢，快快快……
E: Thank you, q—q—quick...

C: 听好了，我们「罗浮四大恶人」最讨厌的就是那些自以为暴力能够解决一切的蠢货。在这银河中，真正的硬实力是智慧！
E: Listen, we're the Luofu Infamous Four. We despise fools who think violence can solve everything. In this cosmos, only wisdom counts!

C: 读读看吧？
E: Care to read it?

C: 规则流程非常简单，我来为各位选手说明一下。本次比赛共分为两个环节——
E: Let me go over everything for our contestants. The rules are simple. The contest is divided into two stages...

C: 各位选手已经准备就绪了！那么，比赛正式进入「外交」环节！
E: Everybody ready, then? Then let's begin the Diplomacy phase!

C: 您好，我想和您外交…
E: Hi there, I'd like to engage in diplomacy with you...

C: 你放水，奖励我们四六分成。
E: Throw the contest and split the prize with me, <unbreak>60</unbreak>/<unbreak>40</unbreak>.

C: 你吃，你吃！又是一阵左支右绌。虽然确实又往胃里填了几个包子，但你感到自己的食道已经开始拥堵起来了——就像通勤高峰时的星槎海。
E: You eat and eat! Once more, you find yourself struggling. Despite sending down several more buns, you feel like your esophagus is all congested — like the Starskiff Haven during rush-hour traffic.

C: 没问题，你就喝一口——
E: No problem, you drink a sip...

C: 可惜你没机会了。胜负只在一念之间。你两眼一黑，晕了过去。
E: Too bad you never had a chance. Victory was but a stray thought floating through your head. Your vision goes black, and you pass out.

C: 我们只是想问问那个人，为什么要给物流机巧鸟加上智能。
E: We just wanted to ask the cycrane designer why courier cycranes had been imbued with the gift of intelligence.

C: （我得给自己起个神秘名字）
E: (Come up with an epic nickname for yourself)

C: 里面竟然…什么也没有写！
E: Wait a second — there's nothing here!?

C: …你以为我是为什么没有恋人啊？
E: ... Why do you think I have no lover?

C: 好吧，我放弃了。
E: Alright, I give up.

C: 不客气，{NICKNAME}。
E: You're welcome, {NICKNAME}.

C: 完成了，剩下的交给我们就好，你可以走了……
E: That's all. Just leave the rest to us. You may take your leave...

C: 只要你喜欢仓鼠球骑士，我们就是好朋友！
E: So long as you like Hamster Ball Knight, we'll be great friends!

C: 既然如此，不如现在就去接一滴下来，几亿个琥珀纪后，你也能成为百万富翁。
E: If that's the case, why not take a drop for yourself now? In a few Amber Eras, it could make you a millionaire.

C: 阴冷的梦得不到恒星的照耀，但稚嫩的画笔仍能创造自己的太阳。
E: A gloomy dream will never feel the illumination of the stars' light, but the simple brush can create its own sun.

C: 「把我最喜欢的太阳送给大家，请大家多多照顾爸爸妈妈的生意。」
E: "I shall gift my beloved sun to everyone. Please, I hope you will help my parents' business."

C: 纵使它已蒙受多年的尘埃侵蚀，纵使它被掩埋在美梦之下，纵使它失去了自己的主人，从这张图纸中，你仍能感受到本属于这座城市的那份壮丽。
E: So what if it has suffered years of dust and corrosion? So what if it has been buried beneath a dream? So what if it has lost its original master? From this blueprint, you can still sense the majesty that once belonged to this city.

C: 都怪我疏忽大意，否则也不至于中了这么简单的陷阱。
E: I was too careless. I shouldn't have fallen for such an obvious trap.

C: 这是很久以前的事了…当时，我在巷子里偶遇了一位美丽的迷因。无数动人的眸子，富有美感的流线型利爪，让我的引擎飞速地转动。
E: It was a long time ago now... Back then, I came across a beautiful meme in an alleyway. It had countless eyes and beautiful, streamlined claws that got my engine racing.

C: …但就算挤进来了，多半会被栏杆卡住头，你开始想象大声呼叫然后被帕姆或丹恒所救的尴尬场景。
E: ...Still, even if you do manage to squeeze in, your head will probably get stuck in the railing. You start to imagine how embarrassing it would be if you had to call for help, and Pom-Pom or Dan Heng had to rescue you.

C: 听说水果打折…
E: I heard there's a discount for the fruits...

C: 我东西少，价格再便宜点呗。
E: I'm not buying much. Can you give me a lower price?

C: 你有试过泡冷水池吗？
E: Have you taken a dip in the cold pool before?

C: 您想喝点什么？
E: What would you like to drink?

C: 做好准备了吗？
E: Ready?

C: 法吉娜会庇佑我们的！
E: Phagousa will protect us!

C: 你知道树庭发生的事吗？
E: Do you know what happened in the Grove?

C: 比外面更加幽暗…
E: It's even darker than the outside world...

C: 作物种子也要开源才是！
E: Even crop seeds should be free-for-all!

C: 消息，不畅通，再等等。
E: Comms, down. Wait.

C: 对不起…对不起…
E: Sorry... I'm sorry...

C: （向玦轮中心投掷。）
E: (Aim at the center of the jade wheel.)

C: 你要的饮料。
E: Here's your drink.

C: 咳咳咳，帕姆刚刚是真的睡着了！才不是演的！
E: Ahem, I really did just doze off then! I wasn't acting!

C: 确实有点…
E: A little...

C: （拍拍帕姆的头，安抚帕姆）
E: (Pat Pom-Pom on the shoulder and comfort them)

C: 怎么一直叹气？
E: Why do you keep sighing?

C: 虽然不确定这么做有没有用，但{NICKNAME}乘客既然在…能不能帮帮帕姆哇！
E: Pom-Pom's not sure whether this'll work or not, but since you're here... Can you help Pom-Pom out?

C: 他很穷，好像越来越不对劲了…然后呢？翻了个垃圾桶就得到了藏宝图？
E: He's really poor, and then things get weirder and weirder... And then? He found a treasure map in the trashcan?

C: 啊！！！！{NICKNAME}乘客，你突然出现，吓了帕姆一大跳！
E: Argh!! {NICKNAME}, where'd you come from? You freaked Pom-Pom out!

C: 需要我帮你吗？
E: Do you need a hand?

C: 代理站长也是站长！如果有代理列车长的话，帕姆也会认可那个家伙的。
E: An acting lead researcher is a lead researcher too! If there were acting conductors, I'd acknowledge them!

C: 这话说得有点伤人啊…
E: What you said just now was rather hurtful...

C: 地板上干干净净，在列车灯光的照耀下，就连空气中的浮尘也看不见。
E: The floor is spotless. Under the illumination of the lights, you cannot spot any speckles of dust in the air.

C: 感觉有点累了，呼呼…稍微休息一下帕！
E: I'm a little tired, huff... Let's take a break!

C: 细菌都是看不见的！空气中有那么多浮尘，日积月累下来就会有一层灰了！
E: Bacteria are not visible to the human eye! There are many dust particles in the air! There will be a layer of dust after a while.

C: 帕姆想借小机器人…
E: Pom-Pom wants to borrow some little robots...

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，喏，扫把给你！都是列车上的一份子，替列车长分忧也是应该的嘛！
E: {NICKNAME}, take the broom! As part of the Express, you should share the worries of the conductor when the time comes!

C: 列车上有不同的房间，自然就有不同的设施。
E: There are different rooms on the Express, so naturally there are different facilities as well.

C: 鹤运物流真诚感谢志愿者的协助，请收下我们的谢礼。
E: Heron Express wishes to sincerely thank those volunteers for their support. Please accept this as thanks.

C: （糟糕，刚才的战斗应该是惊动了扑满，它逃向了道路一侧。）
E: (Oh no, the fight just now alerted the Trotter. Now it's running off to the side of the road.)

C: （应该是有次元扑满被关在里面了…难道说集装箱里存着什么食物吗？）
E: (Looks like a Warp Trotter got itself locked inside... Maybe there's some food stored in that container?)

C: 钟表小子和折纸小鸟可以粗心，但哈努兄弟不行……
E: Clockie and the Origami Bird can be careless, but not Hanu...

C: 嘁，下层区当然在地下了！
E: Of course it is! Where could the Underworld be but underground?

C: 什么？！玛丽竟然被{NICKNAME}击败了…！
E: Oh no, {NICKNAME} has beaten Mary...!

C: 您哪位？
E: Who are you?

C: 客房服务。
E: Room service.

C: 你的右脑开始飞速运转，形成一幅图像。你仿佛看到了鳞次栉比的地髓工厂，来自各个世界的商人、游客在城市的街巷间游荡，诉说着令人啧啧称奇的旅行故事。
E: Your right cerebral hemisphere is now running at full speed, conjuring up a vision where you see orderly lined arrays of Geomarrow factories, merchants coming from various worlds, and tourists lingering in the city streets while sharing fascinating tales about their travels.

C: 它的说话方式…该怎么说呢？有点热情却又不失克制，遇到问题总会第一时间为我考虑…如果要交朋友，这种性格应该就是不二之选了吧！
E: The way it speaks... How to put it? A little enthusiastic, but restrained. Always putting me first whenever we run into any problem... If I were making new friends, this would be the kind of personality I'd want!

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: （放弃吧，想不起来了）
E: (Forget it. I can't remember)

C: 有点好奇，上去看看。
E: Interesting. Go take a look.

C: 让我看看！
E: Let me see!

C: 你见过会说话的罐子？清醒一点。
E: Have you ever seen a talking vase before? Sober up.

C: 我不相信这银河里面还有能让您害怕的东西！
E: I don't believe there's anything in this cosmos that can scare you!

C: 复仇，我必须复仇…
E: Revenge. I'll have my revenge...

C: 这与你无关。
E: It's nothing to do with you.

C: 但是他实在是打不开，转手又送给了我。
E: But he couldn't get it to open, so he passed it on to me.

C: 铁盒究竟在哪里呢？
E: Where on earth is that iron box?

C: 怎么了？
E: Something the matter?

C: 那我先走了啊…刚闹出了这么丢脸的事，我实在没脸面在市面上晃了……
E: Well, I'll be going then... Such an embarrassment for me, there's no way I can show my face at the markets again...

C: 可是你也看到了，这么久以来，根本没有多少人愿意关注「枘凿六合」。所以，秘社才会想办法骗更多的人来玩。
E: However, as you can see, this whole time we've struggled to get anyone to play the Hexanexus. So this whole "secret society" is a way of tricking more people into playing it.

C: 我的家乡是一个被公司并入宇宙市场，却始终不怎么发达的星球。自出生起，我就活在巨大的落差之中……
E: My home planet was brought into the universal market by IPC, but was never really very developed. Ever since I was born, I've grown up among a great disparity of wealth...

C: 嘶…刚才可真是失态，没想到我也有喜怒无常的一天。
E: Tsk... I was really out of character just then. I'm not usually moody like this at all.

C: 所以可以请您告诉我您究竟是为了什么而来的吗？
E: So can you please tell me what exactly it is you're doing here?

C: 您听我说，那个人虽然看起来温和无害，但实际上是个极端的偏执狂！至于那个所谓的W，我还没真正见过他，但……
E: Listen to me: That guy may sound friendly and harmless, but he's actually an extremist bigot! And as for that W, I've never really met him but...

C: 听不到吗？那…您能看到吗？那个人是黛紫色的…这份…嫉妒，因身旁的玫红与明黄而生……
E: You can't hear that? Then... do you see that? That person is lilac... This... jealousy... stems from the rose-red and the bright yellow next to them...

C: 如今我已许久不曾做梦了，它们在我停止创作的那一天便离我而去了。
E: These days I don't really dream anymore. They more or less left me the day that I stopped creating.

C: 我始终坚信在灰烬之中，将会诞生更高尚的萌芽…而果然无论是那一届星夜奖，还是我自己，都因此红透了半边天……
E: I'm a firm believer that out of the ashes can sprout an even more exalted future... and sure enough, both the Starcademy Awards and I spread our fame like wildfire...

C: 那时候我们才刚刚大吵了一架，她眼里的怒火还没烧干净，就被暴风雨似的惊恐浇灭了，湿淋淋的。
E: We'd just had this big fight, and before the anger in her eyes had burnt out, it was doused in a storm-like panic, utterly drenched.

C: 哈，看我的装扮不像，是吧？
E: Ha, can't tell judging by my outfit, can you?

C: 越过事件视界就相当于扎进巨真蛰虫的胃袋——有去无回。所以我必须在信标彻底跌入黑洞前把它截住…这真是我船长生涯中最棘手的挑战。
E: Crossing the event horizon is like plunging into the stomach of a Giant Sting: There's no coming back from it. So I had to intercept the beacon before it fell completely into the black hole... This was the most difficult challenge I ever encountered in my career as a captain.

C: 其实这个时候，我还是可以开足马力追上信标的。但那风险实在太大，不值得。
E: At this point, I could actually still speed in to catch up with the beacon. But the risk was too great to be worth it.

C: 这地方障碍物太多，舰载仪器除了发出恼人的警报外什么忙都帮不上。没办法，我只能用肉眼观察，手动操控飞船。
E: There were so many obstacles in this place that the ship's instruments kept tripping alarms everywhere, rendering it useless. I had no choice but to make observations by dead reckoning, and manually piloted the spaceship.

C: 他原以为缸里的存货足够挺到下一次狩猎，结果找了几周都没发现猎物——根据博识学会的统计，那片星区早就没有活着的虚空鲸了。
E: He thought the supplies in the tank would last until the next hunt, but could find no prey after weeks of searching. According to the statistics from the Intelligentsia Guild, there haven't been any living void song whales in that sector for a long time.

C: 真吓人！
E: That's terrifying!

C: 哈哈，如果真能遇见从十几个琥珀纪前来的人，我也很乐意付他钱——还有比这更酷的事了吗？
E: Haha, if I really could meet someone from dozens of Amber Eras ago, I'd be happy to pay them money — could there be anything cooler than this?

C: 毕竟，可不是每个凡人都有机会活那么久。
E: After all, not just anybody gets the chance to live so long.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Keep silent)

C: 直到生命的最后一刻，他还在试图用嘴去吸输液管，好弄出几滴残留的提取液来。
E: He was still trying to use his mouth to suck the last few drops of extract out of the tubes during his final moments.

C: 正当你打算离开时，一个人影拦在了你的面前.....
E: Just as you're about to leave, a figure blocks your way...

C: 她好像说过自己的房间离楼梯很近，门口还摆着花…或许我该去看看。
E: I think she said her room was beside the stairwell, and there was a pot of flower by her door... Maybe I should take a look.

C: 你们这样胡来，公司知道吗？
E: Would the IPC consider this an abuse of authority?

C: （小声）好汉不吃眼前亏…找个借口先溜吧。
E: (Whispers) A wise man knows better than to fight when the odds are stacked against him... Let's get away first.

C: 好问题，我这就告诉你缘由。
E: Good question. Let me tell you why.

C: 你要不要加入列车？
E: Would you like to join the Astral Express?

C: 嗯…这确实是个极具诱惑的提议。对一个无名客来说，还有什么比登上星穹列车更荣幸呢？
E: Hmm... that's a very tempting offer. The opportunity to join aboard the Astral Express is an utmost honor for a Nameless.

C: 班尼看上去没有那么亢奋了，或许他之前表现出来的乐观积极多少带些表演成分。
E: Benny seems less pumped up now. Perhaps, his earlier enthusiasm and optimism was a bit of an act.

C: 我还承诺过他们，一定会按时交付工程…但谁叫咱们的甲方这么追求完美呢？为了让城市能以最佳状态对游客开放，他们又允诺给我一年的现实时间来打磨工程细节。
E: I even guaranteed that I would complete the project on time... Yet, our client is a perfectionist. They gave us another year of real-world time to fine-tune the project and make sure the city was in the best shape for visitors.

C: …是谁？
E: ...You know us?

C: …有那么明显吗？一下就被你看出来了。
E: ...Is it that obvious? You see right through me at one glance.

C: 嗯…聊过了。
E: Yes...

C: 您知道吗，我曾几乎就要踏上成功之路…可那条路并非坦途，总有些卑鄙的垄断者、贪婪的投机者守在路口，死死叼住嘴里的肥肉，生怕别人分去一星油渣……
E: You know what? I was once on the verge of success... Yet, it wasn't without challenges. There were always some despicable monopolists and greedy speculators lurking at the crossroads, tightly holding onto the juicy bits so that no one could snatch even a smidgen of the grease from them.

C: 你刚不是还在我那些同事旁边，鬼鬼祟祟偷听了好半天吗？
E: Weren't you eavesdropping on my colleagues' conversation just now?

C: 「啪」——你将「长效专利捍卫一纸通」贴到了飞车上，熟练得像是曾经沿街发过十年的小广告。
E: With a "slap," you skillfully stick the Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier onto the vehicle, as if you've been handing out flyers on the street for a decade.

C: 无论如何，我得感谢你，感谢你帮我找到了这最后一块拼图。我会加倍珍惜眼前的科蒂，直到那*二十分之一*的自我彻底燃尽……
E: Anyway, I must thank you for getting me this last piece. I'll treasure my Coty until that *one-twentieth* of my devotion burns out...

C: 呵呵，说到这个，我就不得不骄傲一下了——在鸢尾花家系的努力之下，匹诺康尼优秀的电影与戏剧名扬宇宙！毫无疑问，娱乐业是匹诺康尼最鲜艳的一片花瓣！
E: Ah, I gotta pat myself on the back for this one! Thanks to the Iris Family, Penacony's movies and dramas are renowned across the universe! The entertainment industry is undoubtedly one of Penacony's brightest jewels!

C: 切，你去看看近年希米亚影业的作品吧，演员的演技越来越差劲，实力还不如星际和平娱乐那些肤浅的偶像！
E: Oh, come on! Just take a look at the recent works from Himemia Films! The actors are getting worse and worse! They're not even near the superficial idols from Interastral Peace Entertainment!

C: 波波特先生，这是你认识的人吗？
E: Mr. Popott, do you know this person?

C: 哦？这还是我第一次见到星穹列车的人。
E: Oh? This is the first time I've met someone from the Astral Express.

C: 亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，也请您在游览之余多关注一下其他演出吧。虽然不能与谐乐大典的隆盛相比，但肯定也有自己独特的魅力。
E: Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, while you are here, please pay attention to some other performances. Although they may not match the grandeur of the Charmony Festival, each has its own unique charm.

C: 那可太多了，绿洲的时刻中，自动乐团的演奏永不落幕；蓝调的时刻中，漫游乐手布罗娜举办了游轮演出；太阳的时刻中，巨星爱卡琳主演的歌剧《梦之王》正在辉煌剧场热演……
E: There are numerous options... the automated orchestra at the Moment of Oasis, the wandering musician Brona's cruise show during the Blue Hour, and Ekarin's famous opera, the King of Dreams, at the Moment of Sol...

C: 而在黄金的时刻，一位来自「声乐之星」的遗民也将献唱她家乡的歌谣——请{M#先生}{F#小姐}不要忘记我的音乐会哦。
E: And in the Golden Hour, a talented songstress from the planet of canticles will be performing songs from her lost hometown. Please, don't forget about my concert. Please, dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, don't forget about my concert!

C: 不，不是故意的…怎么可能是呢？
E: No, I didn't do it on purpose... How could it have been...

C: 如果你真想弥补过错，至少要先学会接受现实。
E: If you want to make up for your mistake, you've got to start by facing the reality.

C: 要合作，不要战争。我觉得这才是宇宙最美好的状态。
E: Collaboration, not conflict, is the way to go.

C: 你…不用担心，猎犬会处理好一切。
E: You... don't have to worry. The Hounds will take care of it.

C: 忘记了什么？
E: Forgotten something?

C: 照片上的两个人分别是我的弟弟，约翰；还有我的姐姐，詹妮弗。
E: These two in the photo are my little brother John and my sister Jennifer.

C: 但不久之后，可怕的梦魇开始追逐我，折磨我，令我一度畏惧入梦。为了摆脱那些面容可怖的影子…我主动上缴了自己的记忆。我选择了忘记。
E: But not long after, I became plagued by haunting nightmares that tortured me. I became too scared to fall asleep. To rid myself of those harrowing shadows, I... I handed over control of my own memories. I chose to forget everything.

C: 很简单的，只用把我在<color=#dbc291ff>影视乐园寄存的一批玩具</color>取出来，带到<color=#dbc291ff>「黄金的时刻」的约定交易点</color>就行了。
E: It's a cinch: Just grab the <color=#dbc291ff>batch of toys I stashed at the theme park</color>, and take them over to the <color=#dbc291ff>meeting spot at Golden Hour</color>. That's it.

C: 那是，物美价廉，放眼整个银河系也没有比这更好的。
E: They sure are. High quality at a low price. There's none better in all the galaxy.

C: 不过和你说这么多也没用，我还得赶回去应付我们的总统大人。那长了俩脑袋的人形蛆虫，等我镇压完那群刁民，就带兵把他也给毙了。
E: But there's no use telling you all this. I have to hurry back to deal with that president of ours. Once I finish putting down the uprising, my forces will be executing that two-faced maggot too.

C: 小家伙，说实话，见的烂人多了，我对你还挺有好感。可是啊，我要提醒你，宇宙并不如你想的那样纯粹。
E: Listen, buddy, to be honest with you, I've met a lot of crooks in my time, so I kind of like you. But let me remind you that this universe isn't as innocent as you think it is.

C: 真的吗，我好怕哦。
E: Really? Oh goodness gracious, I'm so scared.

C: 现在的学生喜欢的不是知识，而是一些乱七八糟的亚文化——这些东西都是滋生模因病毒的土壤！就算没有那蕉师，他们早晚也会被什么苹果师、鸭梨师给带坏！
E: Students nowadays aren't interested in knowledge anymore. Instead, they like all sorts of strange subcultures, which act as the perfect fodder for breeding memetic viruses! Even if those BananAdvisors didn't exist, the students would still be led astray by some apple or pear advisors sooner or later!

C: 还有财富学院的主席<color=#dbc291ff>尚恩</color>。他是我遇到过最有潜力的学生，我本来想引荐他加入苜蓿草家系，但这小子居然接了星际和平公司的Offer！
E: And then there's <color=#dbc291ff>Shawn</color>, the president of Fortune Academy and the most promising student I've ever met. I was originally going to recommend him to join the Alfalfa Family. However, this kid accepted an offer from the IPC instead!

C: 为什么不毕业呢？
E: Why don't you wish to graduate?

C: 我说到哪儿了…哦对，那老头不想我出去闯荡。呵，想想都好笑，匹诺康尼如今几十亿住民，都是土生土长的本地人吗？当年的囚犯们这么能生？
E: Now, where was I... Oh right, that old fogey doesn't want me to venture out into the universe. Heh, it's quite funny in retrospect: Do you believe that billions of people that reside in Penacony today have been born and bred here? Surely you don't think the prisoners who once inhabited this place had so many offsprings?

C: 可否请你拿来纸笔，替老鸟写一封口述信，转交给他？
E: Could you bring over a pen and piece of paper so you can write down what I say and deliver it to him?

C: 时代啊…它总在不断变化，而我已经是个老人了。很多事情我只是遵照惯例在做，并没有真的看透多少，但求无过罢了。
