E: The times... are constantly changing, and I'm also no longer young. I've been simply following the convention and not giving much thought to things, only hoping to not make any mistakes.

C: 唉呀呀，腰又开始疼了。你说我一天到晚生这气图什么……
E: *sigh*... My back is starting to hurt again. Tell me, of what use is this anger I feel every day...

C: 后来苜蓿草家系投资入股，学校便加设了财富学院，教授经济学、会计学、金融信托学等知识。
E: Fortune Academy was added when the Alfalfa Family invested in the school as a stakeholder. Subjects such as Economics, Accountancy, and Finance and Trust Management are taught here.

C: 啾啾！啾啾…
E: Tweet tweet! Tweet tweet...

C: 好啦，我得再找个新地方监督大家了，你在空艇上玩的话记得要排队啾！这样每个人才能有机会享受空艇的游乐设施啾！
E: Alright, I need to find a new spot to oversee things. Just make sure to line up when you're having fun in the airship so that everyone gets a chance to experience the recreational facilities, tweet!

C: 以你和黑塔的关系，你觉得你该去要个签名版了，这玩意绝对是抢手货，想来她不会拒绝你的——
E: You should be able to score an autographed copy of the book based on your connection with Herta. That'll be hot commodity, for sure. She wouldn't refuse you, would she...

C: 为了维护星际间难能可贵的和平，你决定还是别乱摸了，以免生出什么事端来。
E: To maintain the precious order of intergalactic peace, you decide not to mess with this pod in case anything bad happens.

C: 你将它的「王座」放到了杂物堆顶上。
E: You place the throne atop the stack of boxes.

C: …将来会有的。
E: ...There will be trees here in the future.

C: 没错~有了它，我们就能建立更多矿场和铁路，把星球各处的资源全部握到手里。
E: That's right! With this, we can create more mines and railways, bringing all this planet's resources straight into our hands.

C: 接下来的议题是...造物引擎的背上应该安装哪种辅助配件？
E: The next item on the agenda is... What kind of auxiliary equipment should the Engines of Creation have installed on their backs?

C: 没关系，等你有线索之后再来找我吧。
E: No worries. Come and see me if you find any clues.

C: 当时雕刻的时候忘记加上本鸟的秀发了，真是唯一的美中不足啾。
E: When I was sculpting, I forgot to add my beautiful hair, which is the only fly in the ointment, tweet.

C: 嗯？这里不就是大树吗啾？
E: Eh? Is this not the Great Tree, tweet?

C: 好啾，欢迎客官随时回来和我聊天啾~
E: Sure thing. You're welcome to come back and chat with me anytime, tweet~!

C: 诶？谢谢客官的光顾啾！希望您昨晚没有被石头老板打扰到…如果害怕的话，人家可以来哄您入睡啾~
E: Eh? Thank you for your patronage, tweet! We hope Boss Stone didn't keep you up last night... If you're still afraid, I can come and make sure you fall asleep, tweet~

C: 唔呣…那些孩子捉迷藏时都有固定的躲藏地点，但在下怎么也想不起来了啾…
E: Hmm... When these children play hide-and-seek, they always have specific hiding spots, but I can't seem to remember them, tweet...

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个狡猾的孩子说过<color=#dbc291ff>苏乐达的广告牌</color>足够隐蔽，说不定它藏在某只广告牌附近呢~
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet tweet... That's right! A sly child mentioned that <color=#dbc291ff>SoulGlad billboards</color> are good hiding spots. It could be hiding near one of them right now!

C: 我见过一个很像你的人…
E: I've met someone like you...

C: 那与金叶广场一同闪耀的薄暮商店、钟表公园也都是本公子的作品啾~
E: The Twilight Store and Clock Garden that shine alongside Goldleaf Plaza are my masterpieces, tweet!

C: 啾啾…来一起追逐智慧的脚步吧。
E: Tweet, tweet... Come and follow in the footsteps of wisdom with me!

C: 好吓人…好吓人啾……
E: I'm so scared... That was so scary, tweet...

C: 小心，外来的人！
E: Look out, outsider!

C: 关于小镇居民…
E: About the townspeople...

C: 但它实在太吵了，我连自己唱得怎么样也听不清了啾。
E: But it's really too loud, I can't even hear myself singing, tweet.

C: 我上电视了啾，你看到了吗？我和钟表小子一起上电视了啾！
E: I was on TV, tweet, did you see? Clockie and I appeared on TV together, tweet!

C: 啾？你好啾？这里的天怎么在转转转啾？
E: Tweet? Hello, tweet? Why's the sky spinning, tweet?

C: 一杯鸡翅味汽水。
E: A chicken-wing-flavored soda, please.

C: 这么危险的地方，里面肯定藏着木头老爷的宝藏啾。
E: Old Man Wood's treasure must be hidden in such a dangerous place, tweet.

C: 看看镜子里的本鸟，尤其是那三根靓丽的头发，连我自己都不禁心动啾。
E: Just look at me in the mirror, especially those three magnificent feather pinions. I can't help but be moved by my own reflection, tweet.

C: 我记得站牌先生那里还有票，你去问问它好了——折纸小鸟，堂堂下班！现在就溜回大树睡懒觉啾！
E: I remember Mr. Signpost has a ticket. You best ask them. Origami bird, punching out! Time to slip back to the Great Tree and take a nap!

C: 让我看看…呃…本季度小鸟岗位已饱和，你接受外包小鸟吗？
E: Let me see... Er... All bird positions for this quarter have been filled. Are you open to being a contract bird?

C: 三…二…一…啾！
E: Three... Two... One... Tweet!

C: 我要把你拽出来。
E: I'm gonna yank you out.

C: 广播找人，广播找人啾！
E: Looking for someone, looking for someone, tweet!

C: 你的行为破坏了场馆秩序，阻碍了活动进展，也对百姓生活造成了极大的负面影响！
E: Your actions have destroyed the order of the venue and hindered the progress of the event, while also generating an extremely negative influence on the people's lives!

C: 完全没法理解你的逻辑......
E: I don't understand your logic at all...

C: 怎么看都不够...
E: It's just not enough...

C: …难道……
E: ...Could it be...?

C: 胡说八道…我有印象，你和那位太卜曾经一起并肩而行，估计是有些地位。
E: Nonsense... but I have seen you walking alongside the master diviner, so I suppose you do have some status.

C: 对我来说，这智慧突如其来，现在我已经想到了一百种毁灭世界的办法了……
E: Thanks to this sudden enlightenment, now I've come up with <unbreak>100</unbreak> ways to destroy this world...

C: 我们绝对再也不敢了！
E: No! We'll never do it again!

C: 不问自取视为偷，不用辩解了，跟我们回十王司一趟就知道你究竟有没有犯事了。
E: Taking without asking is stealing. No need to dispute this. Come back with us to the Ten-Lords Commission and we'll soon find out whether a crime has been committed.

C: 在你暗自思忖，试图探索着仙舟上某个家族隐秘之时，一道清脆的童声打断了你的思绪。
E: While you're pondering and trying to explore the hidden secrets of a Xianzhou dynasty, a crisp child's voice interrupts your line of thinking.

C: 不好意思，其实刚才的虚构故事是改编自……
E: I'm sorry, but that fabricated narrative was actually lifted straight from...

C: 怎么样，都记住了吗？
E: How's that? Can you remember it all?

C: 且为郎君燃烛光……
E: Candles flicker, casting shadows on the wall...

C: 肉为灯芯骨做香。
E: My bones the wick, my flesh, and all.

C: 好～那咱们先从故事背景开始讲起吧。《合巹记》讲的是人被岁阳迷惑，与岁阳相恋的故事。
E: Okay~ Then let's start off with the background of the story. Wedding Wine tells the story of a man seduced by a heliobus and their love story.

C: 那就好，没有人会不喜欢这样的小惊喜。
E: That's great. Everyone loves little surprises like this.

C: 在显眼的地方摆上一块大石头…
E: Leave a big boulder in an obvious place...

C: …你能不能直接给我奖励呢？
E: ...What if you just give me the reward straight?

C: 溜人类？
E: Making humans go on errands?

C: 这个好，都给我吧。
E: I'd like that. Gimme everything.

C: 看不出来吗？我被车撞了！可怜了我这一身的手工外壳，全给刮花了。
E: Can't you tell? I got hit by a car! My poor hand-polished shell... It's all scratched up.

C: 那不打扰你了。
E: Then I won't bug you.

C: 再说了，咱们现实里谁认识谁啊？
E: Besides, does anyone here actually know each other in the real world?

C: 没眼看…
E: I can't bear to watch...

C: 你可能很难想象，但…在你出生前的几年，她还是个充满活力的人，每天奔走在各个展会之间，一回到家里就拿起画笔，开始创作。
E: It may be hard for you to imagine, but... the few years before you were born, she was so full of life. Every day, she would rush from one exhibition to the next and as soon as she got home, she would raise up her brushes and begin creating.

C: 她发生转变的时候…是在我出生之前，还是之后？
E: This transformation... Was it before I was born, or after?

C: 快看这是什么…啊哈，看来得暂时收收你的怒火了——你瞧，有什么随着刚刚那一脚，从表盘缝儿里掉出来啦！
E: Look, what is that... Aha! Looks like you must quell your rage for a moment... Look! As your last kick landed, something came flying out from inside the clock face!

C: 怎么回事，胆子这么小？哎，算了算了，随你吧，看来这回是天要亡我……
E: What? Are you that much of a coward? Ah, forget it, do what you want. I guess my demise is written in stone this time...

C: 不能输给这个宾客！
E: You can't lose to a guest!

C: 我敢打赌，就算飞遍整个匹诺康尼都再找不到比眼前这位更…漂亮的酒杯了。我可没有退路，这回必须成功！
E: I'm sure I won't find another glass as... beautiful as this one before me in the entire Penacony. It's all or nothing for me this time!

C: 谁在说话？你们到底谁是谁啊？妈妈，我分不清！
E: Who's speaking? Holy moly, I can't tell you two apart!

C: 洞穴里隐约传来了说话声，但寻常人的体型根本钻不进去。除非……
E: You hear a faint voice coming from inside the cave, but a regular-sized person could never get inside. Not unless...

C: 你搁哪儿听来的这版本，他自己编的吧？
E: Where'd ya hear that version of the story? He told ya that himself?

C: 有辆豪车曾来过。
E: There was a luxury limousine that passed through here.

C: 罗浮将军——相信他一定不会拒绝到神策府外透透气的。
E: General Jing Yuan of the Luofu... I imagine he would not turn down a chance to get out of the Seat of Divine Foresight for a breath of fresh air!

C: …一阵漫长的忙音后，你期待中的声音果然没有响起。这很黑塔。
E: ...After what seemed like endless ringing, the voice you were waiting for never came to the phone. Typical Herta.

C: 黑天鹅…
E: Black Swan...

C: 不知道艾丝妲的空间站和你哪个更重要……
E: I wonder if you are more important than Asta's space station...?

C: 妈妈我要变成垃圾桶！
E: Mommy, I want to become a trashcan!

C: 你们这是魔怔了…
E: All of you are possessed...

C: 伟大的桶王！让我们变成铁桶吧！
E: Mighty King of Cans! Please turn us into iron cans!

C: 抱胸，摊手，双手叉腰——记住了吗？让我们开始考试吧。
E: Cross yer arms, spread 'em out, hands on your hips — you got that? Let's start the exam now.

C: 老大，有空了记得常回来看看，大伙都很想你！
E: Boss, make sure ya come back n' see us when ya get time! We're all gonna miss ya!

C: 老大好，初次见面，我是垃圾场的拾荒者，大家都叫我「小旋风」。
E: Hey, boss! Nice to meet ya. I'm a scavenger at the garbage dump. Everyone calls me "Little Tornado."

C: 美梦如今摇摇欲坠，许多不怀好意的人也闻风而动。眼下，我无论如何都得保护好这里，然后排除万难，把它建设得更好…哥哥也一定希望我这么做。
E: The dream is on the verge of collapse, and many sinister characters are raring to capitalize on the situation. I have to protect this place at all costs, cull it of all impurities, then turn it into something better... I'm sure Sunday would also want me to do so.

C: …朋友，刚到的货，知更鸟的新专辑《空气蛹》，要看看吗？
E: Psst, hey buddy, I just got these goods. It's Miss Robin's new INSIDE album. Wanna check it out?

C: 好，我去多叫几个人。你继续陪那个逐梦客耍耍，别让他溜了。
E: Great. I'll call for more back up. You keep stringing that Dreamchaser along, and don't let him sneak off.

C: 要不要试试，到底是谁下手会更重？
E: Wanna try me on for size then, and find out who is really harsher?

C: 我们永相随！
E: We will always be with you!

C: 「迷路的人，向前看，那里并非空无一物」
E: "Lost ones, look forth. There lies not void."

C: 你注意到它的机身上有一个显著的按钮，你决定——
E: You notice a conspicuous button on its body. You decide to...

C: 对，有什么电影看吗？
E: Uh-huh. What movies do you have?

C: 花火立即回复了你，她「贴心」地建议送几个「有趣」的娃娃至空艇上，以便代替自己陪伴你，你联想到一些不妙的事，闻言赶紧拒绝。
E: Sparkle replies instantly, very kindly offering to send some "interesting" dolls to the airship to accompany you in her place. The prospect naturally doesn't bode well in your eyes, and you quickly decline her offer.

C: …放映机的原理…看上去和流光忆庭的技术有一定关联。
E: ...The mechanics of this projector seem rather similar to the technology used by the Garden of Recollection.

C: 要放映的话，只需把掌心轻抵在已装填好的压缩梦泡上即可。
E: To start the projection, just press your palm gently against the compressed dream bubble loaded within.

C: 在同伴们闲谈时，你放空大脑，这段时间经历了太多事，好几段回忆涌上心头。
E: While your companions chat, you empty your mind. So much has happened recently, and many memories flood your mind.

C: 你与同伴们闲聊了一会儿，在温情时刻结束后，彼此道别，然后短暂分开。
E: After chatting with your companions for a while longer, the heartwarming moment comes to an end. You bid them goodbye, and they leave you for the time being.

C: 勘录舍…是什么地方？
E: Domain of Collations... what is that place?

C: …别废话。「你是真的」、「你是假的」…就只是一堆车轱辘话。去，带一只谛听过来。
E: ...Save your breath. "You're real," "You're a fake"... These are all pointless. Go and get me a Diting.

C: 囚室是关犯人的，书又不是犯人，那么就是犯人把书留在囚室附近的。至于书是怎么到犯人手上的…那只是无限将简单的问题扩大罢了。
E: The cell is for prisoners. Books aren't prisoners, so the book must have been left behind by a prisoner near the cell. As for how the book came into the possession of the prisoner... that'll further complicate a simple question.

C: 赤衣带着狱卒来到你所在的地方，顺利将逃犯带走。
E: Chiyi arrives at your location with the prison guards and uneventfully leads the fugitive away.

C: 你以为自己说这些话很强吗？
E: You think you can fool me with that line?

C: 可是后来，他们每个人所追求的东西与最初并不一样，于是又产生了变故。
E: But later, what they each sought was different from how it began, so there was a change in the situation.

C: 请、请留步！那边那位{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}！
E: P—Please wait a moment! That {F#young lady}{M#young gentleman} over there!

C: 说实在话，我看不出来…
E: To be honest, I really can't tell the difference...

C: 很合理的建议。据我推测，我们出发来这里之前，持明族和十王司已经派人来盯着我们了，这里虽然没人，但不代表着他们不知道。
E: A reasonable suggestion. According to my deduction, the Vidyadhara and the Ten-Lords Commission have already sent people to watch us even before we set off for this place. Even though there's no one around, it doesn't mean that they won't find out.

C: 你能不能检索些好诗？
E: Can't you come up with some better poetry?

C: *老前辈留下的路线指示*是重要的！那就是个纸条，被冥差给带到勘录舍了，你能帮我取回来吗？拜托了！
E: Those directions left behind by past explorers are extremely important! They have been written down on a piece of paper, but the memo has been taken to the Scriptorium by a spiritfarer. Can you retrieve it for me? Please, I beg of you!

C: 词儿呢？辛辛苦苦排练这么久，忘了？
E: Get with the script! We spent all that time rehearsing, and you've forgotten already?

C: 哦！原来是维修——所以，我们空调坏了？
E: Oh! You're here to fix... Wait, is our AC broken?

C: 谢谢你呀，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}。
E: Thank you, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: 你当然知道好奇害死猫，但你又不是猫；更何况，你还知道好奇心同样能憋死一个开拓者。于是你趁着所有人不备，悄悄探过头去——
E: You, of course, know that curiosity killed the cat, but you're not a cat. You also know that curiosity can also suffocate a Trailblazer. So you catch everyone off-guard and surreptitiously peek around...

C: 你在讲师恨铁不成钢的目光中瑟缩了一下，但随即就被眼前的画面吸引了全部注意——
E: You shrink under the lecturer's steely gaze, but are also wholly fascinated by the scene unfolding before you...

C: 让我们拭目以待吧——
E: Let us stay tuned!

C: 如果打开背包没有看到足够的星琼，你就会胸闷气短，一口气提不上来。
E: If you open your inventory and find there's not enough Stellar Jade, a tightness grips your chest, and you struggle to catch your breath.

C: 容我请问：您希望以哪一种方式展开测试呢？
E: May I ask: Which one would you like to start with?

C: 这情节我好像见过…
E: I think I've seen this scene somewhere...

C: 你仿佛看到狮子得意地摇着不存在的尾巴，向你露出嘲讽的坏笑…早该想到的！答案就差写在这头爱好八卦的狮子脸上了。
E: It's as if you can see the lion swishing its non-existent tail, flashing a toothy, mocking grin at you... You should've thought of it! The answer was practically written all over this loose-tongued lion's face.

C: 但这里有个很明显的陷阱。标价的<unbreak>20</unbreak>万已经在买走大地兽时给商人了，接下来只要还上欠商人的钱，<unbreak>20</unbreak>万利衡币就好了。
E: But there's an obvious trap here. The price tag of <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> was already given to the merchant when you bought the dromas. You just need to pay what you owe to the merchant now — <unbreak>200,000</unbreak> Balance Coins is enough.

C: 好痛！这狮子怎么还会咬人的…你只是想抖个机灵而已……
E: OUCH! This lion bit you... It was just a wisecrack...

C: 没错，答案就是眼前的这头狮子，你已经学会了以子之矛攻子之盾的答法。
E: That's right, the answer is the lion before you. You've learned to turn the tables on its answers.

C: 因为要背负黎明机器，所以*站*不起来…嗯？这个笑话没有太冷吧？
E: Because it has to bear the Dawn Device, so it can't stand up... Hmm? Is this joke not deadpan enough?

C: 零分考卷。
E: An exam paper with zero points.

C: 不对吧，那钱去哪了？
E: That's not right. Where did the money go?

C: 谁问你了？
E: Who asked you?

C: 大家当然可以用我的冰箱，但还是需要规定一下每个人的使用时间。要是都像今天这样一股脑塞进来，就谁都没办法好好使用了。
E: You are all free to use my refrigerator, but I need to set specific times for each person. If we keep stuffing it full like that, no one will be able to use it properly.

C: 讲讲你的故事？
E: Tell me your story.

C: 梦境不容亵渎！
E: Dreamscapes are not to be desecrated!

C: 好，我就喜欢你这股嫉恶如仇的直率性子！
E: Bravo! I like your odium for wrongdoings!

C: 我可以帮你这一次，但不能帮你每一次。
E: I'll help you out this time, but it won't be every time.

C: 兄弟们，帮这家伙清醒清醒——垃圾分类腿！
E: Brothers, let's help this one see the light — Trash Sorting Kick!

C: 无尽的欲望腐蚀了这个世界，众生迷失自我，人变得像垃圾桶，垃圾桶变得像人。
E: Endless desire has corrupted this world, the masses have lost themselves, and people have become akin to trashcans, and vice versa.

C: 咕，你这小辈怎如此放肆，我那些同僚一个个铁骨铮铮，怎会去做这种事？你肯定也是骗子的同伙！
E: The cheek of a brat like you! My upright comrades haven't a single impurity in their steel. Why would they resort to such lowly deeds? You must be in cahoots with those fraudsters!

C: …我也没说要跪啊，莫非…我懂了！你竟想用这个来折辱我？讨打！
E: I didn't say that I would kneel, unless... I get it now! You wish to humiliate me in this fashion? You're just asking for a beating!

C: 我并不想收你为徒…
E: I do not wish to accept you as my disciple...

C: 难道是觉得我道歉不够诚恳？还是…噢，你看不起我的资质？是，我承认我天资不如你聪颖，你竟然就因为这种事看不起我？作为高手，你的格局呢？
E: Perhaps you find my apology not sincere enough? Or perhaps... you do not see any potential in me? Yes, I admit that I am not as talented or as clever as you, but you're looking down on me just because of this? As a skilled master, shouldn't you be more gracious?

C: 好吧，师傅你的大事要紧，徒儿唯有自己多想想了。
E: Alright, your matter is more pressing, Master. This disciple will reflect alone.

C: 写完了。也没什么难的嘛。
E: All done. Well, wasn't so hard after all.

C: 替白厄写回信吧。
E: Write a reply for Phainon.

C: 迷迷！和那个时候一样，还是那么清脆。
E: Mem! That same clear, ringing sound. Just like back then.

C: 当然。
E: Of course.

C: 小海豹，很兴奋的样子呢，是因为听到了夸奖吗？
E: Looks like the baby seal's getting hyped up! Is it because of the compliment?

C: 喂喂。
E: Hey there.

C: 哎呀，给我卸哪儿来了，这还是哀丽秘榭吗？
E: Oh, where are we now? Is this still Aedes Elysiae?

C: 黑塔女士谬赞了，不过是一个食而无味、弃之可惜的小发明。
E: You flatter me, Madam Herta. It's just a minor invention — not satisfying to use but serves its purpose.

C: 当然，储存卡满了。
E: Yeah, the card's full, after all.

C: 小妖精们很害羞，据说只有天真无邪的孩子才能进入迷境。
E: Fairies are very shy. Word has it that only pure and innocent children can enter the maze.

C: 被我喊变美少女的窘迫？
E: Embarrassed by me calling you a pretty girl?

C: 我听故事的时候也很耐心。
E: I'm also very patient when listening to stories.

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Climb inside the wooden horse's stomach)

C: 我早该想到的，毕竟这里是那么安静。
E: I should have realized it sooner, after all, it's so quiet here.

C: 而声带振动产生的声波并不足以点燃柴火，这是宇宙中常见的一个物理学知识。
E: And the sound waves produced by vocal cord vibrations are not enough to ignite firewood, this is a common physics fact across the universe.

C: 可敬的祭司涅柔娅…牺牲了。
E: The honorable Priestess Nereia... has perished.

C: 入侵军团造成的影响很大，整个空间站还未能恢复正常运行。
E: The Legion invasion has been very destructive. The space station has not been able to resume normal operation.

C: 在日常生活中，我更喜欢做一些思想实验。你可以理解为一些短问题测试。
E: Normally I prefer to do thought experiments, such as short quiz questions.

C: 我能从现实中，考究到星神存在的蛛丝马迹，就已经很满足了。
E: I am already happy that I managed to find clues about the existence of Aeons.

C: 相信我，只要你前往主城区，你就会明白的。那里有许多如鲜花般绚烂的少女，正期许着我能够支撑起她们心灵的天空。
E: Trust me, you'll understand when you get to the town center. Many beautiful young ladies are expecting me to be the pillar of their souls.

C: 或许这就是所说的，由内而外，无法控制吧？
E: Maybe it's just a part of me that's beyond my control.

C: 好好把握，姐妹。这里的一切，可没有你看上去那么简单。
E: Seize it, my brethren. Nothing here is as simple as it seems.

C: 你看我的眉毛是不是拧在了一起？这就是我心系空间站的表现啊。
E: Have you noticed how intertwined my eyebrows are right now? That's how much I care about the space station.

C: 我还有一些事情想要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 咳咳……不过我也这把老骨头，搞什么变革也不是我有能力的。真要说，还是年轻人自己努力才行啊。
E: Ehem... But I'm just an old guy. It's not up to me to change anything. But if you ask me, young people should work hard to achieve what they want.

C: 你说说，她会看上他吗？
E: Tell me, do you think she'll like him?

C: 我不了解其他科室的情况，但是单说密卷科，这场入侵无疑是一场灾难。
E: I'm not sure about the other departments. But this invasion is undoubtedly a disaster for us.

C: 你！你突然说些什么！抱歉…刚才反应有点激动，但这种话在公共场合讲出口也太奇怪了！
E: S—Stop saying that! Sorry, I don't mean to yell... But still, it's embarrassing to mention it in front of everyone!

C: 搞不懂他们喜欢你什么。
E: I don't get why they like you.

C: 我想找你聊聊…
E: Can we talk...?

C: 诶？你不是科员，那你为什么会出现在这儿？我还以为你是从上面下来的呢。
E: Eh? How come you're here if you aren't a researcher? I thought you came down from up there.

C: 可我觉得大家说得不对，「爱」这种口味本来就是让人流眼泪的，所以阮•梅女士并没有创造失败……
E: But I don't agree with them. The flavor of love is supposed to make people cry, so I'm not a failed creation of Miss Ruan Mei...

C: 不能，我的心已经被盐渍过了，酸酸的，咸咸的，你感受到了吗？
E: I can't. My heart has been pickled with salt — it's sour and salty. Can you feel it?

C: 小家伙抬头见是你，收敛了哭腔，对你骂骂咧咧，似乎对你颇有微词。
E: The moment the tiny thing sees you, it holds back its teary voice and starts grumbling at you. It seems to be slightly annoyed at you.

C: 你看着很面生，估计是从其他地方过来的吧？大老远的来找我是有什么事吗？
E: I don't think I've seen you before. You aren't local, are you? Why did you come all the way here to see me?

C: 我想问…
E: I'd like to ask...

C: 这个舱段，空间站的人叫它「禁闭舱段」。我在小机器人那里查询到了相关的记录。
E: This is called the seclusion zone on the space station, right? I found related records from the little robot.

C: 噢，你好，又见面了。我在这里独自求索许久，也有一些心得。
E: Hey, here we are again. I've learned a thing or two after exploring this place alone for a long time.

C: 打给我的？我接！
E: A call for me? I'll take it!

C: （尝试按下通讯II键。）
E: (Press the Communication II button.)

C: 好牵强，退钱！
E: So far-fetched. I want my money back!

C: 当然，任何探索都伴随着危险，尤其是与泰坦神明直接相关的时候。你的谨慎没有问题，还是把这个卷轴放在原地，迅速离开吧。
E: Of course, any exploration comes with risk, especially when it is directly linked to Titans and gods. Your caution is understandable. Maybe it's best to leave the scroll where you found it and make a quick exit.

C: 很浪漫的想法，但你似乎并未理解我的发问。人的认知并不可靠，经过转达与记录的信息更加真假莫辨。虚假的东西再怎么叠加，也得不到真实。
E: A very romantic notion, but it seems that you have not understood my question. The cognition of mankind is not reliable. It becomes even harder to ascertain the verity or falsity of any information that has been passed on or left in record. No matter how many falsehoods have piled up, it does not make them truths.

C: 真是讽刺，我原本就是为了他才进行调查的…却没想到最危险的不是城里，而是他的身边……
E: How ironic. He was the whole reason I started the investigation... I never thought that the most dangerous place of all wasn't somewhere in the city, but right next to him...

C: 啊…回来了、你们回来啦…一路辛苦了，怎么样，有找到什么吗？
E: Ah... You're back, you're back... You've been through so much. How was it? Did you find anything?

C: 那你们今天吵什么？
E: So what were you arguing about today, then?

C: 我开拓者做好事从不留名！
E: We Trailblazers always perform good deeds anonymously!

C: 他以为你要结婚了。
E: He thought you were marrying someone else.

C: 难道有内鬼？
E: Could there be an insider involved?

C: 据说，捉迷藏对一切智慧生命而言都是最古老的游戏。猎人需要隐藏自己接近猎物，猎物也需要隐藏自己躲避敌人。
E: It is said that hide-and-seek is the oldest game for all intelligent life. The hunter needs to hide to approach the prey, and the prey also needs to hide to avoid the enemy.

C: …果然。《一拳神王•艾格勒卷》？哼，换作以前，我见一本销毁一本。
E: ...Just as I expected. One Punch God: Aquila? Hmph, if this were the old days, I'd have burned this on sight.

C: 可以了，就这样吧。重申一下价格：喊一句给五个信用点。
E: Yes, that's the one. Reiterate the price: Shout it out once for 5 credits.

C: 确实，就是感觉有点倒霉，回头还得重写一份呢。
E: Yeah, just a little unlucky. I need to re-write it.

C: 等等，「那个」是哪个？
E: Hang on. What exactly are we talking about?

C: 大家今天表现很棒，下面我简单说两句——
E: Everyone has done very well today. Let me just say a few words here...

C: 这个舱段确认过了？
E: Has this zone been confirmed?

C: 嗯，毕竟幽默是带走寂寞感的良药嘛…然后呢？
E: Mmmm, I guess humor really is the antidote to loneliness... then what?

C: <size=28>每天固定时候，固定在这条路上，它都要跑上好几个来回！这谁受得了啊？！</size>
E: <size=28>At the same time every day, on this very road, it runs back and forth several times! Who can endure this!?</size>

C: 但首先，你需要先让它安静下来。
E: But first, you need to calm it down.

C: …嗡嗡？
E: ...Grumph?

C: 喂，对奥赫玛人这么友善干嘛？他们在排挤悬锋人的时候，可没这么好的语气！
E: Hey, why are you being so kind to these Okhemans? When they were ostracizing the Kremnoans, they weren't using such nice words!

C: 现在返乡绝非勇猛之举，反而是懦弱的行径——那是从殿下委托的重任前、从新的战场中逃走，拒绝改变，贪图舒适，害怕无法掌控的未来。
E: Returning home now isn't an act of courage, it's one of cowardice — an escape from His Highness' entrusted mission, from this new battlefield. It's a refusal to change, a retreat into comfort, a fear of an uncontrollable future.

C: 再见了，殿下，我们的王……
E: Farewell, Your Highness. Our king...

C: 嗡嗡~嗡嗡嗡~嗡嗡~
E: Grumph~ Grumphhh~ Grumph~

C: 为什么？！
E: Why!?

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，又见面啦。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, we meet again.

C: 老爷爷，市集的大家才不是邪魔外道！大家都跟我说，只要诚心和刻法勒对话，它就一定能听到！
E: Grandpa, the people at the market aren't heretics! Everyone says as long as we speak earnestly to Kephale, they'll definitely hear us!

C: 小女娃，那不过是他们为自己的吝啬狡辩罢了。供奉乃是牺牲，没有牺牲还奢谈什么信仰？
E: Girl, that's just their excuse for being stingy. An offering is a sacrifice — how can you call it faith with no sacrifice?

C: 谢谢你一路陪我爬到这里…时候不早啦，{F#女士}{M#先生}，我们一起回去吧！
E: Thank you for climbing all the way up here with me... It's getting late, {F#miss}{M#mister}. Let's head back together!

C: 听你这么说，你很懂哦。
E: Huh, you really get it, don't you?

C: 喂，反正世界都要重启了，最后的时刻不疯狂一把，未免也太亏了。大不了来世再见嘛！
E: Hey, anyway, the world is about to reset, and if we don't go all out in these final moments, it'd be such a waste! Hey, worst case scenario, we'll meet again in the next life!

C: 黑潮怪物仍源源不断地聚拢过来，眼看即将闯入中庭。正在此时，门外一道声音传来——
E: The black tide creatures continue to gather in waves, about to breach the courtyard. Just then, a voice comes from outside—

C: 呵呵…一定……
E: Hehe... of course...

C: 一时疏忽，你还未抵达廊下便被怪物撵上。好在你将身一扭，躲过了袭击！
E: With a momentary lapse, the creatures catch up to you before you reach the corridor. Fortunately, with a quick twist, you dodge their attack!

C: 可我们也看得清清楚楚，它肩负的「黎明」已经不再亮着了啊。
E: But we can clearly see that the "Dawn" on their shoulders isn't shining anymore.

C: 那就是——希瑞雅，你其实根本没有去过黎明云崖，都是你编出来骗我们的吧？
E: Then... Serena, you've never actually been to Dawncloud, have you? It's all a bunch of lies you made up to fool us?

C: 不会的，法律禁止高空抛物。
E: Nah. It's against the law to litter from on high.

C: 啊，阁下，不要说、说得那么直接啊……
E: Ah, {NICKNAME}, p—please don't be so... so direct...

C: 她是个爱打扮爱写诗的姑娘，经常和金织爵讨论服饰，也经常和命运爵共写歌谣。
E: She's a girl who loves to dress up and write poetry, often discussing fashion with Dux Goldweaver and frequently composing ballads with Dux Fatorum.

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}啊，请指引我——「于梦中惊觉的悬石，该去往何方？」
E: {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide me — "Where should the floating stone that awakens from dreams go?"

C: …抱歉，阁下，正因为我想着他们，才必须离开这里。
E: ...I'm sorry, but it's precisely because I care about them that I must leave this place.

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 烈到难以入口的纯酿，很难想象什么样的人才会喜欢这种口味，或是把这瓶送给别人。
E: A pure brew so harsh it burns going down. Hard to imagine who would enjoy something like that, or even gift it to someone else.

C: 那倒没有，只是比较少见。
E: Oh, nothing. It's just you don't see things like this every day.

C: 我最近难得有空，还想上列车找姬子姐姐聊聊，没想到正好碰见你……
E: I finally managed to get some time off work and thought I'd hop on the Express for a chat with Himeko. I had no idea I'd bump into you...

C: 你欺负帕姆了？
E: Are you bullying Pom-Pom, Hook?

C: 嗯…感觉不错啊。虽然听起来有点俗，但让我想起了一位叫兰迪的传奇吉他手——可惜他已经去世了……
E: Haha, love it, but I bet there's a lot of songs with that name. It sounds like something Randy would play — he's one of my favorite legendary guitarists. May he rest in peace...

C: 这种感觉对于一个从没离开过贝洛伯格的人来说，真的很神奇。
E: It's an amazing feeling for someone who's never left Belobog before.

C: 真是绝景啊……
E: It truly is a stunning view...

C: 我没有，你别瞎说。
E: What nonsense!

C: 但最后是星核猎手先找到了我——或者说，是我找到了他们。用艾利欧的话讲，这就是「命运」。
E: But in the end, it was the Stellaron Hunters who found me first — or rather, it was I who found them. In Elio's words, this is called destiny.

C: 这让我想起了许多往事…
E: This brings back a lot of memories...

C: 姬子小姐是内行啊…
E: I never knew Himeko was such an expert.

C: 真是太贴心了。
E: You're too kind.

C: 我没什么想要问的了。
E: I don't have anything else to ask.

C: 灾难！这就是一场纯纯粹粹、彻彻底底的灾难！
E: A disaster! An absolute, complete disaster!

C: 年轻的时候吧，这伯纳德情窦初开，想要追密卷科一个姑娘。我们这些做兄弟的能不帮忙吗？那前前后后，忙了好一哆嗦。
E: Back when he was young, Bernard fell in love for the first time with a girl from the Department of Insight. As his brothers, we all helped him to pursue her for a while.

C: 其实，单看卖相我还以为根本不能喝呢。大千世界真是无奇不有啊。
E: Judging from its appearance, I thought it'd be unpalatable. The wonders of the universe are endless.

C: 对，就是咖啡。
E: Yes. Coffee.

C: 是啊。我毕竟身为银鬃铁卫的情报官，没办法抛下工作随意去旅行……
E: Yes. As the Silvermane Guards' Intelligence Officer, I can't just drop my work and go travelling...

C: 师傅和希儿都嫌我话痨，真没想到还能撞见话匣子比我还难关上的人，哈哈哈！
E: My master and Seele both think that I talk too much. Never thought I'd run into someone chattier than me... hahaha!

C: 我还是带它去餐车吧…走了，账账~
E: I'm just gonna take them to the dining carriage... Let's go, Numby!

C: 真是这样？我还以为我猜错了。
E: Really? So my guess was correct.

C: 帕姆会喜欢吗…？
E: Think Pom-Pom will like it...?

C: 不知丹恒近来如何……
E: I wonder what Dan Heng's getting up to lately...

C: 我是说，我和尾巴大爷相遇是意外，进入十王司也是意外，擢升判官…也是意外。
E: What I mean is, I've had plenty of accidents: Meeting Mr. Tail, joining the Ten-Lords Commission, even getting promoted wasn't intentional...

C: 我、我只是觉得自己应该出门走走，就、就来到了这里。
E: I—I just thought it'd be good to get out... so here I am.

C: 有机会一定要向列车长讨教保持整洁的方法。
E: I wonder if the conductor might share some organizing tips with me.

C: 是的！「无名客」就是我心中英雄的模样，也是我想要追随的榜样。
E: Exactly! For me, the Nameless represent the ideal hero. I hope to follow in their footsteps.

C: 哈哈！看来你这是已经做好当列车向导的准备了啊！那就不多等了，开始吧！
E: Haha! Looks like you're prepared to be the Express' tour guide! Then let's not waste any more time, and get started!

C: 你要不忙，就帮我去找一找。对了，顺便再帮我带把螺丝刀，我可以把全身的螺丝拧一拧。
E: If you're not busy, please help me look for some screws. Oh yeah, and if you can also get me a screwdriver, I can tighten all the screws on my body.

C: 原本想在下次逛街的时候用。但款式和颜色太多，我实在有些纠结。
E: I plan to wear it the next time I'm out shopping. But there are too many designs and colors... I can't decide.

C: 也有可能是因为这种日子，对我来说太重复了……
E: For me, living one's days out like that is too repetitive...

C: 列车的沙发实在太柔软了，睡着之后…连梦都是柔软的。
E: The sofas here on the Express are too comfy. After falling asleep... even my dreams are soft and cuddly.

C: {NICKNAME}，你提供的点子都超——极欢愉！我决定也为你打造一个专属面具！
E: {NICKNAME}, the ideas you've come up with are suuuuper Elating! I've decided to forge an exclusive mask for you!

C: 仅想表达一些对列车的祝福。这是带有「记忆」祝福的特有文字，来自一个遥远的古老星球。
E: I only wish to express my blessings for the Express. These are words specially imbued with a blessing of Remembrance — they hail from a distant, ancient planet.

C: 还记得那场幻觉之夜吗？在这熟悉的车厢中，丑陋的巨真蛰虫促成了我们真挚的情谊。
E: Remember that night of hallucinations? In this very familiar car, the ugly Giant Sting solidified our friendship.

C: 无所谓，我会被可爱打败。
E: I would be defeated by the cuteness.

C: {NICKNAME}，你是否听说过太空竞逐？
E: {NICKNAME}, have you heard of space racing?

C: 期待未来有一天，我们能有机会同场竞技。
E: I hope that one day, we will have the chance to meet on the racetrack.

C: 嗯…好像很久没有记录了，自入焰轮铸炼宫受训算起，数量应当是三百一十二柄。
E: Mm... I haven't kept track in a while. Since I started training at Flamewheel Forge, the number should be three hundred and twelve.

C: 罗浮也有咖啡？
E: There's coffee on the Luofu?

C: 你想好叫温什么了吗？
E: Have you decided what "Wen" name to call yourself?

C: 你是说…约瑟夫「召唤」来的那位…模特？
E: Do you mean... the model that Joseph... "summoned"?

C: 绿叶蔬菜在某些星球是遭人嫌弃的土腥食材，在这里倒成了一种美味。
E: Leafy greens, which are considered repulsive and backwards foods on some planets, are a delicacy here.

C: 接下来要去哪里冒险呢？
E: Where to for the next adventure?

C: 你很懊恼，这些高深的理论离常人如此遥远。墙壁空空如也，就像你放空时的大脑，你的思绪飘远……
E: You are left frustrated by those profound theories which seem unreachable by average people. The walls are blank, just like your mind when you are spacing out. Your thoughts are drifting away...

C: 再见，这位市民！我很感激你带来的口信，只惜我工作在身，没法回应！
E: Goodbye, dear citizen! I appreciate your kind message, but I must apologize. I simply have too much work to do to reply!

C: 平安无事又一天～啦啦啦啦～
E: Another peaceful day... La la la la la⁓

C: 但你看起来好像…不属于其中任何一种，所以我有点好奇。
E: But you... you don't seem to be from any of them, so I'm a little curious.

C: 我要是你，就趁这个机会买进，等它价格涨上去了，再出手卖掉，大赚一笔！
E: If I were you, I wouldn't miss out on this opportunity. Buy it now, wait for the price to go up and sell it. Easy money!

C: 说话注意点，我是拉雯妮——行政区谁不认识我？只有蠢材才会分不清机遇和骗局，你不傻，对吧？
E: Don't be rude! I am Lavonne. If you ask around, there's not a single soul in the Administrative District who doesn't know my name. Only fools mistake opportunities for fraud. I trust you are not one of them?

C: （沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: 不要出声！不要打扰我的科研！
E: Silence! Science requires solitary!

C: 但现在我却必须配合着声音做口型，配合着声音做动作…我真的很担心呢，未来某一天，那个声音会不会把我取而代之呢……
E: Now I have to lip sync and act as if in a silent film. I can't help but think that maybe one day they'll get rid of me altogether...

C: 总觉得她的话像是在针对谁而说的…不知道是不是小女子惹到塔米拉小姐了呢？
E: It just feels like she was aiming that at me... Have I done something to get on her bad side?

C: 嗯～我原本没有这种想法…但是时间一久，总会想试试开拓新的道路呢。
E: I've been thinking about that lately... I want to set foot on a new path.

C: 原来你也是推理小说爱好者…这本怎么样？讲的是少女安乐椅侦探和搭档一起解决各种离奇案件、发掘隐秘真相的故事——虽然不算热门，但是质量相当高的作品呢。
E: I'm also a fan of mystery novels... What do you think about this one? It's about a young girl, Detective Anraku, and her associates, solving strange cases and uncovering hidden truths. It isn't exactly a hit but it's quality writing.

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 那当然，以前我和孩子他爸刚刚认识的时候，还经常在上面的餐厅里烛光晚餐呢，我又不是镇子上这些年轻人，我怎么可能……
E: Of course. Back when my husband and I first met, we used to have romantic candlelit dinners up there in the restaurants. I'm not just some country kid, tsk...

C: 我有些问题想问…
E: I still have some more questions...

C: 想在我这儿打拳，你身上必须得有「卖点」。只要能给我带来收益，管你是小丑还是怪物，我统统买单。
E: Anyone that wants to be a fighter here needs to have some selling points. As long as they can bring me profit, whether they are clowns or monsters, I'll hire them.

C: 啊，对了，我还听爸爸妈妈说，我们很快又能去上层区玩了…好期待呀～
E: Oh yeah, I also heard from my parents that we'll be able to go to the Overworld soon... I can't wait~

C: 该醒醒了！
E: It's time to wake up!

C: 嗨，陌生人！
E: Hi!

C: …我正想着呢，别瞎起哄！
E: ...I'm thinking! Stop interrupting me!

C: …吓？！你…你不是之前铆钉镇上遇到的{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}吗？
E: ...Huh? Didn't we meet in Rivet Town earlier?

C: 我想喝下午茶。
E: I would like to try your afternoon tea.

C: 信里说了什么？
E: What does the letter say?

C: 感谢你的时间，布洛妮娅。
E: Thanks for your time, Bronya.

C: 嗐，这有什么！朗道家绝大部分人都走上了军旅生涯，这种场面没看惯也听惯了。
E: No big deal! Most Landaus members work their ways into military careers, and we're used to this.

C: 哎呦，说得我都有点馋了，哈哈哈。
E: Yes! You are making me hungry. Hahaha.

C: 是啊，就是我们拯救了贝洛伯格。
E: Yeah, we're the ones who saved Belobog.

C: 不愧是铁卫的情报官。
E: You're a great Intelligence Officer.

C: 过奖了，这件事能顺利解决也多亏了你的协助，无论如何都要谢谢你才是。
E: Thanks for the compliment. Your help has played a crucial role in this matter. We really appreciate it.

C: 正在处理来自「外来者」的提问。
E: Processing the outsider's inquiry.

C: 了解。
E: Understood.

C: 我不能将异常的演算结果转达给你，但我会持续验证算式和演算结果，直到无限接近答案。
E: I cannot convey irregular calculated results to you, but I will keep verifying my formulae and calculations until I obtain a proximate answer.

C: 暂时相安无事。
E: Fine for the moment.

C: 有吗？虎克只记得自己在欺负他了。那个叔叔对虎克可好啦！
E: Have I? I only remember bullying him. That man is really nice to me!

C: 唷，{NICKNAME}！你居然还在下层区，真是好兴致啊！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! Glad to see you here, in the Underworld!

C: 好，也祝你旅途平安。
E: Great, have a safe journey!

C: 总得有谁向本地人介绍用法嘛。我已经尽可能减少收费了。
E: Well, someone has to teach the locals how to use these phones. I've already done my best to keep the charges as low as possible.

C: 怎么，看见这张桌子就以为我是卖东西的了？
E: Hmm? You see a desk here and think I'm running a store?

C: 哼哼...哼，哼哼！
E: Oink oink... oink, oink oink!
Oink... oink oink...

C: …可恶，毫无反应。这明明是你颇为自豪的冷笑话珍藏之一…看来冰原熊这个物种对于冷笑话的品位颇高，并非能轻易被笑意感染的听众。
E: ...Dang, no reaction. This was clearly one of your proudest dad jokes... It seems that the arctic bear is a species with high standards when it comes to dad jokes. This is a tough crowd.

C: 下层区封闭以后…
E: Since the Underworld was sealed off...

C: 懂的太多了不是好事……
E: Yeah, knowing too much ain't always a good thing...

C: 听说可可利亚那件事有点说法，大家懂的都懂……
E: I heard a bit of gossip about Cocolia. Everyone knows about it...

C: …你也？
E: ...You too, huh?

C: 不会在书架上面吧……
E: Could it be on the bookshelf...

C: 妈妈我啊，当年可强得很……
E: Back then, your mother was very strong, you know...

C: 别起哄！
E: No heckling!

C: 希望爸爸能赢…
E: I hope Daddy will win...

C: 哦，我明白了！
E: Oh, I get it!

C: 说起来，我当年还是贝洛伯格艺术学院雕塑系的优秀毕业生呢——于尔丹喊我来帮忙制作模型，没想到竟然也把修复文物的活计交给我了……
E: Speaking of which, I was once an outstanding graduate from the Belobog College of Arts back then, specializing in sculptures. Uldan hired me to help create models, and I ended up having a job here as a restorer...

C: …欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。有什么需要的话，就来找我吧——你是我们父女俩的恩人，我一定有求必应。
E: ...Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. If you require any assistance, feel free to ask me. You are our savior, I will do my best to assist you.

C: 我想卜算一下凶吉祸福。
E: I wish to know my fortune.

C: 坏了，这是仙舟「苍城」覆灭之景，「抱薪救火大皆燃，烧遍三千亦复然」，老板您最近事不如愿，抱薪救火，不如不救啊。
E: Oh dear, this scene paints the destruction of the Xianzhou Cangcheng: "Fighting fire with woods will only fuel the flames." Your recent affairs haven't been going your way, so instead of remedying them, you should leave them be.

C: 想跟你打听一些事儿…
E: I'd like to ask you a few things...

C: 秋风明月登楼台，谈恋爱要慢慢来。
E: Autumn winds and moon rises on buildings glow, love can also move as slow.

C: 你这啥理解能力啊，还在这儿鉴赏诗词呢？
E: You have such a bad understanding of poetry, and you're trying to appraise poems?

C: 怎么就失败了？
E: How did you fail?

C: 蘑菇没听说，蘑菇不在意。
E: I've not heard about it and do not care.

C: 此言差矣！托蝶幻境是仙舟独特的文化和艺术，并不是什么……
E: Wrong! Butterfly Immersia is a unique cultural legacy and art form found only on Xianzhou, not some crazy...

C: 你是说建木不再生发的事吗？早就知道了啊，南洁还劝我趁热度在火速拍几部呢。
E: Are you talking about the fact that the Ambrosial Arbor no longer sprouts? That's old news to me. Nanjie even advised me to make some immersias about it while it is still a hot topic.

C: 拥有<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「中功」以后，就可以合成1次「大功」；拥有<unbreak>13</unbreak>次「大功」以后，就可以合成1次「奇功」！
E: After accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Moderate Merits," they can then be combined into a "Huge Merit," and after accumulating <unbreak>13</unbreak> "Huge Merits," they can be combined into an "Outstanding Accolade"!

C: 不要就拉倒，到时候别回来求我。
E: Just go if you don't want it. Don't come back and beg me for it later.

C: 我见{F#姑娘}{M#兄台}器宇不凡，想必是个仗义疏财之人，定能同我意气相投！没想到能与这样的贵人在长乐天偶遇，这正可谓是天赐良机啊！
E: I can see you have exceptional attitude there, young {F#lass}{M#lad}. I can see you're the kind of person who helps the needy — just like me! I never thought I'd meet such an honorable soul here in the Exalting Sanctum. This is simply a gift from the gods!

C: 哪能没看见呢？那么大的一棵树啊！
E: How could I miss it? It's absolutely huge!

C: 哎，说不过你们俩…我就选些能说的部分吧。
E: *sigh* I just can't win against you two... I'll just be careful with what I say then.

C: 这人就骗我。明明说好一起做飞行士，这小子就跑去从军了。现在天天刁难我。
E: But this kid tricked me. He said that he'd become a pilot with me, and then abandoned me, joined the army, and revel in contributing to my headaches daily.

C: 我基本已经搞明白了…我忙不忙根本不取决于什么灾难什么建木什么危机，只取决于我姐。
E: I think I've figured it out... It's my sister who decides whether my life is busy, not the Ambrosial Arbor crisis.

C: 这您大可放心，这案牍库归根结底只是个远程访问接口，一锅端了也没用。案牍原件全部都存储在某个玉兆阵列中。
E: You can rest assured about that. This document office is ultimately just a remote access interface. Even if the office was somehow "eliminated," it wouldn't have any effect. All the original documentation are stored on a certain jade abacus matrix somewhere.

C: 哎…现在的这帮年轻人啊…孺～子～不～可～教～
E: *sigh* Youths these days... Simply un-teach-a-ble.

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 最近长乐天不是流行起推理小说了嘛，「安乐椅侦探」无须奔波劳碌，坐在躺椅上听着命案的线索就能找出真凶…我也想做这样的「安乐椅执事」。
E: Mystery novels are really popular around the Exalting Sanctum these days, right? Those armchair detectives crack cases just by sitting on their couch and following the story... I'd love to be an 'armchair officer' like them!

C: 唉，怎么说呢…最近的烦恼比之前少多了，但还是有不少的。
E: Hmm, how do I put it... There's less trouble than before, but it's still there.

C: 所以该从谁手上购入这批超导合金，就成了我该头疼的问题。
E: So the question of who to buy these superconducting alloys from has grown into a rather thorny problem for me.

C: 我们翔水商会是天舶司麾下七大商会之一，您要是有大宗商品想要出手，欢迎随时来找我。
E: Our Aquaglider Guild is one of the seven guilds under the umbrella of the Sky-Faring Commission. If you have any bulk goods that you wish to sell off, come see me any time.

C: 我听说工造司本来是需要我手上这些超导合金的，需求量不大，结果半路杀出个麦尔彦，要拿下批文，还得跟她竞价…我非得急死。
E: I heard they needed these superconducting alloys over at the Artisanship Commission, but not very much. But Maryam popped out of nowhere and wants the business for herself. Now I have to compete with her prices... I'm so anxious!

C: 天舶司的态度是挺好的，怪就怪我遇上了建木生发，关闭玉界门，暂停商团批文，天舶司早就忙得焦头烂额了，我也能理解他们有多辛苦。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission has been reasonable. I can only blame the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth, the closing of the Jade Gate, and the cessation of trade permits. They have been burned out for a while over at the Sky-Faring Commission and I can understand how hard they've been working.

C: 不过幽囚狱的主簿也有特殊的地方——虽然工作强度不高，但给我们这些笔杆子的心理压力可不低。
E: Though, being a secretary in the Shackling Prison also has its unique aspects. The workload might not be that intense, but the pressure for us pen-holders is pretty substantial.

C: 要我说这里游手好闲的人还挺多，您来找我，最好是真的有什么要紧事，我忙得很。
E: If you ask me, there're too many lazybones hanging out here. You'd better have something urgent if you're looking for me, because I'm buried in work.

C: 我就不打扰了，您接着忙。
E: I won't bother you any further. Please carry on with your work.

C: 说吧，又有什么要紧事了？
E: Go on then, what is it this time?

C: …呃，你别瞎想，我只是觉得他们说话太弯弯绕绕了，我大老粗一个，和他们实在是聊不来。
E: ...Uh, don't take what I said too literally. I just think they talk round and round in circles. I'm a hands-on tradesman and I just can't seem to level with them.

C: 普通玉兆里篆刻的是兆亿符箓，而这穷观阵就不止…噢你说的是「人情世故」啊。
E: A normal jade abacus contains a hundred million talismans, but the Matrix of Prescience has far more than that... Oh, you're talking about the "social norm" there, aren't you?

C: 举个例子，我平时负些检修工作，可和我对接的几位卜官各个都有颗玲珑心，说话恨不得绕几百个圈子。
E: For example, I normally do maintenance work here, but the managing diviners I interact with are all so crafty, that they just beat around the bush all day without making anything clear.

C: 像我这种遵纪守法的小商人，要是遇见什么可疑的人和事了，我定然会及时上报到神策府去。
E: As a law-abiding small businessman, any suspicious character I come across is going to get reported to the Seat of Divine Foresight immediately.

C: 连现成的生意都不做？
E: You don't even want to close this easy deal right in front of you?

C: 你现在明白它在我们心目中的地位了？
E: Do you understand now the significant of this place in our hearts?

C: 一回来连个认识的人都没见到，就莫名其妙地升职成丹士长了，哎……
E: I didn't even get to meet anyone I knew when I got back, and I just got promoted to chief alchemist all of a sudden. *Sigh*...

C: 不过又所谓「真正的大师永远怀着一颗学徒的心」，我这不是也来幽囚狱学习深造了么。
E: Although, it is also said that: "A true master always maintains the heart of an apprentice." That is precisely why I have come to The Shackling Prison — to further my craft.

C: 你想问什么？
E: What do you want to know?

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 你为什么是一只机巧鸟…
E: Why are you a cycrane...?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 听说你们和工造司的人不对付？
E: I heard that you guys are not on good terms with those from the Artisanship Commission.

C: 您尽管问，不过我知道也有有限，太复杂的事情，就麻烦您去问问几位卜官大人了。
E: Ask away, though I don't know much. If it's about something too complicated, I'm afraid you'll have to ask the Managing Diviners.

C: 三位卜官大人的想法人尽皆知，太卜大人也没有挑明，只有他们仨还以为别人不知道…看他们在职场上明争暗斗也属实是一件有趣的事。
E: Everyone knows what's on the minds of the three Managing Diviners. As the master diviner doesn't address the issue directly, the three still assume that the competition between them is a secret... It's quite amusing to see them scheming against each other at work.

C: 你具体是做什么的？
E: What exactly do you do?

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: 别看咱细胳膊细腿儿，咱可是「云曳旗旌流星拳」的首席大弟子。咱这路拳法可堪称仙舟外家拳之王！
E: Haha, I may look like a pushover, but I am the Cloudbanner Meteor Fist's chief disciple. My fists are unrivaled among the auxiliary martial art schools in Xianzhou!

C: 原来是这样，我明白了。秘密虽然只是几句话，价值却是千差万别的。
E: So that's how it is, I see. Secrets are nothing more than a few words, yet those words differ dramatically in value.

C: 手打烈焰浓茶，劲道十足！客人又来了，要买点茶吗，还是说想随便聊聊?
E: My hand-brewed Flaming Potent Tea is flavorful and strong! Thank you for your continued visits. Would you like to buy some tea or just have a chat?

C: 我看客人没有带着旧货来，想必是来收收旧货，或者只是随便聊聊呢？
E: I don't see any old gadgets with you. You must have come here to buy some second-hand goods, or maybe you're just here to chat?

C: 况且，还是变成智慧生物更有意思一些～
E: Besides, it's more fun to become an intelligent creature~

C: 他们说我盗用身份、诈骗、窃取机要，犯下了很多大罪…哎呀～真是的，这只是我的生物本能而已～
E: They said I've stolen identities, cheated people, stolen important intelligence, and committed lots of heinous crimes... Ah. Seriously, though, it's just my basic biological instinct.

C: 我虽然*不是*聊天机巧，但我将尽力回答您的问题或为您提供有用的信息和建议。
E: While I'm NOT designed for chatting, I'll do my best to answer your questions or provide you with helpful information and advice.

C: 我的玉兆模组上几乎没有保留那个时代的数据，仅仅留下了一些修改痕迹——据说是为了抹除寰宇中「反有机方程」的可能性。
E: My jade abacus module retains almost no data from that era except for a few traces of modifications, presumably to eradicate the very existence of the Anti-Organic Equation in the universe.

C: 哎，任何地方都有世事变迁，想要延续那些日子并不容易。
E: But alas, things do change. It's not easy to continue those good, old days.

C: 嗯嗯，辛苦啦，我这边也有别的事要处理。有什么问题，可以随时来找我。
E: Yeah, sure, I've got some work to do, too. Feel free to come to me if you have any questions.

C: 算了，我现在没胃口。
E: Forget it. I don't have an appetite now.

C: 客人，我不会谜语。
E: I'm not good at riddles, dear customer.

C: 原本的编钟钟架高大，甚至有长短不同的两堵立面相交，演奏复杂乐曲时，还得依赖多人协同演奏…不过你看，现在我一人也能将它带到长乐天来。
E: In ancient times, chime sets had towering frames resembling high walls, and playing complex music would require multiple minstrels... But they've been improved over time, and now I can play them alone in Exalting Sanctum.

C: 研究的事，你还打算继续吗？
E: Are you going to continue your master's research?

C: 不贵，我这都是小本买卖，贵不到哪里去，只讲究一个「眼缘」。
E: No, that is hardly the case. These curios are carefully prepared for those who are "destined" to become their new masters.

C: 其实撂地和剧场各有各的好处。剧场里能整更大的设备，搞点空中飞人什么的杂技，但撂地气氛好啊，大家都围在一起看，演好演坏都能立刻得到反馈，多热闹。
E: Both performing on the street and in the theater have their benefits. Theaters allow us to set up large-sized equipment for trapeze or other complex acrobatic acts, but street performances are much livelier, and you'll get immediate feedback from the audience.

C: 好的，我也该去忙了，恕不远送。
E: It's time I get back to work. Take care.

C: 嗯嗯，老师慢走。来日若有机会，还希望能和老师切磋一二。
E: Take care! I look forward to sparring with you one day.

C: 有人痴长上千年，脑子里空空如也，岁数都长到永狩原的狍子身上去了。所以你不必听信年长者的鬼话，学养和寿命没什么必然联系。
E: Some folks have been around for thousands of years, but their minds are as empty as a fawn on the Ever-Hunt Plains. So don't blindly believe old-timers' nonsense. Old age does not equal great wisdom.

C: 一提到这个我就来气，龙师们说这玩意儿叫作「尺木长命锁」，是持明龙尊才能佩戴的尊贵饰物！
E: Talking about that always makes my blood boil! The Preceptors call it the Dragonhorn Pilory, which is a noble jewelry piece exclusive to the high elder of the Vidyadhara.

C: 给我开点儿药吧。
E: Please prescribe some meds for me.

C: 总之，经过十王司评估，剩下未被收伏的岁阳已经不足以构成危机了…这、这都是要感谢{NICKNAME}还有捉鬼小队的帮助！
E: Either way, according to an assessment by the Ten-Lords Commission, the remaining heliobi that have not been subdued are not powerful enough to pose a real threat... Th—This is all thanks to you and the ghost-hunting squad, {NICKNAME}!

C: 那我们聊聊天吧。
E: Then let's have a chat.

C: 「六者，窃夺机要。七者，破狱释囚。八者，离间盟契。九者，造作兵祸。十者，倾覆仙舟。」
E: "Six, Illicit Espionage. Seven, Prison Break. Eight, Sowing Discord. Nine, Incitement to Riot. Ten, Capsizing Xianzhou."

C: 请多保重。金人勾魂使四卅七号为你祈福。
E: Take care. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> prays for you.

C: 有什么人气单品，可以介绍一下吗？
E: Do you have anything popular you can recommend?

C: 一看亲就是行家里手，这「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」根本就不需要挑，闭着眼睛选最新款式就成。
E: I can tell you are an expert, sweetie. There's no need to pick anything with the Auspicious XV. Just close your eyes and get the latest model.

C: 哈哈哈，这也是化外民亲亲常有的误会了。「篆纹活玉，卜籀知玄」说的就是咱这玉石上都刻着能用的程序呢。
E: Hahaha, this is a common misunderstanding by Outworlders. "Living jade engraved with symbols for divination into the unknown" means computational programs are carved on our jade.

C: 所谓的珍玩，除物品「稀有」一事所含的价值外，无非是靠历史、传奇为之增色溢价。
E: Apart from the value derived from any inherent rarity, these so-called "treasures" can only raise their worth with relevant histories, tales, or fables.

C: 下次再来拜访。
E: I'll come back again.

C: 饮月君！
E: Imbibitor Lunae!

C: （太长了，下次再听吧）
E: (This story is taking too long. I'll listen to it another time.)

C: 是啊，在下的不少评书话本也要跟着更新了…以前那些「建木断绝数千年，至今再未复生」之类的桥段，在下全都要改了。
E: Yes, many of my stories have to be updated soon... I have to amend those parts that talk about how the Ambrosial Arbor has never resurrected for millennia.

C: 我的口味不挑剔。
E: I'm not fussy at all.

C: 算了算了，我居然还在认真回想这饭菜口味，要是再想下去，我就得当众呕吐出来了。
E: Forget it. To think I even seriously reminisced on this dish's taste. I think I'd throw up on the spot if I gave it any further thought.

C: 我看你是化外民，一生能吃的餐食也是有限的，就更得谨慎选择了吧。
E: I notice you are an Outworlder. Your food tapestry must be limited, so you must make wiser choices.

C: 太好了，我们现在就开始吧。
E: Great, then let's get started now.

C: 你看起来也不壮…
E: You don't look very muscular.

C: 穷乡僻壤嘛，一年到头，不是种些蔫巴巴的庄稼，就是去林子里打点兔子野鼠什么的，勉强糊口。
E: We were some backwater village. The only thing we did was plant crops that don't get enough water to grow, or hunt for hares and rats to keep ourselves fed.

C: 通常考古学家们得从旧时代的器皿、碑铭中推测联想过去发生了什么，这仙舟上各种东西更新换代太快了，几百年的东西说扔掉就扔掉，真是孰不可忍！
E: Archaeologists often speculate on the past by studying utensils and inscriptions from antiquity. But on Xianzhou, everything is perpetually being upgraded. They simply chuck out centuries-old antiques... it's just awful.

C: 为了在仙舟待得更久一些，我待会儿还得找点差事做才行。你还有什么事要聊的吗？
E: I'll have to find something to do later to stay longer on Xianzhou. Do you have anything else to ask?

C: 「大善人」这句话确实是我随口编的。不过我敢说，景元将军肯定也是这么想的。
E: I just made that up, this "savior" honorific. Though I'm sure that General Jing Yuan thinks so as well.

C: 很多人都在找她，我当然也想去找她，但驭空大人不让我去。
E: Many are looking for her. As much as I want to find her, Madam Yukong doesn't allow me to do so.

C: 既然如此，我就只能用自己的方式，陪在驭空大人身边，和她一起度过这段难捱的时光了。
E: Since that's the case, I can only stay by Madam Yukong's side and help her get through the trying times in my own way.

C: 在来仙舟以前，我曾去过一个星球劝说他们购买完善的筑城科技，将他们的母星打造成风吹不进雨打不进的堡垒。
E: Before Xianzhou, I visited a planet and persuaded the people there to buy a complete fortification system and made their planet an impregnable fortress.

C: 狐人…之都？
E: Foxian... capital?

C: 真的是「最后三天」？
E: Is it really the "last three days"?

C: 我先做个自我介绍，在下是「特别观赛渠道」供应商，你可以叫我老九。所谓「特别观赛渠道」，就是为你这样「没票但有钱」的观众提供量身定制的解决方案。
E: Well, let me introduce myself. I'm Laojiu, the vendor for the special viewing channel. This special viewing channel is a specially designed solution for people like you who has the money but did not manage to get tickets.

C: 我想了解赚钱的机会。
E: I want to understand more about ways to make money.

C: {F#小姐姐}{M#小哥哥}请放心，本次抽奖活动全程受地衡司监督，所有奖品的获奖概率都有公示。
E: Rest assured, {F#miss}{M#mister}. The prize draw is supervised by the Realm-Keeping Commission and all the prize probabilities have been clearly stated in public.

C: 事已至此，不得不寄！
E: That's it. I have to mail it!

C: 谢谢姐姐！
E: Thank you very much, ma'am!

C: 老家？哦…你是说我祖先出生的地方……
E: My hometown? Well... Do you mean where my ancestors came from...

C: 我又不是卷轴我不卷。
E: I'm not a scroll, so I can't be rolled up.

C: 我们不会是上当了吧？
E: Did we get scammed?

C: 咳咳…来科学考察的吗？
E: ...Ahem, I see. Are you here on a scientific expedition?

C: …给公司冠名？
E: ...You mean to the IPC?

C: 疯，就是让肢体变得凌乱，让敌人抓不住你的动作。爆，就是招招致命，一定往最痛最下三滥的弱点狠狠攻击。
E: "Crazy" means making your moves chaotic, so enemies can't predict your next move. "Explosive" means every move is deadly, aiming straight for the most painful and despicable weak points.

C: 那艘星槎曾经遭遇致命创伤，龙骨断裂，无法再次执行飞行任务。但是星槎却似乎有着强烈的愿望希望能够再次送上主人一程……
E: Once, that starskiff suffered critical damage, snapping its keel beyond all hopes of ever flying again. But the starskiff seemed to have a powerful will of its own, urging it to carry its owner on one last trip...

C: 就你这三脚猫功夫…
E: With your wishy-washy skills?

C: 尽情嘲笑吧，讽刺吧！你对我的侮辱，在我下次降临时，我会加倍偿还在无名客和仙舟之上……
E: Fine! Laugh at me! Mock me! The next time I descend upon this world, I will repay your insults tenfold upon the Nameless and the Xianzhou...

C: 哎呀，别犟嘛～算了，俗话说距离也能产生美，你真的好美，我原谅你了。
E: Oh c'mon, don't play coy... Forget it, they don't say "beauty creates distance" for nothing. You're really beautiful, so I'll forgive you.

C: 有些事想问问你。
E: I have some stuff to ask you.

C: 有没有可以透露的消息…
E: Do you have any information you can share with me?

C: 今日运势无咎，放心去做想做的事吧。
E: You have nothing to watch out for today. Be free to do whatever you desire.

C: 当然，我还能骗你。
E: Yes. Would I lie to you?

C: 她还在生我的气吗？
E: Is she still mad at me?

C: 开始确实有些艰难。塞涅俄丝大人缺少和患者相处的经验，难以理解常人的情绪，也没法用合适的方式将情绪表达出来。
E: It will be quite difficult at first. Lady Seliose lacks experience in dealing with patients, finding it hard to understand ordinary people's emotions, and is unable to express her own feelings appropriately.

C: 当你把杂多的存在归纳于一个词语之下，就不得不考虑，它是否会因过于纯粹而远离自己的本质。
E: When you categorize diverse existences under a single word, you must consider whether it has become too simplified that it strays from its original essence.

C: 哪里的事，我可是时常听起大小姐提到{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: Not at all, I often hear the young lady mention {NICKNAME}.

C: 看着孩子们，总是让我回想起以前服侍圣女大人的时候。
E: Watching these kids always reminds me of when I served the Holy Maiden.

C: 医嘱是：多聊天、多锻炼，多吃饭、多睡觉。
E: The doctor advised me to chat more, exercise more, eat more, and sleep more.

C: 我不小心掉到过地穴深处，是荒笛大人的声音引领我找到了出口，要不然，奇拉拉早就重新变成「大地」的一部分了，嗷呜嗷呜~
E: I accidentally fell deep into the caverns, but Lord Terravox's voice guided me to the exit. Otherwise, Chirara would've already become one with the Earth again, awoo awoo~!

C: 但火力太大，缇安控制不住准头，火箭嗖地掉下来，砸到了缇安的脑袋……
E: But the firepower was too strong. Trianne lost control of her aim, and the rocket went whoosh as it fell, landing right on her head...

C: 它的身躯，可真是伟岸呀！披着金黄的铠甲，气势毫不输给我的玻吕刻斯……
E: Its stature is truly magnificent! Clad in golden armor, its presence rivals that of my Pollux...

C: 不知道与小大地兽互动的方法在它身上还起不起效？那刻夏老师，再教给我第二步吧！咦？那刻夏老师？
E: I wonder if the method for interacting with little dromases will still work on it? Professor Anaxa, please teach me the next step! Huh? Professor Anaxa?

C: 这枚骨螺来自斯缇科西亚的海床，是我许多年前采撷的，历经风霜仍保持光洁。
E: I collected this shell fossil from the seabed of Styxia many years ago, and it still retains its pristine shine despite weathering through snow and storms.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 哎呀呀呀，瞧瞧你们，怎么把自己弄得这么狼狈？我在临行前，不是留下了那么多妙策吗？桀桀桀——果然没了我还是不行呀！
E: Well, well, well, look at you all! How did you get yourselves into such a mess? Didn't I leave you with so many brilliant strategies before I left? Hehehe... guess you really can't do without me!

C: 身上枝杈横生，毫无美感…
E: The branches are growing all over my body once again. What a complete lack of beauty...

C: 欸？你们因为什么进来的？
E: Ah!? Why did you guys get locked in here?

C: …将对有有有有机生命展开开开净化。
E: ...Prepare t—to eliminate all o—organic lifeforms.

C: 这说明了什么？半人半机械，纯度太低了。
E: And how would you interpret that? I think it's because it was a half-man half-machine, so its purity was too low.

C: 你…叫他宝宝？
E: You're calling him... "little"?

C: 也不行…
E: Not that either...

C: 无论是长翅膀的，还是带螺旋桨的，无论是高空爱好者，还是恐高的人…再提醒你一次，你应该保护好自己的生命，请尽量避开这种危险的地方。
E: Whether you have wings or propellers, and no matter how much you love heights or fear them... I have to remind you once again to treasure your life and avoid such dangerous places.

C: 你蓦然回首，仿佛见到一位威武的将军与他年轻的骁卫，将军要求骁卫好好记住阶下囚犯的样貌，往日的回声从记忆中缓缓浮现……
E: Looking back, you seem to see a mighty general with his young lieutenant. The general instructs his lieutenant to clearly remember the faces of the prisoners here. Echoes of the past slowly emerge from memory...

C: 鉴于你已经在仙舟上见过能飞的剑、写诗的伞和作祟的火，对于坐牢的玉也已经见怪不怪了…谁知道它会不会突然长出两条腿跑掉？
E: Given that you've already seen flying swords, an umbrella that writes poetry, and flames that cause mischief, seeing a piece of jade put in jail doesn't surprise you anymore... Who knows whether it'll grow a pair of legs and escape one day.

C: 我是～怪异的山水画！
E: I am~ A haunted landscape painting!

C: 这东西也能犯罪？
E: This thing counts as a criminal, too?

C: 引擎似乎没有按照你预想的情形发展，可恶，还能做些什么吧？
E: The engine restart did not go according to plan. Darn it, what can you do?

C: 曾经有名飞行士驾驶着这样的竞速级星槎，只用<unbreak>12</unbreak>秒差距就完成了灰穹航线。这件壮举也成为了那名飞行士一辈子的谈资。
E: There used to be a pilot who flew a racing-class starskiff and made the Gray Sky Route in twelve parsecs. This magnificent feat became a lifelong bragging right for the pilot.

C: 别以为我没有看见，做到位！
E: Don't think I'm not watching! Let's do it properly!

C: 那种古老坚毅的设计…
E: That ancient and steadfast design...

C: 时间过得好快啊。
E: Time passed so fast.

C: 帝垣琼玉是仙舟联盟独有的棋牌游戏，据说已有上万年历史。
E: Celestial Jade is a board game unique to the Xianzhou Alliance. It is said to have been around for more than ten thousand years.

C: 也许可以将它拿去假装是根雕作品——就叫它「怒放的生命」吧。
E: Perhaps, you can treat it as a sculpture and name it the "Blossoming Life."

C: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 「『人才激励部』，主管：姆托尤因•拉杰•扎扎德、阎世罗。后者出身联盟，对仙舟态度不明，需警惕？对联盟潜在危害：中。」
E: "Head of Talent Motivation: Mtooyin Raj Zazzad and Yan Shiluo. The latter comes from the Alliance and has an unclear stance toward Xianzhou. Should we be careful? Potential threat level to the alliance: Medium."

C: 是不是落在后台了。
E: Did you leave it backstage?

C: 这些昂贵的花卉如今静静躺在残破的快递箱中——像极了寄件人的爱情。
E: The expensive flowers lying quietly in the tattered courier package reflect the love life of their sender.

C: 你刚打算离开，就看到风吹开了包裹将合未合的顶盖。一封书信飘摇着落到了你的指间，信纸上散发出清朗的香气。你不由得读了起来。
E: Just as you're ready to leave, the cover of the package is blown open by the wind. A letter drifts in the air and slips in between your fingers. A refreshing and pleasant scent wafts from the paper. You can't help reading it.

C: 你看见了一颗心，表面有着古怪的灼痕，干涸而枯竭，远处的火光正张牙舞爪试图吞噬一切。有道身影不顾一切地抱住了另一道影子。混乱中，你听见了几句含糊不清的呐喊，又像是情人的呢喃。
E: You see a heart with odd burn marks on its dry and withered surface. The fire in the distance is burning ferociously in an attempt to devour everything. A figure pulls another figure into their arms despite the danger. In the chaos, you hear some indistinct cries that also sound like the whispering between lovers.

C: 盛装不同茶叶的瓷罐在材质、体量、形态、工艺上各有严格的规矩。许多人认为这不过是故作姿态，但有人说这就叫文化。
E: The porcelain canisters that hold the various tea leaves are strictly regulated in terms of material, volume, shape, and design. Many people believe this to be mere posturing, but others call it "culture."

C: 地衡司没给我奖励？
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission didn't give me any rewards?

C: ——缭乱！缭乱！缭乱！
E: ...Dazzling! Dazzling! Dazzling!

C: 怎么只剩三个人了？
E: Why are there only three people?

C: …纸壳下面是一块又薄又重的金属板。
E: ...You find a thin, heavy metal plate underneath the paper.

C: 我怎么没看出这是条龙？
E: How come I can't tell this is meant to be a dragon?

C: 我小时候常来绥园……
E: I was here a lot when I was young...

C: 当你靠近时，这台机器上的加液枪突然掉落，喷出的苏乐达溅了你一身。
E: As you approach, the dispenser on the machine suddenly falls, spraying SoulGlad all over you.

C: 不知过了多久，那只眼睛羞涩地合上了。望远镜中只留一片黑暗。
E: After some time, the eye closes shyly. Only darkness remains in the telescope.

C: 报社，出产新闻，产出真相。
E: A newspaper publisher. They produce news and disseminate the truth.

C: 高楼的换气装置，由于造型奇特，筑梦师们都叫它「调料罐」。
E: The Dreamweavers call the ventilators in the skyscrapers "seasoning boxes" due to their peculiar shape.

C: 这盏探照灯的外壳破旧，光线昏黄而苍凉，你很好奇它究竟这样守望了多久。
E: This searchlight's shell is old and worn, and its light is dim and weak. You wonder how long it's been standing watch.

C: 这里的天窗很高，如果不小心掉下去，或许在现实中醒来时也得头痛好一会。
E: The skylight here is so high that if you were to accidentally fall in, you might wake up in reality with a headache.

C: 当你和它四目相对时，这只猎犬飞也似地遁入忆域深处。
E: As your eyes meet, the Hound swiftly departs into the depths of the Memory Zone.

C: 希望你对人的情绪足够了解，当心玩火自焚。
E: I hope you know enough about human emotions, or you'd be playing with fire.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 可…我还能做什么？
E: But... What else can I do?

C: 假的。没有意义。只是骗自己。有什么用。
E: Fake. Meaningless. Delusional. Pointless.

C: 您好呀，这儿的夜色可真美。多希望时针不要转动，我们能永远生活在一片祥和的梦里。
E: Hello, the night scenery's really a sight, isn't it? How I wish that time would stop, that we can forever live in this serene dream.

C: 那是最初的原型机，还能勉强使用，现在市面上已经找不到了，据说能够破解某些特殊加密的信息。曾经有个穿白大褂的男人来找我购买，被我回绝了。
E: That's the earliest prototype. Barely usable, it can't be found on the market now. It's touted to be able to crack some special encrypted data. Some man in a flowy white robe wanted to buy it off me, but I refused.

C: 一碗过期了许多年的泡面。
E: A bowl of instant noodles, years past its expiry date.

C: 但智械不同。我们被迫追赶科技发展的浪潮，时刻担心会不会有哪天，自己的身体机能会跟不上时代。
E: Intellitrons are different. We have been forced to pursue the tides of technological advancement. We always fear the day when our components fall behind the times.

C: ……咕呜？
E: ...Groohoo?

C: 呜！咕呜呜！
E: Groo! Groooo!

C: 乌玛紧皱着眉，头顶的绒球因愤怒而来回摆动。
E: Uma frowns, and the fluff ball on her head darts back and forth in anger.

C: 去告诉他们，让那些质疑我的人都记住——我会再次发声的。我会回到舞台上，然后证明给他们看…让他们知道什么才是不朽的歌声。
E: Tell them, and don't let those who doubt me forget: I will sing again. I will return to the stage and prove myself to them... I'll show them what epic singing sounds like.

C: 回头见。
E: See you later.
Tsk...

C: 我甚至不认识你，为什么要和你分享我的感受？
E: I don't even know you. Why should I share my feelings with you?

C: 维塔利不知从哪儿掏出一条鞭子，狠狠抽打在脆筒身上。呼呼的破风声让你不由得眯起了眼。
E: Vitali throws out a whip out of nowhere and hit the cone hard with it. The whipcracking sounds make you squint your eyes.

C: 这是一只又瘦又高的路灯。打招呼时，它雪白的脖颈总是随着点头前后摆动，仿佛在对你招手。
E: It is a slender and tall street lamp. When it greets you, its snow-white neck sways front and back, as if beckoning to you.

C: 这样的拉锯战持续了有一会儿，维塔利终于败下阵来。他擦了擦汗，叹出一口气。
E: This tug-of-war goes on for a while until Vitali finally gives up. He wipes his perspiration and sighs.

C: 我已经在梦境里待了很久了，能让我感到惊讶的事恐怕不多。
E: I have been in the Dreamscape for a long time. I'm afraid nothing surprises me anymore.

C: 在你提到她家人的一瞬间，夏洛特的人格骤然跳出了她的躯壳。
E: The moment you mention her family, Charlotte instantly broke out of her shell.

C: 非要说一幅相对满意的作品…《人间乐土》也许算吧。
E: If I must pick a favorite... then it's probably the Paradise on Earth.

C: 依我看，守护来宾的安全可不能算一种惩罚。
E: From where I stand, protecting the safety of guests is no punishment at all.

C: 哦，我们是猎犬——阴谋的揭露者，匹诺康尼的守护神！不管梦境还是现实，一切危机在我们面前都将烟消云散！
E: Oh, we're the Bloodhounds — the expositors of conspiracies, protectors of Penacony! Be it in dreams or reality, all dangers dissipate like smoke before us!

C: 你怨我需求乱改，我恨你进度欺诈；理念不合要吵，设计分歧就骂；私下里蜚短流长，当着面撸袖子干架……
E: You complain about my constantly changing requirements, I resent your deception in progress. We argue when our ideas don't align, and insults fly when our designs differ. Privately, grievances linger, and face-to-face, sleeves are rolled up for a confrontation.

C: 这前前后后我也调研了好几个月了，愣是没找到什么还有开发潜力的贸易口子。
E: I've already surveyed the trends for months — I just can't seem to find any potential breakthrough that's worth developing.

C: 尚未成年时我就被钦点为下任家主，也算是为咱的家族任劳任怨了一辈子。
E: I was named the next head before I came of age, but at least I slogged my whole life for my Family.

C: 那些喜欢自动乐团的人，他们根本不是音乐家…他们也许是想要降低演出成本的商人，也许是想随时听到演出的宾客，也许只是想图个新鲜的普通人。
E: Those who enjoy the automated orchestra aren't virtuosos... Perhaps they are simply businessmen who want to minimize performance costs, or they could be guests who simply want to enjoy a musical piece, or just ordinary people in search of something refreshing.

C: 但他们真的会对音乐发表看法，甚至会去了解自己指挥家的情绪……
E: But they'll really express their opinions about music, and even seek to understand the emotions of their conductors...

C: 您好。看您的模样，是对店里售卖的豪车感兴趣？都是最新的款式，请随意挑选。
E: Hello. It looks like you're interested in one of our cars? These are all the latest models — don't hesitate to take your pick.

C: 我现在开始恨自己了。我真的恨。常盘国的人民选我做大臣，可我却沉浸在四海太平的假象之中，忘记了居安思危的简单道理。
E: I have started to hate myself. Truly, I despise myself. The citizens of Tokiwa have selected me to be their Minister, yet I allow myself to be immersed in delusions of stability. Everyone knows that it is precisely when things are peaceful that you should begin to prepare for disaster!

C: 「艺术」当然是很重要的，只是…「艺术」绝不是孤立存在的某种特性，而是服从于功能而自然产生的美学景观。
E: Of course "art" is important. It's just... There is no way that "art" exists as an independent characteristic; it is merely an aesthetic landscape that is naturally produced as the result of a function.

C: 你的学生们很糟糕吗？
E: Are your students that bad?

C: 我现在完全是凭着一腔热血，才继续在折纸大学任教的。我现在根本没办法从工作中找到什么乐趣，唯有来黄金的时刻散心时，才能久违地感到些快乐。
E: I am only able to continue my teaching position at Paperfold University due to this burning passion. I find no joy in my work anymore. It is only when I come to Golden Hour to relax that I can feel some of this long-lost happiness.

C: 入住期间，如有换房、提前退房等需求，请通过您的「梦境护照」递交申请，我们将在一个工作日内为您办理完毕。
E: If you need to change rooms or check out, please submit your request via your Dreamscape Pass, and we will process it within one working day.

C: 先聊到这吧。
E: That's enough chit-chat for now.

C: 目前受害者已达十余人，猎犬已经介入调查，但嫌疑人尚未被逮捕归案。
E: Over ten individuals have fallen victim to this scam. The Bloodhounds are investigating, but the suspect remains at large.

C: 所以…如果您刚从梦中醒来，请牢记——此处为现实。
E: Therefore... upon waking up from a dream, please remember that you are back in reality.

C: 若要办理客房相关手续，既可以选择前台的人工服务，也可以使用大堂的终端自助。
E: If you need assistance with room-related services, please choose either the manual service at the receptionist desk or the self-service terminal in the lobby.

C: 这些{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}请您收下吧。您的贡献一定会给其他宾客带来无限的快乐！
E: Please accept these {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}. Your contribution will undoubtedly bring immense joy to other guests!

C: 下次再来。
E: Perhaps next time.

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 啊…那样肯定不行……
E: Ah... that wouldn't work...

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 哦对，差点忘了给那三个小宝贝买适合翁瓦克幼蜥的宠物粮！起床就下单。
E: Oh, yeah, I almost forgot to buy pet food suited for Vonwacq baby lizards for those three cuties! I'll place the order once I wake up.

C: 「喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！」
E: "Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, and make your dreams a blast!"

C: 很有气势！好，这个鼓胀的钱包就归你了，快打开看看吧。
E: I love your energy! This stuffed wallet is now yours. Check it out now!

C: 请说：「嗨，豪华飞车，麻烦把车灯打开。谢谢。」
E: Please say: "Hi, luxury speedster, please switch on the lights. Thank you."

C: 送我去「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」。
E: Bring me to The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.

C: 没想到吧，连我的车灯采用的都是博识学会的最新专利。睁大眼睛，做好迎接光明的准备！
E: Surprised? I'll have you know that even my lights are the most recent patent of the Intelligentsia Guild. Open your eyes and prepare to witness unparalleled brightness!

C: 你吃掉了脆筒，它不算坚硬的筒身在你嘴里被切断、磨碎…真解压！
E: You gobble up the cone. Its crunchy shell is broken and crushed into bits in your mouth... What a satisfying experience!

C: 我没空给你解释设定，自己去找{RUBY_B#折纸小鸟聚集地}「大树」{RUBY_E#}的那几只鸟问问吧。
E: I have no time to explain the settings. You can ask those birds on the {RUBY_B#origami birds' gathering spot}Great Tree{RUBY_E#}.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent.)

C: 你们一人一鸟就这么互相盯着对方，时间在沉默中流逝。
E: Time passes in silence as you and the bird stare at each other.

C: 这场无声的角力还在继续。不知你们谁会是最后的胜者。
E: The silent staring contest continues. No one knows who's going to win.

C: 这场无声的角力还在继续。不知你们谁会是最后的胜者。
E: The silent staring contest continues. No one knows who's going to win.

C: 滴答，总之，非常感谢你的贡献！下次触碰雕像的时候，记得睁大眼睛看好——我给你准备了一个大大大…大惊喜！
E: Tick-tock! Thank you so much for your contributions! The next time you touch the statue, keep your eyes wide open and watch closely, because I have a huge... a tremendous surprise in store for you!

C: 丹西灰溜溜地离开了——看得出来，他的兴致在和你聊天的过程中被扫得一点不剩。
E: Dancy leaves with a crestfallen look. Apparently, your conversation with him has sapped him of his enthusiasm.

C: 艾薇拉的脸上重拾了喜悦与激情。她对你露出一个笑容，用元气满满的声音开了口——
E: Elvira's face is marked with joy and passion yet again. She smiles at you, and musters her gusto as she says:

C: 唉，这年头，喜欢动画片的人越来越少了……
E: *sigh* There are fewer and fewer people who like cartoons these days...

C: 嘿…等等！相遇即是有缘，不如你来给我些建议吧？我就当你同意了啊——
E: Hey... Wait! It's destiny that we encountered each other. How about you give me a couple of suggestions? I'll take your silence as consent...

C: 抱歉，我不喜欢在上班时间闲聊。
E: Sorry, but I don't like to chat during working hours.

C: 心动不如行动。
E: Why be moved when you can get moving?

C: 果然偏远小行星出来的…就是上不得台面…也是，要真是个有能耐的，也不至于退役之后来当什么皮套演员了。
E: Turns out he's just from some remote minor planet... Not suitable to be seen with in public... I guess that makes sense. If he actually had any skills, why would he retire to become a costumed performer?

C: 看着原本骄傲的父亲，沦落到必须看人脸色行事的地步，我实在无法忍受这种生活的落差，赌气离开了匹诺康尼，再也没和任何人联系过。
E: Seeing my once-proud father being reduced to being subservient to others, I could no longer deal with our sudden fall from grace. So, I left Penacony selfishly and never contacted anyone again.

C: …实在没法理解！
E: ...I just don't get it!

C: 想听听你对我的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about me.

C: 我…我努力…努力试试。
E: I... I will try... my best...

C: …后空翻喝汽水。这是我以前从电视节目里学来的技巧。
E: ...Drinking SoulGlad while doing backflips. Learned it from a TV show.

C: 别急着拒绝啊，我先给您演示看看。
E: Don't be so quick to say "no." Let me show you how it's done.
(Meow!)

C: 深呼吸…抱歉，我可能误解了您的意思。真要说，我认为您是位极为优秀的心理咨询师，这些「惊梦剧团」的情绪问题不是能轻易解决的，您处理得很漂亮。
E: *gasp* ...I'm sorry. I may have misunderstood you. To be honest, I think you're an exceptional counselor. The emotional issues of the Dreamjolt Troupe members are not easily resolved, but you've handled them impressively.

C: 设备损坏要自己花钱修，员工宿舍要租金，就连入梦池污染都要我们赔钱，你干脆让我把公司买下来得了。
E: If we break any equipment, we've got to pay for it ourselves. We've got to pay rent to live in the employee dorms. We've even got to pay compensation for pollution when entering the Dreampool. With all of that, you might as well let me buy the company.

C: 合理利用工作时间，调整个人办公状态…直白点说，就是忙里偷闲、无聊消遣。
E: To astutely utilize my work hours and organize my own work attitude... Or more bluntly, to find time to slack off at work and relieve my boredom, darling.

C: 想请你介绍一下「谐乐大典」。
E: Can you tell me about the Charmony Festival?

C: 你知道那次夺宝传奇的胜出者是谁吗？
E: Do you know who the winner of the great treasure hunt that day was?

C: 想说什么就赶快，超级骇客的时间比你想的还要值钱。
E: If you've got something to say, make it snappy. A hacker's time is worth far more than you think.

C: 不烦你了。
E: I'll stop bothering you.

C: 哎，情绪平静下来后，想想觉得还挺奇妙的。
E: Ah. Now that my emotions have settled, I realize that this is actually quite wonderful.

C: 什么？不就是个垃圾箱吗……
E: What? That's just a trashcan...

C: 你根本想不到那个鬼地方有多可怕！我费了好大的力气才从那片地狱里爬出来，结果…结果他们竟然对我说，我看到的全都是「忆质过敏诱发的幻觉」！
E: You can't even imagine how terrifying that place was! It took so much energy just for me to drag myself out of that hell! In the end... in the end, they told me everything I saw was "hallucinations triggered by memoria allergy"!

C: 当然，梦里种田也得讲究家族法。十二时刻的时间都被锁死了，只有在流梦礁，作物才会生长。
E: Of course, you have to pay attention to the laws of The Family if you want to plant fields in a dream. The time in the Twelve Hours is frozen, and crops will only grow in the Dreamflux Reef.

C: 这地方也没土壤啊。
E: But this place has no soil.

C: 你接下来的计划是什么？
E: What's your next plan?

C: 是啊，在阅读她的手稿时，我仿佛透过纸面看到了她的灵魂…也许那才是真正深刻的相遇吧。
E: Exactly. When I was reading her manuscripts, it was as if I could see her soul through the papers... Maybe that was genuinely a profound encounter.

C: 钟表小子是梦境世界共同的精神财富，不是某些人的个人财产。
E: Clockie is a shared cultural asset of all Dreamscapes. It's not a personal property.

C: 欢迎下次光临，翠丝的店永远为你敞开~
E: See you again next time — Jessie's store will always be open to your business~

C: 后来我才知道，那位平易近人的老人就是让家族头疼的搅局者，匹诺康尼的最为传奇的大亨。
E: I later learned that kind old man had been behind The Family's troubles and was Penacony's most legendary tycoon.

C: 本来是给小家伙们的零花钱，但为了惩罚它们逃跑，都分给你了啾。
E: This was supposed to be their allowance, but I'm giving it to you to punish them for escaping, tweet.

C: 未入梦时，曾憧憬美梦；方入梦时，美梦竟成空\n入梦愈久，愈心生惶恐；入梦愈深，愈惫怠难行
E: Before diving into a dream, once yearning for one. Once dived into, the dream be a void.\nThe longer in a dream, the more paranoid the heart. The deeper in a dream, the more draining the body.

C: 该和集团的人力部门商谈该如何降本增效了，首先，就要开除那些不做事的员工！
E: It's time to have a chat with HR on measures of cost reduction and higher efficiency. First on the list is to dismiss the employees with subpar performances!

C: 即便我们的起源与人类一样来自宇宙的演变，但比起神秘莫测的有机生命，我们却像一张白纸，从构造模式到思维系统，没有一点秘密可言……
E: Even if our origin is the result of the universe's evolution, just like humanity, we are like a blank piece of paper compared to the profundity of organic life — from our structural modes to thought systems, there are no secrets to speak of...

C: 对你们也一样吧，有了丰富的物质世界，这样单纯简陋的玩乐毫无意义，对吗？
E: It's probably the same for you: In a material world full of wonder, such plain, shoddy distractions are meaningless, no?

C: 见到你们以后，我感觉格外…平静。相比我那无法实现的理想，你们的到来更像是一个早晚都会兑现的承诺。
E: After meeting you all, I felt especially... peaceful. Compared to that unfulfilled ideal of mine, your arrival is more akin to a promise that will eventually be realized.

C: 哼，那位英雄没有那么高调。他将自己亲手解放的星球命名——匹诺康尼。
E: Hmph, that hero was not so ostentatious. He named the planet that he personally liberated — Penacony.

C: 呃，那位英雄不爱打棒球，只喜欢打架。他将自己亲手解放的星球命名——匹诺康尼。
E: Err, that hero much preferred brawling to baseball. He named the planet that he personally liberated — Penacony.

C: 朋友，你应该也是我们的一员吧——那就去看看，去「开拓」那些不为人知的故事吧。
E: Friend, you should be one of us as well, right? Then let's go check it out together. Let's "trailblaze" upon those unknown stories.

C: 嗯…你在改变我的情绪，对吗？
E: Hmm... You're changing my emotions, aren't you?

C: 即便动用梦境的力量将自己转化为迷因，并非忆者的凡人也终究会在「记忆」的遗忘中衰败，在「神秘」的磨损中逐渐消散，就像「钟表匠」的一样悄然离去。
E: Even if one turns into a memetic entity with the power of the Dreamscape, those who aren't Memokeepers will inevitably wane in how the Remembrance forgets, gradually dissolve in the corrosion of the Enigmata, and quietly depart from existence just like the Watchmaker did.

C: 智械沉默着点头，权当作别。
E: The Intellitron nods silently in response. Perhaps that was his way of bidding farewell.

C: …没问题，你要的最新典藏版已经买好了…嗯，辛苦你了……
E: Not a problem. I've also bought the new Collector's Edition that you wanted. Right, thank you for your help...

C: 只不过，偶尔我也会觉得，我们拥有的一切，也和这云气有些相似之处。
E: It's just, sometimes, I can't help but feel everything we own is like these clouds.

C: 当你受困于原始森林久未进食，爬过的肥美甲虫就是美食。
E: When you're lost and starving in a forest, a plump beetle becomes gourmet.

C: 前几年，我…咳…我朋友差点被星际法庭判了死刑。
E: Years ago, I — ahem — My friend was nearly sentenced to death by the Interastral Court.

C: 经我调查，这完全是陷害，我证据确凿！
E: I looked into it and they were totally framed! I have the evidence to prove it!

C: 你是否有点自恋了…
E: Aren't you a little too into yourself?

C: 嗐，没什么，就是被我发现有个合作伙伴想空手套白狼…啧，可把我恶心坏了。
E: Ah, it's nothing major. I just caught a potential partner attempting to scam me into forking out their share of the capital, and it's left me thoroughly disgusted!

C: 好，下次再聊吧，正好我也有点累了，想在这儿放空一会儿。
E: Let's catch up later. I'm feeling a bit tired at the moment and could really use some alone time.

C: 本以为只是个普通出差，没想到能遇到这么有趣的事。匹诺康尼这地方，还有这艘空艇，没想到背后藏了这么多复杂的秘密…哈哈，还好我心细。
E: I thought this was nothing more than an unremarkable work trip. Who would've expected to learn something so interesting? But for Penacony and this airship to be hiding such intricate secrets... Haha, I guess it's a good thing I'm meticulous.

C: 我可以摸摸你吗？
E: Can I pet you?

C: 啾！诶呀，这可真是太不淑女了，但客官真的好会梳理羽毛了啾！
E: Tweet! Hey, this may be very unladylike, but I must say that you really do know how to comb one's feathers, tweet!

C: 这是…照着我的模样做的？
E: This is... designed after me?

C: 只是个工作用的称呼而已，你不必在意。
E: It's just a term of address we use at work. Don't mind it too much.

C: 哎，都怪我做事拖拉，一直没处理掉，这下可踢到铁板了……
E: *sigh* It's all because of my procrastination! I should've done it and got it out of the way. I've really gone and shot myself in the foot now...

C: 我原本在一个乐队里弹贝斯，手上那点花活对我来说不算什么。就是…我从没来过这种高档地方，更别说工作了…难免有些紧张。
E: I used to be the bassist of a band, so it's no sweat entertaining them. It's just... I've never been anywhere this boujee, much less worked at one. I can't help getting the jitters.

C: 船长，您来啦？是来视察我们工作的吗？哈哈，我老佩德罗早就说过，我们皮皮西就是最棒的！您瞧，一个个精神着呢！
E: Oh, captain! Are you doing an inspection tour? Hah, as I, old Pedro, always say, we Pepeshi are the best! Boy, look at how pumped up everyone is!

C: 我们需如家人般相互扶持，共同面对风浪。在未知的航道上，这份信任和紧密的团队合作就是我们最宝贵的财富。
E: The trust and close liaison between us will be our most valuable assets as we navigate this channel into the unknown. We'll need to support one another as family does and brave the storms together.

C: 来聊会儿天吧。
E: Let's have a chat...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 也正因为我把握住了机会，公司的实习录用书才会理所当然地摆在我的桌子上。
E: And that's how I easily earned an internship offer at the IPC. Because I spotted an untapped business opportunity and jumped in with the right service offering.

C: 禁止折纸大学校外人员或企业以任何形式参与比赛用车的设计、改造、制作，驾驶违规车辆的选手将被取消正赛资格，终生禁赛！
E: It is forbidden for personnel or businesses from outside of Paperfold University to take part in the design, modification, creation, or driving of competition vehicles. Any contestants found to be driving illegal cars will be disqualified from the current competition and banned for life!

C: 他打算背刺财富学院？
E: He's going to betray Fortune Academy?

C: 哈哈…唉…不行，我还是咽不下这口气。找个时间，得把那家伙捆起来扔垃圾桶里去！
E: Haha... Ah... No, I just can't get this guy off my mind. Next time I see him, I'm tying him up and throwing him in the trashcan!

C: 我没什么问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 老实说，那家伙也有点可取之处。对那些从最开始就拥有许多东西的人来说，能为了证明自己而不懈努力，这也是个挺难能可贵的品质。
E: If I'm honest, there are things I could learn from that guy. For someone like him who has always been blessed with abundance from birth, that attitude of always working hard to prove oneself is actually a very precious quality.

C: 想这些也没用，还是做好手头的每一件事吧。
E: Thinking about these things is pointless. I just have to make sure I do everything properly.

C: 你忙吧，不打扰了。
E: I'll let you get on.

C: 乱破小姐走了啊！她才是「缭乱」的灵魂，虽然现在还会和其他成员碰面，但聊起天来，总感觉少了点什么。
E: Miss Rappa left! She's the soul of The Dazzling! We can still meet up with the other members, but it still feels like something is missing.

C: （写下煽情的寄语）
E: (Write an emotional message)

C: 先预祝你成功吧！
E: Let me wish you the best of luck in the meantime!

C: 那个时候究竟发生了什么？
E: What exactly happened then?

C: 最近实在太忙，之前很多事我都有点记不清了…你和另外几位同学好像帮了我一个大忙？
E: I've been too busy lately, and I can't remember a lot of incidents that happened recently... You and some other students seem to have done me a great favor?

C: 就是校委会决定在今年刊发一本全校性质的年鉴，所有正式就读于我校的在读生都有份参与，里面有大家的个人资料、本年度校园里发生的大事和不同学院不同班级的介绍等等。
E: The council decided to publish a school-wide yearbook this year. Every officially enrolled student will be included. There will be details of each individual, major school events of the year, and introductions to the various schools and classes.

C: 为什么要我给你写？
E: Why do you want me to write in it?

C: 答案是：听天由命。
E: The answer is: Leave it to fate.

C: 只是来找你聊聊，老日。
E: Just wanted to chat with you, Sunny.

C: 虽然但是，在这种地方喝苏乐达，是否不太雅观。
E: It would be in poor taste to drink SoulGlad at a place like this.

C: 盛会海选，一场人人平等的造星之旅。
E: The Festivity Auditions are a journey to discover a new star in a way that is fair to all who participate.

C: 收藏特殊汽水的展柜，永远向汽水界的盛会巨星敞开。
E: A display case that stores special sodas. It is always open to the superstars of the soft drink industry.

C: 墙上的喇叭有些异样，你伸手取下，竟发现它原是保险箱的伪装，你很想知道这究竟是哪任船长所为。
E: The horn on the wall looks somewhat off. You take it down and notice it's a front for a safe box. You really want to know which captain did this.

C: 看在钟表小子的面子上，或许该给广告费打个八折，你在心中默默定下这一切。
E: You consider a discounted advertising fee on account of Clockie — that's what's going through your mind.

C: 当然可以。
E: Of course.

C: 蜜桃的滋味真不错啊！
E: The peach flavor is gorgeous!

C: 啊啊啊，气死我了！凭什么我花了大价钱来度假还要碰上这种糟心事……
E: Ahhh, I'm livid! What am I doing spending all this money on a vacation, just to meet this darn annoyance...

C: 今天差点被球笼撞了。
E: I nearly got smashed by a Spheroid today.

C: 有点转晕了…
E: I'm feeling dizzy with the twirls...

C: 梦里谁吃零卡啊！
E: Who would eat zero-calorie snacks in a dream, seriously!?

C: 这、这不是车多吗！
E: Th—There's so much traffic here!

C: 要不买新款「巴顿」？
E: Perhaps getting the latest of the Patton series?

C: 感觉不如卡利白浓郁…
E: It doesn't hit as hard as Kapo-Kali...

C: 不，这要多亏了你，苜蓿草家的小伙子。还得是年轻人靠得住。
