E: Well, it's all thanks to you, Alfalfa's boy. Young people are the reliable ones making things happen.

C: 他怎么说？
E: What did he say?

C: …说起这个，你到底什么时候才能让我摸摸你的绒球？它看起来手感真的……
E: ...Come to think of it, when are you going to let me touch your fluff ball? It looks so...

C: 谁是小亚当？
E: Who is Little Adam?

C: 非常抱歉！
E: Our sincerest apologies!

C: 记得我们最开始报名的是动作派表演吧？也不知道是谁，被美梦剧团的一条狗吓破了胆，直接丢下我们两个跑了。
E: I remember, we first signed up for the action performance part, right? I wonder who it was who got scared of some dog from the Sweet Dreams Troupe and left us both behind.

C: 这教训也太贵了——苏乐达能不能当主食？我未来半年只能吃这个了。
E: That lesson cost me an arm and a leg. Can SoulGlad pass as a meal? Because it's all I can afford for the next six months.

C: 这次也没能…
E: Not this time either...

C: 嘘！有人来了！
E: Shhh! Someone's coming!

C: 客房里真的有虫子！
E: There's really a bug in the hotel room!

C: 不知道，等见到问问吧。
E: I don't know. Let's ask when we meet them.

C: 嘘——你小点声说。
E: Shhh!!! Lower your voice.

C: 瞧瞧这窜动的人群、看看这琳琅的摊位，简直完美符合你对大学社团的一切向往——好吧，虽然在来到这里之前，你从未对大学生活有过任何概念。
E: Just look at the thronging crowds and the dazzling stalls. It's a sight that perfectly matches your aspirations as to what college clubs should be, even if you had no idea what college life would be like before even setting foot here.

C: 人类初次踏上太空时，菜谱里只有单调的压缩食品，如今太空旅行中的饮食已经远远超出他们的想象。
E: When humans first set foot in space, their menus consisted only of bland, compressed foods. Now, the cuisine available during space travel has far surpassed anything they could have imagined.

C: 没错，所以先来做个规划吧，要是可以的话，你想在折纸大学组建什么社团？
E: That's right, so it's time to draw up a plan first. If you could, what club would you form at Paperfold University?

C: …音乐社。
E: ...Music club.

C: 不得不承认，你也没见过这么大的气球，并且它既不是「折纸」做成的，也绝对算不上是「小鸟」。你对如何称呼它产生了疑惑。
E: You have to admit, you've never seen such a giant balloon before. It's not folded with paper, and it definitely isn't as small as an Origami Bird. You struggle with what to call it.

C: 啾！不懂得欣赏艺术的家伙，我要拉黑你啾！
E: Tweet! A plebe who can't appreciate art. I'm gonna ban you, tweet!

C: 啾~啾啾~啾啾啾啾~这位客人，我们在跟随舞台的旋律练习合唱啾，会吵到你吗？
E: Tweet! Tweet tweet~ tweet tweet tweet tweet~! Hello! We are practicing our chorus with the stage's melody. Is it disturbing you?

C: 可笑，区区岁阳，也敢扰我清静。十王司判官在此，邪祟之物还不速速退散！
E: Pathetic, a puny heliobus dares to disrupt my peace and quiet. A Ten-Lords Commission judge stands before you! All evil spirits should turn tail and start fleeing!

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
E: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now I understand.

C: 水珠蹦跳，前所未有的自由感充盈在你的心间。此刻，你仿佛一只在山涧清泉中徜徉的小猴，纯洁无瑕的心里没有一丝忧虑。
E: Water droplets bounce, and an unprecedented sense of freedom fills your heart. At this moment, you feel like a little monkey frolicking in a clear mountain spring, your pure heart unburdened by any worries.

C: 要怪就怪我哥。泰奥弗斯，你这个老古板！瑟希斯在我笔下又活出了八百种精彩的神生，不比被你侍奉成个木头泰坦好？
E: Blame my brother. You old stiff, Theophis! Cerces has lived over <unbreak>800</unbreak> brilliant divine lives through my pen! Isn't that more exciting than being a dull Titan on your altar!?

C: 我都摆在后屋的小隔间里，免得被我哥看出破绽，要的话我去给你取两本。
E: I stash them away in a secret compartment in the back room to keep them safe from my brother's prying eyes. If you're interested, I can fetch you a couple.

C: 要是见到了，你可要想起来哦。
E: When you meet them, don't forget to remember this moment.

C: 不同选项之间差距好像有点大？
E: Seems like the options are a bit too different?

C: 你清醒了不少，眼前两位自己也随即消失。
E: You're much more clear-headed now, and the two versions of yourself before your eyes quickly disappear.

C: 吃了，你呢？
E: Yeah, I did. How about you?

C: 没事啦，你先忙。
E: Well, that's it for now. I'll leave you to your duties.

C: 塞纳托斯能止小儿夜啼？
E: Can Thanatos terrify crying children into silence?

C: 云石市集什么时候成私人住宅了？
E: Since when did Marmoreal Market become a personal property?

C: 哈哈，这类的故事向来最受欢迎~那么这首《阿多尼娅之死》献给您——
E: Haha, a classic choice indeed! Here's a poem named Adonia's Death just for you...

C: 别灰心！许多新朋友都会犯糊涂，所以*我们*为他们编了个用于辨认的口诀，小灰听好咯——
E: Don't worry! It happens all the time. So, we created a slogan to help people tell the difference. Listen up, Little Gray...

C: 纷争泰坦尚未失神的辉煌年代，只有在其威压之下仍能稳持长枪、浴血而立的王储，才有资格继任悬锋之王。
E: In the glorious era before the Strife Titan fell, only the crown prince who could hold their spear firm under the divine pressure and stand tall under the rain of blood was worthy to become the King of Kremnos.

C: …呦，还好意思说我是骗子。给你个建议，赶紧跑吧。
E: ...Ho, ho! You have some nerve calling me a scammer. I suggest you make a run for it.

C: 香料。
E: Spices.

C: 先想象一龛壁炉…旁边有一张餐桌。外面下着大雪，天气有点冷——一家人围着餐桌吃着热乎乎的饭菜。新鲜茴香的香气在蒸汽中盘旋。
E: Imagine a fireplace... next to it is a dining table. Snowdrifts are piled up outside, and it's a little cold... A family is gathered around the table eating a piping hot evening meal. The aroma of fresh fennel lingers in the steam.

C: 哈！当然有，你想聊什么？莫不是我的研究？太好了，终于有人对我的研究感兴趣了。来来来，我给你好好说道说道！
E: Ha! Of course, what do you want to chat about? Perhaps it's my research? That's great! Finally, someone is showing interest in my research. Come right this way, and let me tell you all~ about it!

C: 好的，请慢慢享受，客人。有需要再叫我。
E: Alright, please enjoy yourself, dear customer. If you need anything, please come and ask.

C: 我看你也是个有故事的人……
E: I'm sure you have some stories yourself...

C: 在战场上，赢家才配说话。
E: Only the victor can speak on the battlefield.

C: 久违的满足，谢谢你，宝贝儿~这些秘酿让我稍微清醒了点…原来你映在水面上的容貌这么俊美，让我都耐不住翻涌起来了呢~
E: Such long-awaited satisfaction, thank you, my dear! This ambrosia has sobered me up a little... The visage of your reflection is so good-looking that I can't help but get all stirred up...

C: 吉奥里亚，打造武器。尼卡多利，磨炼武器。
E: Forge weapons, Georios does. Temper weapons, Nikador shall.

C: 万敌？
E: Mydei?

C: 天才。
E: Genius.

C: 你不敢相信眼前所见，你再一次用力揉了揉眼……
E: You can hardly believe what you're seeing, and you rub your eyes hard once more...

C: 一阵天旋地转后，你在熟悉的地方醒来……
E: After a wave of vertigo, you wake up in a familiar place...

C: 重温过往的天外之音。
E: Revisit the celestial echoes of the past.

C: 异乡的智者啊，莫要被诡辩术迷惑了你的思考。跟从感官的结果固然轻松，但别忘了，理性才是灵魂的主宰。我将为你讲述我的见解。
E: Wise one from elsewhere, do not allow your mind to be clouded by sophistry. Though it is easy to follow one's senses, do not forget that reason is the master of the soul. Allow me to explain my understanding.

C: （驳斥：你在循环论证。）
E: (Rebuttal: You are making a circular argument.)

C: 你的这番言论，属实有些太过欠缺思考了。还是仔细想想吧。
E: These remarks of yours require further reflection. Why not think about this a little more?

C: 你看，这里的深灰代表阴影，而这里的浅灰色则是光照最强的地方。我知道常人眼中可能不是这样，但对我来说，这就是世界的样子。
E: You see, the deep gray here symbolizes the shadows, and the lighter gray marks the areas with the brightest light. I know it might not appear this way to everyone else, but this is how I see the world.

C: 你的好意我心领啦，其实很多朋友先前也这么问过我，还到处搜集各地的偏方，可惜这些对黑潮的损害都没有任何效果。
E: I appreciate your kindness. My friends have asked me the same and have searched far and wide for remedies, but unfortunately, none are effective against the black tide.

C: 阿格莱雅大人啊，在画师的圈子里，她是传说般的人物。我当然认识她，至于她认不认识我，那就不知道了。
E: Lady Aglaea is a legend among painters. I certainly know who she is, but I'm not sure if she knows me.

C: 嗯？细说救命？
E: Hmm? Tell me more about how you were saved.

C: 有人说这看上去像是传说中的「捷足飞贼」干的，据说那是个身形如闪电般迅捷的怪盗，偷走过许多珍奇秘宝……
E: Some say it looks like the work of the legendary Phantom Strider, a mythical thief as quick as lightning, rumored to have stolen many rare treasures.

C: 看来{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}你也是个大忙人啊！没办法啦，那我还是自己一个人练吧。
E: It seems like you're a busy person too, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I guess I'll just practice on my own then.

C: 聊聊旅途经历。
E: Talk about your travels.

C: 边进行工作，边补充营养。要是那些学者也能像我这样钻研问题，早就有突破性的进展了，还至于每次都在讨论会上争辩那几个话题？
E: While working, I also make sure to replenish my energy. If those scholars could dive into their problems like I do, there'd have been breakthroughs by now — why do they always end up debating the same old topics at every conference?

C: 海浪拍打岩石，那便是最初的音乐。我们收集这些声响，将它们谱成旋律。
E: The waves crash against rocks, that is the very first music made. We collect these sounds and weave them into melodies.

C: 奇美拉才不是宠物，它们是人类的同伴！其余动物，包括那些已经灭绝的古生物，能有奇美拉这么聪明懂事嘛。我是没见过。
E: Chimeras aren't pets. They're companions for humans! Could any animal, like those extinct prehistoric creatures, compare to the intelligent and considerate chimeras? I think not.

C: 有些园丁坚持认为奇美拉的出现是个错误，但我不同意这个观点！
E: Some Gardeners insist that the chimeras' appearance is a mistake, but I vehemently disagree!

C: 不幸的是，可能是感官灵敏带来的副作用，卡尼兽对黑潮的抗性非常低，即便在其它动物毫无异常的环境中，卡尼兽也有可能因为黑潮的作用而突发恶性病症。
E: Unfortunately, perhaps a side effect of their sensitive senses, the Canis' resistance to the black tide is frighteningly low. Even in anomalous environments that don't affect other animals, the Canis would probably develop malignant symptoms due to black tide exposure.

C: 嘶——老、老师，人家讲学都是收钱…您、您是要命啊！
E: Ahh... S—Sir... They normally take their students' money for the lectures... N—Not their lives...

C: 还是算了吧，我不需要。
E: It's okay. I don't need any.

C: 今天晚点有上新，走过路过不要错过！哟，是你啊！怎么样，想来点「种子」吗？
E: New stocks going up on shelves tonight, don't let this slip by! Hey, it's you! What do you say, want to grab some "seeds"?

C: 这似乎是个合适的位置，正好用来摆放你从那匹木马手中买来的神秘商品——虽然你还不知道箱子里装着的究竟是什么。要拆开看看吗？
E: This looks like a suitable place to put the mysterious object you bought from the wooden horse... Though you still have no idea what is inside this crate. Do you want to tear it open and see?

C: 以后再说吧。
E: Catch you next time.

C: 你怎么这么话痨。
E: Why do you talk so much?

C: 再就是阅读模式，包含相册与私人文件，可以随时查阅。
E: Don't forget "Reading" mode, which includes access to albums and private files at any time.

C: 看看其他人的留言。
E: Let's see what messages others have left.

C: 如果你下次还要去前线，麻烦帮我给老爸带句话，让他安安心心工作，我会把妈妈照顾好，等他平安归来的。
E: If you go to the front lines next time, please tell my dad to work peacefully and not worry, as I'll take good care of Mom and wait for his safe return.

C: 雅努斯之城不仅是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}曾经垂迹的圣所，三位命运泰坦向世界发出神谕的中心…它还是整个翁法罗斯在地理上的中心。
E: The City of Janus is not only the holy land where {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} once left their mark, it also served as the center where the Fate Titans would declare prophecies to the world... It is the geographical center of all of Amphoreus.

C: 不、我不是这个意思…只是…我是瞒着家里偷偷溜出来的，身上的钱财或许并不足以……
E: No, it's not that... It's just... I snuck out without the knowledge of my family. I fear the money I have on me may not be...

C: 县长？你可真是装糊涂的天才！少说胡话，圣女卫队的锋刃可不和你开玩笑。
E: A magistrate!? You are truly a master of smoke and mirrors! Enough nonsense, the blades of the Holy Maiden's guards will not join you in your jokes.

C: 还请阁下接受我诚挚的歉意。命运三相殿地处神圣，圣女又手无缚鸡之力，我等祭司不得不严防死守。
E: Please accept my sincerest apologies, My Lord. The Temple of the Three Fates is a sacred location, and the Holy Maiden is powerless to protect it. We must keep it under tight guard.

C: 首先面粉要过筛，蜂蜜要选最纯净的。然后嘛，做点心得用心，揉面团的时候要根据不同人的口味来，烤制的火候也是。
E: First, sift the flour well and choose only the purest honey. Then, you need to put your heart into the process of baking. It's crucial to tailor the dough to suit individual tastes and to get the baking just right.

C: 好吧，你突然开始好奇——要是佩佩生活在这个世界，究竟会归在哪位泰坦麾下？
E: Alright then, you suddenly wonder — if Peppy lived in this world, which Titan would he follow?

C: 我的触碰，我的拥抱，并非只有冰冷的剥夺……
E: My touch and embrace can do more than just bring ice-cold loss...

C: 但是万敌却说我并非真正热爱战斗……
E: But Mydei says I don't truly love battle...

C: 没问题，我随时奉陪！
E: Sure. Feel free to find me any time!

C: 你是…啊，我在公民大会上见过你，你和阿格莱雅大人、白厄大人并肩而立，我记得你的名字…叫{NICKNAME}对不对？
E: You're... Wait, I've seen you before! At the citizens' assembly, standing with Lady Aglaea and Lord Phainon. Your name is {NICKNAME}, isn't it?

C: 嘿嘿，我就知道你感兴趣。
E: Ah, I knew you'd be interested.

C: 当然了，会有很多人指责我的。他们希望我只有救人的善心，而放弃发财的野心——这黎明云崖里有太多这样站着说话不腰疼的家伙了。
E: Of course, I get plenty of criticism. People want me to save lives with a pure heart, free of ambition. This place — Dawncloud — is full of self-righteous types who sit comfortably while judging others.

C: 只是，在那座城市里有一件奇怪的事——从邻居到过客，几乎每个人都在为这片土地上自己看不见的部分感到不安。
E: However, there's something strange about this city — everyone, from neighbors to passersby, feels uneasy about the parts of the city they cannot see.

C: 现在请给我签名吧。
E: Please give me the autograph now.

C: 我很怀念桂冠和掌声，圣城也得办奥赫玛运动会才行啊！
E: I miss the laurels and applause very much. The holy city needs its own Okhema Games!

C: 再见。
E: Farewell.

C: 可是漫长的一生，又如何用短短的三言两语诠释呢？那些前人的挣扎、欢乐、悲剧与胜利的记录，总会有一些对后人的启示吧。
E: But how does one define a long life with just a handful of words? The records of struggle, joy, tragedy, and victory of those before would surely hold some revelation for generations to come.

C: 作为四大贵族之首，祖先定下的家训是「成为民众的方向」。可惜，我年轻时不太理解，自视甚高，干下了许多蠢事…不过，如今也已无关紧要。
E: As the first of the four great noble Houses, our family's founding principle is "To become the path for the people." Unfortunately, my younger self, in his arrogance, did not grasp the essence of these words and committed many foolish deeds... But the past is the past.

C: 「虫鸣指引着朝圣之路。」算是相当直白了。
E: "The chirping of insects guides the pilgrim's path." Quite straightforward.

C: 对了，这座古城中有只奇怪的若虫，叫声和其他飞萤们都有所不同…它似乎知道些内幕，贵客可以去找它问问。
E: By the way, there's a strange nymph in this ancient city. Its call is different from the other fyreflies... It seems to know some inside information. You might want to go ask it.

C: 关于预言…
E: About the prophecy...

C: 接下来有什么打算？
E: So what's your plan now?

C: 但我还打算在这里停留一段时间。你看，接待处不能一直乱糟糟没人打理，还有积压的货物也该打个包……
E: But I plan to stay here a while longer. The reception area can't remain in such disarray, and there are also goods that need to be packaged...

C: 还有很多数据来不及保存。年轻人，你若是有空，能帮我一把吗？
E: There's still lots of data I haven't saved. Young one, if you have time, could you help me?

C: 弥斯姐姐的弹奏，总是让我回想起第一次见到刻法勒的那天。如果我能把这份感动的心情写成歌唱出来就好了……
E: Misia's performance always reminds me of the day I first encountered Kephale. If only I could turn this moving emotion into a song...

C: 现在，也只能走一步看一步了。
E: For now, we can only take it one step at a time.

C: 其，其实刚刚出现怪物的时候，我怕得要死。本想跟着人流一起逃跑，但刚跑出去没多远，就看到有一只大地兽为了保护民众受了重伤……
E: A-actually, when the monsters appeared, I was really scared. I originally wanted to flee with the crowd, but I didn't get that far, only to see a dromas suffering major wounds while protecting the people...

C: （{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我见过金发的姐姐，和你在一起。）
E: ({F#Miss}{M#Sir}, I've seen a blonde lady before. She was with you.)

C: （谢谢你，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。）
E: (Thank you, {F#miss}{M#sir}.)

C: 这里也有若虫？
E: There are even nymphs here?

C: 呼…好累好累。但看着沉甸甸的麦子和你——就好开心！
E: Phew... I'm so exhausted! But seeing the heavy ears of wheat and you — that makes me so happy!

C: 摘野果？玩过了迷。
E: Picking wild berries? Already did that, memi.

C: 该去除草了迷。
E: Time for some weeding, memi.

C: 白厄，你来得正好，看到披索了吗？
E: Phainon! Good timing. Have you seen Piso around?

C: 呵呵，你从前就是个心思细密的孩子，总是考虑得很多。
E: Hehe, ever since childhood, you've always had a careful mind — always planning ahead.

C: 咦，没有见过你！
E: Oh? I haven't seen you before.

C: 听说有一句开海辟路的祷言——
E: I heard there's a sea-splitting prayer—

C: 多漂亮的小木屋呀，好想进去看看嘤！
E: What a lovely little cabin. I really want to take a peek inside, eep!

C: 嗯…有位织者模仿妖精的耕种动作。金丝带来消息，它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>紧邻田地的道路一侧</color>，静候收获月的成果呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who imitates how the fairy farms. The golden thread brings tidings: It is hiding at <color=#dbc291ff>a side of a pathway right next to the crop field</color>, patiently waiting for the harvest in the Month of Reaping.

C: 是呀。说不定，小奇美拉的食谱里，也包含人们的烦恼呢。
E: That's true. Maybe little chimeras' diet includes eating humans' troubles.

C: 看上去维吉妮娅依然藏不住秘密，这让你有些担忧。不过，除了你之外，沉溺在幻境中的其他人恐怕不会有疑问吧。
E: It seems Verginia still can't keep a secret, and that worries you a little. But aside from you, the others lost in the illusion likely won't suspect a thing.

C: 凯撒的宏图，太虚妄了……
E: The Imperator's grand plans are too impractical...

C: 唔啊…您怎么上岸来了…要来点秘酿吗？
E: Oh... What brings you to the shore? Do you want some ambrosia?

C: 你怎么也叫「凯妮斯」？
E: Why are you called Caenis too?

C: 「海洋」力量塑造的幻境中，浮现着半神醉梦中的泡影……
E: In the illusion sculpted by the authority of Ocean, a bubble of a drunken demigod emerged...

C: 谁把你灌成这样的？
E: Who made you drink so much?

C: 冬霖爵。
E: Dux Brumalis.

C: 真可怕…
E: So scary...

C: 迷…想我当年在外闯荡的时候，尝过比妖精耳朵还长的面包。一口咬下去，浓浓的谷香就像住进了嘴巴一样，好几天都不会散去迷。
E: Mem... back in my adventuring days, I once tasted a loaf of bread longer than a fairy's ear. The moment I bit into it, the rich scent of grain seemed to take up residence in my mouth and refused to leave for days, mem.

C: 还不够，客人要求「能击碎盔甲」，需要很高韧性，淬火前混一些靛钢进去。
E: It's not enough. The customer wants it to be able to "break armor." It needs to be highly durable. Mix some indigo steel in before quenching it.

C: …说这喂养奇美拉是门学问，然后啊，我就把我前些日子钓的那条胳膊粗的大鱼喂给它，它反而不怎么喜欢。
E: ...Caring for a chimera is a science. Then, I fed it the big fish I caught that was as thick as my arm, but it didn't take much of a liking to it.

C: 元老院？那些家伙压根就没把神谕当回事！
E: The Council of Elders? These people have never taken the prophecy seriously!

C: 你们的心意，猫头鹰老师接收到了。谢谢你们咕……
E: Professor Owl appreciates your sentiment. Thank you all, hoot...

C: 不过……看你的眼神，似乎很好奇的样子。这种眼神可在大人里不多见了。
E: However... the curiosity in your eyes... I don't see that a lot in grown-ups' eyes.

C: 你说的那位大人是谁？
E: Who is the lord you were talking about?

C: 不然你还是和我一起去避难吧？
E: Why don't you take refuge with me?

C: 然而，仅仅是因为它们的外形，并不为人类所普遍认识，它们的生命就不被重视了！
E: However, just because their appearances are not understood by humans, their lives are not valued!

C: 「翁法罗斯的所有故事，通常都可以看作是『掉入洞穴』之中，而那些故事的结尾要么是『逃离洞穴』，或是『死在洞穴』之中……」
E: "All Amphorean stories can typically be seen as 'falling into caves,' ending with either 'escaping from the cave' or 'dying in the cave'..."

C: 不对，你骗虫！这个雕像本来就没有脸喀！
E: No way, you're buggin'! This statue never had a face to begin with, crrk!

C: 你想，一旦心之壁破裂，所有虫的灵魂就会溶解在黄色的液体中，不分彼此…
E: Think about it. Once the walls of the heart crumble, all the nymphs' spirits will be dissolved in the yellow fluid, leaving no separation between anything...

C: 诶，好像也不是不行喀。
E: Hm. It's not like it's that bad, crrk...

C: 只为等候你将我寻得喀。
E: Just waiting for you to find me, crrk.

C: 想喝…
E: I'm thirsty...

C: 这是瑟希斯的符文…谁会投入它的怀抱？
E: This is Cerces' rune... who will fall into its embrace?

C: 天哪——「8」！来财！财从八方来。
E: Oh my gosh— "8"! That's money right there! Money coming from all directions!

C: 一把破椅子折腾这么久，有这个闲功夫，还不如多帮我整理几份资料。
E: All this fuss over an old chair... You could've helped me sort through some files instead of wasting all this time.

C: 咳…诚如你所见，我和克瑞斯都没什么商业头脑——比如餐厅的选址装修、投资的预算和成本、营销和推广的策略啊…还好有阿忒在。
E: *ahem*... As you can see, neither Kyros nor I have much business sense. You know, things like restaurant location and decoration, investment budgeting and costs, marketing and promotion strategies... Thank goodness we have Aitee.

C: 你遇上麻烦了？
E: Got yourself in trouble?

C: 呵呵…我看未必。
E: Heh... I wouldn't be so sure about that.

C: 宁芙，我的宁芙…你与我注定在新世界中长相厮守……
E: Nympha, my beloved Nympha... Our destiny is to be together forever in the new world...

C: 哈哈，我只是开个玩笑。见到你太高兴了嘛。
E: Haha, I was just joking! I'm just happy to see you again.

C: 这就给你写酒馆的推荐信…
E: I'll write you a Tavern recommendation letter right now...

C: 等会，怎么还有圣女的事？
E: Hold up, what's this about a Holy Maiden?

C: 你听听这个…黑土好，充饥快！黄土好，治馋病！
E: How about this... Blacksoil's good, it fills you up quick! Yellowsoil's good, it cures your cravings!

C: 呜嗡——
E: Grumph—

C: ——科可波三世，黑土和黄土你喜欢哪个？
E: Kokopo III, tell us, which do you prefer: blacksoil or yellowsoil?
Grumphhhhh—

C: 也没什么不妥吧？奥赫玛城就是在几百光历年里无数次修缮翻新，才维持至今的。
E: What's wrong with that? Okhema has only survived to this day through countless renovations and repairs over hundreds of Light Calendar years.

C: 呜嗡！（它把它的孩子托付给了我，告诉我它得了失语症，让我负起责任照顾它，我责任重大！）
E: Grumph! (It asked me to take care of its child, saying it had lost its voice and couldn't raise its child anymore. So I took responsibility. Big responsibility!)

C: 呵…真是有劳她费心了呀。
E: Heh... how thoughtful of her.

C: 这枚骨螺来自斯缇科西亚的海床，是我许多年前采撷的，历经风霜仍保持光洁。
E: I collected this shell fossil from the seabed of Styxia many years ago, and it still retains its pristine shine despite weathering through snow and storms.

C: ——这不此世必要的伤痛吗？
E: ...Isn't this the agony this world needs?

C: 粘上什么了？我看看。
E: What is it? Let's see...

C: 明天…要种花…要唱歌……
E: Tomorrow... gotta plant flowers... gotta sing...

C: 嗯？
E: Huh?

C: 嗯…有位织者喜爱温暖。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>那位英雄的余烬旁边</color>，感受火焰的余温呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who delights in warmth. The golden thread brings tidings: They're nestling <color=#dbc291ff>beside that hero's embers</color>, savoring the lingering warmth of the flames.

C: 我曾用金丝为这些织者建造了一座乐园，如今它已变成「记忆」的一部分。希望你能收下。
E: I once built them a paradise with golden threads, and now it has become a part of the Remembrance. I hope you will accept it.

C: 那位英雄用脱落的羽翼铸成了这道封印。若要靠近，得先解决{RUBY_B#「铁墓」}一切的源头{RUBY_E#}才行。
E: That hero forged this seal with their fallen wings. To get close, we must first deal with {RUBY_B#Irontomb}the source of everything{RUBY_E#}.

C: 这是一面古怪的屏幕。上次触碰它时，你不得不与那来古士战至天昏地暗。
E: This is one weird screen. Last time you touched it, you had to fight Lygus until all hell broke loose.

C: 我们差点就回不来了…
E: We almost didn't make it back...

C: 真可惜，这次没法和你们一起登陆……
E: It's a shame I couldn't go with you...

C: 不过，说起我和列车缘分的开始，我很清楚记得，那天正巧是我的生日。当时，我在故乡的野外游荡，打算找个不受光污染干扰的地方观察「天堂之指」的亮度与运动轨迹。
E: But I'm clear about the beginning of my story with the Express. That day just so happened to be my birthday. Back then, I was hiking outdoors and looking for a place without any light pollution to observe the light and orbit of Heaven's Finger.

C: 那你一定要去看一看，书里全是有趣的大冒险！
E: Then you have to read it. It's full of fun adventures!

C: …我没有打算忽略你，谢谢你。但是你做的还不够，要想当上鼹鼠党的二把手，必须先过了我这关。
E: ...I wasn't trying to ignore you, you know. But you haven't done enough. If you want to be number two in The Moles, you have to get past me first.

C: 这样你才算是收集齐了一整本《冒险鼹鼠队》，真不愧是{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，我可没有这样的耐心。
E: Now you have collected the whole book of The Adventurous Moles, great job. You did great, {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, I myself wouldn't have the patience to find all these missing pages.

C: 儿童文学可以从小看到老。
E: Children's literature is suitable for all ages.

C: 对啊！这个理由真不错，我以后也这么说。
E: Yes! That's a good point. I'll tell people that when I grow up.

C: （原来这就是「让群星回到天空」啊。）
E: (So this is what it meant by "let the stars return to the sky.")

C: 师傅说，矿车工是矿山的血液，是咱保证了地髓能够源源不断从矿道深处运输出来。
E: My master said that the mine cart operator is the lifeblood of the mine. The operator ensures the Geomarrow can be continuously transported out of the depths of the mine.

C: 我爹妈都走得早嘛。生活所迫，加上师傅以前是我爹的朋友，我就被那老头子收养咯。
E: Well, I guess, life happens. You see, my parents... they died a long time ago. My master, who was a friend of my father, adopted me.

C: 师傅说，这蓝灯的意思是…什么来着？
E: What did the master say this blue light means again?

C: 好嘞——场地已经整理好了。你要挑战下一题了吗？
E: Great! The venue's all sorted. Are you up for the next challenge?

C: 滴、答，石头老板也没你们说得那么坏嘛。整天打打杀杀的，跟我一起享受生活不好吗？
E: Tick, tock, Boss Stone isn't as nasty as you all say. Instead of fighting tooth and nail all day, how about enjoying life a little with me?

C: 滴、答！快快快！快快快快快！
E: Tick, tock! Quick, quick! Quick quick quick!

C: 我通关「星芒战幕」了。
E: I clocked Stellar Flare.

C: 这是…？
E: What's this...?

C: 呃…这样吗？没事，按她的说法，这是个多人协作游戏。大家一起努力，总归有办法的……
E: Uh... really? That's okay. According to her, it's a multiplayer game. With everyone working together, we'll find a way...

C: 好忙啊…好忙啊…好忙啊……
E: So busy... So busy... So busy...

C: 艾丝妲很生气。
E: Asta's really angry.

C: 黑塔女士也知道了？完了，这下全完了……
E: Herta knows, too? This time it's game over...

C: 虽然你没能给我想要的答案，但你的真诚打动了我！
E: That might not be the answer I wanted to hear, but your sincerity left me touched!

C: 展品的价值是历史赋予的，这些东西本身也承载了一段历史。虽然不够久远，但值得记录。
E: The value of an exhibit is endowed by history, and these things indeed all bear a certain historical weight. They might not be tremendously ancient, but they are worth recording.

C: <size=36>大守护者布洛妮娅驾到——</size>
E: <size=36>Supreme Guardian Bronya has arrived!</size>

C: 我想再重新考虑一下。
E: I would like to reconsider.

C: 一幅摄影作品，记录了磐岩镇搏击俱乐部的内景。
E: A work of photography that captures the interior of Boulder Town's Fight Club.

C: 这种矿物是驱动整个贝洛伯格不断运转的燃料，更是万千劳动者汗水的结晶——其中当然也包括你。
E: This mineral is the source that fuels the entire Belobog's operation, as well as the crystallization of blood, sweat, and tears of thousands of workers — including you.

C: 一尊黄铜制的天球仪，造型典雅。
E: An armillary sphere made with brass. Classy and elegant.

C: 你还记得自己为了靠近这个大铁球费了不少力气，好在那位倒霉蛋总是随身携带着那枚重要的钥匙。
E: You remember using much effort to get close to the giant steel ball. Fortunately, that poor fool always carries the all-important key.

C: 巨大的地髓供暖器，贝洛伯格街头随处可见的加热装置。
E: A huge geomarrow radiator. It is a heating device that can be seen everywhere on the streets of Belobog.

C: 这篇剪报的标题是「大守护者塔提维娜发表重要讲话」。
E: This clipping is titled "Supreme Guardian Tatiana Delivers an Important Speech."

C: 第十八任大守护者可可利亚与天外来客并肩作战，最终以她自己的生命为代价，彻底终结了肆虐近千年的风雪——他们无愧为贝洛伯格的铁壁。
E: The eighteenth Supreme Guardian, Madam Cocolia did battle alongside allies from beyond the sky, and ended up sacrificing herself to eradicate this blizzard that ravaged our planet for nearly a thousand years. They are, undeniably, the iron walls of Belobog.

C: 藿藿——
E: Huohuo...

C: 编的倒是有鼻子有眼。
E: Your story is pretty convincing.

C: 唉，我也有很长的时间没去过狐眠冢了，咱们就在那儿见面吧。
E: Well, it's been a long time since I visited Foxsomn Tomb. Let's meet there.

C: 驭空…你会来吗……
E: Yukong... Will you come...

C: 也许我们应该给你俩留出空间…
E: Perhaps we should give you two some personal space...

C: 我是记者，你要火了。
E: I'm a reporter. You're the next big thing.

C: 如果在游玩途中遇到些肠胃不适、跌打损伤的小问题，也有我这样超专业的医士为您立刻诊治，这样的好事哪里能找到喔！
E: And if you get into medical trouble — gastrointestinal discomfort, sprained ankle, yadi yada — you'll have a professional doctor right by your side! That's a two-in-one deal!

C: 不好意思，打听一下…
E: Excuse me...

C: 我叫霄翰，虽说是金人巷本地人，但也好久没有回来了。离家在外的时候，光是想着这里的味道，乡愁便让我彻夜难眠。
E: My name's Xiaohan. I'm originally from Aurum Alley, but this is my first visit in a long time. When I was away, I'd stay up at night reminiscing about the flavors and aromas of this place.

C: 可惜这家老板非要说我吃白食，不让我探店，活该后悔去吧。
E: The seller at this food stall won't let me do any taste testing because I'm not a "paying customer." Well, if they don't want free publicity, that's their loss.

C: 就是就是。
E: I agree.

C: 哈——？说大声点，我听不太清。
E: Ha...? Speak louder, I can't quite hear you.

C: 谁不知道他们想要利用码头债务，让商会彻底失去信誉嘛。商会雇佣了我，又不是公司雇佣了我，我不可能支持公司的。
E: Everyone knows the IPC wants to use the dock debt to discredit the Merchant Guild. The Merchant Guild are the ones who gave me a job, not the IPC — why would I side with them?

C: 怎么会这样，到底是哪一步出了岔子……
E: How did this happen? How did the plan go awry...?

C: 你当时怎么说的，学狗叫呢？
E: Wasn't there something about barking like a dog?

C: 会长呢，我要见会长！
E: We're going to pay a visit to the president!

C: 你们从历史中学到了不少，学会了嘴硬与诡辩，却对真正的教训视而不见。
E: You have indeed learned — about wordplay and logic traps — while ignoring the true lessons.

C: 所以我提出建议，让金人巷商会与尚滋味联动，只要购买尚滋味的食盒，就可以随机获得白露大人的绘影图形怎么样？
E: To get us started, I've proposed a crossover between the Merchant Guild and Spices Supreme — buy a meal box and get a visiograph of Bailu!

C: 三、二、一…包子！
E: Three, two, one... Mung beaaaan!

C: 要是这外卖生意做起来了，咱这店里还得添些帮厨的人手。
E: If we want to start making takeout, we're gonna need more hands in the kitchen.

C: 驭空目光坚定，此时不与你对话是为了避嫌，聪明的你肯定能够领会。
E: Yukong's gaze remains steadfast. She's not talking with you right now to avoid arousing suspicion, but if you're smart enough, you should pick up on what the situation entails.

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 公司又开始施展钞能力了……
E: Classic IPC...

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 于是我拜托了小少爷，他帮我安排了去往庇尔波因特的实习机会，不久就准备出发了。
E: ...and that's why I secured an internship opportunity at Pier Point with the help of Xiaohan. Once I wrap up here, I'll be on my way.

C: 你察觉到阿丰紧张地避开视线，他的话里好像有什么问题……
E: A-Feng was being shifty and avoidant, there seems to be something off about the way he's speaking...

C: 当然可以，我帮你联系小秘书。
E: Of course. I'll put you in touch with the secretary.

C: 是你让我走的，现在又反悔了？
E: You let me go, and now you're trying to back out of it?

C: 好的，请稍等。
E: Okay, one moment please.

C: 小天老板，你之前可是给我开过病假证明的，可千万不能中途放弃呀！
E: Little Tian, you always gave me a medical certificate before. You can't just turn off the tap now!

C: 您好，我是太卜司的司库青雀，我很抱歉地通知您，由于前些天我感染了「不治之症」，身体状况不佳，需要请一段时间病假进行修养和康复。
E: Hello there, I'm the custodian, Qingque, from the Divination Commission. I sincerely regret to inform you that I am feeling unwell due to contracting an "incurable disease," and must request a period of sick leave in which to rest and recuperate.

C: 我这不是还在等小天老板的病假证明吗？那我现在随便取个名字好了——就叫它「不打牌我就要死了综合症」吧。
E: Aren't I still waiting to get a medical certificate from Little Tian? Let me come up with a random name for my illness — what about "No-Game-No-Life Syndrome"?

C: 公司计划将金人巷改造为物流中转仓，你们的所作所为的本质也是如此。
E: The IPC plans to turn the Alley into a logistics hub. You are practically thinking the same.

C: 你的意思是说现在的金人巷无法超越当时的金人巷？
E: Are you suggesting that the Alley is a shadow of its former self?

C: 你们为什么会认为只有继续做「美食街」才算是金人巷复兴？
E: What makes you so determined to hold onto this idea of a "food street"? Why can't the revival of the Alley take on other forms?

C: 给我的「搭档」，喏，就这只新来的机巧鸟，带它去这附近的餐馆转转。
E: Here's my cycrane and "partner." There you go. Please take it around a few nearby restaurants.

C: （开始想象训练）
E: (Start envisioning your training)

C: 先说报酬再说事。
E: Let's talk about rewards first.

C: 除开一些和践踏者本身有关的样本素材，你还需要去搜集一些<color=#dbc291ff>金属</color>。数量我都整理成备忘录给你啦。
E: In addition to getting some samples on Tramplers, you'll also need to collect some <color=#dbc291ff>Metal</color>. The exact amount has been specified in this memo I wrote for you.

C: 但归根结底，世玲不能满足于眼下的成绩，我需要更多的独创性！为此，我查阅了诸多资料…发现了一个只有在你的协助下，才能完成的实验！
E: But at the end of the day, I can't be satisfied with the current results, I need more innovation! For this reason, I consulted a lot of resources... and found an experiment that can only be completed with your assistance!

C: 诶！诶！你瞧瞧，这不就有「反应」了！赶紧赶紧，你来帮把手，我来记录一下坐标！
E: Oh! Oh! Look, it's responding now! Hurry and give me a hand! I need to note down this coordinate!

C: 拿出魄力就可以解决问题！尤其是这样的售货机，卡住了就可以帮它「踢」出来嘛！
E: Use your charisma to solve the problem! Vending machines like this can be kicked if they're stuck!

C: 诶！你是谁？别在外边偷听！
E: Hey! Who're you? Don't eavesdrop!

C: （给「它」一拳）
E: (Punch "it")

C: 啊，又来了个奇怪的大人。
E: Oh, here's another strange adult.

C: 今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
E: Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!

C: 新鲜的青草、雨后的泥土、秋季的落叶…似乎短短一秒，你就从这颗糖上品味道了某颗植物的一生。
E: Fresh grass, rain-soaked earth, autumn leaves... In a mere second, it's as if you've tasted the entire life of a particular plant through the taste of this candy.

C: 哈努兄弟发出了一声很酷的「哼」，看来他明白该如何表现得像个高手。
E: Hanu lets out a snort in an attempt to sound cool. He seems to know very well how to behave to come across as a big shot.

C: 你，你想要这把秘钥是吧？拿去吧…只要你别伤害我啾。
E: Y—You want this key, right? Take it... as long as you don't hurt me, tweet.
*Hmph*, *hmph*... *Hmph*!

C: 并没有。
E: No.

C: 滴答…我也不知道造我们的人是怎么想的，但按设定来说就是这样的！
E: Tick-tock... I don't know what our creator was thinking either, but that was supposed to be the planned design!

C: 这片空间里的线索大概都收集完了吧？应该没漏什么东西了。
E: I think we've collected all the clues in this area, right? Looks like that's all of them.

C: 来吧，我们把这次获得的线索拼凑一下，看看汉密尔顿又有什么话要说。
E: C'mon, let's gather the clues we obtained this time, and see if Hamilton said anything else.

C: 虽然编导说你身手了得，可能用不着这些旁门左道…但有机会的话还是建议你试试，但说不定还能为你减轻点负担呢。
E: The director thought you might not need the tip since you were so well-trained... but I'd suggest that you give it a try. It can probably make things easier for you.

C: 「什么情况？」你感到疑惑。
E: "What?" You're puzzled.

C: 这究竟是什么？你不理解，也不敢多看。
E: What exactly is that? You have no clue and dare not linger your eyes on it.

C: 哈哈，刚开始是这样。别太往心里去。怪物们受噩梦的侵袭太深，性格已经变得奇怪了。
E: Haha, it's normal to feel that way in the beginning. Please don't take it to heart. They're just too affected by the nightmare that they can be a bit twisted.

C: 以后要打十个耳光！
E: If this happens again, you'll get slapped ten times!

C: 汪！新来的调饮师，别丢下我不管哇……
E: Woof! Drinksmith! Don't just cast me to the side...

C: 别哭了别哭了…
E: There, there...

C: 嘻嘻，像您这样温柔体贴的人，到哪都会受欢迎的。觉得孤独的话，下次我约您出去玩呀。
E: Hee-hee, a gentle person like you will be popular wherever you go. If you ever feel lonely, I'll ask you out next time.

C: （没记错的话，应该只有小星星的问题还没解决了吧？）
E: (If I remember correctly, Starlet is the only one who is still troubled by his problem, right?)

C: 可以，你有什么计划？
E: Sounds great. What's your plan?

C: 这位艾米绮小姐，是梅芙恩家主最宠爱的孩子，如今是梦境里炙手可热的明星，有她作为担保，是不是你们就愿意听听我的话了？
E: This lady, Amiky, is the favorite daughter of Lady Maeven, head of the Iris Family, and she's now a superstar in the Dreamscape. Are you willing to listen to what I have to say for her sake?

C: 怎么、怎么…这张宣传海报上，写的都是怪物们的名字呢？
E: But why... why are all the monster names listed on this promotional poster?

C: 能问问，这有什么好处吗？
E: Can I ask what's in it for me?

C: 我这开拓经历真的有用吗？
E: Will my trailblaze experiences really be useful?

C: 我感觉真的是在玩强手棋…
E: This really feels like playing Cosmodyssey...

C: 这是属于无名客的传承，所以你明白我的请求了吗？
E: This is a legacy that belongs to the Nameless, so you probably know what my request is, right?

C: 呜呜…终于有人和我说话了……
E: *sob*... Someone is finally speaking to me...

C: 传说中，热砂会场的建造者在不为人知的地方藏了宝物，等待着像您这样优秀的选手去发现。
E: Legends speak of how Scorchsand Hall's builders concealed a treasure within its walls, awaiting discovery by an exceptional contestant like yourself.

C: 这…《钟表小子》居然让人感到的不是温馨快乐，而是惊险与刺激，这不是什么好事。
E: Well... Can't believe Clockie is now being associated with excitement and thrills instead of warmth and joy... This doesn't bode well.

C: 谢谢您的祝福，宾客，我们一定会尽力拯救钟表小子的！
E: Thanks for your wish! We'll give it our all to rescue Clockie!

C: 《美梦往事》讲的是什么？
E: What is Dreamjoy Memoir about?

C: 你们修不好胶卷了？
E: The film reel hasn't been fixed yet?

C: 审核批注：危言耸听，有损家族的对外形象，建议禁止公映。
E: Review: An attempt at scaremongering that can damage the image of The Family. The movie should be banned.

C: 说实话，他还真是了不起——哪怕是这么糟糕的题材，看上去还是那么有趣。
E: Honestly speaking, he's truly amazing. Despite the terrible subject matter, the story still looks pretty interesting.

C: 真的吗？你们的最后一部作品做完了吗？
E: Are you sure? Have you completed the final work?

C: 哎呀，太久没在影城里看动画了，真是令人怀念……
E: Oh, it has been such a long time since I watched animations in the theme park. How nostalgic...

C: 这个嘛…我的审美要求可是很高的哦，这场梦境中昼夜不停地上演着无聊的悲剧，喜剧，肥皂剧——还有一堆让人昏昏欲睡的电影。
E: Well... I've got high aesthetic standards. This Dreamscape is always showing boring tragedies, typical comedies, mundane soap operas... and a bunch of sleep-inducing films.

C: 导演，和您一起工作的时候，我就像回到了克劳克影业的黄金时代——我与「钟表匠」一起共事，跟着他一起延续钟表小子的冒险。
E: Director, working with you is like returning to the golden age of Clock Studios, when I was still working with the Watchmaker and continuing the adventures of Clockie alongside him.

C: 这还没完，之后隐夜鸫家系的人跑过来，说这里受到的破坏并非寻常，是什么…「虚无」的力量？反正拽了一堆名词，开了一个我们无法接受的修理费。
E: That's not all. Later, a bunch of Nightingale Family members showed up, asserting that the destruction was unusual and exhibited signs of some... power of Nihility? Anyway, they inundated us with a barrage of technical terms and demanded an exorbitant repair fee that we simply couldn't accept.

C: 「那么——出击！劫掠黑心工厂，救出所有员工吧！」
E: "Then — attack! Raid the ruthless factory and save all the workers!"

C: 钟表小子！该撤退了！
E: Clockie! It's time to retreat!

C: 导演，汽水先生的外传已经制作完成了？听说外传十分精彩，那位动画师对你的水平赞不绝口！
E: Director, have you already finished making Mr. Soda's extra story? I heard that the Extra you shot was all kinds of thrilling. The animator can't stop praising your skill!

C: 您回来了，拍广告的感觉怎么样？
E: You're back. How did it feel shooting the ad?

C: 咕噜噜，也许是。一个满嘴同谐的圣人太无聊了，愚蠢又可爱的汽水先生肯定更讨人喜欢。
E: *gurgle* Maybe. A self-righteous saint harping on about Harmony is boring, so a loveable buffoon like Mr. Soda is going to appeal more widely.

C: 啊？不能吧，我听说星穹列车上的无名客都是乐善好义的好人，怎么会是无恶不作的石头老板呢？
E: Ah? No way, I heard those Nameless aboard the Astral Express are all good folks with hearts of gold. No way they could be someone as unfathomably evil as Boss Stone?

C: 或许他根本不存在。
E: Maybe he never existed.

C: 即使他真的存在，也已经是上千年前的历史人物了——「钟表匠」先生真的会认识他吗？
E: Even if he really does exist, he's a historical figure that must've been thousands of years old — would Mr. Watchmaker really know him?

C: 这只「小鸟」好像正在偷懒，去找找让他认真起来的消息吧。
E: This "birdie" seems to be slacking off. Go look for information that could perk it up.

C: 啊哈，这个合理！那家伙收集了一大堆金灿灿的坚果，肯定是个贪心的仓鼠！
E: Aha, now that adds up! That guy had a huge collection of hard, shiny nuts. He must be a greedy stockpiling hamster!

C: 被神秘力量劈开的…
E: Split in two by a mysterious force...

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 擅自翻阅他人物品的惩罚？
E: Serves you right. You lot didn't ask my consent first for all this.

C: 使用「钟表把戏」。
E: Use Clockwork.

C: 记住，是我送了你们最后一程！
E: Remember, I am the one who will send you on your final journey!

C: 别傻了，朋友。失败不是一种病，而是一种罪过，罪过是治不好的。
E: Don't be naive, buddy. Failure isn't a sickness — it's a sin, and sins can't be cured.

C: 终点就要到了，答案应该就在前面——
E: You are about to reach the end. The answers are just ahead of you.

C: 流萤
E: Firefly

C: 那一天{RUBY_B#早已}必将{RUBY_E#}到来。
E: That day {RUBY_B#has already}will definitely{RUBY_E#} come.

C: 你还搜集了哪些末日的忆泡？
E: What other Memory Bubbles of the apocalypse are in your collection?

C: 悼亡诗沉默不语，身形几乎融入蜿蜒的影子中。
E: Elegy falls silent, their figure almost merging into the winding shadows.

C: 天呐，那你能给我表演一下吗？
E: Oh! How marvelous! How about you show me, then?

C: 勤练剑术，比什么都强。
E: Mastery of the sword trumps all.

C: 云璃说的没错。
E: Yunli's right.

C: 那你刚才是不是随便说的胜算。
E: So, did you just randomly throw out a number for your odds?

C: 过了不久，罗浮之上某个阴暗的角落里……
E: Moments later, in a dark corner on the Luofu...

C: 不过按照规矩，收到战帖的人仍然可以拒不接受挑战。
E: However, according to the rules, the person receiving the challenge letter has the right to decline the challenge.

C: 那不就是承认自己会输嘛，我肯定接受啊！
E: Declining would be like admitting defeat! Of course I'll accept it!

C: …好像确实是这样。
E: ...That actually makes sense.

C: 尾巴大爷，你…你对斯科特做了什么？
E: Mr. Tail, what... what did you do to Skott?

C: 能让这种家伙洗心革面，尾巴大爷，你可真不简单啊。
E: You've managed to make a guy like him turn over a new leaf. You're amazing, Mr. Tail!

C: 好啦，被你发现了。说真的，我精通天下各门各派的武艺，让我摸摸你的脑袋，一眨眼就可以全数传授给你喔。
E: Fine, you got me. Honestly though, I'm a master of all the martial arts across all schools. Just let me touch your head, and I'll be able to impart all my skills to you in the blink of an eye.

C: 怎么可能会有那种丹药啦！
E: Come on, do you really think there's a magical pill like that?

C: 不行了，我感觉自己昨天的晚餐要离我而去！
E: Not good. I think last night's dinner is about to make a grand exit!

C: 稍等，走之前再奉劝你一件事。
E: Hold on a sec. Before you leave, let me give you a piece of advice.

C: 三月小姐，你写什么呢？
E: What are you writing, Miss March?

C: 都怪你满嘴跑火车，灵砂大人肯定已经狠狠地批评过你了吧！
E: It's your fault for spewing all that nonsense. I bet Master Lingsha reprimanded you harshly!

C: …可以说是成功了吧？
E: ...I reckon it's a success.
But...

C: 作者可管不了读者的「阅读顺序」——三月小姐，我知道书的另一半在哪里了，你从后向前读便是故事的下半！
E: Actually, the author has no power over "the order in which the reader reads their book"! Miss March, I know where the second half of this book is, try reading the second half of the book from the ending to the beginning instead!

C: …{F#亲姐弟}{M#亲兄弟}，是吧？
E: ...{F#Siblings}{M#Brothers}, right?

C: 呼…呼…呼……苦练了这么久的出场动作，总算派上用场了。你看，就这一下，嘿，腾空转体七百二十度，需要多么强健的核心力量。你看我这腹肌，多么线条分明！
E: Phew... Hoo... Phew... I spent so long practicing that debut pose and I finally got to use it! Look, a <unbreak>720</unbreak>-degree spin jump! Do you know how much core strength that takes? Look how ripped my abs are!

C: 布洛妮娅笑了笑，讲起了希儿孜孜不倦教导她「粗鄙之语」的经历……
E: Bronya laughs softly and begins to talk about Seele's tireless efforts to teach her "foul language"...

C: 我听说…只是听说，在物质世界中存在一个所谓的「垃圾桶仙子」，凭借它的力量，可以把我们从幻想生物变成真实的生命。
E: I hear... It is no more than a rumor, but... It is said that in the physical world, there exists a Trashcan Fairy. With their power, it could be possible for entities like us to be transformed from fantasy creatures into material beings.

C: 如果你们找上希儿，她的抽象画会是怎样的？不行，越说越想看了，如果不麻烦的话，一会儿请带上我。
E: If you bring Seele along, I'm curious about how her abstract portrait would look like... Actually, the more I talk about it, the more I want to see it. If it's not too much trouble, would you take me with you to see her?

C: 难不成，卢卡选手就是你训练的战士？
E: Could Luka be the fighter that you've been training?

C: 再稍等一下。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 你见过托帕？
E: You know Topaz?

C: 无意冒犯，卡美丽小姐，我不喜欢公司。他们差一点就把我的故乡变成了可以打包贩卖的资产。
E: No offense, Miss Carmella, but I'm not keen on the IPC. They nearly turned my home into an asset that could be bundled and sold.

C: …贝洛伯格的人，从来不是奴隶！
E: ...The people of Belobog have never been servants!

C: 啊…那片阴影长得好像我的手啊。
E: Ah... That shadow looks a lot like my hand.

C: 你先回去吧，我想一个人再上街逛逛。
E: You go back first. I'm going to take a stroll along the streets.

C: 你小子，不要随便承诺小孩子啊…没事，输了就让他去当铺把铁臂当掉，自掏腰包带你去。
E: Kid, you've really gotta stop making promises to children... Never mind. He'll just pawn his iron arm if he loses, and take you up there out of his own pocket.

C: 前不久，贝洛伯格的星际通讯基站恢复了运作。在一个月前，我们收到了一封讯号失真有些严重的「邀请函」——
E: Not long ago, Belobog's interstellar comms base resumed operations. A month ago, we received an invitation with a highly distorted signal...

C: 布洛妮娅大人，我没怎么上过学，不太懂这些伟大的事情……
E: Lady Bronya, I'm not well-educated, so I don't really know such matters of grandiosity...

C: 总之你要当心，卢卡选手。公司的通缉要犯，可真不是闹着玩的。
E: You just have to be cautious, Luka. A wanted criminal on the IPC's list is really no joke.

C: （毕竟仙舟联盟也没通缉他，还允许他参加演武仪典呢。）
E: (After all, the Xianzhou Alliance didn't arrest him, and they even allowed him to participate in the Wardance.)

C: 万众瞩目的卢卡选手，又要面临一场恶战了！
E: All eyes are on Luka as he prepares for yet another fierce battle!

C: （卢卡的状况真令人担心…还是快点回休息室看看他吧。）
E: (Luka's condition is worrying... Let's go see him at the lounge.)

C: {NICKNAME}，你训练的那个小子…呃叫卢卡的，这不正好败退了嘛，无缝衔接上咱们藿藿，还有比这更好的时机吗?
E: {NICKNAME}, that kid you're training... Luka or whatever his name is. He got beat anyway. Isn't this the perfect opportunity to throw Huohuo into the mix?

C: 他让人打傻了吧？
E: He got beat senseless?

C: 全都吃了？
E: You ate it all?

C: 伊戈尔•哈夫特是雅利洛-Ⅵ的英雄，但我们都对他的生平经历知之甚少。找到这些资料，也算是进一步认识他了……
E: Igor Haft is a hero of Jarilo-VI, yet we know so little about his life. This information we've discovered can help us know him better...

C: 青雀小姐，你还好吗？
E: Miss Qingque, are you alright?

C: 我哪有！
E: That's not true!

C: 好神秘啊。不过没关系，反正现在我要登上擂台亲眼确认一下这位「铁臂」的实力了！
E: So mysterious! But it doesn't matter, because now I'm going to step into the ring and see just how strong this "iron arm" is for myself!

C: 这与「相信」与否无关，卢卡。这是理性的计算——从数学概率上看，你很难获得胜利，但贝洛伯格需要这次胜利。
E: This isn't about what I "believe," Luka. This is a matter of calculation. Mathematically speaking, your chance of winning is low, but Belobog really needs this win.

C: 不行，你可是公司的通缉犯！我怎么放心让你带他去喝什么茶！

E: Ah, forget it! That's our first draft for now! As for the exact details, I'll leave that up to Future Mr. Xiyan to worry about!

C: 其一，是建木制成的柄材。其二，则是以帝弓光矢的余烬「天火熔金」打造的剑身。
E: One is a hilt forged from the wood of the Ambrosial Arbor. The other is a blade forged from the embers of Reignbow's Lux Arrow, known as the Ignis Aureliae.

C: 很好！只有建木制成的柄材，才能承受住「天火熔金」中所存的帝弓神力，使得它不至于反噬持有者。
E: Wonderful! Only a hilt made from the Ambrosial Arbor can hope to withstand the Reignbow's residual power in the Ignis Aureliae, so it would not harm its wielder.

C: 「此时此刻，幻胧自建木中汲取丰饶神力已到了紧要关头，这位绝灭大君轻蔑一哂：不知死活的蝼蚁们，纳命来！」
E: "Right here, right now, was the critical moment for Phantylia to absorb Abundance's powers from the Ambrosial Arbor. The Lord Ravager sneered: Reckless ants, accept your fate!"

C: 维持原名吧！
E: Keep the old name!

C: 要不你俩去现场表演表演？
E: Why don't you guys do live performances instead?

C: 这家口碑一般……
E: This store doesn't have fantastic ratings...

C: 你这人怎么说话的，面相又不能反应一个人的学问。
E: Hey! It's unfair to judge someone solely based on their appearance.

C: 不过，由于星核阻塞星际通路的缘故，本次庆典临时改为了线上观赛模式——
E: However, due to Stellarons blocking interstellar routes, the festival was changed to online attendance at the last minute...

C: <size=36>我终于有成功把这游戏推销出去的一天了！</size>
E: <size=36>I finally managed to successfully promote the game!</size>

C: 竟然还带来了{M#一位英俊的先生和这位美丽的小姐}{F#两位美丽的小姐}！欢迎光临我的竞技场！
E: ...and you brought along {M#a handsome gentleman and a beautiful young lady}{F#two beautiful young ladies}! Welcome to my arena!

C: 你这工程合规吗？
E: Is this project compliant with regulations?

E: We sure showed those troublemakers who's boss! Are you okay, Eric?

E: Nah, sounds fine to me!

C: 大家看起来都干劲十足啊…{NICKNAME}，我们要不也说点什么？
E: Yikes, everyone's so fired up... {NICKNAME}, quick, let's say something...

C: 没想到连公输师傅也…
E: I didn't expect Master Gongshu...

C: 他在催促我们加快进度。
E: He's just urging us to pick up the pace.

E: Mr. Giovanni, have you been deliberately guiding us towards a certain goal?

E: We'll be right there—

C: 明白了——！
E: Got it!

C: 哼哼！哼！哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink! Oink!

C: …可恶！既然你诚心诚意地发问了……
E: Well, since you asked so nicely...

C: 那我就大发慈悲地……
E: ...But don't think we'll be taking it easy on you!

C: 然后是{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}和三月七小姐…你们和那只以太灵的事情，我也听维尔德说过了。
E: As for {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} and Miss March, Wilder has informed me of your situation with the Aether Spirit.

C: 哈哈哈，我理解你为何能够走到这里了…不愧是你！
E: Ha, now I see why you've made it so far. Truly impressive!

C: 那么，加油——目标是成为冠军首席！
E: Then what are we waiting for? Let's go grab ourselves the title!

C: 既然是荣誉队员赢了，那应该也算鼹鼠党的胜利...对吧？
E: Well, as an honorary member won, that counts as a Moles victory too... right?

C: 呜汪汪汪汪！汪汪！
E: Rrr—ruff ruff woof! Woof woof!

C: 玩家福利？
E: Player benefits?

C: 行，反正这工作也怪无聊的，聊呗。
E: Alright, this job is pretty dull, let's chat.

C: 可别以为我会手下留情！我引以为豪的以太灵，一定会将你们全部击溃！
E: But don't expect me to go easy! My prized Aether Spirit is gonna crush you!

C: 哈哈哈，若非是命运指引我们汇聚于此，那答案便只有一个了。
E: Hahaha, if it isn't fate's doing, then there's only one other answer.

C: 正是！你还是一如既往地敏锐。
E: Correct! I see you're just as keen as ever.

C: 那么，这边请——登上台阶，向那位神秘的女士讨要你们希冀的「答案」吧！
E: Well then, this way please — ascend these steps and seek the answers you desire!

C: 过奖，过奖。
E: You flatter me!

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 走，我们去找下一个谜题吧～
E: Let's go find the next one~

C: 大、大人？你还是叫我藿藿吧。
E: C—Captain? You can just call me Huohuo.

C: 比如什么《阿芬探灵：云骑美少女夜路遇鬼，只用三秒钟她让妖魔后悔》。
E: Like: "Little Gui Investigates: Ghost Tries to Scare Young Cloud Knight Girl on Creepy Road — Gets Owned..." Y'know?

C: 我打算再和她们聊聊。
E: I wanna chat for a bit first.

C: 嗯，有了这条线索，事情办起来想必也能顺利多了。
E: Mm... This intel should be a big help.

C: 嗯嗯，判官大人你可放心，如何同群众有效交流可是云骑的必修课～
E: Don't worry Judge Huohuo. Effective communication with the public is one of the basic skills of a Cloud Knight~

C: 总之，我们听说了龙女消失的事情，就赶来看看能不能帮上些忙。
E: Anyway, we heard about the Dragon Lady's disappearance, so we hurried over to see if we could help.

E: After the ghost-hunting squad disbanded, the chat starts to flash with activity...

C: 于是事情就成了无聊的耐力比拼。嘻嘻，不知道是仙舟人的寿命更长，还是岁阳的耐心更顽固……
E: So now I'm stuck here, condemned to eternal boredom. Hehe, I wonder which will last longer — the lifespan of my jailors, or the patience of a heliobus...

C: 上一回被那坏东西操纵，是因为…呃是因为措手不及啊，没来得及提气防御！不许再说上一回啦，还不兴人家将功补过嘛。
E: Uhh, I was possessed, okay? That thing snuck up on me — I couldn't even react! I'll make up for it this time.

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得这样搜索岁阳可行吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you think we can really catch heliobi this way?

C: 暂时没有。
E: Not quite.

C: 喂，那边那个岁阳，快把白露大人放了！
E: Hey, you over there! Release Lady Bailu!

E: Umm, c—can we not linger around here too long? This place is really spooky... Maybe we can chat somewhere else?

C: …我工作还是很认真的好吧！至少不会理直气壮写什么「照例迟到」。
E: ...I take my job seriously! I'd never post something like "late as usual" on a public forum.

C: 当然了。
E: Of course.

C: 要是你还有几分胜算，早就不顾一切地对我们几个露出獠牙了。我说的没错吧，浮烟？
E: If you were, you'd have devoured us without hesitation. Am I right, Cirrus?

C: 可是知道了这个事实又能怎么样呢？它和你有什么关系？
E: But does the knowledge of this fact change anything? What does it have to do with you?

C: 发泄愤怒毫无意义。
E: Venting your anger is meaningless.

C: 这只是个游戏。
E: It's just a game.

C: 当大哥大姐的，还得多多包容，耐心等待呀。
E: You'll just have to be a little patient.

C: 他一定是遇到了什么凶险，这剑才会跑出来寻人报信的吧？
E: He must have encountered some kind of danger... and his sword flew away to find someone to help, right?

C: 你的剑法，我已悉数牢记。
E: Your swordplay, every stroke and sway — I've committed it all to memory.

C: 试试使用「同心火铃」吧？
E: Should we try using the Harmonic Chime?

C: 让本大爷亲自来降妖捉鬼。

C: 你在说什么？

C: 对了对了，帮我参谋一下这次该在「罗浮杂俎」上发什么吧！这可是大新闻，全靠这期内容涨粉了。

C: 我和小桂子去查另外一条线索了，等你的好消息！
E: Little Gui and I will go and check out another lead, we'll wait for your good news!

E: You shall pay the price just as these three that humiliated me before you did!

C: 哎…刚才的冒犯，就当做没发生吧。我们现在就离开这里，好吧？

C: （文远已经彻底被岁阳「若昔」迷惑了，用「同心火铃」试试看吧。）
E: (Wenyuan is already completely enraptured by the heliobus — Ruoxi. Try using the Harmonic Chime.)

C: 如果没有其他事的话，你走吧。
E: If there's nothing else, please go.

C: 但你现在…回来了，重新回到了我的身边。哪怕你并不是真正的她…哪怕你只是命运的一个玩笑，我也很满足了。
E: But now... you're back, back at my side. Even if you're not really you... even if you're just a joke of fate, I am still happy.

C: 看上去有些突兀的广告板，没人会在家里放着这玩意儿。
E: An advertisement board that looks a little out of place. No one would have something like this in their house.

C: 便条上写着「保险箱密码是T」，显然密码盘上没有「T」。所以「T」代表着一串数字吗？你需要线索来佐证。
E: The note says "the safe's password is 'T.'" There is no "T" on the lock, So, "T" must represent a series of digits? You will need to find clues to prove this.

C: 走吧，我们回绥园，先把这个倒霉岁阳给放进镇妖塔里吧。

C: 你们这个…异形文字有什么意义，我完全不懂。不过你看图形，「M」一笔画的话是<unbreak>71839</unbreak>，「N」一笔画的话是<unbreak>7193</unbreak>，「V」是<unbreak>183</unbreak>……
E: These... Strange characters, I have no idea what they mean. However, looking at their shapes, "M" is <unbreak>71839</unbreak> if we're going by single strokes, "N" is <unbreak>7193</unbreak>, and "V" is <unbreak>183</unbreak>...

C: 之后再打过来，声音就变得很诡异，似人非人，有时是问我怎么不来，有时又突然凄厉地嚎起来，差点没把我人给带走。
E: When they call back later, the voice grows really weird as though it weren't human, asking me why I haven't yet come or suddenly bawling out in misery to the point that I'm almost carried off.

C: 至于什么「深夜扰民」，那是我只能在那个时候抢到身体的控制权啊。
E: As for that "midnight ruckus," that was when I'd finally managed to wrest back control.

C: 别急，待我先照着她的形象变个模样！
E: Don't worry. I'll just change into her appearance first!

C: 拜托你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: I'll leave it to you then, {NICKNAME}.

E: What an conceited heliobus.

E: Oh, I remember. We ate those spicy buffalo wings, and I nearly cried.

E: Are you transforming!?

E: She and I have very similar traits, which were caused by genetic mutations. But I have no idea as to why I might look like some of these other people you know.

E: Lemme try.

E: I'd like you to take some group photos of everyone.

C: 这是一个颇为激烈的故事……
E: This is rather intense...

C: 你先去忙吧，我再和它僵持一会儿！就不信这鸟不肯开口！

E: Chat with me, too!

C: 嘿嘿，是我吗？
E: Hee-hee, are you choosing me?

C: 怎么搞的，没吃饱饭吗？连个骰子都转不好，养你们还有什么用？

E: (From what I've just heard, Siobhan is planning to explore deeper into the hotel in the Dreamscape to search for the rest of the Sweet Dreams Troupe. Let's follow her.)

E: (Found another jigsaw piece... Let's keep it first. It's about time Siobhan brings Melancholy back to the lounge.)

C: …说是正式营业，可这地方哪有客人呀。除了你们几个，不会再有宾客光顾了。
E: ...Yeah, it's the grand opening, but I don't think there'll be any other customers coming here, except for you guys.

C: 要开咯。买大买小？买大买小？庄家做主，全部投注，输了要补，赢了不付！
E: Let's get started. Are you going big or small? Big or small? The dealer calls the shots, and all bets are in. Lose, and you've got to pay. Win, and you don't!

C: （掏出舒翁给你的杯垫。）
E: (Take out the coaster that Siobhan gave you.)

C: 唉，就连饮料都喝不到想要的。我还真是生不逢时啊。
E: *sigh* I can't even get the drinks I want. I was born into an era of misfortune.

C: 呐呐。您才刚来这不久，不知道有没有注意到…这家酒吧外面，不是很太平？
E: By the way, you've only been here for a short while. I wonder if you've noticed that... things aren't very peaceful outside the lounge?

C: 就喜欢您这样的气势！人家也要朝这个方向继续努力！
E: That's what I like about you! I should have the same attitude!

C: 该乘胜追击！
E: Seize the chance while you have it!

C: 再给我杯饮料。<color=#dbc291ff>要超大杯，梦幻风格的，口感浓厚</color>的那种。这个要求觉得困难么？
E: Make me another drink. <color=#dbc291ff>In an extra large glass, dreamy, with a thick texture</color>. Is this request too difficult for you?

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: …分层？
E: ...Layering?

C: 好像没什么特别的。
E: There's nothing special about it.

C: 但在某个时候，我突然悟了哇！狗狗的命也是命，与其消耗自己，不如消耗对方！
E: But one day, I had this epiphany! A dog's life is also a life. Rather than let people shave off time from my life, I'll shave it off of theirs.

C: 你怎么到匹诺康尼去了？
E: What brought you to Penacony?

C: 全是<rhythm>科员<rhythm>在<rhythm>捣乱
E: It's <rhythm>all <rhythm>researchers' <rhythm>fault

C: 汪汪汪  汪
E: WoofWoofWoof  Woof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 现在，准备开始正式的合奏吧！
E: Now, prepare to begin the ensemble proper!

C: 算了，事情都办到这儿了，咱也不好拿着半截文件回去交差。最后回去一次，我保证。
E: Well, forget it. We can't just go back with half of the document. We'll go back one last time, I promise.

C: 你爱…不是不是，不是这个！
E: So, your favorite tea... No, no. That's not the password!

C: 我听到了。
E: I heard that.

C: 很好，您已经基本掌握玩法了。那么接下来请根据初号机的内置地图，出发寻找更多的街机，并解锁更多的玩法与功能吧！
E: Great! You've mastered the basics. You can now use Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>'s built-in map to find more arcade machines and unlock more gameplay and features!

C: 你猜？猜对了就告诉你。
E: Take a guess? I'll tell you if you get it right.

C: 嗯？这俩人不是说相声…等等，你骂谁呢！你才……
E: Ah? Aren't those two the crosstalk comedy duo? ...Wait a sec, that's a backhanded comment! You...

C: 怎么搞得像我欺负鸟似的…算了，要不我们边回船上边说？
E: Oh, now I sound like I'm bullying a bird... Forget it. Why don't we talk on the way back to the ship?

C: 我只是想到处逛逛，毕竟之前一直没什么时间……
E: I'm just looking around since I didn't have the time to do that before...

C: 那…你们继续去玩吧，我大概还需要一点时间来熟悉这款游戏。
E: Um, you can go ahead and play without me. I probably need a bit more time to get the knack of the game.

C: 这就是你的专属小鸟，根据你的形象生成的那种。你看，那边还有一只我的呢。
E: Mm-hmm, this is your exclusive little bird. It was made in your likeness. Look, mine's over there.

C: 我不会退赛，人们也不会一直被你愚弄。我会在赛场上证明自己，他们有自己的判断力。
E: I won't drop out, and people won't keep being fooled by you. I'll prove myself on the field, and they can judge for themselves.

C: 不，绝大多数人只会误把别人的观点当做自己的观点——只要大家都说你是可恶的，那么他们就会「认为」你是可恶的。
E: No, most people simply adopt others' perspectives as their own. If everyone says you're vile, then they'll believe you're vile.

C: {NICKNAME}和卢卡，你们又来了呀～卢卡，妾身的梦貘对你有帮助吗？
E: {NICKNAME} and Luka, here you are! Luka, has the tuskpir been helpful to you?

C: 是啊！一般人遇到这种事，哪有机会动用战略投资部的资源来替自己解决麻烦啊？
E: Indeed! How often does one get the opportunity to use resources from the Strategic Investment Department to solve personal problems?

C: 卢卡出现在活动现场，但代言人却不是他，人们对他的无端猜想就会不攻自破，要不了多久流言也会烟消云散的，对吧？
E: Luka showing up at the event, but not as the ambassador, would dispel baseless speculations, and soon the rumors will dissipate.

C: 随着一阵强而有力的音乐响起，主持人摇摆身子登上了擂台。
E: As powerful music plays, the host sways onto the stage.

C: 我要是接下了铄金的挑战却被打败了，他就找回了演武擂台上落败的面子……
E: If I accept his challenge and lose, he'll regain his honor from his previous defeat in the ring...

C: 哦对了…你一直标榜自己使用的是仙舟传统武术，这会不会和公司的机甲产品有些概念冲突？
E: Oh... Considering you've always emphasized your use of traditional Xianzhou martial arts, wouldn't that conflict conceptually with the IPC's mech products?

C: 包赢的。
E: Bet.

C: 你讨厌巧合吗？
E: Do you hate coincidences?

C: 模拟宇宙的损坏…
E: The damage on the Simulated Universe...

C: 这应该问你自己……
E: Shouldn't you be asking yourself that...?

C: 这…哪里羞耻了！仪式是很重要的帕！
E: H—How is it cringey!? This is an especially meaningful part of the initiation!

C: 唔…不然先将就一下，明天再采购？
E: Hm... Let's just leave it for now, and get one tomorrow?

C: {NICKNAME}，晚安好梦哦～
E: Sweet dreams, {NICKNAME}!

C: 陌生的天花板。
E: A strange ceiling.

C: 唔…真拿你没办法！休息好了就快来哦，不许拖延和偷懒！帕姆会监督你的帕！
E: Alright, fine! Rest up and come quickly... No delaying or slacking off! Pom-Pom will be keeping an eye on you!

C: 哦？亲爱的无名客，我早知道您也是一位幽默大师！我会将您的幽默牢牢存入语料库，传递给一代又一代无名客。
E: Oh? Dear Nameless, I always knew you were a master of humor! I'll make sure to save your jokes in the database and pass them on to future generations of the Nameless.

C: 唉，七三开就七三开吧…分赃的话题到此为止！
E: Bah, I'll just live with a 7-3 split... This is final! No more negotiation on how we're splitting the loot!

C: ——单看容积，这孩子将来也许真能成长为一头参天巨兽——就像那刻夏故事里讲的那样。
E: Seeing how much it eats, this little one might really become a giant beast someday, just like in Anaxa's stories.

C: 再仔细看看它。
E: Take another good look at it.

C: 呜呜…（咦，眼睛…睁不开了…）
E: Grumph... (Can't... stay awake...)

C: 别紧张，如果遇到什么困难的话，就让灰宝帮你好了。
E: No need to stress. If you run into any trouble, just let Grayie handle it.

C: 加油，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大！
E: Keep going, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas!

C: 呜，呜嗡……（呜，我的欧洛尼斯之力…在奔涌……）
E: Grumph, grumph... (Ugh, my Oronyx power... is surging...)

C: 当然，不然我如何与旅团的那么多只大地兽相处？看来，这只幼兽是我兽友生涯的一大挑战……
E: Of course, how else could I get along with so many dromases in the troupe? Though... this little one might just be a tough challenge in my beast-friend career.

C: 呜嗡？（啊？）
E: Grumph? (Huh?)

C: 呜嗡！（规则，就是用来打破的！）
E: Grumph! (Rules are made to be broken!)

C: 你是老大？
E: You're the boss?

C: 好吧好吧，下次再一起泡澡哦？驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大。
E: Alright, alright, let's take a bath together next time, okay, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas?

C: 很好，刚才发生了什么来着？
E: Alright, what just happened?

C: 哦，原来是感动的——不提这个了，请{NICKNAME}来为这场仪式开个头吧！
E: Oh, turns out you were just moved to tears. Let's not dwell on that. {NICKNAME}, would you kick off this ceremony?

C: 其实，这个世界已经毁灭过一次了。是我家孩子挺身而出，击退了万恶的黑潮，然后用祷言回溯了整个世界！很可惜，这事大家都不记得了。
E: Matter of fact, this world has already been destroyed once. It was my child who stepped up, fought back against the evil black tide, and then rewound the entire world with a prayer! Unfortunately, no one remembers any of this anymore.

C: 可人类是吃不了土的。
E: But humans can't eat dirt.

C: 哼，把我的鉴定费还我，不然我上圣城卫士那儿告你去！
E: Refund my appraisal fee, or I'll report you to the Holy City Guard!

C: 高度融入生活中的器物，其源头往往被岁月掩埋。
E: Artifacts deeply integrated into daily life often have origins obscured by the passage of time.

C: 嗐，对于这枚孱弱的梦泡来说，遇上了无敌的您，那是它的危险呢……
E: Ah well, for such a fragile dream bubble, running into someone as invincible as you... it's the one in danger...

C: 我就不卖关子了，事情是这样的。阮•梅女士为小家伙们设计了一组新的训练项目，但她最近抽不开身，所以就把主导工作交给了我们。
E: Let me cut to the chase. Here's the deal. Miss Ruan Mei designed a new set of training programs for the little ones, but she's been too busy lately, so she handed over the lead role to us.

C: 数据都已经装载到终端里了，要试试看吗?
E: The data's all loaded into the terminal. Wanna give it a try?

C: 对了，您觉得难度如何，是否有需要调整的地方？
E: By the way, how do you find the difficulty? Anything that needs adjusting?

C: 「均衡」的仲裁官，仲裁官中的「结绳人」。
E: The Arbitrator of Equilibrium, and the "Knot-Tier" among Arbitrators.

C: 我有奖励吗？
E: Do I get a reward?

C: 为什么我要接受审判？
E: Why should I be put on trial?

C: 仲裁官会搭建一座桥梁，令你们在虚拟的搏斗中交换{RUBY_B#虚数能}能量{RUBY_E#}，就像沙漏的两端，最终达成和谐一统。
E: The Arbitrator will build a bridge, allowing you to exchange {RUBY_B#Imaginary Energy}energy{RUBY_E#} in virtual combat, and like the two ends of an hourglass, ultimately achieving harmonious unity.

C: 不管看多少次，都觉得好漂亮呢……
E: No matter how many times I look, it's still so beautiful...

C: 那说来听听。
E: Well, okay then. I'm listening.

C: 要继续努力，朝着四星级的目标前进迷！迷！
E: Keep it up! Aim for that four-star goal next! Mem!

C: 要忙碌起来了呢。不过是好事！
E: Looks like we're about to get a lot busier! But that's a good thing.

C: 想扩充菜单的话，奶油生菜沙拉怎么样？
E: If we're expanding the menu, how about a Creamy Lettuce Salad?

C: 店长…都说每人只有一票，不许滥用职权哦。
E: Manager... we said one vote per person. No abusing your power.

C: ——呜哇！呸呸呸！
E: — WHOA!! Pfft! Pfft!!

C: 还有点事要处理…
E: Still got a couple of things to wrap up...

C: 作为晋级的证明，我将为店长颁发迷其林星级奖章。请收下吧。
E: As proof of your success, I now present the Memchelin Star Award to the owner. Please accept it!

C: 哼。名称不过是随手捏造的符号，拘泥于此未免太过表面。不合格。
E: Hmph. Names are just convenient labels. Such shallow reasoning. Fail.

C: 这个故事是你写的吗？
E: You wrote this story yourself, didn't you?

C: 放心。这是迷境里的一种植物，叫这个名字，只是因为和妖精的大尾巴长得很像啦。

C: <size=28>是比妖精的个头还高的巨大南瓜！</size>
E: <size=28>...an enormous pumpkin that's bigger than a whole fairy!</size>

C: <size=28>召集迷境里所有妖精，为各位准备了一场最盛大的晚宴！</size>

C: 宴会还没正式开始，得先忍忍迷……
E: The feast hasn't officially started yet... We have to resist for a bit longer, mem...

C: 说不定村长会悄悄飘过来，拜托你守好背后……
E: The chief might sneak up on us at any moment... I'm counting on you to watch my back...

C: 是呀。木盆堆满了蔬菜，桌上到处都是好吃的菜品，现在仿佛都还能闻到香气呢。
E: Did you, now? The wooden basins were filled with vegetables, and delicious dishes covered every inch of the table. I can almost still smell that mouthwatering aroma.

C: 故事就是这样，有着无限的可能性，总是出乎意料，却也令人着迷。
E: That's the beauty of stories. They hold endless possibilities, always surprising, yet utterly captivating.

C: 迈德漠斯，往日的英雄……\n他是悬锋的叛徒，\n<color=#9e5738>弑父的王储。</color>
E: Mydeimos, a hero of yore..\nNow a traitor to Kremnos,\n<color=#9e5738>the patricidal crown prince.</color>

C: 鏖战片刻不曾停歇，\n日复一日，难分今晨昨夜，
E: War and battle never cease for a single minute.\nEach passing day indistinguishable, morning and night entwined.

C: 同貌姊妹们的远行，\n也曾让她犹疑。
E: and the distant travels of her identical sisters\nsometimes inspire uncertainty within her.

C:
直到数年以后，
吟诗人尽数长眠地底。
孩童唱着悠长的歌，
独自背负凡人的回忆。
E:
Till many years later,
When the bards all return to their subterranean eternal rest,
The children sing the long, long songs,
And alone they bear memories of humanity.

C: 在诸般关乎死亡的祭礼中，\n少女最常主持的是葬仪。
E: Among the thousand ceremonies in life and death,\nThe ones she knows with most intimacy are funerals.

C:
死亡逃离时间的方式即是如此——

她将每一次临终的拥抱，
悉数藏于不朽的心间。
E:
This is how Death escapes Time —

She keeps every final embrace,
Hidden in her immortal heart.

C: 彼时朔风凛冽刺骨，\n彼时死亡苦涩难咽。
E: Back then, the boreal winds cut through to the bone.\nBack then, death was a bitter and stabbing fright.

C: 「不可回头，不可回头。\n望向人间，便是回头。」
E: "Do not turn back.\nFor to look toward the land of mortals, is in itself turning back."

C:
那座城邦名为埃杜利亚，
瑟希斯的根系深植地下。

善辩的学者手举乌龟，
他的理论却与常理相悖——
E:
That city is named Idilia,
Where Cerces' roots bury deep and wide.

The sophist scholar holds a tortoise aloft,
But his theories? Common sense bereft —

C: 「侠盗们，与我一同算计神明！」
E: "Fellow thieves, come on and deceive gods with me!"

C: 谨以此书献给你——\n<color=#9e5738>{NICKNAME}</color>。
E: This book is dedicated to you,\n<color=#9e5738>{NICKNAME}</color>.

C: 「你是仁爱的巨兽，」\n「我本无意将你囚留。」
E: "You are a benevolent beast,"\n"I had no intention of keeping you captive."

C: 「是吗…还未到来……」\n孩童继续睡去，\n等待下一场醒梦。
E: "Really...? ...Not here yet..."\nThe child continues to sleep,\nWaiting for the next waking dream.

C: 「母亲，母亲，我已...孤身一人…」\n孩童发出无助的呼求。
E: "Mother, Mother, I'm... already all alone..."\nThe child let out a helpless cry.

C: 陪虎克捉迷藏，好玩。\n她手下那群孩子，还挺藏龙卧虎。
E: Playing hide-and-seek with Hook was fun.\nThose kids under her command have quite the hidden talent.

C: ——以雅努萨波利斯的祭司、 圣女、颁赐神谕者之名， 凯撒的「命运爵」， 如是说。
E: ...In the name of Janusopolis's priestess, Holy Maiden, and oracle, Thus spoke The Imperator's "Dux Fatorum."

C: 女王抚着公主的发髻宽慰，\n却最终心软，取来一只窄杯。
E: The queen consoled the princess, caressing the other's hair bun.\nFinally she relented and took a chalice.

C: 「欢迎来到昏光庭院。 请问有什么可以帮到您？」 脸色阴郁的患者却摇头。 「末世摇摇欲坠…我们都日趋彷徨。」 「您能医好创口，却不能治愈绝望。」
E: "Welcome to the Twilight Courtyard. How can I help you?" The gravely patient shakes their head. "The end times are coming... and we all wander more and more." "You may heal our wounds, but you cannot cure despair."

C: 预料的死亡并未到来。\n<color=#9e5738>虹色的庇佑</color>从天而降，\n将两人温柔相护。
E: The death they awaited never came.\nInstead, <color=#9e5738>a cascade of colors</color> fell from the heavens,\nSimply there, protecting them both.

C: 圣城的居民，\n在造像前看见一个男人。
E: In front of a statue, the people of the holy city\nbeheld a man.

C: 难以忍受心中的烦闷，\n男人再度启程——\n「那么，便去拯救我能拯救的。」
E: Unable to bear the turmoil in his heart,\nThe man set off on a journey once more—\n"Then, I shall go save what I can."

C: 只怕背负越多，错谬越多。\n荆棘遍布的，\n未必是英雄的道途。
E: Fearing only that the greater the burden, the more the mistakes.\nThe road trod by heroes,\nNeed not be that beset by thorns.

C: 「此人的全名，鲜有人愿提起。」\n「恰如此人的命运，残缺不齐。」
E: "This person's name was seldom mentioned by others,"\n"Incomplete, just like his fate."

C: 「不必惊疑，人子。汝在世间尚有最后一题。」
E: "Do not be startled, child of humanity. You have a final query in this world."

C: 泰坦曾揭晓「调和生命」的奥秘。\n这一瞬看似恩赐，\n却饱含恶意。
E: The Titan once revealed the secrets of "Mixing Life."\nA boon seemingly a blessing,\nBut full of malice.

C: 可那字里行间，仿若有回声告诫：\n「往事而已，揭示又有何妨？」
E: Yet there seems to be a voice there in remonstration:\n"It's just the past. What harm is there in revelation?"

C: 她已知晓那美誉与讥讽皆非真言，\n她已知晓那皮囊美丑无关浪漫，\n神的金丝，只在心间。
E: She now knew that praises and ridicule were both untrue,\nAnd that romance cared not for beauty of the face.\nThe golden thread of gods exists only within.

C: 昔涟
E: Cyrene

C: 「德谬歌」
E: Demiurge

C: 「母上，我已经在『曳石学派』门下进修。最近发生了一件新鲜事，树庭驱逐了一名学生，据说他用炼金术妄图令死者复生，违背了禁令。我觉得有些惋惜。另：随信附送了一本初步编纂的字典。」
E: "Mother, I have been pursuing my advancement under the Helkolithist school. Something interesting happened recently. The Grove expelled a student who allegedly attempted to resurrect the dead through alchemy, violating the ban. I find it rather regrettable. P.S. I've attached a preliminary draft of the dictionary with this letter."

C: 母亲的回信姗姗来迟。「吾儿，你父近日重启悬锋祭典，但一直没能决出令他满意的『王翼冠军』。我不明白他的用意，却嗅到了硝烟的气息…字典已收到，母亲很欣慰，你知道的，我一直不希望你成为『纷争』的傀儡……」
E: Mother's reply came late. "My child, your father has recently restarted the Kremnos Festival, but he still hasn't found a 'King's Aegis' champion that satisfies him. I don't understand his intentions, but I can smell the fog of war in the air... I received the dictionary and it brings me joy. You know, I've never wanted you to become a puppet of 'Strife'..."

C: 不远处在麦田里劳作的披索也直起身来，「白厄大哥，记得别吃篮子最底下那个五颜六色的面包，那是莉维娅的新配方，村子里的小奇美拉都摇头……」
E: Piso, who was working in the wheat field nearby, straightened up. "Mr. Phainon, make sure you avoid the colorful bread at the bottom of the basket. That's Livia's new recipe. Even the little chimeras in the village didn't want a bite..."

C: 海风忽地变得凶烈，男人瞥见不远处的小丘上，一袭黑衣的故人持剑也正向此处眺望。白发男人咽下面包，三步并两步追向黑衣剑士的方向。
E: The sea breeze suddenly turned fierce. On a nearby hill, the man glimpsed a figure in black, an old acquaintance with a sword, gazing in this direction. The white-haired man swallowed his bread and rushed towards the black-clad swordmaster.

C: 「只是，似乎也和『背叛』的主题八竿子打不着。」
E: "Though it doesn't really seem connected to 'betrayal' either."

C: 第三轮比赛——「主菜」的评审官是神悟树庭烹饪学校的那刻夏。他直接撕碎了装着赛题的信封，一边接过阿格莱雅递来的水杯，痛饮一口——「本轮赛题，我毫无疑问，会选择大地……」
E: Third round: the theme "Main Course" was announced by judge Anaxa from the Grove of Epiphany Culinary School. He ripped the envelope to pieces, took the cup of water Aglaea handed him, and drank deeply. "As for this round's theme, without a doubt, I will choose the drom-"

C: 翁法罗斯语，意为「混沌」。\n\n批注：从某次循环开始，一组因子均表现出以「卡厄斯」或其变体进行自我命名的规律，推测为某条代码在迭代中稳定继承了下来。该猜想有待证明。
E: A word from the Amphorean language, meaning "Chaos."\n\nNote: Starting from a certain cycle, all factors in one group have consistently exhibited the pattern of naming themselves with the word "Khaos" or its variants. The hypothesis is that a particular code was stably inherited across iterations, though this hypothesis remains unverified.

C: 权杖内核层，所有未载入缓冲区的废弃数据留存地。\n永劫轮回中，卡厄斯兰那于每次死循环末尾入侵该区域，试图破坏运算进程。\n最后的再创世完成后，十二因子先后入侵该区域，并取回三千万次死循环中废弃的大部分数据。
E: The Scepter's core layer, the repository for all discarded data not loaded into the buffer.\nIn the eternal recurrence, Khaslana invades this area at the end of every recursive loop, attempting to disrupt the computation process.\nAfter the final Era Nova is completed, the twelve factors invade this area sequentially and retrieve most of the data discarded during the thirty million recursive loops.

C: ApoRia<unbreak>432</unbreak>
E: ApoRia<unbreak>432</unbreak>

C: 角色等级需要大于等于#1
E: Character level must be greater or equal to #1

C: 生活本身就不是一帆风顺的，但你有支持你的家人在。就像你始终坚持勤工俭学那样，你的父亲也一直挂念着你在学校的情况。和那些关心你的人好好沟通，共同走向更加美好的明天吧！
E: Life isn't always a smooth ride, but your family and friends are always there for you. You've been working part-time diligently for your family, and your father has got your back. Stay close to those who care about you, and together, you'll light up the path to a brilliant future!

C: 花火大人的绚丽写真
E: Miss Sparkle's Splendiferous Memoir

C: 但有一件事列车长很欣慰：列车锅放在你的冰箱里，竟然完好无损。\n\n帕姆按照你的「新规定」，缴纳了列车锅的「保管费」。希望你不要乱花。
E: But the Conductor is glad about one thing: You didn't touch the Express Special in your refrigerator at all.\n\nPom-Pom paid the "storage fee" for the Express Special, per your new "rules." I hope you don't waste it.

C: 群星交汇的轨迹
E: Traces of Stars Converging

C: 除了赚钱都很擅长
E: Good at everything except making money

C: 解决纠纷
E: Solving conflicts

C: 「可她肩上的担子实在过于沉重——她试图从乱线中编织出冬城的命运，却也被它压垮。她渐渐变得无情而寡欲，但人们依旧紧密团结在她的身边；」
E: "The weight on her shoulders was far too heavy. She tried to weave the destiny of the winter city from a tangled thread, but was crushed by this destiny. She slowly became emotionless and impassive, yet the people still clustered around her in loyalty."

C: 爱
E: Love

C: 原隶属「星际和平公司」技术开发部的小组长，但因爆破实验被开除，后加入隐夜鸫家系。\n疯狂的发明家，其代表性发明为破坏性梦境开拓装备「冯恩三世」，因过大的安全隐患而被废除使用。
E: Originally a team leader in the Technical Development Department of the Interastral Peace Corporation, he was fired due to a demolitions experiment. Later, he joined the Nightingale Family.\nThis mad inventor is known for his eccentric inventions, with his most notable being the destructive "Vaughn III" Dreamscape exploration equipment, which was discontinued due to significant safety hazards.

E: Supply Purchase

E: Taking Shape

E: Wall Surface (Right)

C: 可使用特殊行动卡<color=#f29e38ff>「热血激励」</color>生成激励格。
E: You can use the Special Action Card <color=#f29e38ff>"Passion Booster"</color> to generate the Incentive Tile.

C: 不夜之城
E: City That Never Sleeps

E: Dreamchaser

C: 他想要的只是毁灭本身。
E: He only wished for his own destruction.

C: 它的能力简直不可思议
E: Its abilities are incredible

C: 「避难所、古代遗物、特殊机兵…贝洛伯格的地底居然埋藏了这么多东西——{NICKNAME}，做好笔记，我们去更深的地方看看吧。」
E: "Shelters, ancient relics, special automatons... Who knew there are so many things lay hidden underneath Belobog? {NICKNAME}, take some notes, and let's explore deeper."

C: 「{NICKNAME}，调查进展如何？不知道你有没有发现，遗迹中的敌人拥有一些特殊的能力，这应该是古代科技的影响…看来这里有着我们不曾了解的古代技术，{NICKNAME}，来继续帮我搜集这里的情报吧。」
E: "{NICKNAME}, how was the investigation? I don't know if you're noticed, but there are some enemies with special abilities in the ruins. This might be effects of these ancient technologies... Looks like there are old techniques that we've never encountered before. {NICKNAME}, help me gather information about this place."

C: ——这里似乎是安放补给品的储存室，在这里好好补充资源再前进吧。
E: — This seems to be a supply storage room. Rest up and re-supply before moving on.

C: ——幸运的你来到了避难所的安全屋，没有怪物，只有宝物。
E: — You arrive at the safe house of a shelter. There are no monsters to be found, only treasures.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「机械危机」</color>击败所有敌人后，将激活可传送门。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Machine Crisis</color>: After defeating all enemies, you can activate the teleporter.

E: Boss: Support Ability

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「超频博弈」</color>是一种所需游玩<color=#f29e38ff>时间更短</color>的快速模式，可用于完成<color=#f29e38ff>双周积分</color>任务奖励。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Overclock Gambit</color> is a fast-paced mode that requires <color=#f29e38ff>less time</color> to play, and can be used to complete <color=#f29e38ff>Biweekly Points</color> mission rewards.

C:
共有8种简易装备，每种简易装备对应一种属性类型，例如：
•折叠小刀可以提高前台强度，适合前台输出角色。
•和平手枪可以提高后台强度，适合后台输出角色。
•轮滑鞋可以提高速度增幅，适合速度型角色。
E:
There are 8 types of basic equipment, and each type corresponds to an attribute. For example:
• The Folding Knife can increase On-Field Strength, suitable for on-field damage dealers.
• The Peace Pistol can increase Off-Field Strength, suitable for off-field damage dealers.
• Roller Skates can increase SPD Amplification, suitable for speed-type characters.

C: 「折纸小鸟对对碰」是一款<color=#f29e38ff>三消对战游戏</color>。在群鸟争锋模式下，每场共有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>30</unbreak>名</color>玩家参与对战。
E: "Origami Bird Clash" is a <color=#f29e38ff>match-3 battle game</color>. In the Best of the Flock mode, each match features <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>30</unbreak></color> players competing against each other.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>冰属性</color>造成弱点击破时，会立即造成<color=#f29e38ff>冰属性击破伤害</color>，并施加<color=#f29e38ff>冻结</color>状态。冻结会使敌方目标无法行动，并在<color=#f29e38ff>回合开始时</color>，造成冰属性附加伤害。<color=#f29e38ff>冻结</color>状态解除后，弱点击破状态仍会继续维持，直到下一次行动开始。
E: Using <color=#f29e38ff>Ice</color> attacks to trigger Weakness Break will immediately deal <color=#f29e38ff>Ice Break DMG</color> and apply the <color=#f29e38ff>Freeze</color> effect. Freeze will cause enemies to be unable to take action and take Ice Additional DMG <color=#f29e38ff>at the start of their turn</color>. After <color=#f29e38ff>Freeze</color> is dispelled, Weakness Break will continue until the start of their next action.

C: 探索中有时会遭遇实力强劲的对手，如果能击败它们，即可获得丰富的奖励。
E: While exploring, you may encounter powerful enemies. Defeat them to win bountiful rewards.

C: 通过<color=#f29e38ff>抛出记忆盲点</color>将有机会唤醒与之相关的模糊记忆。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Using Cognition Chasm</color> has a chance of restoring relevant hazy memories.

C: 在匹诺康尼之梦中，举着<color=#f29e38ff>「筑梦拼图」</color>的拼图绅士出没于世界各处。<color=#f29e38ff>完成拼图可使其中的事物在世界中显现。</color>
E: Puzzle Gentleman holding <color=#f29e38ff>Dream Jigsaws</color> may appear anywhere in Penacony. <color=#f29e38ff>Completing the jigsaw puzzle will make the object within it appear in the Dreamscape.</color>

C: 「记忆残晶」可以帮助你在特定商店兑换物品，或让「衣匠」为你指明尚未搜集的若虫所在的方位。
E: Memory Crystal Shards can help you to redeem items in specific shops, or let the Garmentmaker point out the location of nymphs you have not collected.

C: 如果能使用「哈努飞弹」引爆烟花，则能触发更大范围的爆炸击败敌人，甚至能够破坏墙壁。
E: If you use the Hanu Rocket to ignite the fireworks, it will trigger an explosion that defeats enemies, and is even capable of destroying walls.

C: 点击<color=#f29e38ff>涂鸦标识</color>进行光锥解析，解析完成后可获得光锥<color=#f29e38ff>新手任务开始前</color>。
E: Select the <color=#f29e38ff>graffiti markers</color> to perform Light Cone analysis. Complete the analysis to obtain the Light Cone <color=#f29e38ff>Before the Tutorial Mission Starts</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>消耗耐力值</color>，可以对明亮的区域进行探索。
E: By <color=#f29e38ff>consuming Stamina</color>, you can explore the illuminated areas.

C: 在「战意阶段4：力量觉醒」期间，非首领敌人在进入战斗后，生命值将大幅降低。\n注意：本关敌方首领生命值极高，可利用消灭<color=#f29e38ff>非首领敌人</color>造成的<color=#f29e38ff>溢出伤害</color>，对敌方首领造成高额伤害。
E: During "Grit Phase 4: Power Awoken," non-boss enemies will have their HP drastically reduced after entering battle.\nAttention: The boss's HP for this current stage is extremely high. You can use the <color=#f29e38ff>Overflow DMG</color> dealt when defeating <color=#f29e38ff>non-boss enemies</color> to deal high amounts of DMG to the boss.

C: 请尽可能多地让我方<color=#f29e38ff>相同角色</color>连续行动。\n相同角色在<color=#f29e38ff>连续行动</color>后，可积累大量「战意值」。
E: Do your best to make the <color=#f29e38ff>same character</color> perform consecutive actions.\nYou will accumulate a large amount of Grit Value after the same character performs <color=#f29e38ff>consecutive actions</color>

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>甜美的沉眠</color>\n我方角色或武器消灭敌方目标时，【甜美的沉眠】发生范围爆炸，对其相邻敌方目标造成量子属性伤害。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>Sweet Slumber</color>\nWhen an ally or weapon defeats an enemy target, Sweet Slumber triggers AoE detonation, dealing Quantum DMG to adjacent enemy targets.\nPrioritize the upgrade of the initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

C: 魔法师施放<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>后，小桶会进化，最高进化至<color=#f29e38ff>究极金</color>形态。\n进化后会大幅提升小桶攻击力，并提高我方全体<color=#f29e38ff>追加攻击</color>伤害。
E: After the Magician uses their <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color>, the minicans will evolve, up to the <color=#f29e38ff>Ultra Gold</color> form at max.\nAfter evolution, greatly increases minicans' ATK and increases all allies' <color=#f29e38ff>Follow-Up ATK</color> DMG.

C: 三月七担任领队时，获得三月七对应行动卡的概率将会提升。
E: When March 7th is leader, the chance you'll get Action Cards corresponding to March 7th increases.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>当前命途</color>的祝福达到<color=#f29e38ff>3</color>个后，获取另一<color=#f29e38ff>特定命途</color>的祝福达到<color=#f29e38ff>3</color>个时，会触发回响交错。回响交错的具体效果可在命途选择时的<color=#f29e38ff>「命途回响」</color>页签查看。
E: When you receive <color=#f29e38ff>3</color> Blessings for your <color=#f29e38ff>current Path</color> and then receive <color=#f29e38ff>3</color> Blessings for another <color=#f29e38ff>specific Path</color>, Resonance Interplay will be triggered. You can find the effect of Resonance Interplay on the <color=#f29e38ff>Path Resonance</color> tab when choosing a Path.

C: 位面内进入新区域、战斗胜利、敲碎可破坏物都将获得<color=#f29e38ff>大量宇宙碎片</color>。
E: Entering a new domain, achieving victory in battle, or destroying destructible objects will all get you <color=#f29e38ff>a large number of Cosmic Fragments</color> in this plane.

C: 在「差分宇宙」的<color=#f29e38ff>「转化」</color>区域中，可以进入<color=#f29e38ff>「过量转化」</color>挑战。
E: In Divergent Universe's <color=#f29e38ff>Conversion</color> Domains, you can enter the <color=#f29e38ff>Excessive Conversion</color> challenge.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>韧性上限高</color>的敌人被弱点击破时受到的<color=#f29e38ff>击破伤害</color>更高。
E: When enemies with <color=#f29e38ff>high max Toughness</color> are Weakness Broken, the <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG</color> they receive will be higher.

C: 我方角色受到致命伤害时不会陷入无法战斗状态，<color=#f29e38ff>立即复活</color>并<color=#f29e38ff>行动提前</color>。
E: When an ally character takes fatal damage, they will not be downed but will instead <color=#f29e38ff>immediately revive</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>advance their action</color>.

C: 与地面上的阵枢交互后，可以<color=#f29e38ff>拿起阵枢</color>，阵枢连线关系不会发生改变。已经持有阵枢时，和地面上的阵枢交互，则会<color=#f29e38ff>交换阵枢</color>。
E: After interacting with the base terminals on the ground, you can <color=#f29e38ff>pick them up</color>. The connecting lines between the base terminals will not change. When you are already holding a base terminal, interacting with another base terminal on the ground will cause you to <color=#f29e38ff>swap base terminals</color>.

C: 展览日开始后，每隔一段时间会出现<color=#f29e38ff>来宾事件</color>。\n完成来宾事件后，<color=#f29e38ff>展览日</color>进度将<color=#f29e38ff>向前推进</color>。
E: After the Exhibition Day starts, <color=#f29e38ff>Guest Occurrences</color> will appear periodically.\nCompleting Guest Occurrences will <color=#f29e38ff>advance</color> the <color=#f29e38ff>Exhibition Day</color>.

C: 与双人对战不同，多人对战<color=#f29e38ff>不会获得额外步数</color>。请在规定的<color=#f29e38ff>时间</color>与<color=#f29e38ff>步数</color>内进行消除，增强小鸟战斗力，尽量存活下来吧！
E: Unlike in Duo Duel, multiplayer battles <color=#f29e38ff>do not grant extra moves</color>. Please make eliminations within the allotted <color=#f29e38ff>time</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>moves</color>. Increase your bird's combat power, and try to stay alive!

E: From here on out, you'll have to complete all the Node challenges on your own.

E: Check it out!

C: 当前<color=#f29e38ff>驱邪术</color>的效果是<color=#f29e38ff>清空敌方韧性并造成伤害</color>。

C: 随着我们镇伏的岁阳增加，降妖辑录的挑战也会增加。
E: As the number of heliobi we suppress increases, so does the number of Exorcismal Chronicle challenges.

E: Th—This is also the place to check out the exorcismics we've already acquired.
