E: Since you're just starting out, follow these steps first.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>完成接待</color>可以获得怪物们给你的<color=#f29e38ff>小费</color>。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Finish serving your customers</color> to earn <color=#f29e38ff>tips</color> that the monsters leave you.

C: 用指定的原料<color=#f29e38ff>还原</color>出图片中的饮品吧。
E: Use specific ingredients to <color=#f29e38ff>recreate</color> the drink in the image.

C: 测测你更接近历史中哪位<color=#f29e38ff>星穹列车领航员</color>。
E: The test will let you see which <color=#f29e38ff>Astral Express Navigator</color> from history you are most like.

E: Complete Dreamscape Training Challenge Targets to obtain <color=#f29e38ff>Training Rewards</color>.

C: 现在，我的飞船即将抵达初始星球。满怀期待地开始冒险吧！
E: Now, my ship is about to reach the Initial Planet. Let us start our exploration!

C: 可以在暂停界面查看武器的获取信息。
E: You can view which weapons you've obtained in the pause menu.

C: 我拒绝了他们的好意，因为木头制成的飞船容易着火！
E: I turned down their kindness because wood-made spaceships are a fire hazard!

C: 嗷呜！来吧，现在让泡泡来教你怎么进行小海豹冲撞！
E: Awoo! Alright, let Bubbles show you how to do a baby seal ram!

C: 好机会！只要击败敌方，就能触发我的技能。
E: Great opportunity! Defeating an enemy will trigger my ability.

C: 嗷呜，那家伙竟然耍手段，把水池变成了冰面。
E: Awoo, that trickster turned the water into ice.

C: 还有闪闪发光的<color=#f29e38ff>浣熊金币</color>！钱多不压身~先塞进兜里再说！
E: And all these sparkly <color=#f29e38ff>Raccoon Gold Coins</color>! The more money, the better~ Just stuff it in your pocket first!

C: 咦，这个闪闪发亮的……
E: Huh, this shining, shimmering thing...

C: 黑斗篷魔王的邪恶力量遍布整个银河，我们即将前往的C<unbreak>996</unbreak>星球也是他的受害者，一定不能掉以轻心！
E: The Black Cloak Demon King's wicked influence is all over the cosmos. Planet C<unbreak>996</unbreak>, which we're going to next, also fell victim to him. We can't be too careful!

C: 본 게임은 <unbreak>12</unbreak>세 이용가 게임물로 만 <unbreak>12</unbreak>세 미만의 어린이나 청소년이 이용하기 부적절합니다

C:
1、本游戏是一款3D角色扮演类回合制游戏，适用于年满<unbreak>12</unbreak>周岁及以上的用户，建议未成年人在家长监护下使用游戏产品。

2、本游戏基于架空背景展开剧情，用户可通过对话、交互、完成任务推进剧情，游戏内还可以自由探索场景地图。游戏中有需要使用游戏角色进行的人机对战，玩法基于一定难度的思考判断，鼓励玩家随机应变、制定策略来取得对战胜利。游戏中有少量自定义文字系统，该社交系统遵循相关法律法规进行管理。

3、本游戏中有用户实名认证系统，认证为未成年的用户将受到以下游戏限制：
未满8周岁的用户不能充值；8周岁以上未满<unbreak>16</unbreak>周岁的未成年用户，单次充值金额不得超过<unbreak>50</unbreak>元人民币，每月充值金额累计不得超过<unbreak>200</unbreak>元人民币；<unbreak>16</unbreak>周岁以上的未成年用户，单次充值金额不得超过<unbreak>100</unbreak>元人民币，每月充值金额累计不得超过<unbreak>400</unbreak>元人民币。
游戏仅会在周五、周六、周日和法定节假日的<unbreak>20</unbreak>时至<unbreak>21</unbreak>时，向未成年人提供1小时游戏服务。

4、游戏玩法鼓励玩家积极思考，制定和应用策略来取得对战的胜利。同时，在游戏中呈现了精美细腻的画面效果，能够为玩家提供优质的视觉体验。
E:
1、本游戏是一款3D角色扮演类回合制游戏，适用于年满<unbreak>12</unbreak>周岁及以上的用户，建议未成年人在家长监护下使用游戏产品。

2、本游戏基于架空背景展开剧情，用户可通过对话、交互、完成任务推进剧情，游戏内还可以自由探索场景地图。游戏中有需要使用游戏角色进行的人机对战，玩法基于一定难度的思考判断，鼓励玩家随机应变、制定策略来取得对战胜利。游戏中有少量自定义文字系统，该社交系统遵循相关法律法规进行管理。

3、本游戏中有用户实名认证系统，认证为未成年的用户将受到以下游戏限制：
未满8周岁的用户不能充值；8周岁以上未满<unbreak>16</unbreak>周岁的未成年用户，单次充值金额不得超过<unbreak>50</unbreak>元人民币，每月充值金额累计不得超过<unbreak>200</unbreak>元人民币；<unbreak>16</unbreak>周岁以上的未成年用户，单次充值金额不得超过<unbreak>100</unbreak>元人民币，每月充值金额累计不得超过<unbreak>400</unbreak>元人民币。
游戏仅会在周五、周六、周日和法定节假日的<unbreak>20</unbreak>时至<unbreak>21</unbreak>时，向未成年人提供1小时游戏服务。

4、游戏玩法鼓励玩家积极思考，制定和应用策略来取得对战的胜利。同时，在游戏中呈现了精美细腻的画面效果，能够为玩家提供优质的视觉体验。

C: 云璃师父，来检验一下我的修行成果吧！
E: Master Yunli, look at how hard I've been training!

C: 洞天幻化，长梦一觉…破！
E: This sanctuary, is but a vision... Break!

C: 加入星核猎手前，由于工作的缘故，我很少见到一个人两次。
E: Before I joined the Stellaron Hunters, the nature of my work meant that I barely ever saw the same person twice.

C: 你们活不长了。
E: Your number is up.

C: 每一颗星星，都是一个奇迹！
E: Every star is a miracle!

C: Excalibur！
E: Excalibur!

C: 不急于动手吗？嗯，再观望一下也好。
E: In no hurry to strike? Hmm, it won't hurt to observe a bit longer.

C: 审讯恶徒时，时常要强压心中怒火，以免用词有失妥当。
E: You have to suppress your anger during an interrogation, or you might find yourself using... indelicate vocabulary.

C: 这个感觉不错～写进新歌里吧！
E: Nice! I should write this into my next song...

C: 这些资源要仔细分配。
E: Allocate these resources appropriately.

C: 多爱惜下自己的身体吧，卢卡。
E: Take care of yourself, Luka.

C: 放眼贝洛伯格，不会有比布洛妮娅小姐谈吐更优雅、更有领袖气质的人了。
E: In all of Belobog, you won't find anyone who speaks more elegantly or acts more like a leader than Lady Bronya.

C: 侦察到敌方目标。
E: Enemy targets detected.

C: 克拉拉：我、我才不怕你们！
E: Clara: I—I'm not afraid of you!

C: 权当找点乐子喽。
E: We're just having fun.

C: 你喜欢？那你收着呗。
E: You like it? It's yours for the taking!

C: 找一找呀跑一跑呀跳一跳~
E: First you go a-searching, then you go a-running, searching, running, jump jump jump!

C: 每一步都在探险计划之中。
E: Every step is just a part of the adventure.

C: 小心坎特谷的山风，那通常是暴风雪的预兆——千万，千万不要在夜晚的峡谷中逗留。
E: Beware of the mountain winds in the Kandor Valley — they are usually the harbinger of a blizzard. And never, ever stay in the canyon at night.

C: 哟，你好！我叫卢卡，是「地火」的成员。打击恶棍，守护镇民——这就是我每天的工作。
E: Oh, hey! I'm Luka, a member of Wildfire. Roughing up thugs and protecting the townsfolk is just part of my everyday job.

C: 欢呼声在哪儿？
E: Where's the applause?

C: 星穹列车的姬子，我早有耳闻。听同事聊八卦的时候说，她是一位貌美绝伦又见多识广的女士。有机会的话，我还真想和她见上一面。
E: I've heard about Himeko of the Astral Express — my colleagues were gossiping about how beautiful and knowledgeable she is. If I ever get the chance, I'd love to meet her.

C: 趁此机会一举拿下吧。
E: Seize the moment!

C: 谈生意嘛，以和为贵，遇到好说话的，那自然好；遇到不好说话的，就用扇子给他扇扇风，消消火气。
E: Peace is the best for business. It's best to work with persuadable people. For those who are less persuadable, cooling them down with a fan works wonders.

C: 逝者将再临！
E: The dead will return!

C: 我受俗务羁扰多年，不仅对周遭事物见怪不怪，人也变得无趣。一定要说有什么见闻，便是遇见你这般云游天外之人吧。
E: I have been bound by mundane duties for years. Not only do I find no fun in my surroundings, but I'm also becoming a rather boring person. If I must talk about something interesting, then it'd be meeting space travelers like yourself.

C: 如此稀有之物，你收下便好。
E: A rare find such as this is best suited for your keeping.

C: 你会带给我惊喜么？
E: What surprises do you hold?

C: 走着瞧吧，本姑娘早晚会在评书里青史留名！
E: Sooner or later, I'll make my mark in history!

C: 从维护员到飞行士，还有武备士和观星士，天舶司的每个岗位我都待过…一晃眼，就到现在了。
E: I have worked in every post in the Sky-Faring Commission from maintenance to pilot, combat reserves to stargazer... Such a long time has gone by so quickly.

C: 藿藿你也凑近点看看呗，这火又烧不到你~
E: Come get a better view, Huohuo. Don't worry, the fire won't bite you, you know~

C: 无尽形寿便是这般滋味：苦苦等待，直至疯狂。
E: An endless lifespan is just a bitter wait for insanity.

C: 「烦恼」这东西，对吾太奢侈了。
E: Annoyances are a luxury to me.

C: 希望这能让更多人好好活着。
E: I hope that with this, I can help more people live better lives.

C: 他总是叫我去吃火锅。我知道火锅很好吃，但我就是吃不了又辣又烫的。
E: He always asks me to go eat hot pot with him. I know it's delicious, but I just can't eat that hot and spicy stuff.

C: 能再见飞霄将军的英姿，我可真是好福气。
E: To bear witness to the great General Feixiao's heroism again is truly fortunate.

C: 这次也要靠你的鬼点子化险为夷了。
E: We'll have to rely on your clever tricks to turn the tide again.

C: …恶浊之气。
E: ...The stench of evil.

C: 原来如此。
E: I see.

C: 行于命途的浪潮，如小女子这般的人只是一粒微渺的尘埃，随着那些巨手的拨弄上下沉浮，身不由己…可如今，小女子也得当一粒狡猾的灰尘，让他们好好打上几个喷嚏才是。
E: Drifting on the waves of destiny, people like me are just tiny specks of dust, tossed about involuntarily by the hands of fate... But now, I must be a cunning speck of dust and make them sneeze a few times.

C: 请阮•梅小姐放心，我恢复得不错呢。
E: Don't worry, Miss Ruan Mei, I am recovering well.

C: 还用说么？我当然更相信肌肉记忆。
E: Need I say more? Muscle memory never lies.

C: 此间并非杀伐之地，而是智计的竞逐。丹恒先生，很荣幸同你并肩作战。
E: Combat is a contest of wits. Dan Heng, I am honored to fight by your side.

C: 她老是希望在公司与客户的平衡中找到最优解，但这世上哪有那么多两全其美？不过话说回来，她也走到了今天这个位置，对吧？
E: She's always searching for the optimal solution in maintaining equilibrium between the corporation and its customers. Not an easy feat if you ask me, but she's climbed the corporate ladder incredibly fast, so she must be doing something right.

C: 群星的运动，数字的默示，纸牌的预言…嗯，听说最近手机占卜也很流行。但这些都只是辅助，倾听一个人的言语，走入他们的内心，窥探他们的记忆，结果才最准确。
E: The dance of the stars, the silent whisper of numbers, the foretelling of cards... Mmm, I've heard that divination via app is all the rage these days. Yet, this is just a supplementary tool. To hear one's speech, to venture into their hearts, to glimpse their memories... that's where the most precise truths are revealed.

C: 熟悉的感觉……
E: How familiar...

C: 我这有笔更好的交易，要来听听看吗？
E: I have an even better deal. Why don't you come hear about it?

C: 那对漂亮的眼睛背后，又有什么诡计了？
E: What kind of schemes are lurking behind those pretty eyes?

C: 你的欲望，我会好好珍藏的。
E: I'll keep your desires close to my heart.

C: 刚想到你呢，来得还挺快？
E: I was just thinking of you. That was fast.

C: 开火！
E: Fire!

C: 此乃——「忍法•奥义•缭乱灭破杀阵」！
E: This is... Ninjutsu Secret Technique: Dazzling Obliteration!

C: 谁出的题？回去重写。
E: Who came up with this? Seriously, go rewrite it.

C: 远道而来的贵客，风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的讯息。我名阿格莱雅，奥赫玛的改衣师，翁法罗斯的黄金裔之一。愿我们坦诚相待。
E: O, noble guest from afar. The wind brought me news of you along the golden threads. My name is Aglaea, the Dressmaster of Okhema and one of Amphoreus' Chrysos Heirs. I hope we treat each other with honesty.

C: 接纳他人的愿望，并将其化作己身之心愿——并非所有的英雄都拥有如此空白的底色，这也是世人对他寄予厚望的原因。
E: Accepting others' wishes and turning them into his own wishes — not all heroes are such blank canvases as him, and that is why the world places such great hopes on him.

C: 金丝已不再能够感受到他内心的犹疑，今后，他势必会在自己选择的道路上阔步前行。
E: The golden threads can no longer detect doubts in his heart. From now on, he will certainly walk tall and proud on the road he chose.

C: 生命啊，脆若游丝。
E: Life, so fragile, like a wisp of silk.

C: 太好啦，我们又见面啦。
E: Wonderful, we meet again.

C: 来吧，向我展现你的勇气。
E: Come on, show me your courage.

C: 流淌吧，悬锋之血！
E: Blood of Kremnos, stream forth!

C: 哼，死亡会拒绝我。
E: Hmph, death refuses me.

C: 短短时间内能阅遍树庭的藏书，消化大量翁法罗斯的资料…倒是比很多人更像优秀的学者，若论及对大地兽的精通程度，他更是万中无一。
E: Being able to read all of the Grove's books and interpret the mountains of information regarding Amphoreus in such a short time... He's more of an outstanding scholar than many people I know. And when it comes to knowledge about the dromas? He is indeed second to none.

C: 「小小兵卒，也能侵吞敌王」…其他的话我都忘光了，只有这一句还记得。
E: "Even a humble pawn can check the enemy king"... I've forgotten everything else she said, but that one line stayed with me.

C: 战士思乡的呓语，母亲安慰孩子的童谣，少女留给恋人的最后一封信…每完成一次葬仪，我便多了一份逝者留给我的记忆——这些都曾是他们活着的温度。
E: The whispers of a homesick soldier, the lullabies a mother uses to soothe her child, the last letter left by a maiden to her lover... With each funeral, I carry another memory left by those who have passed — memories that still hold the warmth of their lives.

C: 三月小姐，结束之后，想一起做玩偶吗？
E: Miss March, would you like to make plushies together after this is over?

C: 请珍惜灵魂还未枯萎的时光。
E: Please cherish the time before your soul withers.

C: 即便面对死亡，人也能做出选择。
E: Even in the face of death, people can still make a choice.

C: 仅此而已么？
E: Is that all?

C: 安宁平淡的日子，就像带着麦香的风。
E: Peaceful days are like breezes carrying the scent of wheat fields.

C: 好好记着。
E: You'd better remember this~

C: 走过的路，总要留个纪念~
E: Every road we walk deserves a little souvenir~

C: 相信我，我会保护好你的伙伴。
E: Trust me, I'll keep your companions safe.

C: 这股力量，已不同过往。
E: My strength is not what it was... it's more.

C: 切勿错失良机。
E: Do not let this moment slip away.

C: 「大人者，不失赤子之心」——见到她们，我总会想起这句仙舟旧谚。
E: "Those who are truly great never lose their childlike innocence." I'm reminded of this old Xianzhou saying whenever I see them.

C: 嘘——健康生活的小妙招，我都是从他那里学来的。勤睡早起，多吃苦练，人家现在…学会了一半！
E: Shh. I learned all my tricks for healthy living from him. Sleep early and rise early, eat lots and exercise lots... I've learned, um, the first half of both tenets!

C: {NICKNAME}喜欢荡秋千吗？随风荡起的时候，心也会飞得好高好高，仿佛能追上远去的思念。来，我们一起。如果害怕，就牵住人家的手吧？
E: Do you like swings, {NICKNAME}? Whenever I swing with the wind, my heart soars super high as well. It feels like I could catch up to everything I've longed for. Come on, let's go on the swings together. You can hold my hand if you're scared~

C: 我来守护。
E: I'm on guard.

C: 不慌，还有我在。
E: Don't panic. I'm still here.

C: 即便将被遗忘，不要放弃选择。
E: Do not give up on making a choice, even if you're about to be forgotten.

C: 配合得不错。
E: Nice teamwork.

C: 小心错过入场的最佳时机。
E: Don't miss the best timing for an attack.

C: 帮帮我，万能的缇宝老师！
E: Help me, omnipotent Lady Tribbie!

C: 选择，并非像看上去那般遥不可及。
E: Choice isn't as elusive as it may appear.

C: 想想该怎么对付它。
E: We need a strategy.

C: Astral Express
E: Astral Express

C: 镜头移动下
E: Move camera down

C: 发射
E: Launch

C: 施放终结技
E: Unleash Ultimate

C: 舞！舞！舞！
E: Dance! Dance! Dance!

C: 可惜花蕊为虫剥蚀
E: Pity Its Heart Gnawed by Worms

C: 鸣蛀之梦
E: Dream of Gnawing

C: 【狮震八方】伤害提升！
E: Earthshaker Leo DMG increased!

C: 完成噩梦难度挑战
E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge

C: 完成噩梦难度挑战，且我方【致幻人鱼】受到致命伤害少于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次
E: Complete the Nightmare difficulty challenge with ally "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" receiving fatal damage fewer than <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s)

C: 蝶糕糕
E: Butterfly Cake

C: 努努斯
E: Nanus

C: 浪潮汹涌而来
E: The Waves Come Crashing In

C: 自身受到伤害时：与后1格同伴交换位置，并使自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Swaps positions with the companion 1 tile behind, and its <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 回合开始时：使前1格同伴<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: At the start of the turn: Causes the companion 1 tile ahead <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: 同伴攻击时：对该同伴和其攻击目标各造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: When a companion attacks: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to both the companion and their attack target

C: 对战开始时：若属性总和大于等于<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点，则随机变成1只更高稀有度的非专属奇美拉，并使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>
E: At the start of combat: If total stats is <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or more, randomly transforms into a non-exclusive chimera of a higher Rarity, its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>, and <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP increases by <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>.

C: 回合开始或被召唤时：咕噜鱼儿对<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值最高的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn or when summoned: Gurgling Fish deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to the opponent with the highest <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP.

C: 胶糖卷不能陷入【忘却】状态。对战开始时：队伍中最强的胶糖卷使所有对手陷入【忘却】状态。同伴攻击/追加攻击时：若攻击目标处于【忘却】状态，则立即对其造成1次等同于<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>的伤害
E: Gummy Roll cannot enter the "Oblivion" state. At the start of battle: The strongest Gummy Roll in the team inflicts the "Oblivion" state on all opponents. When a companion uses attack/Follow-Up ATK, if the attacked target is in the "Oblivion" state, immediately deal 1 instance of DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK.

E: The flavor's unbeatable!

E: Divergent Universe

C: 大丽花提升星魂等阶的素材。
E: Material for raising The Dahlia's Eidolon Level.

C: 视角回到流萤这边，阴差阳错之下，她正在深入梦主阴谋的终局……
E: Back to Firefly's POV, she was entering the final stage of the Dreammaster's plot in an unexpected turn of events...

C: <color=#f29e38ff>【负载生命值】：</color>敌我双方单位生命值<color=#f29e38ff>可降低至0以下</color>且不会陷入无法战斗状态。当行动条上的<color=#f29e38ff>【负载清算】行动时</color>，将进行生命值<color=#f29e38ff>结算</color>，当前生命值为0以下的单位会受到致命伤害。敌方召唤物未被全部消灭时，敌方全体目标所受伤害降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>99%</unbreak></color>。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>"HP Overload":</color> Both ally and enemy units' HP <color=#f29e38ff>can be reduced below 0</color> without being knocked down. When <color=#f29e38ff>"Overload Settlement" on the action bar takes action</color>, HP <color=#f29e38ff>calculation</color> will be performed. Units with HP below 0 will receive fatal damage. When there are enemy summons that are still undefeated, reduces <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>99%</unbreak></color> of DMG taken by all enemy targets.

C: 敌方目标每次受到攻击后，使自身受到的伤害降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，受到的暴击伤害降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>层，该效果在敌方目标回合开始或进入弱点击破状态时清空层数；若敌方目标处于弱点击破状态时，该效果不会叠加层数。
E: After the enemy target takes DMG, reduces DMG taken by this unit by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and CRIT DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>, stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). These stacks are cleared when the enemy target's turn begins or when they enter the Weakness Break state. While the enemy target is in the Weakness Break state, stacks cannot be accumulated.

E: Shatterstrike

E: Bizarre Spell

C: 认真起来的丹恒，想想都感觉强得可怕
E: Just thinking about Dan Heng getting serious makes me tremble in fear

C: 我是来击败你们的
E: I'm here to defeat you all

C: 从我方队伍左侧起横扫攻击我方3个连续目标，造成少量火属性伤害，同时大概率使击中目标陷入灼烧状态。
E: Starting from the leftmost target, uses a sweeping attack on 3 consecutive targets, dealing minor Fire DMG with a high chance to Burn the attacked targets.

C: 死斗绝命
E: Fatal Clash

C: 罪血嚼齿
E: Hemotort Teethgrind

C: 大丽花称美梦分成两条平行的道路，你行于「开拓」，流萤则行于「终末」。为抵达二者相交的时刻，要找出更多记忆的矛盾之处。
E: The Dahlia said Dreamjoy was split into two parallel paths: You walked along the Trailblaze, while Firefly walked along the Finality. To reach the moment where these paths intersect, you must find more contradictions within the memories.

C: 大丽花梳理现状，称她也曾出现在你关于匹诺康尼的「记忆」中。身为星核猎手合作者的花火将你和流萤送入梦境深处，令你们遭遇「何物朝向死亡」的威胁。在黑天鹅帮助你们逃离梦境后，你与流萤就此失散。而在流萤接下来的经历中，大丽花同样在场。
E: The Dahlia recounted the current situation, saying that she had also appeared in your memories of Penacony. Collaborating with the Stellaron Hunters, Sparkle sent you and Firefly deep into the dreamscape, where you faced the threat of Something Unto Death. After Black Swan helped you escape the dreamscape, you and Firefly were separated. The Dahlia had also been there for what followed in Firefly's subsequent experiences.

C: 以知更鸟的记忆为引，大丽花打捞出一片忆域，并请流萤进入探索。黑天鹅出现，揭露大丽花并非星核猎手，但未能阻止流萤被传送走。
E: Using Robin's memories as a guide, The Dahlia retrieved a Memory Zone and invited Firefly to explore it. Black Swan appeared and revealed that The Dahlia was not a Stellaron Hunter, but couldn't prevent Firefly from being teleported away.

C: 从梦中醒来
E: Awaken from your dream

C: 监督之眼
E: Eye of Overseer

C: 天赋的追加攻击尚且无法触发。
E: Talent's Follow-Up ATK cannot be triggered yet.

C: 暴击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Increases CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 冰蚀
E: Glacial Erosion

C: 受教
E: Gleaned Instruction

C: 焚身
E: Immolation

C: 奇怪，这位少女身上的确存在一丝杂音，可那位自称治安官的男人却毫无察觉。\n直接跟上去的话，自己很容易被其他人认出来，打草惊蛇，先使用「调律」进行监视吧。
E: That's strange... there is a definite trace of static noise around this girl, yet that man who calls himself a security officer is completely oblivious.\nIf I follow her directly, I'll be recognized and blow my cover. I'll use "tuning" to keep an eye on her for now.

C: （可选）履行约定
E: (Optional) Fulfill the promise

C: 所以，出了什么问题？
E: So, what's the problem?

C: 我把它改造成了维生舱。这会儿，你我都在阿斯德纳星系边缘飘着呢。
E: I converted it into a life support pod. Right now, we're both drifting at the edge of the Asdana system.

C: 没准你是对的。沿着这条路继续找下去吧。至于它们究竟是什么……
E: Maybe you're right. Let's keep searching down this path. As for what they really are...

C: 等下还是当心点吧，未必所有幻影都是善茬。
E: Better stay on guard. Not every illusion has good intentions.

C: 两点之间，她究竟发现了什么，才会遭受如此可怕的命运？
E: What did she discover during that time that would make her suffer such a terrible fate?

C: 长、长官？
E: S—Sir?

C: 玩得还开心吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Did you have fun, {NICKNAME}?

C: 前方是施工重地，我们就不深入了。告辞。
E: There's a construction site ahead, so we won't go any further. Goodbye.

C: 在匹诺康尼冒充一位家主，想必你已做好了心理准备。
E: I trust you're mentally prepared to face the consequences of posing as a family head on Penacony.

C: 而在那之中，也潜藏着危险。
E: And the dangers that lurk within.

C: 可冷静想想，那什么也无法改变，记忆…终究是已经发生过的事。
E: But thinking about it calmly, nothing can change it. A memory... is ultimately something that's already happened.

C: 更严重，她是格拉默铁骑第一位，也是唯一一位「叛逃者」。那时帝国仍未覆灭，但她不想接受战死的命运，独自离开了。她说…想要自己选择如何死去。
E: Worse than that, she was the first and only "deserter" of the Glamoth Iron Cavalry. The Empire hadn't fallen yet, but she didn't want to accept a fate of dying in battle, so she left on her own. She said... she wanted to choose how she would die.

C: 但记忆的复现很顺利，她要来了…很快就要来了…这里没有别人，不那么优雅也可以…我得不遗余力……
E: Memory recovery is going well, but slowly. She'll be here soon, and time is short.... There's nobody else here, so there's no need to be delicate... In fact I think I'd better go all out....

C: …这是？
如果你愿意，也能够承受…我倒是可以一以贯之呢。还是说……
E: If you're willing, and if you can endure it... I can keep going. Or perhaps...

C: 我方才施予的一击，虽不光彩却绝无错失——今时此地，你已必死无疑。
E: The strike I just delivered — dishonorable though it may be — did not miss. Here and now, your death is certain.

C: 我向你承诺，在一切结束之后，无论结果如何，我会把她的作为告诉人们——她应当被美梦铭记。
E: I promise you, when all of this is over, regardless of the outcome, I'll tell everyone about her deeds. She deserves to be remembered by the sweet dream.

C: 没错，只留下这一幕作为纪念——我想记住那一刻的心情。
E: That's right. I kept only this scene as a memento. I wanted to remember how I felt at that moment.

C: 还是自己品味吧，我只希望自己尽快忘记。
E: Go ahead and savor it on your own. I want to put it behind me, the sooner, the better.

C: 我可不会承这份情，你原本就做不到。孝心也不像是你会有的品质，别兜圈子了。
E: I won't be grateful for that... You couldn't have done it anyway. Filial piety has never been one of your strong suits, so drop the act.

C: 暗号，暗号，立刻回答——<color=#dbc291ff>生命因何而沉睡？</color>
E: Passphrase, passphrase, respond at once: <color=#dbc291ff>Why does life slumber?</color>

C: 「机甲大亨」不够酷，所以……
E: "Mech Tycoon" wasn't cool enough, so...

C: 事关星核、匹诺康尼、乃至整个银河的未来。公平起见，就让我们在那里一见真章。
E: Since the future of the Stellaron, Penacony, and even the entire Cosmos is at stake, let's draw a conclusion there, in all fairness.

C: 流萤女士，想必您也思索过命运？
E: Lady Firefly, I assume you've pondered over destiny too?

C: 歌斐木先生，不…<color=#dbc291ff>「最后的律令」</color>。
E: Mr. Gopher Wood, no... <color=#dbc291ff>the Final Divine Law</color>.

C: 能见到你真好。
E: It's so great to see you.

C: 这场盛大的宴会快要结束了。这里便是前往最后舞台的起点…也曾是匹诺康尼所有故事的起点。
E: This grand festival is drawing to its close. This is the starting point for the ultimate stage of our journey... just as it marked the beginning of all the stories in Penacony.

C: 舒翁女士，在你看来，<color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#生命因何而沉睡}鸟为什么要飞上天空{RUBY_E#}？</color>
E: Miss Siobhan... <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#Why does life slumber}Why do you think birds fly{RUBY_E#}?</color>

C: 告诉我，过去，{RUBY_B#我}你{RUBY_E#}是什么人？
E: Tell me, {RUBY_B#who am I}who were you{RUBY_E#} in the past?

C: 可是，我仍然会去喜欢类似的小东西。
E: Yet I can't help but love these little things.

C: 代表你是不同的，唯一的，你做到了从未有人做过的事。
E: It means you're different, unique... You've done something no one has ever done before.

C: 我想知道，你和我过去的故事。
E: I want to know our story from the past.

C: 你能看到烟花的。
E: You'll be able to see the fireworks.

C: {NICKNAME}…烟花……
E: {NICKNAME}... Fireworks...

C: 不，不是无法弥补……
E: No... It's not beyond saving...

C: 我能够拨转命运，成全缺憾。世界给我们的命运，立下一个终点，那它至少，要补偿给流萤…她想要的花束。
E: I can change the course of destiny and make up for what's missing. If the world has set an endpoint for our destiny, then at the very least... it owes Firefly the bouquet she wanted.

C: 你还没有觉悟吗…我知道你会这么说，毕竟我已经历过无数次。
E: Don't you understand?... I knew you'd say that, because I've been through this too many times.

C: 操船的流程大同小异。你们离开岸边，很快就逼近了河心。平静的水面顿时掀起巨浪，将你们拍入水中。看来神权并非凡人所能模仿。
E: The sailing procedure was pretty much the same. You left the shore and quickly approached the middle of the river. The calm water suddenly erupted into massive waves, throwing you all overboard. Seems like divine authority isn't something mortals can imitate.

C: 你怎么爬上去的？
E: How did you get up here?

C: 打服所有桶。
E: Defeat all the cans.

C: 被蛀空的星空，沦为虫群孵育子嗣的卵床…梦境向你展示了一段残酷的回忆。
E: The hollowed-out starscape, reduced to a breeding ground for the Swarm's offsprings... The dreamscape revealed a cruel memory to you.

C: 请选择你的英雄！
E: Select your hero!

C: 既然你诚心诚意地提问了，*我们*就大发慈悲地告诉你——
E: Since you asked so sincerely, we shall tell you graciously—

C: 随着轮次数提升，商店中会出现更高稀有度的奇美拉。
E: As the number of Cycles increases, higher rarity chimeras will appear in the Store.

C: 拥有【生命计数】的单位<color=#f29e38ff>受到攻击时</color>不会损失生命值，但是会减少【生命计数】。【生命计数】<color=#f29e38ff>归零时</color>单位将陷入无法战斗状态。<color=#f29e38ff>治疗</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>护盾</color>效果无法避免【生命计数】减少。
E: Units with "HP Count" will not lose HP <color=#f29e38ff>when attacked</color>, but their "HP Count" will decrease instead. When the "HP Count" <color=#f29e38ff>reaches zero</color>, the unit will be knocked down. <color=#f29e38ff>Healing</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Shield</color> effects cannot prevent "HP Count" reduction.

C: 获取觅宝券
E: Obtain Treasure Hunt Ticket

C: 每消耗#1点开拓力可获得一张<icon SpritePath=SpriteOutput/ItemCurrency/300057.png id=0 Height=1 color=ffffff>
E: For every #1 Trailblaze Power consumed, obtain one <icon SpritePath=SpriteOutput/ItemCurrency/300057.png id=0 Height=1 color=ffffff>

C: 改变来时的路，有这么难？
E: Is it that hard to change our past?
